Addling Blast.name: 扰乱爆破 Addling Blast
Addling Blast.description:
你爆发出一股心智能量锥形冲击，扰乱敌人的心智，使其措手不及。你对一个@Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的所有敌人造成@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[mental]]伤害，其效果取决于其@Check[will|against:eldamon]意志豁免。

在5级时，你在使用“扰乱爆破”时可以选择将锥形范围的体型增大为@Template[type:cone|distance:20]；此后每4级，你都可以将锥形范围再增大额外5尺，至17级时最多可增大至@Template[type:cone|distance:35]{35尺}。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并在其下一回合开始前处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}与措手不及，这两者均持续至你下一回合结束。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}与措手不及，这两者均持续至你下一回合结束。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d4。

等级（+2） 伤害提高1。

You blast a cone of mental energy to muddle your foes' minds and throw them off their guard. You deal @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[mental]] damage to all foes in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the cone to a @Template[type:cone|distance:20] when you use Addling Blast, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the cone by 5 additional feet, to a maximum of @Template[type:cone|distance:35]{35 feet} at 17th level.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the beginning of their next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} and offguard, both until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} and off-guard, both until the end of your next turn.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Force Jab.name: 力场刺击 Force Jab
Force Jab.description:
你从意想不到的方向以力场刺击一名敌人，将其移动到你想要的位置。对一名位于你触及内的敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[force]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败 你造成双倍力场伤害，并且你可以将敌人重新定位至多10尺并扰乱其站姿，使其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 直到你下个回合结束。

成功 你造成正常力场伤害，并且你选择将敌人重新定位5尺，或扰乱敌人的站姿，使其获得措手不及直到你下个回合结束。

失败 你未能伤害敌人，但力场仍会干扰其位置。敌人选择让你将其重新定位5尺，或扰乱其站姿，使其获得措手不及直到你下个回合结束。

大成功或大失败 你的刺击完全落空，敌人不受影响。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d8。

You jab a foe with force from an unexpected direction, moving them where you see fit. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe within your reach, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[force]] damage.

Critical Success You deal double force damage and you can reposition the foe up to 10 feet and throw off its stance, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.

Success You deal normal force damage and you choose to either reposition the foe 5 feet or to throw off the foe's stance, making it off-guard until the end of your next turn.

Failure You don't harm the foe, but the force still interferes with its positioning. The foe chooses whether to either let you reposition it 5 feet or to throw off its stance, making it off-guard until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure Your jab misses completely, and the foe is unaffected.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Healing Motes.name: 治疗微粒 Healing Motes
Healing Motes.description:
你释放出闪耀的治疗能量微粒，它们会附着在你选择的以下之一：@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内所有活与不死生物，或30尺内一个活或不死生物。若你仅以单一生物为目标，则有两枚微粒附着在该生物上。

当带有一枚或更多微粒的活生物受到伤害时，他们获得等同于2加上你等级的两倍、且最多不超过所受伤害值的同步@Damage[(2+(2*@actor.level))[healing]]{治疗}，如同恢复效果的通常规则。随后该生物身上的一枚微粒消失。

当带有一枚或更多微粒的不死生物受到伤害时，他们也会因微粒受到@Damage[(2+(2*@actor.level))[vitality]]伤害，随后该不死生物身上的一枚微粒消失。否则，微粒会持续到你的下一个回合。不死生物获得一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免以尝试在一开始就避开微粒，其效果如下。

大成功或大失败 该不死生物完全避开微粒。

成功 微粒擦过该不死生物，他们承受来自微粒的一半活力伤害。

失败 微粒附着在该不死生物上，他们承受来自微粒的完整伤害。

大成功或大失败 微粒落在该不死生物尤其脆弱的位置，他们承受来自微粒的双倍伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.1gnFsjdwbgl3jYjT]{效果：治疗微粒}

等级 (+1) 伤害增加2。

You send out glowing motes of healing energy, which latch onto your choice of either all living and undead creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], or a single living or undead creature within 30 feet. If you target only a single creature, two motes latch onto that creature.

When a living creature with one or more motes takes damage, they receive an amount of simultaneous @Damage[(2+(2*@actor.level))[healing]]{healing} equal to 2 plus twice your level, up to a maximum of the damage taken, as normal for a recovery effect. One mote on the creature then vanishes.

When an undead creature with one or more motes takes damage, they also take @Damage[(2+(2*@actor.level))[vitality]] damage from the mote, and then one mote on the undead creature vanishes. Motes otherwise last until your next turn. Undead receive a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save to attempt to avoid the motes in the first place, with the following effects.

Critical Success The undead entirely avoids the mote.

Success The mote grazes the undead, and they take half the vitality damage from the mote.

Failure The mote attaches to the undead, and they take full damage from the mote.

Critical Failure The mote lands in an especially vulnerable spot for the undead, and they take double damage from the mote.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.1gnFsjdwbgl3jYjT]{Effect: Healing Mote}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 2.

Zephyr Slash.name: 疾风斩 Zephyr Slash
Zephyr Slash.description:
你沿直线冲入敌人之中，将他们切成碎片，并扰乱其做出反应的能力。你以直线移动至多120尺，穿过任意数量的生物的空间。区域内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]]，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。未通过其反射豁免的敌人直到你回合结束前都不能使用反应动作，包括任何由你的移动触发的反应动作；而反射豁免大失败的敌人直到你下个回合结束前都不能使用反应动作。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d8。

You rush in a straight line through your foes, slicing them to pieces and destabilizing their ability to react. You move in a line up to 120 feet, moving through any number of creatures' spaces. Foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. Foes that fail their Reflex save save can't use reactions until the end of your turn, including any reaction triggered by your movement, and foes that critically fail their Reflex save can't use reactions until the end of your next turn.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Billowing Terror.name: 翻涌恐怖 Billowing Terror
Billowing Terror.description:
你以纯粹的恐惧环绕自身，恐惧翻涌扩散，使你的敌人陷入惊慌。处于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人受到一半伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该敌人受到全额伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 该敌人受到双倍伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

等级（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

You surround yourself with pure terror, which billows out and throws your foes into a panic. Foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The foe takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Flurry.name: 连击 Flurry
Flurry.description:
你抛出一阵雪、雨夹雪与寒冷的乱流，使生物颤栗。你对位于 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 内的所有生物造成等同于 @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[cold]] 的寒冷伤害，其效果取决于它们的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。

在第5等级时，你使用乱流时可以选择将线的体型增加至 @Template[type:line|distance:40]，此后每4个等级你都可以将线的体型再增加10尺，至第17等级时最大为70尺。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 1}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4}。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1。

You fling a flurry of snow, sleet, and cold, chilling creatures. You deal an amount of cold damage equal to @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[cold]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:30], with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the line to a @Template[type:line|distance:40] when you use Flurry, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the line by 10 additional feet, to a maximum of 70 feet at 17th level.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 1}.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Kamaitachi.name: 镰鼬 Kamaitachi
Kamaitachi.description:
你召唤一只强大的剥皮尘暴魔鬼，拥有传说黄鼠狼般的凶残韧性。尘暴魔鬼出现在1,000英尺内，占据一个15英尺×15英尺的区域，体型类似于一只巨型生物，并持续存在直到你刷新。在使用此力量之后立即，以及在你每个回合开始时，你都可以使用一个带有专注（特征）的自由动作（）将尘暴魔鬼向任意方向移动至多60英尺（包括垂直方向），但如果尘暴魔鬼曾移动到距离你的位置超过1,000英尺以外，它就会消散。所有进入尘暴魔鬼@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]范围内的敌人都会受到@Damage[floor(@actor.level/2)d10[slashing]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免；无论他们靠近尘暴魔鬼多少次，每轮只会受到一次伤害。如果尘暴魔鬼在移动过程中与某位盟友的空间相交，并且该盟友自愿，尘暴魔鬼可以将该盟友举起，并在其移动结束时把盟友安置在其结束移动时所处的某个空间中。尘暴魔鬼一次最多可举起1名巨型盟友、2名大型盟友，或4名中型或更小体型的盟友。

等级（20级） 伤害提高1d10。

You conjure a powerful flensing dust devil with the vicious tenacity of a legendary weasel. The dust devil appears within 1,000 feet, occupies a 15-foot by 15-foot area, similar to the size of a Huge creature, and lasts until you refresh. Just after using this power, and then again at the beginning of each of your turns, you can use a free action, which has the concentrate trait, to move the dust devil up to 60 feet in any direction, including vertically, though the dust devil dies out if it ever moves more than 1,000 feet from your position. All foes that come within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] of the dust devil take @Damage[floor(@actor.level/2)d10[slashing]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save; they take damage only once per round, regardless of how many times they come near the dust devil. If the dust devil intersects with an ally's space during its movement, and the ally is willing, the dust devil can lift the ally up, depositing them in one of the spaces when it ends its movement. The dust devil can lift up to 1 Huge ally, 2 Large allies, or 4 Medium or smaller allies at a time.

Level (20th) The damage increases by 1d10.

Boulder Smash.name: 巨石粉碎 Boulder Smash
Boulder Smash.description:
你创造一块与身体相连的巨大巨石，猛击一名敌人，同时用巨石阻挡攻击。对触及内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]] 伤害。你获得 +2 环境加值至 AC，直到你下个回合开始。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍伤害。

成功 你对目标造成正常伤害。

失败 巨石未能直接命中，但一次擦击使目标受到 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]]。

大失败 巨石完全打空。

等级（+1） 伤害提高 1d8，或在失败时提高 1。

You create a huge boulder attached to your body and smash a foe while using the boulder to block attacks. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe within your reach, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]] damage. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC until the beginning of your next turn.

Critical Success You deal double damage to the target.

Success You deal normal damage to the target.

Failure The boulder doesn't connect directly, but a glancing blow deals the target @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]].

Critical Failure The boulder misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Heart of Darkness.name: 黑暗之心 Heart of Darkness
Heart of Darkness.description:
你召唤出一颗脉动的黑暗之心，它不断脉动并在一次巨大的爆发中炸裂。黑暗之心出现在500尺内，并以@Template[type:burst|distance:30]爆炸，依据其@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免，对区域内每个生物造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]]伤害。

只要任意敌人受到伤害，你的心便因黑暗的力量而涌动，你成为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}，并在所有豁免与技能检定上获得+1状态加值；两者均持续至你下个回合结束。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并在你下个回合结束前处于@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并在你下个回合结束前处于@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并在你下个回合结束前处于@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 3}。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.idVFUK9JA6hklgE7]{效果: 黑暗之心}

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You call forth a pulsing heart of darkness which pulses and explodes in a massive burst. The heart appears within 500 feet and explodes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30], dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage to each creature in the area, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

As long as any foes take damage, your heart surges with the power of darkness, and you become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} and gain a +1 status bonus on all saving throws and skill checks, which both last until the end of your next turn.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3} until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.idVFUK9JA6hklgE7]{Effect: Heart of Darkness}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Entrench.name: 固守 Entrench
Entrench.description:
需求 你正站在坚实的表面上

你将自己牢牢钉入地面并使自己无法移动，使敌人更难移动你或从你身边通过。你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}状态，并且针对试图移动你的效果，你的豁免和DC获得+4状态加值；而“固守”会对这些效果进行一次反制检定，其反制调整值等于你的力量DC – 10，反制等级等于你等级的一半（向上取整）。

此外，你触及内的所有方格对你的敌人而言都是困难地形，并且当一名敌人在其移动期间从你触及外的方格进入你的触及时，他们必须成功通过一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]强韧豁免来对抗你的力量DC，否则他们的移动结束。

这些效果将持续到你刷新为止，或直到你不再处于无法移动状态为止，或直到你移动为止，或直到你选择以自由动作（）结束它们为止——以最先发生者为准。

Requirements You are standing on a solid surface

You entrench yourself into the ground and immobilize yourself, making it difficult for foes to move you or move past you. You're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and gain a +4 status bonus to saving throws and DCs against effects that attempt to move you, and Entrench attempts a counteract check against those effects with a counteract modifier equal to your power DC – 10 and a counteract level equal to half your level rounded up.

Additionally, all squares within your reach are difficult terrain for your foes and when a foe enters your reach from a square outside your reach during their movement, they must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save against your power DC or their movement ends.

These effects last until you refresh, until you are no longer immobilized, until you move, or until you choose to end them as a free action, whichever comes first.

Deathtouch.name: 死触 Deathtouch
Deathtouch.description:
你接触一个生物，将该生物送入死亡的严酷怀抱。对你触及范围内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d10[void]] 伤害。

大成功 你的接触欢迎该生物投入死亡的怀抱，对目标造成双倍虚空伤害。

成功 你的接触将该生物推向更接近死亡的一步，对目标造成正常虚空伤害。

失败 该接触只擦过该生物的身体，但即便如此也足以造成伤害。你造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[void]] 虚空伤害。

大失败 该接触完全落空，且目标未受伤害。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高 1d10，或在失败时提高 1。

You touch a creature, sending that creature to the harsh embrace of death. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe within your reach, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d10[void]] damage.

Critical Success Your touch welcomes the creature to death's embrace, dealing double void damage to the target.

Success Your touch brings the creature closer to death, dealing normal void damage to the target.

Failure The touch only manages to graze the creature's body, but even that is enough to cause harm. You deal @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[void]] void damage.

Critical Failure The touch misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d10, or 1 on a failure.

Nabu.name: 纳布 Nabu
Nabu.description:
你召唤神话中的知识源泉与文字起源，以铺天盖地的信息洪流同时袭击你的敌人。你选择的120英尺内的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于它们对 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 的意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并在你下个回合结束前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并在你下个回合结束前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3}，并在你刷新前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并在你下个回合结束前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}，并在你刷新前陷入 stupefied 2。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You call upon a mythical font of knowledge and origin of writing, assailing your foes all at once with a torrent of overwhelming information. Creatures you choose within 120 feet take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} until the end of your next turn and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until you refresh.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} until the end of your next turn and stupefied 2 until you refresh.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Glacial Curtain.name: 冰川帷幕 Glacial Curtain
Glacial Curtain.description:
你在战场上描绘出一幕寒冷帷幕，令穿越者为之战栗。你创造一面厚度为5英尺的寒冷帷幕，高度最高10英尺，长度最长为直线上的 @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet}，并在120英尺内感召出这道帷幕。任何穿过帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据帷幕区域的生物，都会受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]] 伤害，并变为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}。该帷幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

每个生物在其每个回合中只会从“冰川帷幕”受到一次冷伤害，即使它在回合开始时位于帷幕中，随后又穿过帷幕，或在同一回合中多次穿越帷幕也是如此。

等级 (+2) 伤害提高1d6。

You trace a curtain of cold across the battlefield, chilling those who cross it. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of cold up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet} long in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes cold damage from Glacial Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Elemental Shot.name: 元素射击 Elemental Shot
Elemental Shot.description:
你从远处向一名敌人射出一支箭、一发子弹，或一道由元素物质或能量构成的射线。对60英尺内的一名敌人进行一次@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击检定}，造成@Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[untyped]]点与你的元素相关类型的伤害，其效果取决于你的攻击掷骰。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍伤害。

成功 你对目标造成正常伤害。

失败 你的射击仅仅擦到目标，造成@Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[untyped]]点伤害。

大失败 你的射击完全落空。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6，或在失败时增加1点。

You shoot an arrow, bullet, or ray of elemental matter or energy at a foe from a distance. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[untyped]] damage of the type associated with your element, with effects depending on your attack roll.

Critical Success You deal double damage to the target.

Success You deal normal damage to the target.

Failure Your shot barely grazes the target, dealing @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[untyped]] damage.

Critical Failure Your shot misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1 on a failure.

Refreshing Field.name: 复苏力场 Refreshing Field
Refreshing Field.description:
你召唤周围的木之元素能量并在你周围种下一片领域，你刷新你的力量，然后在你周围30英尺的放射范围内播种。

You call upon surrounding wood elemental energies and plant a field around you, You Refresh your powers and then sow in a 30-foot emanation around you.

Fan of Flames.name: 焰扇 Fan of Flames
Fan of Flames.description:
你唤起一扇火焰之扇，穿过附近的敌人并散布火势。你对@Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的所有生物造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] 伤害，并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

如果锥形范围内的任何生物正因你的火力量而承受持续火伤害，则除非它们在其反射豁免中获得重度成功，否则它们会将该持续火伤害传播给锥形范围内所有离你更远的其他生物。

在第5等级时，当你使用“火焰扇”时，你可以选择将锥形范围的体型增加到@Template[type:cone|distance:20]，并且此后每4个等级你都可以将锥形范围的体型再增加5英尺，在第17等级时最多增加到35英尺。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You call forth a fan of flames, blazing through nearby foes and spreading fires. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

If any creatures in the cone are taking persistent fire damage from your fire powers, they spread that persistent fire damage to all other creatures in the cone that are farther away from you unless they critically succeed at their Reflex save.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the cone to a @Template[type:cone|distance:20] when you use Fan of Flames, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the cone by 5 additional feet, to a maximum of 35 feet at 17th level.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Blade of Light.name: 光之刃 Blade of Light
Blade of Light.description:
你召出一把光之刃并刺向你的敌人，用光环绕其身，并将其周遭的任何光为你所用。你对一名在你触及范围内的敌人造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[fire]] 伤害。结果取决于你的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}。如果该敌人处于显映的状态，则其在对抗此次攻击时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

大成功 你造成双倍火伤害，且敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 状态，直到你下个回合结束。

成功 你造成正常火伤害，且敌人处于显映的状态，直到你下个回合结束。

失败 你的刀刃未能命中，但敌人必须选择让此次攻击擦过，或在光刃从其眼前呼啸而过时变得目眩。敌人处于显映的状态，直到你下个回合结束。此外，其选择承受 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[fire]] 伤害，或获得目眩状态直到你下个回合结束。

大失败 你的光之刃完全落空，且目标毫发无伤。

等级（+1） 伤害增加 1d8，或在失败时增加 1。

You bring out a blade of light and stab your foe, wreathing them in light and using any light surrounding them to your advantage. You deal @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[fire]] damage to a foe within reach. The results depend on your @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll}. If the foe is limned, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the attack.

Critical Success You deal double fire damage and the foe is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of your next turn.

Success You deal normal fire damage and the foe is limned until the end of your next turn.

Failure Your blade misses, but the foe must either let the attack graze or become dazzled as it whizzes past their eyes. The foe is limned until the end of your next turn. Additionally, they choose whether to take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[fire]] damage or to be dazzled until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure Your blade of light misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Jumbling Threads.name: 杂乱线头 Jumbling Threads
Jumbling Threads.description:
你在一个锥形区域内喷射出力场丝线，袭击你的敌人并在区域内将它们搅乱。你对一个@Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的所有敌人造成@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 +ceil(@actor.level/2))[force]]伤害，其效果取决于它们的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免。

在第5等级时，你在使用“乱线之丝”时可以选择将锥形的体型增加为@Template[type:cone|distance:20]，此后每4个等级你都可以将锥形的体型再增加5尺，在第17等级时最高可达35尺。

锥形内的盟友不会受到伤害，并且如果他们愿意，你可以将他们重新定位，最多移动10尺到锥形内的另一个空间。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并且你可以将其重新定位，最多移动5尺到锥形内的另一个空间。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且你可以将其重新定位，最多移动10尺到锥形内的另一个空间。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1。

You spray threads of force in a cone, assailing your foes and jumbling them through the area. You deal @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 +ceil(@actor.level/2))[force]] damage to all foes in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the cone to a @Template[type:cone|distance:20] when you use Jumbling Threads, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the cone by 5 additional feet, to a maximum of 35 feet at 17th level.

Allies in the cone take no damage, and if they're willing, you can reposition them up to 10 feet to another space within the cone.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and you can reposition them up to 5 feet to another space within the cone.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and you can reposition them up to 10 feet to another space within the cone.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Icicle.name: 冰锥 Icicle
Icicle.description:
你向你的敌人发射一枚冰锥。对60英尺内的一个敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[((2+@actor.level)d4)[cold],(2+@actor.level)[piercing]] 伤害。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍寒冷伤害，并且目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4}。

成功 你对目标造成正常寒冷伤害，并且目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}。

失败 冰锥从生物附近掠过，残留的寒意使目标受到 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[cold]] 伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 1}。

大失败 冰锥完全未命中。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4，或在失败时增加1。

等级（+2） 正常伤害增加1。

You fire an icicle at your foe. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[((2+@actor.level)d4)[cold],(2+@actor.level)[piercing]] damage.

Critical Success You deal double cold damage to the target, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4}.

Success You deal normal cold damage to the target, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}.

Failure The icicle passes near the creature, and the lingering chill causes the target to take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[cold]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 1}.

Critical Failure The icicle misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1 on a failure.

Level (+2) The normal damage increases by 1.

Steal Breath.name: 窃取吐息 Steal Breath
Steal Breath.description:
你吸入气息，汲取附近生物的生命力。你对所有位于一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[void]] 伤害，其效果取决于它们的强韧豁免。

在第9等级，当你使用窃取吐息时，你可以选择将锥形范围的体型增加到一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:20]；在第17等级，你则可以改为选择将锥形范围的体型增加到最多一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:25]。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物挣扎但维持住其生命力，受到一半伤害，并在其下一回合结束前进行的下一次攻击上获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害并获得虚弱1，持续1轮，因为你抽离了它的一部分力量。

大失败 你造成双倍虚空伤害，且目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2} 持续1轮，并获得虚弱1持续1分钟，因为你抽离了它的大量力量。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d4。

You breathe in, drawing in the life force of nearby creatures. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[void]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], with effects depending on their Fortitude save.

At 9th level, you can choose to increase the size of the cone to a @Template[type:cone|distance:20] when you use Steal Breath, and at 17th level, you can instead choose to increase the size of the cone to a maximum of a @Template[type:cone|distance:25].

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature struggles but maintains its life force, taking half damage, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} on the next attack it makes before the end of its next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is enfeebled 1 for 1 round, as you draw away some of its strength.

Critical Failure You deal double void damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round and enfeebled 1 for 1 minute as you draw away much of its strength.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Eclipsing Embrace.name: 蚀影拥抱 Eclipsing Embrace
Eclipsing Embrace.description:
你用一层光滑的蚀暗黑暗包裹自身，这层黑暗会黏附并笼罩那些攻击你的人，使他们寒彻入骨。

直到你刷新为止，相邻的敌人以近战攻击命中你时，以及敌人接触你或以徒手攻击命中你时，会受到 @Damage[@actor.level[cold]] 伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1} 状态，持续至其回合结束。你处于笼罩的状态时，寒冷伤害增加你等级的一半。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1点。

You surround yourself with a slick layer of eclipsing darkness, which latches onto and enshrouds those who attack you, chilling them to the bone.

Until you refresh, adjacent foes that hit you with a melee attack, as well as foes that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take @Damage[@actor.level[cold]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of their turn. While you're shrouded, the cold damage increases by half your level.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Psychic Thrust.name: 灵能推撞 Psychic Thrust
Psychic Thrust.description:
你从远处将灵能灌入一名敌人，压垮其心智。对60英尺内的一名敌人进行一次@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰}，造成@Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[mental]]伤害。

大成功你对敌人造成双倍的精神伤害，且敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3}直到你下个回合结束。

成功你对敌人造成正常的精神伤害，且敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}直到你下个回合结束。

失败这股灵能冲击几乎触及你的敌人，擦过其心智，削弱其思绪但未造成任何实际伤害。其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}直到你下个回合结束。

大失败灵能冲击完全落空。

等级（+1）伤害提高1d6。

You thrust psychic energy into a foe from a distance to overwhelm their mind. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[mental]] damage.

Critical Success You deal double mental damage to the foe, and the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} until the end of your next turn.

Success You deal normal mental damage to the foe, and the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The thrust of psychic energy comes close enough to your foe to graze their mind, weakening their thoughts without dealing any real damage. They are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The psychic thrust misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Sicken Unto Death.name: 病至死亡 Sicken Unto Death
Sicken Unto Death.description:
你将浓缩的死亡能量灌注入一个生物，使其在死灵能量涌遍全身时变得恶心。选择30尺内的一个生物。该生物受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[persistent,void]] 伤害，并可能变为恶心，其效果取决于该生物的强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半的持续虚空伤害，且不会变为恶心。除正常的纯骰检定外，它们还可以通过干呕来移除持续伤害：以单动作并在对抗你的力量DC的强韧豁免中成功（类似于恶心（状态））。

失败 该生物受到全额持续虚空伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1（状态）}。如果它从恶心（状态）中恢复，则持续伤害结束。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍持续虚空伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2（状态）}。如果它从恶心（状态）中恢复，则持续伤害结束。

等级 (+2) 持续伤害增加1d4。

You infuse concentrated death energy into a creature, sickening it as necrotic energies flood through its body. Choose a creature within 30 feet. The creature takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[persistent,void]] damage and might become sickened, with effects depending on the creature's Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half the persistent void damage and isn't sickened. In addition to the normal flat checks, they can remove the persistent damage by retching, as a single action, and succeeding at a Fortitude save against your power DC (similarly to the sickened condition).

Failure The creature takes full persistent void damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. If it recovers from the sickened condition, the persistent damage ends.

Critical Failure The creature takes double persistent void damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}. If it recovers from the sickened condition, the persistent damage ends.

Level (+2) The persistent damage increases by 1d4.

Mjollnir.name: 妙尔尼尔 Mjollnir
Mjollnir.description:
你将一柄闪电之锤投向空气中，它会漂浮在空中，水平最远可达120尺，且可高于地面最远60尺。在你每个回合结束时，这柄锤会向其正下方垂直方向且水平60尺内的所有敌人射出闪电，造成 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] 伤害，进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。此锤将持续存在，直到你刷新。

等级（20级） 伤害增加1d12。

You hurl a hammer of lightning into the air, where it floats, up to 120 feet away laterally and up to 60 feet above the ground. At the end of each of your turns, the hammer shoots lightning at all your foes below it vertically and within 60 feet laterally, dealing @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. The hammer lasts until you refresh.

Level (20th) The damage increases by 1d12.

Phrenic Curtain.name: 膈幕 Phrenic Curtain
Phrenic Curtain.description:
你在战场上划出一幕荡漾的精神能量帷幕，伤害并令穿过它的敌人陷入困惑。你创造一道5英尺厚的精神能量帷幕，高至10英尺，长度最长为@Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long}，呈一直线，并在120英尺内感召出这道帷幕。任何穿过帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据帷幕区域的生物，都会受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[mental]]伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，直到其下一回合开始。帷幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

在每个生物的每个回合中，它只会从“Phrenic Curtain”受到一次精神伤害与困惑效果，即使它在回合开始时位于帷幕中随后又穿过帷幕，或多次穿过帷幕也是如此。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You trace a curtain of rippling mental energy across the battlefield, damaging and stupefying foes that move through. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of mental energy up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long} in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[mental]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the beginning of their next turn. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes mental damage and the stupefied effect from Phrenic Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Shining Guidance.name: 闪耀的引导 Shining Guidance
Shining Guidance.description:
你召来一道指引之光环绕你的敌人，引导你的攻击指向他们。选择一名40尺内的敌人。你造成 @Damage[((2+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]] 火伤害，其效果取决于他们的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 你对该敌人造成一半火伤害，且该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的} 状态，直到你下个回合结束。你可以选择改为不对该敌人造成任何火伤害而非造成一半伤害；若你如此选择，则只要其仍处于显映的状态，你和你的盟友在对该敌人进行攻击掷骰时获得+1环境加值，直到你下个回合结束。

失败 你对该敌人造成全额火伤害，且该敌人处于显映的状态，直到你下个回合结束。在此期间，只要其仍处于显映的状态，你和你的盟友在对该敌人进行攻击掷骰时获得+1环境加值。

大失败 你对该敌人造成双倍火伤害，且该敌人处于显映的状态，直到你下下个回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你的回合结束）。在此期间，只要其仍处于显映的状态，你和你的盟友在对该敌人进行攻击掷骰时获得+1环境加值。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。
等级（+2） 常规伤害增加1。

You call forth a guiding light to surround your foe and guide your attacks toward them. Choose a foe within 40 feet. You deal @Damage[((2+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success You deal half fire damage to the foe, and the foe is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn. You can choose to deal no fire damage to the foe instead of half damage; if you choose to do so, you and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus on attack rolls against the foe until the end of your next turn, as long as it remains limned.

Failure You deal full fire damage to the foe, and the foe is limned until the end of your next turn. During that time, as long as it remains limned, you and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus on attack rolls against the foe.

Critical Failure You deal double fire damage to the foe, and the foe is limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn). During that time, as long as it remains limned, you and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus on attack rolls against the foe.

Level (+1) The damage increased by 1d4.
Level (+2) The normal damage increases by 1.

Flame Whip.name: 火焰鞭 Flame Whip
Flame Whip.description:
你用一条由烟雾与火焰形成的长鞭猛击你的敌人。进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，对一个距离你比你正常触及远至多5尺的敌人（若你的触及为5尺，则通常为10尺）进行攻击，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[fire]] 伤害，以及 @Damage[(3+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[persistent,fire]] 伤害。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍火伤害与持续火伤害。

成功 你对目标造成正常火伤害与持续火伤害。

失败 长鞭未命中，不造成火伤害，但少许余烬点燃了目标，造成 @Damage[(floor((3+(floor(@actor.level/2)))/2))[persistent,fire]] 伤害。

大失败 长鞭完全落空，目标毫发无伤。

等级（+1）伤害提高1d8。

等级（+2）持续火伤害提高1点。

You lash out at your foe with a whip formed of smoke and flame. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe up to 5 feet farther away from you than your normal reach (typically 10 feet if you have a 5 foot reach), dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[fire]] damage, as well as @Damage[(3+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[persistent,fire]] damage.

Critical Success You deal double fire damage and persistent fire damage to the target.

Success You deal normal fire damage and persistent fire damage to the target.

Failure The whip misses, dealing no fire damage, but a few embers ignite the target, dealing @Damage[(floor((3+(floor(@actor.level/2)))/2))[persistent,fire]] damage.

Critical Failure The whip misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d8.

Level (+2) The persistent fire damage increases by 1.

Storm Spiral.name: 风暴螺旋 Storm Spiral
Storm Spiral.description:
你用无数电击锥体环绕自身，形成一场毁灭性的旋转风暴。选择创造1到4个锥体，其体型由你决定，范围在15到60英尺之间。若你创造4个锥体并将它们放置得彼此不重叠，它们将完全环绕你；若你为中型或更小体型，这相当于地面高度的放射。你对至少位于其中一个锥体内的所有生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

豁免失败的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 状态，持续至你下一回合结束；大失败的生物将震慑2轮。即使某个生物处于多个锥体的区域内，它仍只会受到一次伤害。

选择一项：

  • 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 状态
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，锥体的最大体型可以提高至120英尺。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d10

You surround yourself with numerous cones of electricity in a swirling storm of destruction. Choose to create between one and four cones of your choice of size between 15 and 60 feet. If you create four cones and place them so they don't overlap, they surround you completely; if you're Medium or smaller, this is akin to an emanation at ground level. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] damage to all creatures within at least one of the cones, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Creatures who fail the save become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} until the end of your next turn, and creatures who critically fail become shocked for 2 rounds. Even if a creature is in the area of multiple cones, they still only take damage once.

Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, the cones can have a maximum size up to 120 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d10

Water Curtain.name: 水帘 Water Curtain
Water Curtain.description:
你在战场上划出一道水幕，伤害敌人并如波浪般移动，将生物一同推移。你创造一道5尺厚的水幕，高至10尺，长度为直线上的至多@Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long}，并在120尺内感召这道水幕出现。任何穿过水幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据水幕区域的生物，都会受到@Damage[(max((ceil(@actor.level/2)),6))d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。水幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

在每个生物的每个回合中，即使它在回合开始时位于水幕内随后又穿过水幕，或多次穿过水幕，它也只会从力场帷幕获得一次钝击伤害与重定位效果。对没有游泳速度的生物而言，水幕属于强效困难地形，但它足够薄，生物可以将穿过或离开水幕作为一次疾走的一部分完成，而无需游泳。穿过水幕的物理远程攻击承受–2环境减值；位于水幕内或水幕另一侧的生物，对需要进入或穿过水幕才能命中它们的酸与火攻击获得抗力5。

高潮：在你的回合结束时，你可以选择将水幕从你创造它时的初始位置向远处移动至多10尺。若你如此做，水幕中的生物，或在其移动期间进入水幕的生物，会随水幕一同移动。

低潮：在你的回合结束时，你可以选择将水幕朝向你创造它时的初始位置移动至多10尺。若你如此做，水幕中的生物，或在其移动期间进入水幕的生物，会随水幕一同移动。

等级（+2）伤害提高1d6。

You trace a curtain of water across the battlefield, damaging foes and moving like a wave, pushing creatures along with it. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of water up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long} in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(max((ceil(@actor.level/2)),6))d6[bludgeoning]] damage. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes bludgeoning damage and the reposition effect from Force Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times. While the curtain is greater difficult terrain for creatures without a swim Speed, it's thin enough that creatures can cross or exit the curtain as part of a Stride, without needing to Swim. Physical ranged attacks through the curtain take a –2 circumstance penalty, and creatures within or on the other side of the curtain gain resistance 5 to acid and fire attacks that need to enter or cross the curtain to reach them.

High Tide: At the end of your turn, you can choose to move the curtain up to 10 feet away from your initial position when you created it. If you do, creatures in the curtain, or who enter the curtain during its movement, move along with it.

Low Tide: At the end of your turn, you can choose to move the curtain up to 10 feet toward your initial position when you created it. If you do, creatures in the curtain, or who enter the curtain during its movement, move along with it.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Arboreal Curtain.name: 树幕 Arboreal Curtain
Arboreal Curtain.description:
你在战场上召唤一幕荆棘与木质帷幕，刺穿穿越它的目标。你创造一条厚度5英尺的荆棘帷幕，高度最高10英尺，长度为一条直线，最长可达 @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long}，并在120英尺内感召出该帷幕。该帷幕提供标准掩蔽。任何穿越帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据帷幕区域的生物，都会受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[piercing]] 伤害。该帷幕持续存在直到你刷新。

每个生物在其每个回合中只会因林木帷幕的穿刺伤害受击一次，即使它在回合开始时位于帷幕中随后又穿越帷幕，或多次穿越帷幕。

选择播种或收获其一。

  • 播种：你在区域内播种，创造出极其浓密的荆棘与植物，使该区域成为强效困难地形，而非播种时的正常困难地形。

  • 收获：你在区域内收获，使荆棘在帷幕提供更多掩蔽时造成流血。该帷幕提供强效掩蔽而非标准掩蔽。若某生物穿过帷幕且至少经过1个已收获的方格，则其还会受到 @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。
    该持续流血伤害在13级时提高至 @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]]，在17级时提高至 @Damage[1d10[persistent,bleed]]。

等级（+2）该伤害提高1d6。

等级（13级）该持续伤害提高至1d8。

等级（17级）该持续伤害提高至1d10。

You call forth a curtain of thorns and wood across the battlefield, piercing those who cross it. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of thorns up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long} in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. The curtain provides standard cover. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[piercing]] damage. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes piercing damage from Arboreal Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in the area, creating such thick thorns and plants that the area becomes greater difficult terrain, instead of the normal difficult terrain when sowing.

  • Harvest: You harvest in the area, making the thorns cause bleeding as the curtain provides more cover. The curtain provides greater cover instead of standard cover. If a creature moves through the curtain and passes through at least one harvested square, they also take @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] damage.
    This persistent bleed damage increases to @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]] at 13th level and @Damage[1d10[persistent,bleed]] at 17th level.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Level (13th) The persistent damage increases to 1d8.

Level (17th) The persistent damage increases to 1d10.

Galeforce Launch.name: 狂风发射 Galeforce Launch
Galeforce Launch.description:
你将自己射入风中，随后在一道劈砍般的爆炸中猛然坠地。你向空气中飞行至多30尺，无论你通常是否拥有飞行速度，然后俯冲至200尺内的任意空间。位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的生物受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]]，并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d8。

You launch yourself into the wind and then plummet to the ground in the midst of a slashing explosion. You Fly up to 30 feet into the air, whether or not you normally have a fly Speed, then soar down to any space within 200 feet. Creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Flash Freeze.name: 闪冻 Flash Freeze
Flash Freeze.description:
你将地面瞬间急冻，冻结区域内的生物，并可能使其绊倒。你选择半径至多15尺的光环内，位于地面上的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。

在7级以及之后每4级，你可选择的最大半径增加5尺，在19级时最大为35尺。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4}，且你可以选择使该生物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

大成功或大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 5}，且你可以选择使该生物倒地。

You flash freeze the ground, freezing creatures in the area and potentially causing them to trip. Creatures on the ground within an emanation with your choice of radius up to 15 feet must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

At 7th level, and every 4 levels thereafter, the largest radius you can choose increases by 5 feet, to a maximum of 35 feet at 19th level.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4} and you can choose to knock the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5} and you can choose to knock the creature prone.

Rigor Mortis.name: 尸僵 Rigor Mortis
Rigor Mortis.description:
你释放出一条僵硬的死亡之线，部分坏死其中的生物，使其身体僵硬并破坏其敏捷。你对位于@Template[type:line|distance:30]内的所有生物造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[void]]伤害，其效果取决于其强韧豁免。

在第7等级以及之后每提升4个等级，你可以将线的长度额外增加5尺，最高在第19等级时达到@Template[type:line|distance:50]。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物轻微坏死，承受一半伤害，并在其下一回合结束前获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

失败 该生物承受全部伤害，并因身体僵硬而在1轮内处于笨拙1。

大成功或大失败 你造成双倍虚空伤害，并且目标因身体变得如尸体般僵硬而在1轮内获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，并在1分钟内处于笨拙1。

等级 (+2) 持续伤害增加1d4。

You unleash a rigid line of death that partially necrotizes those within, stiffening their bodies and ruining their dexterity. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[void]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:30], with effects depending on their Fortitude save.

At 7th level, and every 4 levels thereafter, you can increase the length of the line by 5 additional feet, to a maximum of a @Template[type:line|distance:50] at 19th level.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is slightly necrotized, taking half damage, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the end of their next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is clumsy 1 for 1 round as its body stiffens.

Critical Failure You deal double void damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 round and clumsy 1 for 1 minute as its body becomes as rigid as a corpse.

Level (+2) The persistent damage increases by 1d4.

Fire Arrow.name: 火箭 Fire Arrow
Fire Arrow.description:
你射出一支纯粹的火之箭，将敌人化为灰烬。对60尺内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[fire],(1+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[persistent,fire]] 伤害。在第7等级，以及此后每4个等级，你的火之箭的射程增加30尺，在第19等级时最多达到180尺。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍火伤害。

成功 你对目标造成正常火伤害。

失败 箭矢从目标身旁掠过，但余烬仍将其点燃，造成 @Damage[(floor((1+(floor(@actor.level/2)))/2))[persistent,fire]] 伤害。

大失败 箭矢未命中，且不造成伤害。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

等级 (+2) 持续伤害增加1。

You shoot an arrow of pure fire to reduce your foe to cinders. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[fire],(1+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[persistent,fire]] damage. At 7th level, and every 4 levels thereafter, your fire arrow's range increases by 30 feet, to a maximum of 180 feet at 19th level.

Critical Success You deal double fire damage to the target.

Success You deal normal fire damage to the target.

Failure The arrow soars just past the target, but the embers still set them alight, dealing @Damage[(floor((1+(floor(@actor.level/2)))/2))[persistent,fire]] damage.

Critical Failure The arrow misses, dealing no damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Level (+2) The persistent damage increases by 1.

Aqua Punch.name: 水之重拳 Aqua Punch
Aqua Punch.description:
你以一股涌动的水重拳击打一名敌人。对触及范围内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

效果取决于你的攻击掷骰结果，以及你处于高潮还是低潮。

高潮：伤害改为 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d10[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害。

低潮：你可以对30尺内或你触及范围内的一个目标进行你的近战攻击掷骰，以较优者为准。该攻击从你在30尺内选择的一个方格发起。你仍然无法对具有完全掩蔽的目标使用水拳，并且你需要通往拳击起点的效果线，但这可能使拳击无视其他类型的掩蔽，或通过从不同方向攻击来夹击目标。攻击成功时，目标在1轮内对你进行的攻击掷骰承受–1环境减值；若为大成功，则改为承受–2环境减值。

大成功你造成双倍钝击伤害，并将目标移动20尺。

成功你造成正常钝击伤害，并将目标移动10尺。

失败你未能伤害目标，但涌动的水会移动他们，除非他们让自己失去平衡以避开它。目标选择要么让你将其移动5尺，要么扰乱其姿态，使其成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，直到你下个回合结束。

大失败你的拳击完全落空，目标不受影响。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.U2aMUOhRLnZOOZUs]{效果：水拳}

等级（+1）伤害增加1d6，或在高潮时增加1d10。

You punch a foe with a surge of water. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe within your reach, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

The effects depend on your attack roll, and whether you're in high tide or low tide.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d10[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage.

Low Tide: You can make your melee attack roll against a target within 30 feet, or within your reach, whichever is better. The attack originates from a square of your choice within 30 feet. You still can't use Aqua Punch against a target with total cover, and you need line of effect to the punch's origin point, but this might allow the punch to ignore other types of cover or to flank a target by attacking from a different direction. On a successful attack, the target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to their attack rolls against you for 1 round, and on a critical success, they take a –2 circumstance penalty instead.

Critical Success You deal double bludgeoning damage and you move the target 20 feet.

Success You deal normal bludgeoning damage and you move the target 10 feet.

Failure You don't harm the target, but the surge of water moves them unless they throw themselves off-balance to avoid it. The target chooses whether to either let you move them 5 feet or to throw off their stance, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure Your punch misses completely, and the target is unaffected.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.U2aMUOhRLnZOOZUs]{Effect: Aqua Punch}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d10 on high tide.

Life Shackles.name: 生命 镣铐群岛 Life Shackles
Life Shackles.description:
你使敌人的生命力在其周围凝结成镣铐，将其束缚住。位于一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的活敌人会根据其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免以及其当前生命值而受到影响。

大成功或大失败 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人被自身的生命力轻微束缚。若其处于最大生命值，则其为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑（状态） 3}；否则其为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑（状态） 2}。其可以选择失去等同于你等级 × 其希望降低的震慑数值的生命值，以此按其选择的数额降低或移除震慑（状态）的数值。

失败 同成功，但镣铐更紧：若其低于最大生命值的一半，则该敌人为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑（状态） 4}；若其高于最大生命值的一半，则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑（状态） 5}；若其处于最大生命值，则为 震慑（状态） 6。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但生命的镣铐极其紧缚，其若希望降低震慑数值，则会失去等同于 2 × 你等级 × 其希望降低的震慑数值的生命值。

You cause your foes' life force to congeal around them into shackles, holding them down. Living foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] are affected depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save and their current Hit Points.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe is slightly shackled by their own life force. If at maximum Hit Points, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}, and otherwise they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}. They can reduce or remove the stunned condition's value by an amount of their choice by choosing to lose a number of Hit Points equal to your level × the amount they wish to reduce the stunned value.

Failure As success, but the shackles are tighter, so the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4} if they're below half their maximum Hit Points, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 5} if above half their maximum Hit Points, and stunned 6 if they're at their maximum Hit Points.

Critical Failure As failure, but the shackles of life are extremely tight, and they lose a number of Hit Points equal to twice your level × the amount they wish to reduce the stunned value.

Stupefying Inception.name: 迟钝开端 Stupefying Inception
Stupefying Inception.description:
你接触一名敌人，将满溢的心智能量释放进其脆弱的心智，对其造成伤害并短暂削弱其心智。对触及范围内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[mental]] 伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍心智伤害，且该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3}，持续至你下个回合结束。

成功 你造成正常心智伤害，且该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}，持续至你下个回合结束。

失败 该敌人设法抵御了心智伤害，但其心智仍被短暂削弱。其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，持续至你下个回合结束。

大失败 你的接触完全落空，该敌人不受影响。

等级（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

You touch a foe and release overflowing mental energy into their vulnerable mind, damaging them and briefly weakening their mind. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe within your reach, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[mental]] damage.

Critical Success You deal double mental damage and the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} until the end of your next turn.

Success You deal normal mental damage and the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The foe manages to fight off the mental damage, but their mind is still briefly weakened. They are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure Your touch misses completely, and the foe is unaffected.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Coruscating Chain.name: 炫光链 Coruscating Chain
Coruscating Chain.description:
你创造一道电击锁链，在多个目标之间跳跃。选择250尺内的一个生物。你向该生物释放一股电击洪流，造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

除非目标在其反射豁免中大成功，否则选择一个距离前一个目标30尺内的新目标，并重复该流程，使用同一次伤害掷骰。持续进行，直到你决定停止，或某个目标在其反射豁免中大成功为止。所有目标都必须在前一个目标30尺内且在你250尺内，你不能将同一个生物作为目标超过一次，并且你必须对所有目标都有效果线。

选择一项：

  • 你要么获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 状态
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，目标可以在你500尺内且在前一个目标60尺内。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d6，或在放电时提高1d10。

You create a chain of electricity, arcing between various targets. Choose a creature within 250 feet. You unleash a torrent of electricity at the creature, dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Unless the target critically succeeds at its Reflex save, choose a new target within 30 feet of the previous target, and repeat the process, using the same damage roll. Continue until you decide to stop or a target critically succeeds at its Reflex save. All targets must be within 30 feet of the previous target and within 250 feet of you, you can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets.

Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, the targets can be within 500 feet of you and within 60 feet of the previous target.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d10 on discharge.

Disrupting Gust.name: 扰乱阵风 Disrupting Gust
Disrupting Gust.description:
你用一阵席卷四周的强风扰乱附近的敌人，将他们吹得失去平衡，从而让你可以安全地从他们身边通过。位于 @Template[type:cone|distance:25] 内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[slashing]] 伤害，其效果取决于他们对抗 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免的结果。达到7级时，你可以选择将锥形区域的体型增加为 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]；此后每提升4个等级，你都可以将锥形区域的体型再增加5尺，最高在19级时达到45尺。

大成功或大失败 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人受到一半伤害，并在2轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态。

失败 该敌人受到全部伤害，在2轮内处于off-guard状态，并且在1轮内无法使用反应动作。

大成功或大失败 该敌人受到双倍伤害，在2轮内处于off-guard状态，并且在2轮内无法使用反应动作。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You disrupt nearby foes with a widespread gust, knocking them off-balance enough to move past them safely. Foes in a @Template[type:cone|distance:25] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[slashing]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save. At 7th level, you can choose to increase the size of the cone to a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the cone by 5 additional feet, to a maximum of 45 feet at 19th level.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 2 rounds.

Failure The foe takes full damage, is off-guard for 2 rounds, and can't take reactions for 1 round.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage, is off-guard for 2 rounds, and can't take reactions for 2 rounds.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Hidden in the Mist.name: 雾中潜藏 Hidden in the Mist
Hidden in the Mist.description:
你在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]范围内创造一团蒸腾的薄雾，持续至你下个回合结束，然后你可以尝试在薄雾中进行躲藏。薄雾内的所有生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，而薄雾外的所有生物对薄雾内的生物而言变为隐蔽。你可以正常看穿薄雾，且如果你具有波感，即使你不在水下，它也会在薄雾中生效。你刷新你的力量，使你可以选择切换为高潮或低潮。

You create a cloud of vaporous mist in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] which lasts until the end of your next turn, and you can then attempt to Hide within the mist. All creatures within the mist become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the mist become concealed to creatures within it. You can see through the mist normally, and if you have wavesense, it applies within the mist, even if you aren't underwater. You Refresh your powers, which allows you to change to your choice of high tide or low tide.

Burn Out.name: 燃尽 Burn Out
Burn Out.description:
你猛然引燃火焰吞没你的敌人，在火焰逐渐减弱时造成令人难以置信的剧烈灼烧。60英尺内一名因你的火力量而承受持续火伤害的生物会受到等同于该持续火伤害数值四倍的火伤害，进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免，随后该持续火伤害结束。

You flare up your flames engulfing your foe, creating an incredible intense burn as the flames taper out. A creature within 60 feet that has persistent fire damage from your fire powers takes fire damage equal to four times the amount of that persistent fire damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save, and then the persistent fire damage ends.

Life Buffer.name: 生命缓冲 Life Buffer
Life Buffer.description:
你向30英尺内的一名生物注入一股强大的生命精华涌动，制造一个生命缓冲，以保护一名活生物或伤害一名不死生物。如果目标是活生物，他们获得1d10点临时生命值，外加你每有1个等级再获得1d10点临时生命值。这些临时生命值持续到你刷新为止。

如果他们是不死生物，他们改为承受等量的@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[vitality]] 伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.p1FSamqUxqbkr1SV]{效果：生命缓冲}

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d10。

You send a powerful surge of vital essence into a creature within 30 feet, creating a life buffer that protects a living creature or damages an undead creature. If the target is a living creature, they gain 1d10 temporary Hit Points plus an additional 1d10 temporary Hit Points for each level you have. These temporary Hit Points last until you refresh.

If they're an undead creature, they instead take the same amount of @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[vitality]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.p1FSamqUxqbkr1SV]{Effect: Life Buffer}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Dispersing Retreat.name: 驱散撤退 Dispersing Retreat
Dispersing Retreat.description:
触发 你因一个敌对动作而受到伤害

受到伤害后，你会散成空气并撤退。你将自身形态散作稀薄空气，然后疾走25尺，无视困难地形与强效困难地形。若有某个效果正使你陷入定身，散逸撤退会先尝试反制该效果，使用你的 @Check[type:eldamon|options:counteract]{反制调整值}，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。由于你散成空气，在这次移动期间，大多数反应动作（例如反应式打击）不会影响你，除非它们能对普通空气产生效果。在你的移动结束时，你恢复为正常形态。尽管你的形态近似空气，它不会挤压或压缩，因此你在疾走期间无法穿过小缝隙或其他任何实体生物无法进入的区域。

Trigger You take damage from a hostile action

After being damaged, you disperse into air and retreat. You disperse your form into thin air and then Stride 25 feet, ignoring difficult and greater difficult terrain. If an effect is immobilizing you, Dispersing Retreat first attempts to counteract that effect, using your @Check[type:eldamon|options:counteract]{counteract modifier} and half your level rounded up as your counteract level. Because you are dispersed into air, most reactions (such as Reactive Strike) don't affect you during the movement, unless they could have an effect on ordinary air. At the end of your movement, you return to your normal form. Despite your form being akin to air, it doesn't squeeze or compress, so you can't fit through small gaps or other areas that a solid creature couldn't enter during your Stride.

Rushing Refresh.name: 猛冲 刷新 Rushing Refresh
Rushing Refresh.description:
你驾驭空气的阵风移动自身，在行进时收集空气能量并将其塑造成用于刷新你的力量。Stride 至多三次。你刷新你的力量。

You carry yourself around on gusts of air, collecting air energy as you move and shaping it to refresh your powers. Stride up to three times. You Refresh your powers.

Ice Armor.name: 冰护甲 Ice Armor
Ice Armor.description:
当你刷新你的冰元素力量时，你用一层冰的保护层覆盖自己。你获得冻结 2，并获得AC+2环境加值，以及等同于你等级的临时生命值。你刷新你的力量。随后冰会迅速融化。

在你下个回合开始时，你因冰护甲获得的冻结状态降低为冻结 1，且你对AC的环境加值降低为+1。在那之后的那个回合开始时，来自冰护甲的冻结状态、AC加值以及任何剩余的临时生命值到期。

You cover yourself in a protective layer of ice as you refresh your ice elemental power. You become frozen 2 and gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and temporary Hit Points equal to your level. You Refresh your powers. The ice melts quickly thereafter.

At the beginning of your next turn, your frozen condition from Ice Armor is reduced to frozen 1, and your circumstance bonus to AC is reduced to +1. At the beginning of your turn after that, the frozen condition from Ice Armor, AC bonus, and any remaining temporary Hit Points expire.

Earthen Maul.name: 土槌 Earthen Maul
Earthen Maul.description:
你挥舞一柄由大地形成的巨大槌子，以宽阔的横扫击退数名敌人，并偏转他们对你（以及可能在附近的盟友）的攻击。对所有位于@Template[type:cone|distance:20]内的敌人进行@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}。根据你的力量攻击掷骰结果，你造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[钝击]]伤害。

大成功你对该敌人造成双倍伤害，并且你与位于你20尺内的盟友在对抗该敌人时获得强效掩蔽，持续至你下个回合开始。盟友的掩蔽取决于其当前所在位置；之后远离你的盟友会失去该掩蔽，而在你使用该力量后移动至你20尺内的盟友则获得该掩蔽。

成功你对该敌人造成正常伤害，并且你与位于你20尺内的所有盟友在对抗该敌人时获得标准掩蔽，持续至你下个回合开始。盟友的掩蔽取决于其当前所在位置；之后远离你的盟友会失去该掩蔽，而在你使用该力量后移动至你20尺内的盟友则获得该掩蔽。

失败这次挥击仅对该敌人造成擦伤，造成1点钝击伤害，外加每拥有1个等级便造成@Damage[@actor.level[钝击]]伤害，并且你在对抗该敌人时获得标准掩蔽，持续至你下个回合开始。

大失败巨槌完全落空，不过你在对抗该敌人时仍获得较弱掩蔽，持续至你下个回合开始。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d6，或在失败时增加1点。

You swing an enormous maul of earth in a wide swipe, rebuffing several foes and deflecting their attacks against you, and potentially nearby allies. Make @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack rolls} against all foes within a @Template[type:cone|distance:20]. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage, depending on the results of your power attack roll.

Critical Success You deal double damage to the foe, and you and allies within 20 feet of you gain greater cover against that foe until the beginning of your next turn. Allies' cover depends on their current position; allies who later move away from you lose the cover, and allies who move to within 20 feet after you used the power gain the cover.

Success You deal normal damage to the foe, and you and all allies within 20 feet of you gain standard cover against that foe until the beginning of your next turn. Allies' cover depends on their current position; allies who later move away from you lose the cover, and allies who move to within 20 feet after you used the power gain the cover.

Failure The swing is only a glancing blow against the foe, dealing 1 bludgeoning damage plus @Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]] damage for each level you have, and you gain standard cover against that foe until the beginning of your next turn.

Critical Failure The maul misses completely, though you still gain lesser cover against the foe until the beginning of your next turn.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1 on a failure.

Recharge.name: 充能 Recharge
Recharge.description:
你在创造复杂的电能矩阵来准备你的力量时，汲取电荷。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}，然后你刷新你的力量。

You draw upon electric charge while creating a complex matrix of electrical energy to ready your powers. You become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}, and then you Refresh your powers.

Death Pulse.name: 死亡脉冲 Death Pulse
Death Pulse.description:
你在周围脉动死亡能量，控制距离以将破坏限制在周遭环境中。你对至多30尺散发范围内的所有生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[void]] 伤害，目标进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 强韧豁免。区域内的小型非生物植物，例如草与蕨类，会枯萎并死亡。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d6。

You pulse death energy around you, controlling the distance to limit the destruction to the surrounding environment. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[void]] damage, to all creatures in an emanation up to 30 feet, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. Small non-creature plants in the area, such as grass and ferns, wither and die.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Enduring Verdure.name: 不凋青翠 Enduring Verdure
Enduring Verdure.description:
你小心地重新排列你周围的木元素能量，使其不会扰乱你播种的任何植物。你在维持所有已播种植物的同时刷新你的力量。如果你之后以不同的方式刷新，例如在遭遇结束时发生的自动刷新，它们仍会消退。

You carefully rearrange the wood elemental energy around you in a way that won't disrupt any of the plants you've sown. You Refresh your powers, while maintaining all your sowed plants. They still fade away if you refresh in a different way later, such as the automatic refresh that happens at the end of an encounter.

Leviathan.name: 利维坦 Leviathan
Leviathan.description:
你通过你的意志召唤一条神话般的水鲸蛇，它盘绕住你所有的敌人，将其短暂困在其翻涌的形而上咽囊之中，除非他们抵抗它的召唤。这头巨兽影响你周围一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:200] 内的一切。区域内所有敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，结果取决于他们的 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免。

高潮：伤害改为 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害，但直到你下个回合结束前，你的意志豁免承受 –2 减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.ozmTj0Bri31NqMEo]{效果：利维坦（高潮）}

低潮：当你将利维坦的力量拉入自身时，它赐福你以英雄般的神力。直到你下个回合结束前，你在攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免以及技能检定上获得 +2 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4oX7oo58xL8eDDvk]{效果：利维坦（低潮）}

大成功该生物不受伤害，你将其移动 5 尺。

成功该生物受到一半伤害，你将其移动 10 尺。

失败该生物受到全额伤害，你将其移动 20 尺。

大失败该生物受到双倍伤害，你将其移动 40 尺。

等级（+1）伤害提高 1d6，或在高潮时提高 1d10。

You call upon a mythical whale serpent of water through your will, and it coils around all your foes, trapping them for a brief moment within its churning metaphysical gullet unless they resist its call. The leviathan affects everything within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:200] around you. All foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage, with results depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage, but you take a –2 penalty to your Will saves until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.ozmTj0Bri31NqMEo]{Effect: Leviathan (High Tide)}

Low Tide: As you pull the leviathan's power into yourself, it blesses you with heroic might. You gain a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4oX7oo58xL8eDDvk]{Effect: Leviathan (Low Tide)}

Critical Success The creature takes no damage and you move them 5 feet.

Success The creature takes half damage and you move them 10 feet.

Failure The creature takes full damage and you move them 20 feet.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and you move them 40 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d10 on high tide.

Centripetal Barrage.name: 向心弹幕 Centripetal Barrage
Centripetal Barrage.description:
你以不规则的环形绕着你的敌人移动，将成千上万道风刃射向中心，以摧毁由你自身移动所界定的区域内所有生物。你至多疾走六次，且若可能，你的移动结束时必须位于你开始时所在的同一空间。你在移动过程中所走路径围成的区域会变成一片杀戮地带，成千上万道细小风刃在其中重叠，撕裂其内的一切。该区域内的生物承受 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] 伤害，进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。若你的移动未在原本空间结束（通常是因为你被打断，因为你不能自愿在其他地方结束），风刃会四散而出，杀戮地带随之被破坏。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高 1d8。

You circle around your foes in an irregular circuit, firing off thousands of wind blades into the center to destroy all creatures in an area defined by your own movements. Stride up to six times, ending your movement in the same space where you began if possible. The area surrounded by the path you took during your movement becomes a killing zone where the thousands of tiny wind blades overlap and rip through everything within. Creatures in that area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. If your movement doesn't end in your original space (typically due to being disrupted, since you can't end elsewhere voluntarily) the wind blades turn loose and the killing zone is ruined.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Water Gaol.name: 水牢 Water Gaol
Water Gaol.description:
你召唤一座水之牢狱来禁锢并可能淹死你的敌人。选择60尺内的一名敌人。目标所受影响取决于其 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。

若目标挣脱，牢狱会像气泡一样“啵”地破裂；否则其至多持续1分钟。当敌人被囚禁在你的水牢狱中时，它处于水下，必须屏住吐息，否则若其无法在水下呼吸便会开始窒息。此外，水牢狱还提供其他处于水下的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.other-effects.Item.TPbr1kErAAJKBi3V]{效果}：敌人处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，除非其具有游泳速度；其获得强酸与火抗力5；其进行的或对其进行的钝击与挥砍近战攻击承受–2环境减值；其进行的或对其进行的钝击与挥砍远程攻击自动未命中；且其无法使用火法术或动作。

高潮：在每个被囚禁生物的回合开始时，其会因高压而受到 @Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害。然而，维持压力会消耗你的力量。牢狱持续期间，你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}。在每个被囚禁生物的回合结束时，你可以将水牢狱移动至距离你至多30尺远的位置。此移动无视其禁足（状态）。

低潮：在每个被囚禁生物的回合结束时，你可以将水牢狱向你方向移动至多30尺。此移动无视其禁足（状态）。你获得针对被囚禁生物的强效掩蔽。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标仅被水牢狱勉强困住，因此逃脱很容易。目标陷入禁足（状态），直到其以你的力量DC为目标进行逃脱，或成功通过一次 @Check[type:athletics|dc:10] 检定以游出牢狱。

失败 目标被完全囚禁在牢狱之内。目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}，直到其以你的力量DC为目标进行逃脱。

大失败 目标被囚禁并被水压贯穿钉住。目标被水牢狱施加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}，直到其以你的力量DC为目标进行逃脱。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1。

You call forth a prison of water to immobilize and potentially drown your foe. Choose a foe within 60 feet. The target is affected depending on its @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

The gaol pops like a bubble if the target breaks free, and it otherwise lasts up to a maximum of 1 minute. While a foe is imprisoned in your water gaol, it's underwater and must hold its breath or begin suffocating unless it can breathe underwater. Additionally, the water gaol provides other @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.other-effects.Item.TPbr1kErAAJKBi3V]{effects} of being underwater: the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} unless it has a swim Speed, it gains acid and fire resistance 5, bludgeoning and slashing melee attacks it makes or that are made against it take a –2 circumstance penalty, bludgeoning and slashing ranged attacks it makes or that are made against it automatically miss, and it can't use fire spells or actions.

High Tide: At the start of each of the imprisoned creature's turns, they take @Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage from the high pressure. However, keeping up the pressure saps your strength. You're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} while the gaol lasts. At the end of each of the imprisoned creature's turns, you can move the water gaol up to 30 feet away from you. This movement ignores their immobilized condition.

Low Tide: At the end of each of the imprisoned creature's turns, you can move the water gaol up to 30 feet toward you. This movement ignores their immobilized condition. You gain greater cover against the imprisoned creature.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is barely trapped in the water gaol, so escaping is easy. The target is immobilized until it either Escapes against your power DC or succeeds at a @Check[type:athletics|dc:10] check to Swim out of the gaol.

Failure The target is imprisoned completely within the gaol. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until it Escapes against your power DC.

Critical Failure The target is imprisoned and transfixed by the water pressure. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by the water gaol until it Escapes against your power DC.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Nyctophobia.name: 夜盲恐惧症 Nyctophobia
Nyctophobia.description:
你用敌人对黑暗中未知事物的恐惧压倒敌人。选择120尺内的一名敌人。该敌人变为恐惧且笼罩的，并根据其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免承受 @Damage[@actor.level[cold,persistent]] 伤害。拥有强效黑暗视觉的生物在其豁免上获得+2环境加值，而没有黑暗视觉或弱光视野的生物在其豁免上承受–2环境减值。

大成功或大失败成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人承受一半的持续寒冷伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}，直到你下个回合结束。

失败 该敌人承受全部持续寒冷伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 2}，直到你下个回合结束，然后在持续寒冷伤害结束前获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}；若你在此期间 刷新，则笼罩的状态会提前结束。

大成功或大失败失败 该敌人承受双倍持续寒冷伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 3} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 3}，直到你下个回合结束，然后在持续寒冷伤害结束前获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}；若你在此期间 刷新，则笼罩的状态会提前结束。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1点。

You overwhelm a foe with their fear of the unknown that lies within the darkness. Choose a foe within 120 feet. The foe becomes frightened and shrouded and takes @Damage[@actor.level[cold,persistent]] damage, depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save. Creatures with greater darkvision gain a +2 circumstance bonus on their saving throw, and creatures without darkvision or low-light vision take a –2 circumstance penalty on their saving throw.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half persistent cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The foe takes full persistent cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2} until the end of your next turn, then @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the persistent cold damage ends; if you Refresh during that time, the shrouded condition ends early.

Critical Failure The foe takes double persistent cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3} until the end of your next turn, then @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the persistent cold damage ends; if you Refresh during that time, the shrouded condition ends early.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Drain Life.name: 汲取生命 Drain Life
Drain Life.description:
你从60尺内一名生物身上汲取生命力，削弱其强韧。结果取决于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功该生物的生命力坚不可摧，该生物不受影响。

成功你汲取了该生物些许生命力。该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 1}。

失败你汲取了该生物相当一部分生命力。该生物受到等同于其等级两倍的虚空伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 2}。

大成功或大失败：失败你汲取了该生物大量的生命力。该生物受到等同于其等级三倍的虚空伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 3}。

You drain the life force from a creature within 60 feet, weakening its fortitude. The results depend on its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature's life force is unassailable, and the creature is unaffected.

Success You drain a bit of the creature's life force. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Failure You drain a substantial portion of the creature's life force. The creature takes void damage equal to twice its level and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Critical Failure You drain a great deal of the creature's life force. The creature takes void damage equal to three times its level and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}.

Phantom Raid.name: 魅影突袭 Phantom Raid
Phantom Raid.description:
你分裂出无数个自己的暗影分身，攻击附近所有敌人。你120尺内的每个敌人都会受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[cold]] 伤害，结果取决于你对每个掠袭暗影进行的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}。

如果你在使用暗影突袭时处于笼罩的状态，且为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被侦测到}，你可以结束笼罩的状态以追加 @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4[precision])[cold]] 伤害（如果你仅对部分敌人处于隐藏或未被侦测到，你仍然可以做出此选择，但那些正在观察你的敌人不会受到额外的精准伤害）。

大成功或大失败：成功 敌人受到双倍寒冷伤害（以及精准伤害，若有）。

成功 敌人受到全额寒冷伤害（以及精准伤害，若有）。

失败 攻击稍稍偏离目标。敌人受到一半寒冷伤害，且不会受到任何精准伤害。

大成功或大失败：失败 攻击落空。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You split off countless shadow duplicates of yourself to attack all nearby foes. Each foe within 120 feet of you takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[cold]] damage, with results depending on your @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack rolls} for each of the raiding shadows.
