If you were shrouded and either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} when you used Shadow Raid, you can end the shrouded condition to add @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4[precision])[cold]] damage (if you were hidden or undetected to only some of your foes, you can still make this choice, but the foes who were observing you don't take the additional precision damage).

Critical Success The foe takes double cold damage (and precision damage, if any).

Success The foe takes full cold damage (and precision damage, if any).

Failure The attack is slightly off the mark. The foe takes half cold damage and doesn't take any precision damage.

Critical Failure The attack misses.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Intrusive Analysis.name: 侵入式分析 Intrusive Analysis
Intrusive Analysis.description:
你侵入敌人的心智，对其造成伤害，并让你在短时间内预测他们的每个动作。选择一名60尺内的敌人。其受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于其进行的 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害，且你对抗该敌人的AC与豁免获得+1环境加值，直到你下个回合开始。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，且你对抗该敌人的力量攻击掷骰、AC与豁免获得+1环境加值，直到你刷新。

大失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，且你对抗该敌人的力量攻击掷骰、AC与豁免获得+2环境加值，直到你刷新。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.6HeqeFhufTRavbAF]{效果：侵入式分析}

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You intrude into your foe's mind, damaging them and allowing you to predict their every action for a short time. Choose a foe within 60 feet. They take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your AC and saves against the foe until the beginning of your next turn.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your power attack rolls, AC, and saves against the foe until you refresh.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your power attack rolls, AC, and saves against the foe until you refresh.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.6HeqeFhufTRavbAF]{Effect: Intrusive Analysis}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Mortal Reprieve.name: 凡躯缓刑 Mortal Reprieve
Mortal Reprieve.description:
触发 一名敌人对你造成伤害。

你呼唤生命的力量来暂停任何即将到来的伤害，给你时间在它将你击倒前加以应对。你直到触发该效果的敌人的下个回合开始时才会承受这次伤害。你通常仍会承受与该伤害同时发生的任何其他效果。例如，一个造成寒冷伤害并使你获得冻结状态的寒冷力量仍会使你冻结，或一个造成伤害并推动你的水力量仍会推动你。然而，若次要效果以造成伤害为前提，例如由蛇的毒牙送入的创伤毒素或带毒的武器，或来自老鼠或食尸鬼（特征）颌骨的疾病，那么你也暂时不会承受该次要效果。

在这段间隔时间内，你可以选择将你从自身的生命力量中获得的任何治疗或临时生命值，改为等量减少这次待结算的伤害。若你将待结算的伤害减少至0，你将永远不会承受该伤害，这也会阻止你承受任何依赖伤害的次要效果。

特殊 若你是一名当前处于相位内的eldamon，并且你使用了Mortal Reprieve，但在触发该效果的敌人的下个回合承受伤害之前你相位离开，则当需要承受后果时，你的eldamon训练师会承受该伤害，以及其他相关效果。

Trigger A foe deals damage to you.

You call upon the power of life to suspend any incoming harm, giving you time to deal with it before it lays you low. You don't take the damage until the beginning of the triggering foe's next turn. You normally take any other effects that came at the same time as the damage. For instance, a cold power that deals cold damage and gives you the frozen condition would still make you frozen, or a water power that damages and pushes you would still push you. However, if the secondary effect is contingent on damage being dealt, such as an injury poison delivered by a snake's fangs or a poisoned weapon, or a disease from a rat or ghoul's jaws, you don't take the secondary effect yet either.

During the intervening time, you can choose to use any healing or temporary Hit Points you receive from your own life powers to instead reduce an equal amount of the pending damage. If you reduce the pending damage to 0, you never take the damage, which also prevents you from taking damage-dependent secondary effects.

Special If you're an eldamon who is currently phased in and you use Mortal Reprieve but then phase out before taking the damage on the triggering foe's next turn, your eldamon trainer takes the damage, as well as the other associated effects when the time comes to take the consequences.

Life Conductor.name: 生命指挥者 Life Conductor
Life Conductor.description:
你掌控你周围所有的治疗与复苏。你获得等同于你等级两倍的临时生命值，持续到你刷新为止。每当60尺内的一个活生物恢复生命值（无论是来自治疗魔法、快速治疗、再生或其他手段）或获得临时生命值时，你可以选择将其中一半的治疗或临时生命值重定向到你在60尺内选择的另一个目标；该目标不能从同一效果中获得任何治疗。

如果治疗的发起者不愿允许你这么做，你必须成功通过一次反制检定，其反制调整值等于你的力量DC – 10，且反制等级等于你等级的一半（向上取整），才能这么做。你控制治疗的能力持续到你刷新为止。

You take control of all healing and rejuvenation around you. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to twice your level, which last until you refresh. Whenever a living creature within 60 feet regains Hit Points (whether from healing magic, fast healing, regeneration, or some other means) or gains temporary Hit Points, you can choose to redirect half the healing or temporary Hit Points to a different target of your choice within 60 feet who did not gain any healing from the same effect.

If the originator of the healing is not willing to allow this, you must succeed at a counteract check, with a counteract modifier equal to your power DC – 10 and a counteract level equal to half your level rounded up, in order to do so. Your ability to control healing lasts until you refresh.

Anansi.name: 阿南西 Anansi
Anansi.description:
你模仿一位神话织工与诡计家的技能，将力场之线交织于四处，摧毁你的敌人，并像操控木偶般让周遭一切随你摆布。这些丝线会延伸至你周围的@Template[type:emanation|distance:200]。你可以将灵光内自愿的盟友移动最多80英尺，并且他们不会受到力场之线的伤害。

另一方面，你对区域内的敌人造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[force]]伤害，其结果取决于他们的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，且你可以将其重新定位最多10英尺。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，且你可以将其重新定位最多20英尺。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，且你可以将其重新定位最多40英尺。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

Emulating the skills of a mythical weaver and trickster, you interlace threads of force everywhere, devastating your foes and moving all around you like puppets. The threads reach out in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:200] around you. You can move willing allies within the emanation up to 80 feet, and they are unharmed by the threads of force.

On the other hand, you deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[force]] damage to foes in the area, with results depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and you can reposition them up to 10 feet.

Failure The creature takes full damage and you can reposition them up to 20 feet.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and you can reposition them up to 40 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Hyperion.name: 许珀里翁 Hyperion
Hyperion.description:
你召唤神话中的太阳战车，带来真理之光。明亮光照在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:200] 内照耀 1 分钟，尝试反制该区域内的所有幻觉与变形（除了来自你的光力量的幻觉），使用你的力量 DC – 10 作为你的反制调整值，并以你的一半等级（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。一次成功的反制检定会揭示海伯利昂区域内的真相，而不是终止效果。这道光会反制既存的幻觉，以及被带入该区域的新幻觉。

在区域内开始其回合的敌人受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)[fire]] 伤害，并在区域内以及离开区域后直到其回合结束期间处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，并直到其下个回合结束前处于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的} 状态。你和你的盟友对被海伯利昂显映的敌人进行攻击掷骰时获得 +1 环境加值。

等级（+1） 伤害增加 1。

You call upon the mythical solar chariot to bring forth the light of truth. Bright light shines within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:200] for 1 minute, attempting to counteract all illusions and transformations (except illusions from your light powers) within the area, using your power DC – 10 as your counteract modifier and half your level rounded up as your counteract level. a successful counteract check reveals the truth within Hyperion's area, rather than ending the effects. The light counteracts preexisting illusions and new illusions brought into the area alike.

Foes that start their turn in the area take @Damage[(@actor.level)[fire]] damage and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} while in the area and until the end of their turn once they leave the area and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of their next turn. You and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus on attack rolls against foes limned by Hyperion.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

High Voltage.name: 高电压 High Voltage
High Voltage.description:
当你刷新你的电击时，你积蓄起巨大的电势，电击第一个攻击你的生物。在你下个回合开始之前，第一次出现以下情况时：一个相邻的生物以近战攻击命中你；一个生物接触你（例如使用接触射程法术时）；或一个生物以近战徒手攻击或以金属武器进行的近战攻击命中你——该生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

与这类效果的通常规则一样，它只会在生物接触或命中你时发生，而不是在你接触或命中该生物时发生。电击放电一次后，即使该生物在其反射豁免上大成功且不受任何伤害，也不会再有其他生物受到电击伤害。你刷新你的力量。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

As you refresh your electricity, you build a huge electric potential, shocking the first creature to attack you. Before the beginning of your next turn, the first time an adjacent creature hits you with a melee attack, a creature touches you (such as when using a touch range spell), or a creature hits you with a melee unarmed attack or a melee attack with a metal weapon, that creature takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

As usual for such effects, it occurs only when a creature touches or hits you, not when you touch or hit the creature. After the electricity discharges once, even if the creature critically succeeds at its Reflex save and takes no damage, no further creatures take electricity damage. You Refresh your powers.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Ball Lightning.name: 球状闪电 Ball Lightning
Ball Lightning.description:
你创造闪电球，它们会持续几秒钟，而非仅仅一瞬间，然后将它们掷向附近的敌人。选择至多四个不同的敌人，每个都在你30尺内。你向这些敌人各掷出一颗闪电球，对每个敌人造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] 伤害，其效果取决于你分别对每个所选敌人进行的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰} 的结果；你对每次攻击都适用你的多重攻击减值，但只在完成所有掷骰之后才应用。选择一项：

  • 你要么获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 状态
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，你可以将目标设为至多八个、每个都在你60尺内的敌人。

大成功 敌人受到双倍电击伤害，并在2轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 状态。

成功 敌人受到全额电击伤害，并在1轮内处于震慑状态。

失败 敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[electricity]] 伤害。

大失败 攻击未命中。

等级（+2） 伤害提高1d12，或在失败时提高1点。

You create balls of lightning, which last for a few seconds, rather than a mere moment, then fling them at nearby foes. Choose up to four different foes, each within 30 feet of you. You fling balls of lightning at each of those foes, dealing @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] damage to each of them, with effects depending on @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack rolls} you roll separately against each chosen foe, applying your multiple attack penalty for each attack you make, but only after making all the rolls. Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, you can target up to eight foes within 60 feet of you.

Critical Success The foe takes double electricity damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} for 2 rounds.

Success The foe takes full electricity damage and is shocked for 1 round.

Failure The foe takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[electricity]] damage.

Critical Failure The attack misses.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d12, or 1 on a failure.

Shadow Betrayal.name: 暗影背叛 Shadow Betrayal
Shadow Betrayal.description:
你在60尺内控制一个生物的影子，使其背叛投下它的人，并持续攻击与阻挠对方。当你使用影之背叛时，以及此后在你每个回合开始时，影子都会进行一次攻击掷骰，使用你的 @Check[type:eldamon|defense:ac]{力量攻击调整值}，造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]] 伤害。

这些攻击会持续直到你刷新，或目标以对抗你的力量DC从这背叛的影子中逃脱，或影子的攻击掷骰出现大成功或大失败中的大失败（以最先发生者为准）；在此时，由影之背叛造成的任何状态也会立即结束。影子的攻击掷骰不会使用或计入你的多重攻击减值。

当该生物处于笼罩的状态时，影子对其进行的伤害掷骰获得等同于其笼罩的状态数值的环境加值。

大成功或大失败 影子造成双倍伤害，且目标因其影子的抓握而在1轮内陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动}。

成功 影子造成全额伤害，且当影子限制其移动时，目标的速度承受–10尺的环境减值。

失败 影子无法对目标造成伤害，但当影子限制其移动时，目标的速度仍承受–10尺的环境减值。

大成功或大失败 影子的攻击完全失败，且目标能够完全从其背叛的抓握中逃脱。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.CzrDbs6LG3DW1Ams]{效果：影之背叛}

等级（+2） 伤害提高1d6。

You take control of a creature's shadow within 60 feet, causing it to betray the one who cast it and continue attacking and hindering them. When you use Shadow Betrayal and then again at the beginning of each of your turns, the shadow makes an attack roll, using your @Check[type:eldamon|defense:ac]{power attack modifier}, dealing @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]] damage.

The attacks continue until you Refresh, the target Escapes from the treacherous shadow against your power DC, or the shadow critically fails an attack roll, whichever comes first, at which point any conditions from Shadow Betrayal end immediately as well. The shadow's attack rolls don't use or contribute to your multiple attack penalty.

When the creature is shrouded, the shadow gains a circumstance bonus to damage rolls against them equal to their shrouded condition's value.

Critical Success The shadow deals double damage and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round by their shadow's grasp.

Success The shadow deals full damage and the target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to their Speeds as the shadow restricts their movement.

Failure The shadow isn't able to damage the target but still takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to their Speeds as the shadow restricts their movement.

Critical Failure The shadow's attack fails completely, and the target is able to escape its treacherous grasp entirely.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.CzrDbs6LG3DW1Ams]{Effect: Shadow Betrayal}

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Tornado.name: 龙卷风 Tornado
Tornado.description:
你召唤出一股短暂但强力的龙卷风，在你周围旋转撕裂你的敌人，同时让你与盟友安全地机动。龙卷风在120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:40]中旋转。区域内的敌人受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]]，其结果取决于他们的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免。你可以将区域内自愿的盟友（以及你自己，如果你在该区域内）移动到该区域内任意一个与他们原本空间到该区域中心距离相同的空间。例如，如果一名盟友位于该区域中心以南30尺处，你可以将他们旋转到该区域中心西北方向30尺处。这不会使他们在垂直方向上移动。

大成功或大失败 该敌人不受龙卷风影响。

成功 龙卷风造成几道无意的割伤，但敌人承受住了最猛烈的部分。敌人受到来自龙卷风的一半伤害。

失败 龙卷风切入敌人并将其裹挟带走。敌人受到来自龙卷风的全额伤害，并且你可以将其移动至多10尺，移动到一个与其原本空间到该区域中心距离相同的空间。这不会使他们在垂直方向上移动。

大成功或大失败 龙卷风在将敌人卷起并不断旋转时深深切入敌人。敌人受到来自龙卷风的双倍伤害，并且你可以将其移动到任意一个与其原本空间到该区域中心距离相同的空间。这不会使他们在垂直方向上移动。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You call up a brief but powerful tornado, spinning around and rending your foes while safely maneuvering yourself and your allies. The tornado spins in a @Template[type:burst|distance:40] within 120 feet. Foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]], with results depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save. You can move willing allies in the area (and yourself, if you're in the area) to any space in the area the same distance from the center of the area as their original space. For instance, if an ally was 30 feet south of the center of the area, you could spin them to be 30 feet northwest of the center of the area instead. This doesn't move them vertically.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected by the tornado.

Success The tornado makes a few incidental cuts, but the foe withstands the worst of it. The foe takes half damage from the tornado.

Failure The tornado cuts into the foe and carries them along. The foe takes full damage from the tornado and you can move them up to 10 feet to a space the same distance from the center of the area as their original space. This doesn't move them vertically.

Critical Failure The tornado cuts deeply into the foe as it picks them up and spins them around and around. The foe takes double damage from the tornado and you can move them to any space the same distance from the center of the area as their original space. This doesn't move them vertically.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Lucent Beam.name: 辉光光束 Lucent Beam
Lucent Beam.description:
你发射一道光束，使一条直线上的敌人目眩。你对@Template[type:line|distance:30]内的所有生物造成等同于@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]]点火伤害的伤害，其结果取决于它们的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

在第5等级时，你在使用「明辉光束」时可以选择将直线的尺寸增加至@Template[type:line|distance:40]{40尺}；此后每提升4个等级，你都可以将直线的尺寸再增加10尺，至多在第17等级时达到@Template[type:line|distance:70]{70尺}。

大成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物受到一半火伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}状态，直到你下个回合结束。

失败该生物受到全额火伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态与显映的状态，直到你下个回合结束。

大失败该生物受到双倍火伤害，并获得目眩与显映的状态，直到你的下下个回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你的回合结束）。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1。

You emit a beam of light to dazzle foes in a line. You deal an amount of fire damage equal to @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:30], with results depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the line to a @Template[type:line|distance:40]{40 feet} when you use Lucent Beam, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the line by 10 additional feet, to a maximum of @Template[type:line|distance:70]{70 feet} at 17th level.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and limned until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double fire damage and is dazzled and limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Tendrils of Shade.name: 阴影触须 Tendrils of Shade
Tendrils of Shade.description:
你向前释放一锥形的暗影触须，使你的敌人受寒并笼罩自身。你对位于@Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的所有生物造成等同于@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 +ceil(@actor.level /2))[cold]]的寒冷伤害，生物可以进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免，随后你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}状态，持续至你下个回合结束。

在5级时，你在使用暗影触须时可以选择将锥形的体型增大为@Template[type:cone|distance:20]，之后每提升4级，你都可以将锥形的体型再增加5尺，至17级时最大为35尺。若你处于笼罩的状态，你可以将触须额外延伸最多10尺（1级时为25尺，17级时为45尺）。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1。

You send forth tendrils of shade in a cone to chill your foes and shroud yourself. You deal an amount of cold damage equal to @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 +ceil(@actor.level /2))[cold]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save, and then you become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the cone to a @Template[type:cone|distance:20] when you use Tendrils of Shade, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the cone by 5 additional feet, to a maximum of 35 feet at 17th level. If you're shrouded, you can extend the tendrils by up to 10 additional feet (25 feet at 1st level, 45 feet at 17th level).

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Puppetmaster.name: 傀儡师 Puppetmaster
Puppetmaster.description:
你使用力场丝线违背其意志地操纵其腿部或其他用于行走的肢体，尝试夺取对敌人移动的控制权，在其以所有移动动作移动时决定它往哪里走，直到它挣脱为止。

选择60英尺内的一个生物。目标受到的影响取决于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免。目标可以通过扯断力场丝线来挣脱你的控制并提前结束该效果：要么以 [[/act escape dc=resolve(@actor.system.proficiencies.classDCs.eldamon.dc)]]{逃脱} 对抗你的力量DC，要么花费三个带有操作（特征）的动作，小心地将其移除。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标下一次尝试移动时，你几乎控制了它的移动，但它设法抵御了控制。该移动动作被扰乱，且操偶师的效果结束。若目标没有尝试移动，则该效果持续到你刷新，或目标逃脱或移除丝线为止。

失败 目标下一次尝试移动时，你在1轮内控制目标所有移动动作的移动。若你刷新、目标逃脱或移除丝线，则该效果提前结束。

大成功或大失败 你控制目标所有移动动作的移动。若你刷新、目标逃脱或移除丝线，则该效果提前结束。

Using threads of force to puppet their legs or other ambulatory limbs against their will, you attempt to take control of a foe's locomotion, controlling where it moves with all its move actions until it breaks free.

Choose a creature within 60 feet. The target is affected depending on its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save. The target can break free of your control and end the effect early by ripping off the threads of force, either by [[/act escape dc=resolve(@actor.system.proficiencies.classDCs.eldamon.dc)]]{Escaping} against your power DC or by spending three actions, which have the manipulate trait, to carefully remove them.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The next time the target attempts to move, you nearly control its movement, but it manages to stave the control off. The move action is disrupted, and Puppetmaster's effect ends. If the target doesn't attempt to move, the effect lasts until you refresh or the target Escapes or removes the threads.

Failure The next time the target attempts to move, you control the movement from all the target's move actions for 1 round. The effect ends early if you refresh, if the target Escapes, or if it removes the threads.

Critical Failure You control the movement from all the target's move actions. The effect ends early if you refresh, if the target Escapes, or if it removes the threads.

Fire Whirl.name: 火旋风 Fire Whirl
Fire Whirl.description:
你让火焰在你周围翻卷成炽烈的火焰旋涡，并绕开你的盟友。你对所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的敌人造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] 伤害，并额外造成等同于你等级一半的 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,fire]]{persistent fire} 伤害，敌人可以进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

等级 (+1) 常规伤害提高 1d6。

You swirl flames around you in an incendiary fire whirl, swerving around your allies. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage, as well as @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,fire]]{persistent fire} damage equal to half your level, to all foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The normal damage increases by 1d6.

Shocking Curtain.name: 电击帷幕 Shocking Curtain
Shocking Curtain.description:
你在战场上勾勒出一道电击帷幕，电击穿过它的敌人。你创造一面5尺厚、至多10尺高、并在一条直线上最长达 @Template[type:line|distance:40]{40 feet} 的电击帷幕，在120尺内感召出该帷幕。任何穿过帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据帷幕区域的生物，都会受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[electricity]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 状态，持续1轮。该帷幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

生物在其每个回合中只会从震撼帷幕受到一次电击伤害，即使它在回合开始时位于帷幕内随后又穿过帷幕，或在同一回合内多次穿过帷幕也是如此。

选择一项：

  • 你要么陷入 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 状态
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] 伤害，并将帷幕的最大长度提高至 @Template[type:line|distance:80]{80 feet}。

等级 (+2) 伤害提高1d6，或在放电时提高1d12。

You trace an curtain of electricity across the battlefield, electrocuting those who cross it. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of electricity up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:40]{40 feet} long in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[electricity]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} for 1 round. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes electricity damage from Shocking Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] damage and increase the maximum length of the curtain to @Template[type:line|distance:80]{80 feet}.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d12 on a discharge.

Inexorable Demise.name: 无可避免的终结 Inexorable Demise
Inexorable Demise.description:
你召唤所有活物终将不可避免的终结，将生物的死亡如同达摩克利斯之剑般悬于其头顶，直到其直面死神的镰刀。你选择一名60尺内的生物，其头顶会出现三个不祥的骷髅。在该生物的每个回合结束时，随着一声哀伤的钟鸣，其中一个骷髅燃尽并消失。在最后一个骷髅消失后，一柄虚空能量的镰刀收割该生物的生命力，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d12[void]] 伤害，进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 强韧豁免。你可以在最后一个骷髅消失前的任何时间，使用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作来取消该效果并饶恕该生物。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.laqtHcTDdj2GdjpC]{效果: 不可避免的终结}

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d12。

You call upon the eventual inexorable demise of all living things, hanging a creature's death over them like a sword of Damocles until they face the reaper's scythe. Three ominous skulls appear over the head of a creature you choose within 60 feet. At the end of each of the creature's turns, a mournful bell tolls as one of the skulls burns up and disappears. After the last skull disappears, a scythe of void energy reaps the creature's life force, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d12[void]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. You can cancel the effect and spare the creature at any time before the last skull disappears by using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.laqtHcTDdj2GdjpC]{Effect: Inexorable Demise}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Life Rebound.name: 生命反弹 Life Rebound
Life Rebound.description:
你通过让盟友消耗的生命力伸展并在短暂瞬间反弹回他们体内来保护盟友免受伤害，帮助他们在后续攻击中存活。选择30尺内一名活生物。直到你下一次刷新为止，每当该生物受到伤害并失去实际生命值（而非临时生命值）时，他们获得等同于其失去的实际生命值数量或你等级的2倍（取较低者）的临时生命值。这些临时生命值仅持续到当前生物回合结束。

You protect your ally from harm by causing their spent life force to stretch and rebound back to them for a fleeting moment to help them survive a follow-up attack. Choose a living creature within 30 feet. Until the next time you refresh, whenever that creature takes damage and loses actual Hit Points (not temporary Hit Points), they gain temporary Hit Points equal to the number of actual Hit Points they lost, or twice your level, whichever is lower. These temporary Hit Points only last until the end of the current creature's turn.

Force Curtain.name: 力场帷幕 Force Curtain
Force Curtain.description:
你在战场上划出一道力场帷幕，对穿过的敌人造成伤害并重新定位。你创造一道5尺厚、最高10尺、直线长度至多@Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet}的力场帷幕，并在120尺内感召出该帷幕。任何穿过该帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据该帷幕区域的生物，会受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[force]]伤害，且你可以将其重新定位5尺。该帷幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

每个生物在其每个回合中，只会从力场帷幕获得一次力场伤害与重新定位效果，即使它在回合开始时就在帷幕中、随后又穿过帷幕，或多次穿过帷幕（可能因为你将其重新定位回到帷幕另一侧）。

等级（+2） 伤害提高1d6。

You trace a curtain of force across the battlefield, damaging and repositioning foes that move through. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of force up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet} long in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[force]] damage and you can reposition them 5 feet. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes force damage and the reposition effect from Force Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times (perhaps because you repositioned it back across the curtain).

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Creeping Dread.name: 潜行恐惧 Creeping Dread
Creeping Dread.description:
你将恐惧暗示注入敌人的心智，使其被不断升起的恐慌感所压倒。选择60尺内的一个敌人。其受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害，且成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，且成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大成功或大失败 失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，且成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 3}。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d6。

You insinuate dread into your foe's mind, overcoming them with a rising sense of terror. Choose a foe within 60 feet. They take @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[mental]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The foe takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Fated Quietus.name: 命定终灭 Fated Quietus
Fated Quietus.description:
你引导环绕生物死亡的魔法能量，提高其被特定手段杀死的几率。选择60英尺内的一个生物。根据其进行的 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免，它获得等同于你等级一半（向上取整）的弱点，弱点对应你选择的一种单一伤害类型（而非“物理”或“全部”这类更大的伤害类型分组）。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得该弱点，持续1轮。

失败 该生物获得该弱点，持续3轮。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物获得等同于你等级的弱点（而非你等级一半），持续3轮。对该生物造成所选伤害类型的效果获得死亡（特征），使其在将该生物的生命值降低至0时杀死该生物。

You tap into the magical energy surrounding a creature's death, increasing the odds that they're slain by a given methodology. Choose a creature within 60 feet. It gains weakness equal to half your level (rounded up) to a single damage type of your choice (not a larger grouping of damage types like "physical" or "all"), depending on its @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature gains the weakness for 1 round.

Failure The creature gains the weakness for 3 rounds.

Critical Failure The creature gains weakness up to your level (instead of half your level) for 3 rounds. Effects that deal the chosen damage type gain the death trait against the creature, causing them to kill the creature if they reduce it to 0 Hit Points.

Whirlwind.name: 旋风 Whirlwind
Whirlwind.description:
你向前涌动，随后令疾风在你周身盘旋，切割你的敌人。Stride，随后你对处于一个由你选择的、最大至20尺的体型的 emanation 内的所有敌人造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]] 伤害，进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

@Template[type:emanation|distance:5]

@Template[type:emanation|distance:10]

@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]

@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]

等级 (+1) 该伤害增加 1d6。

You surge forward and then spin winds around you, slicing into your foes. Stride and then you deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]] damage to all foes in an emanation with your choice of size up to 20 feet, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

@Template[type:emanation|distance:5]

@Template[type:emanation|distance:10]

@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]

@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Fastball Special.name: 快速球特技 Fastball Special
Fastball Special.description:
你运用力场，将区域内最危险的东西之一扔向你的敌人……你自己的盟友，武器朝前！你将一个自愿的、位于60尺内的盟友，直接朝向120尺内的一名敌人移动，直到该敌人进入你盟友的近战触及范围内（若你的盟友的触及超过5尺，你可以选择把他们扔多远）。

在移动结束时，你的盟友以自由动作（）对目标进行一次近战打击，在成功时根据敌人的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免，额外增加 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[force]] 伤害（与大多数额外伤害一样，此额外力场伤害在大成功或大失败时会翻倍）。若你盟友的打击为失败但不是大成功或大失败，你仍会造成该额外力场伤害，因为你的盟友在敌人附近落地并激起一道力场冲击波。在攻击掷骰为大成功或大失败中的大失败时，你的盟友倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。由于你移动的是盟友而非敌人，此移动不属于强迫移动。

大成功或大失败中的大成功 你的盟友的打击不会造成任何额外力场伤害。

成功 你的盟友造成一半的额外力场伤害。

失败 你的盟友造成全部的力场伤害。

大成功或大失败中的大失败 你的盟友造成双倍的额外力场伤害。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

Using force, you throw one of the most dangerous things in the area at your foe… your own ally, weapon first! You move a willing ally within 60 feet directly toward a foe within 120 feet until the foe is within your ally's melee reach (if your ally has more than 5 feet of reach, you can choose how far to throw them).

At the end of the movement, your ally makes a melee Strike against the target as a free action, adding @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[force]] damage on a success depending on the foe's @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save (like most additional damage, this additional force damage is doubled on a critical hit). If your ally's Strike is a failure, but not a critical failure, you still deal that additional force damage as your ally lands near the foe with a shockwave of force. On a critical failed attack roll, your ally falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Since you are moving an ally and not a foe, this movement isn't forced movement.

Critical Success Your ally doesn't deal any additional force damage with their Strike.

Success Your ally deals half the additional force damage.

Failure Your ally deals full force damage.

Critical Failure Your ally deals double the additional force damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Killing Embrace.name: 死亡拥抱 Killing Embrace
Killing Embrace.description:
你用死亡的阴霾环绕自身，迫使那些攻击你的人以他们的生命为代价。直到你刷新之前，相邻生物以近战攻击命中你时，以及接触你或以徒手攻击命中你的生物，都会受到 @Damage[@actor.level[void]] 伤害，并在其回合结束前变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}（由你选择）。

等级（+1）伤害增加1点。

You surround yourself with a pall of death, forcing those who attack you to pay with their life. Until you refresh, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take @Damage[@actor.level[void]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (your choice) until the end of their turn.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Reaping Refresh.name: 收割 刷新 Reaping Refresh
Reaping Refresh.description:
你收获你所播种的，汲取木之能量来帮助你刷新你的力量。所有位于你播种植物的区域内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。随后你 刷新 你的力量。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1。

You reap what you sowed, drawing upon the wood energy to help you refresh your powers. All foes in areas with plants you sowed take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. You then Refresh your powers.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Gelid Touch.name: 冰寒接触 Gelid Touch
Gelid Touch.description:
你猛冲向一名敌人并接触对方，将冰扩散到其全身。对触及范围内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[cold]] 伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍寒冷伤害，且目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 5}。

成功 你造成正常寒冷伤害，且目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3}。

失败 你只是擦中目标，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[cold]] 伤害，并使目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}。

大失败 你的接触完全落空，目标毫发无伤。

等级（+1）伤害提高 1d8，或在失败时提高 1。

You lunge at a foe and touch them, spreading ice across their body. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe within your reach, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[cold]] damage.

Critical Success You deal double cold damage and the target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5}.

Success You deal normal cold damage and the target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}.

Failure You only graze the target, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[cold]] damage and causing the target to be @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}.

Critical Failure Your touch misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Locomotion Shred.name: 运动撕裂 Locomotion Shred
Locomotion Shred.description:
你用力场丝线缠绕住你的敌人，使其每当移动时都会受到伤害。选择一个100尺内的敌人，使其在每次移动中每移动一个5尺方格，就可能受到 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[force]] 伤害，具体取决于其 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免结果。在15级时，伤害提高为其移动时每移动一个5尺方格就受到等同于 @Damage[(3+@actor.level)[force]] 的伤害。

大成功 敌人避开这些力场丝线，不受影响。

成功 力场丝线仅仅勾住敌人随即坠落。在其下个回合结束前，它下一次使用移动动作时，会受到来自“机动撕裂”的力场伤害。

失败 力场丝线黏在敌人身上。在你下次刷新之前，它在每个回合的第一次移动动作时，都会受到来自“机动撕裂”的力场伤害。此外，若你用力场力量重新定位目标，则其受到等同于你等级的力场伤害。

大失败 丝线完全缠绕住敌人。在你下次刷新之前，它每次使用移动动作时，都会受到来自“机动撕裂”的力场伤害。此外，若你用力场力量重新定位目标，则其受到等同于你等级两倍的力场伤害。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1。
等级 (15h) 伤害提高为其每移动一个5尺方格就受到3+你的等级的伤害。

You wrap threads of force around your foe, damaging it whenever it moves. Choose a foe within 100 feet, causing it to potentially take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[force]] damage for each 5-foot square it moved during that movement, depending on its @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save. At 15th level, the damage increases to an amount of @Damage[(3+@actor.level)[force]] damage when it moves equal to your level plus 3 damage for each 5-foot square it moved.

Critical Success The foe avoids that threads of force and is unaffected.

Success The threads of force barely snag the foe before falling off. The next time it uses a move action before the end of its next turn, it takes force damage from Locomotion Shred.

Failure The threads of force stick to the foe. It takes force damage from Locomotion Shred on its first move action of each turn until the next time you refresh. Additionally, if you reposition the target with a force power, it takes force damage equal to your level.

Critical Failure The threads become completely enmeshed around the foe. It takes force damage from Locomotion Shred on every move action until the next time you refresh. Additionally, if you reposition the target with a force power, it takes force damage equal to twice your level.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.
Level (15h) The damage increases to 3 plus your level for each 5-foot square it moved.

Foe Throw.name: 敌人投掷 Foe Throw
Foe Throw.description:
你将一个敌人扔向另一个敌人。选择一个120尺内的敌人，并尝试将其扔向该敌人30尺内的另一个敌人，这取决于第一个敌人的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免的结果。若射程内没有第二个敌人，你改为将该敌人扔向你选择的30尺内的一个方格，并忽略任何对第二个敌人所列出的效果。

大成功或大失败 你无法扔出该敌人，且其完全不受影响。

成功 该敌人设法在很大程度上抵抗被扔出，但并非毫无代价。它选择是承受 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[force]] 伤害并留在原地，还是飞向第二个敌人但安全且不受伤害地落在其所选择的、与第二个敌人相邻的一个空间内。

失败 你将第一个敌人扔向第二个敌人。第一个敌人承受 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[force],(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并落在距离其起始位置最近的、与目标相邻的未占据空间内。对第二个敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}；此项具有攻击（特征）。在一次成功时，第二个敌人承受与第一个敌人相同的伤害；在一次大成功或大失败时，两个敌人都承受 @Damage[((1+@actor.level)*4)[force],((1+@actor.level)*4)[bludgeoning]]{最大伤害}。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但第一个敌人承受双倍伤害（这可能导致在重击时造成双倍最大伤害）。

等级 (+1) 力场与钝击伤害各增加1d4。

You throw one foe at another. Choose a foe within 120 feet and attempt to throw them into another foe within 30 feet of that foe, depending on the result of the first foe's @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save. If there isn't a second foe within range, you instead throw the foe at a square of your choice within 30 feet, ignoring any listed effect to the second foe.

Critical Success You can't throw the foe, and it's entirely unaffected.

Success The foe manages to resist being thrown for the most part, but not without a cost. It chooses whether to take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[force]] damage and stay in place, or to fly toward the second foe but land safely and undamaged in a space of its choice adjacent to the second foe.

Failure You throw the first foe into the second. The first foe takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[force],(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] damage and lands in the closest unoccupied space to their starting location that's adjacent to the target. Attempt a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack roll} against the second foe; this has the attack trait. On a success, the second foe takes the same damage as the first foe and on a critical success, both foes take @Damage[((1+@actor.level)*4)[force],((1+@actor.level)*4)[bludgeoning]]{maximum damage}.

Critical Failure As failure, but the first foe takes double damage (this could potentially lead to dealing double maximum damage on a critical hit).

Level (+1) The force and bludgeoning damage increase by 1d4.

Grasping Vines.name: 攫握藤蔓 Grasping Vines
Grasping Vines.description:
触发 60英尺内的一名敌人通过你可以采集的区域进行移动。

你从敌人周围的植物中采集，并将其变形为用于破坏其移动的缠抓藤蔓。被触发的生物必须尝试一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物正在通过的空间在其回合结束前为强效困难地形，且该生物的速度在其回合结束前或直到其对抗你的力量DC成功脱逃为止（以先发生者为准），承受–5英尺的环境减值。

失败 同成功，但你打断被触发的移动。

大成功或大失败 同成功，但你打断被触发的移动，且该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，直到其回合结束前或直到其对抗你的力量DC成功脱逃为止（以先发生者为准）。

Trigger A foe within 60 feet moves through an area you can harvest.

You harvest from the plants surrounding your foe to transform them into grasping vines meant to ruin their movement. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The space the creature is moving through is greater difficult terrain until the end of its turn and the creature takes a –5- foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until the end of its turn or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Failure As success, except you disrupt the triggering movement.

Critical Failure As success, except you disrupt the triggering movement and the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until the end of its turn or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Sea Spray.name: 海浪飞沫 Sea Spray
Sea Spray.description:
你以圆锥形不可预测地喷射水，让自己失去平衡，或将水雾拉回身边以保护自己。你对@Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的每名敌人造成@Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),2))d4[bludgeoning]]伤害，并使其进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]强韧豁免。

在第5等级，当你使用海之喷雾时，你可以选择将圆锥体型增大为@Template[type:cone|distance:20]；此后每提升4个等级，你都可以将圆锥的体型再增加5英尺，至第17等级时最大为35英尺。

高潮：伤害变为@Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),2))d6[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power]伤害。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}直到你的下一回合。

低潮：你获得AC+1环境加值直到你下一回合开始。若某生物对海之喷雾的豁免未获得大成功或大失败，则你对该生物的AC环境加值提升为+2；若某生物对海之喷雾的豁免获得大成功或大失败中的大失败，则你对该生物的AC环境加值提升为+4。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.bpmehE1sbwNKRKzN]{效果: Sea Spray (Low Tide)}

大成功或大失败中的大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，且你将其移动10英尺。

大成功或大失败中的大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，且你将其移动20英尺。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d4，或在高潮时增加1d6。

You spray water unpredictably in a cone, throwing yourself offbalance, or draw the spray back toward you to defend yourself. You deal @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),2))d4[bludgeoning]] damage to each foe in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the cone to a @Template[type:cone|distance:20] when you use Sea Spray, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the cone by 5 additional feet, to a maximum of 35 feet at 17th level.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),2))d6[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until your next turn.

Low Tide: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the beginning of your next turn, which increases to a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against creatures that didn't critically succeed on their saving throw against the Sea Spray, and a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against creatures that critically failed their saving throw against the Sea Spray.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.bpmehE1sbwNKRKzN]{Effect: Sea Spray (Low Tide)}

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and you move them 10 feet.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and you move them 20 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d6 on high tide.

Cold Snap.name: 寒潮 Cold Snap
Cold Snap.description:
你打个响指，震碎正在冻结目标的冰，造成巨大的伤害。从60尺内选择一个因你的冰力量而具有冻结状态的敌人。目标受到@Damage[(@actor.level)d6[cold]]伤害，外加等同于2d6 × 该生物的冻结状态数值的额外伤害；若该生物的冻结为10或更高，则额外伤害最多为20d6，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]强韧豁免。随后，其冻结状态结束。

在11级时，来自冻结状态的额外伤害提高为2d8 × 该生物的冻结状态数值。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d6

You snap your fingers and shatter the ice that was freezing a target, dealing them massive damage. Choose a foe with the frozen condition from your ice powers within 60 feet. The target takes @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage, plus additional damage equal to 2d6 × the value of creature's frozen condition, to a maximum of 20d6 additional damage if the creature is frozen 10 or more, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. Then their frozen condition ends.

At 11th level, the additional damage from the frozen condition increases to 2d8 × the value of creature's frozen condition.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6

Sunlight Ray.name: 阳光射线 Sunlight Ray
Sunlight Ray.description:
你发射出一道阳光射线，并将其疾射向你的敌人，受其身上的光所吸引。对60尺内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[((2+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]] 伤害。

在7级，以及之后每提升4个等级，你的射线射程增加30尺，至19级时最大为180尺。

若敌人处于显映的状态，则其在对抗该攻击时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

大成功或大失败：成功你对目标造成双倍火伤害，且目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}状态，持续至你下下个回合结束（持续2轮，然后持续至你的回合结束）。

成功你对目标造成正常火伤害，且目标获得目眩与显映的状态，持续至你下个回合结束。

失败射线未命中，但仍使目标显映。目标获得目眩与显映的状态，持续至你下个回合结束。

大成功或大失败：失败射线完全未命中

等级（+1）伤害增加1d4。

You emit a ray of sunlight and send it hurtling at your foe, attracted toward their light. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[((2+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]] damage.

At 7th level, and every 4 levels thereafter, your ray's range increases by 30 feet, to a maximum of 180 feet at 19th level.

If the foe is limned, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the attack.

Critical Success You deal double fire damage to the target and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Success You deal normal fire damage to the target and the target is dazzled and limned until the end of your next turn.

Failure The ray misses but still limns the target. The target is dazzled and limned until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The ray misses completely

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Irkalla.name: 伊尔卡拉 Irkalla
Irkalla.description:
你召唤冥界的一部分，令你周围的地面褪去颜色，化为缥缈而不祥的白色。地面上处于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] 内的区域会在 1 分钟内成为冥界的附属地带。你的敌人在该区域内时，会在其每个回合开始时受到 @Damage[20[void]] 伤害。以此方式受到伤害的敌人会在 1 轮内陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}（由你选择）。该区域对你的敌人而言也属于有害地形：敌人每进入一个方格，就会受到 @Damage[2[void]] 伤害。

You call upon a portion of the underworld as the ground around you fades to a wispy and ominous white. The area on the ground within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] becomes an annex of the underworld for 1 minute. Your foes take @Damage[20[void]] damage at the start of each of their turns in the area. A foe who takes damage in this way is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (your choice) for 1 round. The area is also hazardous terrain to your foes, dealing @Damage[2[void]] damage for every square that the foe enters.

Brain Blast.name: 脑力冲击 Brain Blast
Brain Blast.description:
你从大脑向四面八方释放出一道精神能量波。你对位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的所有敌人造成等同于 @Damage[((1+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))d4+ceil(@actor.level/2))[mental]] 伤害的精神伤害，其结果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，并且直到其下一回合之前处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

大失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，并且处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d4。

You send a wave of mental energy blasting from your brain in all directions. You deal an amount of mental damage equal to @Damage[((1+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))d4+ceil(@actor.level/2))[mental]] damage, to all foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], with results depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage.

Failure The foe takes full damage and they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until their next turn.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Gloom Burst.name: 幽暗爆发 Gloom Burst
Gloom Burst.description:
你创造出一股阴郁的喷涌，对敌人造成伤害并笼罩盟友。阴郁在120英尺内的一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:20] 中扩散。

爆发范围内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] 伤害，其效果取决于他们的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。

爆发范围内的盟友（以及你自己，如果你也在爆发范围内）不受伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}，直到你下个回合结束为止。如果你在使用 Gloom Burst 时已经处于笼罩的状态，你可以选择让阴郁在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] 中扩散，而不是在一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:20] 中扩散。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半寒冷伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额寒冷伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}，直到你下个回合结束为止。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物受到双倍寒冷伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 2}，直到你下个回合结束为止。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You create an outpouring of gloom, damaging foes and shrouding allies. The gloom spreads in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet.

Foes in the burst take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Allies in the burst (and you, if you are in the burst) take no damage and are @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn. If you were already shrouded when you used Gloom Burst, you can choose to spread the gloom in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] instead of a @Template[type:burst|distance:20].

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half cold damage.

Failure The creature takes full cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2} until the end of your next turn.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Peaceful Impulse.name: 宁静冲动 Peaceful Impulse
Peaceful Impulse.description:
你强行将一股和平冲动施加到敌人的心智上，使其进行敌对动作变得困难且会受到伤害。选择60尺内的一个敌人，其效果取决于其进行的 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败·成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 持续1轮，每当敌人进行一次敌对动作时，其受到等同于 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[mental]] 的心智伤害，并且其用于进行敌对动作的攻击掷骰、技能检定，以及DC都承受–1环境减值。若敌人使用包含数个从属动作的敌对行动（例如一个允许其对触及范围内的每个生物进行打击的行动），则其仅受到一次伤害。

失败 同成功，但效果持续直到你刷新。

大成功或大失败·失败 同成功，但心智伤害等于6加上你的等级，环境减值为–2环境减值，且效果持续直到你刷新。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4ou27ma4vEO0C1O9]{效果: Peaceful Impulse}

等级（+1） 伤害增加1。

You forcibly apply a peaceful impulse to your foe's mind, making it difficult and damaging for them to take hostile actions. Choose a foe within 60 feet, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success For 1 round, the foe takes mental damage equal to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[mental]] each time they take a hostile action and takes a –1 circumstance penalty to their attack rolls, skill checks, and DCs used to perform hostile actions. If the foe uses a hostile activity with several subordinate actions (such as an activity that allows it to Strike every creature within reach), it only takes damage once.

Failure As success, but the effect lasts until you refresh.

Critical Failure As success, but the mental damage is equal to 6 plus your level, the circumstance penalty is a –2 circumstance penalty, and the effect lasts until you refresh.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4ou27ma4vEO0C1O9]{Effect: Peaceful Impulse}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Forced Link.name: 强制链接 Forced Link
Forced Link.description:
你强行将你的生命力与附近一名敌人连接起来，使其承受一部分原本要落在你身上的伤害。选择30尺内一名活的敌人。每当你受到伤害（在应用弱点、抗力等之后），该敌人失去等同于你等级一半的生命值，或等同于你将要承受的伤害量，以较小者为准。将你将要承受的伤害按相同数值减少。该敌人可以尝试用一次@Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免来抗拒该链接，并产生以下效果。如果该敌人死亡或被摧毁，则链接结束。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 你施加该强制链接，其持续1轮。

失败 你施加该强制链接，其持续直到你刷新。

大失败 你以正常生命值数量的两倍施加该强制链接，其持续直到你刷新。

You forcibly link your life force with that of a nearby enemy, causing them to take some of the harm meant for you. Choose a living foe within 30 feet. Whenever you take damage (after applying weaknesses, resistances, and the like), the foe loses a number of Hit Points equal to half your level, or the amount of damage you would take, whichever is less. Reduce the damage you would take by the same amount. The foe can attempt to resist the link with a @Check[will|against:eldamon] save, with the following effects. If the foe dies or is destroyed, the link ends.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success You apply the forced link, and it lasts for 1 round.

Failure You apply the forced link, and it lasts until you refresh.

Critical Failure You apply the forced link for twice the normal amount of Hit Points, and it lasts until you refresh.

Vital Touch.name: 活力接触 Vital Touch
Vital Touch.description:
你的接触将汹涌的生命力量注入一名生物，治疗活体并伤害不死生物。接触一名在你触及范围内的活体生物，或对一名在你触及范围内的不死生物进行一次近战力量攻击掷骰以尝试接触它。一名活体目标获得6点临时生命值，外加你每有1等级再获得6点临时生命值，并且在1轮内获得AC+2状态加值。这些临时生命值持续到你刷新为止。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.6q9GQbouYB04o2G7]{效果: 生命接触（活体）}

一名不死目标受到 @Damage[(6+(6*@actor.level))[vitality]] 伤害，其效果取决于你的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}；这具有攻击（特征）。

大成功或大失败 不死生物受到双倍伤害，并在2轮内承受AC–2状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.VURae9MMbPOLWlNJ]{效果: 生命接触（不死生物，大成功或大失败）}

成功 不死生物受到全额伤害，并在1轮内承受AC–2状态减值。

失败 你的接触仅仅擦过不死生物。它只受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[vitality]] 伤害，并在1轮内承受AC–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.pqxqIqe8RpRLvAel]{效果: 生命接触（不死生物）}

大成功或大失败 你的接触完全没有碰到不死生物。它没有效果。

等级（+1） 伤害增加6点，或在失败时增加1点。

Your touch infuses surging life force into a creature, healing the living and harming the undead. Touch a living creature within your reach or make a melee power attack roll against an undead creature within your reach to attempt to touch it. A living target gains 6 temporary Hit Points plus 6 temporary Hit Points per level you have, as well as a +2 status bonus to AC for 1 round. The temporary Hit Points last until you refresh.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.6q9GQbouYB04o2G7]{Effect: Vital Touch (Living)}

An undead target takes @Damage[(6+(6*@actor.level))[vitality]] damage, with effects depending on your @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll}; this has the attack trait.

Critical Success The undead takes double damage and a –2 status penalty to AC for 2 rounds.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.VURae9MMbPOLWlNJ]{Effect: Vital Touch (Undead, Critical Success)}

Success The undead takes full damage and a –2 status penalty to AC for 1 round.

Failure Your touch barely grazes the undead. It takes only @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[vitality]] damage and a –1 status penalty to AC for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.pqxqIqe8RpRLvAel]{Effect: Vital Touch (Undead)}

Critical Failure Your touch misses the undead completely. It has no effect.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 6, or by 1 on a failure.

Exploding Bulwark.name: 爆裂壁垒 Exploding Bulwark
Exploding Bulwark.description:
你用岩石环绕自身，形成一道准备爆炸的壁垒，除非敌人先将其敲碎，否则它会主动寻觅附近的敌人。当你使用“爆炸壁垒”时，选择20尺内任意数量的敌人，一道土石壁垒在你身上生长成形。

你从岩石壁垒获得对AC的+4环境加值，持续到你下一回合开始；在那时壁垒爆炸，释放出无数石块，偏转飞行以寻觅并猛击任何处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]内且被你所选的敌人，造成@Damage[(-3+@actor.level)d10[bludgeoning]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。

然而，在你下一回合之前，每当一个生物尝试对你进行一次打击时，除非该打击为大成功或大失败中的失败，否则你从爆炸壁垒获得的对AC的环境加值降低1，且爆炸造成的伤害减少1d10，最低降至AC+0与少四颗伤害骰。

注：显示的伤害假设未剩余任何AC加值。请应用下方效果以计算伤害。

等级 (+1) 该伤害增加1d10。

You surround yourself in a bulwark of rock that prepares to explode, seeking out nearby foes, unless they chip it away first. When you use Exploding Bulwark, choose any number of foes within 20 feet, as an earthen bulwark grows over your body.

You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC from the rock bulwark until the beginning of your next turn, upon which the bulwark explodes, sending out countless stones that veer off to seek out and pummel any of the chosen foes that are within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60], dealing @Damage[(-3+@actor.level)d10[bludgeoning]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

However, each time a creature attempts a Strike against you before your next turn, unless the Strike is a critical failure, your circumstance bonus to AC from Exploding Bulwark decreases by 1 and the damage from the explosion decreases by 1d10, to a minimum of +0 AC and four fewer dice of damage.

Note: The displayed damage assumes no AC bonus remaining. Apply the below effect to calculate damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Earthen Curtain.name: 土石帘幕 Earthen Curtain
Earthen Curtain.description:
你在战场上描绘出一道横贯的泥土帷幕，阻隔一片区域。你创造一道厚5尺的土之帷幕，高至10尺，长度至多为 @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long in a straight line} 的直线，并在120尺内唤出该帷幕。帷幕是坚固的，阻止生物穿过它，不过它们可以对帷幕的一个10×10区段造成伤害。

超巨型生物的打击会对帷幕相邻的两个10×10区段造成伤害，而非一个。每个帷幕区段AC为10、硬度5，且生命值等于你等级的两倍，并且免疫大成功或大失败和精准伤害。帷幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

You trace a curtain of dirt and soil across the battlefield, blocking off an area. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of earth up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long in a straight line}, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. The curtain is solid, preventing creatures from crossing it, though they can damage a 10 by 10 section of the curtain.

A gargantuan creature's Strikes damage two contiguous 10 by 10 sections of the curtain instead of one. Each curtain section has AC 10, Hardness 5, and Hit Points equal to twice your level, and it's immune to critical hits and precision damage. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

Cerebral Shock.name: 脑震荡 Cerebral Shock
Cerebral Shock.description:
你深深集中精神，并在远处发出一道精神脉冲，对以80英尺内某点为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:20] 内的敌人造成伤害并使其震慑。你对区域内所有敌人造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[mental]] 伤害，结果取决于他们的 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

大成功或大失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

You concentrate deeply and send out a mental pulse at a distance, damaging and stunning foes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] whose center is within 80 feet. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[mental]] damage to all foes in the area, with results depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage.

Failure The foe takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Flamewrack.name: 焰蚀 Flamewrack
Flamewrack.description:
你用烈焰折磨燃烧的敌人，用令人作呕的焦灼灼烧他们的身体。你对40尺内每个正承受持续火焰伤害的敌人造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[fire]] 伤害，其效果取决于他们的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并在他们花费一个 单动作 移除该减值之前，其豁免与AC承受–1 状态减值。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 4}。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.bk715G04Rz88DQbF]{效果: Flamewrack (成功)}

等级 (+2) 该伤害增加1d6。

You wrack your burning foes with flames, searing their bodies with a sickening char. You deal @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[fire]] damage to each foe within 40 feet that is taking persistent fire damage, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and takes a –1 status penalty to saving throws and AC until they spend a single action to remove the penalty.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 4}.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.bk715G04Rz88DQbF]{Effect: Flamewrack (Success)}

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Aeolus.name: 埃俄罗斯 Aeolus
Aeolus.description:
你从元素空气的源泉中召唤出强劲的狂风，裹挟你的盟友前行，并将你的敌人切割成碎片。狂风沿一直线吹拂，最远可达 @Template[type:line|distance:1000|width:60]{60尺宽、最长1,000尺长}。你与位于区域内的盟友不会受到伤害，并且如果他们愿意，你可以让他们沿着该直线路径移动任意距离。位于区域内的敌人则会受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]]，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

You call forth powerful winds from the wellspring of elemental air that carry forth your allies and slice your foes into pieces. The winds blow in a line up to @Template[type:line|distance:1000|width:60]{60 feet wide and up to 1,000 feet long}. You and allies in the area are unharmed, and if they are willing, you can move them any distance along the line's path. Enemies in the area instead take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Devouring Light.name: 吞噬之光 Devouring Light
Devouring Light.description:
你召唤出一道吞噬性的光，环绕并吞没你的敌人。选择120尺内的一名敌人。该敌人变为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}并@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，并受到等同于你等级的@Damage[(@actor.level)[persistent,fire]]伤害，具体效果取决于其@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人受到一半持续火伤害，并在其具有该持续伤害期间处于显映的状态；且目眩直到你下个回合结束或其具有该持续伤害期间（取两者中较短者）。

失败 该敌人受到全部持续火伤害，并在其具有该持续火伤害期间处于目眩与显映的状态。只要该生物具有该持续火伤害，你和你的盟友对其进行攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值。

大失败 该敌人受到双倍持续火伤害，并在其具有该持续火伤害期间处于目眩与显映的状态。只要该生物具有该持续火伤害，你和你的盟友对其进行攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1。

You call forth a devouring light that surrounds and consumes your foe. Choose a foe within 120 feet. The foe becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and takes @Damage[(@actor.level)[persistent,fire]] damage equal to your level, all depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half persistent fire damage and is limned while they have the persistent damage and dazzled until the end of your next turn or as long as they have the persistent damage, whichever is shorter.

Failure The foe takes full persistent fire damage and is dazzled and limned as long as they have the persistent fire damage. You and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls against the creature as long as it has the persistent fire damage.

Critical Failure The foe takes double persistent fire damage and is dazzled and limned as long as they have the persistent fire damage. You and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls against the creature as long as it has the persistent fire damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Harvest Shield.name: 收获护盾 Harvest Shield
Harvest Shield.description:
触发 一个生物以一次攻击将你作为目标，你能看见攻击者，且在你的空间内或相邻空间内有一株你可以收割的植物。

你收割一株植物来创造一面木质护盾，以保护你免受伤害。你在对抗该次攻击的攻击掷骰时，以及直到你下个回合开始为止，获得AC+2环境加值。你还会在对抗该次触发攻击时，获得等同于你等级的钝击和穿刺伤害抗力，因为这些植物仍然活着并保护你的身体免受伤害。

Trigger A creature targets you with an attack, you can see the attacker, and there is a plant you can harvest in your space or an adjacent space.

You harvest a plant to create a wooden shield that protects you from harm. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC against the attack roll and until the beginning of your next turn. You additionally gain resistance to bludgeoning and piercing damage equal to your level against the triggering attack, as the plants remain alive and protect your body from harm.

Outstretched Shadow.name: 伸展之影 Outstretched Shadow
Outstretched Shadow.description:
你将自己的影子伸展成一条直线，令其中的一切寒冷并笼罩。你对所有位于一个@Template[type:line|distance:80]内的生物造成等同于@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 + ceil(@actor.level/2))[cold]]点寒冷伤害，其效果取决于其反射豁免。

如果你处于笼罩的状态，你可以选择将直线延伸至最多120尺。区域内已处于笼罩的生物其豁免承受–2环境减值。

大成功或大失败该生物不受影响。

成功该生物承受一半寒冷伤害。

失败该生物承受全额寒冷伤害，且直到你下个回合结束前获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}。

大成功或大失败该生物承受双倍寒冷伤害，且直到你下个回合结束前获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 2}。

等级（+1）伤害提高1d4。

等级（+2）伤害提高1。

You stretch your own shadow into a line, chilling and enshrouding everything within. You deal an amount of cold damage equal to @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 + ceil(@actor.level/2))[cold]] damage to all creatures within an @Template[type:line|distance:80], with effects depending on their Reflex save.

If you're shrouded, you can choose to extend the line up to 120 feet. Creatures in the area who were already shrouded take a –2 circumstance penalty to their saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half cold damage.

Failure The creature takes full cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2} until the end of your next turn.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Aerial Trail.name: 空中轨迹 Aerial Trail
Aerial Trail.description:
你裹挟着狂风穿梭于敌人之间，在身后留下风刃，斩击任何胆敢踏入你路径之人。你疾行两次，在此期间你可以穿过被你的敌人占据的空间，并在你路径上的每个空间留下一道风刃轨迹。直到你下个回合结束，进入该轨迹任一空间的生物会受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]] 伤害。一个生物只会从“空中轨迹”承受一次挥砍伤害，即使它进入了你轨迹中的多个方格；而如果它没有进入你轨迹中的任一方格，即使它起始于你轨迹的某个方格中，也不会受到伤害。

等级（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

You rush through your foes with wind, leaving behind wind blades to slash through any who dare to cross your path. You Stride twice, during which you can move through spaces occupied by your foes, and you leave a trail of wind blades in each space of your path. Until the end of your next turn, creatures who enter one of the trail's spaces take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]] damage. A creature only takes slashing damage from Aerial Trail once, even if it enters multiple squares from your trail, and if it doesn't enter a square from your trail, it doesn't take damage even if it starts in a square from your trail.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Lifebond.name: 生命连结 Lifebond
Lifebond.description:
你暂时将一名自愿目标的生命力与数名其他自愿生物的生命力连接起来，以保护该目标免受伤害。选择30尺内一名自愿目标，之后称为主要目标；并选择30尺内至多三名其他自愿生物，之后称为守护者。你可以是主要目标或守护者。守护者的等级必须等于或高于主要目标，且他们不能是仆从，不过主要目标可以是仆从。

主要目标获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，直到你刷新为止。直到你刷新之前，守护者失去的生命值等于对主要目标造成的伤害（在应用弱点、抗力等之后）除以（守护者数量 + 1）；而主要目标将所受伤害减少一个数值，等于守护者失去的生命值总和。举例来说，若你包含三名守护者，且主要目标在抗力、弱点等之后总计受到26点伤害，则每名守护者失去6点生命值，而主要目标只受到8点伤害。

如果一名守护者变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死}，他们会自动不再作为守护者，不过只要至少仍有一名守护者存在，生命连结仍会在持续时间内继续。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.rDJio8T2c3kV0KBV]{效果：生命连结（主要）}

You temporarily connect the life force of one willing target to those of several other willing creatures in order to protect the target from harm. Choose one willing target within 30 feet, later referred to as the primary target, and up to three other willing creatures within 30 feet, later referred to as protectors. You can be the primary target or a protector. The protectors must be of the primary target's level or higher, and they can't be minions, though the primary target can be a minion.

The primary target gains temporary Hit Points equal to your level until you refresh. Until you refresh, the protectors lose Hit Points equal to the damage dealt to the primary target (after applying weaknesses, resistances, and the like) divided by the number of protectors + 1, while the primary target reduces the damage by the total number of Hit Points the protectors lost. For example, if you include three protectors and the primary target takes a total of 26 damage after resistances, weaknesses, and the like, each protector loses 6 Hit Points, and the primary target only takes 8 damage.

If a protector becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, they automatically cease being a protector, though the Lifebond continues for the duration as long as at least one protector remains.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.rDJio8T2c3kV0KBV]{Effect: Lifebond (Primary)}

Interrupting Torrent.name: 打断洪流 Interrupting Torrent
Interrupting Torrent.description:
触发 60英尺内的一个敌人采取一个移动动作

当你的敌人开始移动时，你会根据你的潮汐迅速推或拉他们，扰乱他们的站位。被触发的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 敌人不受影响。

成功 在他们移动之前，你将敌人移动15英尺。

失败 在他们移动之前，你将敌人移动30英尺。

大成功或大失败 你将敌人移动30英尺，且洪流扰乱被触发的移动动作。

Trigger A foe within 60 feet takes a move action

As your foe begins to move, you quickly push or pull them depending on your tide, throwing off their positioning. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success You move the foe 15 feet, just before they move.

Failure You move the foe 30 feet, just before they move.

Critical Failure You move the foe 30 feet and the torrent disrupts the triggering move action.

Water Barrier.name: 水屏障 Water Barrier
Water Barrier.description:
你以水环绕自身，使你获得许多如同身处水下时的防护。直到你下个回合开始前，对你进行的钝击与挥砍攻击承受–2环境减值，且你获得等同于你等级的酸与火伤害抗力。你刷新你的力量，使你可以改为你所选择的高潮或低潮。

You surround yourself in water, providing you many of the protections of being underwater. Until the beginning of your next turn, bludgeoning and slashing attacks take a –2 circumstance penalty against you and you gain resistance equal to your level to acid and fire damage. You Refresh your powers, which allows you to change to your choice of high tide or low tide.

Backlash Gust.name: 反冲阵风 Backlash Gust
Backlash Gust.description:
你向前释放一阵风刃突风，借助反冲将自己送至安全处。你对所有位于 @Template[type:line|distance:20] 内的生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]] 伤害，目标进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免，然后你可以将自己向该线的相反方向发射，最多20尺。

在5级时，你可以选择将该线的尺寸增加至 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 并向后移动最多30尺；此后每4个等级，你都可以将该线的尺寸以及你可向后移动的距离再增加10尺，至17级时最大为60尺。

等级（+1）该伤害增加1d6。

You launch a gust of wind blades forward, riding the backlash to safety. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:20], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save, and then you can launch yourself in the opposite direction of the line up to 20 feet.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the line to a @Template[type:line|distance:30] and move backward up to 30, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the line and the distance you can move backward by 10 additional feet, to a maximum of 60 feet at 17th level.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Crushing Toss.name: 粉碎投掷 Crushing Toss
Crushing Toss.description:
你向敌人投掷一个巨大的无人持用物体或一大块场景碎块。对300尺内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并可能将敌人压碎，具体取决于你的力量攻击掷骰结果。

当这块翻滚的碎块落地时，以目标为中心、除目标以外的所有生物在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内也会受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

如果你更希望所有在该发散范围内的生物都进行一次基础反射豁免而不进行力量攻击掷骰，以获得强效效果，你可以选择以一个空方格而非一名敌人为目标。该发散区域内的地形变为困难地形，直到你刷新。

如此巨大的场景碎块完全由特殊材料制成的可能性极低，但在极其罕见的环境下，若周围环境完全由某种特殊材料建造，GM可能会判定该伤害适用该特殊材料。

大成功 你用巨大的投掷物体或场景碎块将目标彻底压碎。目标被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，并受到双倍伤害。

成功 你重击目标。目标受到全额伤害并倒地。

失败 你瞄得仅够让目标吃到部分效果。目标受到一半伤害。

大失败 尽管你投掷了如此巨大的物体或场景碎块，你仍不知怎的未命中目标，不过你仍可能根据其他附近生物的反射豁免结果影响它们。

等级（+1）该伤害增加1d6。

You throw an enormous unattended object or chunk of the scenery at your foes. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack roll} against a foe within 300 feet, dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage and possibly crushing the foe, depending on your power attack roll.

As the careening chunk lands, all creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around the target other than the target also take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

You can choose to target an empty square instead of a foe if you'd prefer all creatures in the emanation to make a basic Reflex save without a power attack roll for greater effect. The area in the emanation becomes difficult terrain until you refresh.

It's very unlikely that such a large chunk of scenery is entirely made of a special material, but in very rare circumstances where the surroundings are entirely built out of a special material, the GM might determine that the damage applies that special material.

Critical Success You crush your target completely with the enormous thrown object or scenery chunk. The target is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, and takes double damage.

Success You clobber your target. The target takes full damage and falls prone.

Failure You aim only well enough to catch the target with some of the effect. The target takes half damage.

Critical Failure You somehow miss the target despite throwing such a large object or chunk of the scenery, though you still might manage to affect other nearby creatures depending on their Reflex saves.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Elemental Rocket.name: 元素火箭 Elemental Rocket
Elemental Rocket.description:
你运用自身的元素能量，将自己如火箭般沿直线向一名敌人冲刺，最多30尺，猛撞对方并在移动结束时停在与敌人相邻的位置。当你的元素能量推动你前进时，你的身体与敌人发生碰撞，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，其效果取决于你的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}。

如果你的身体异常尖锐或布满针刺，例如你是一只elecupine，GM可能会裁定元素火箭改为造成穿刺伤害，而非钝击伤害。

由于只有你会被你自身的元素所影响，当它将你向前推进时，生物对你的元素的抗力、弱点与免疫不会对元素火箭生效；不过，任何对钝击（或在适用时为穿刺）的抗力、弱点或免疫仍会如常影响元素火箭的伤害。

大成功 你以极其猛烈的力道撞上敌人，造成双倍伤害。

成功 你正面命中敌人，造成全额伤害。

失败 你撞上敌人，但冲击角度尴尬，几乎没伤到对方。你造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败 你不仅完全没撞到敌人，还会在你的移动结束时倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6，或在失败时增加1点。

Using your elemental energies, you rocket yourself up to 30 feet in a straight line directly toward a foe, slamming into them and ending your movement adjacent to the foe. While your elemental energy propels you, your body collides with the foe, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage with effects depending on your @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll}.

If your body is unusually pointy or covered in needles, such as if you're an elecupine, the GM might determine that Elemental Rocket deals piercing damage instead of bludgeoning damage.

Because only you are affected by your own element, as it rockets you forward, creatures' resistances, weakness, and immunities to your element don't apply against Elemental Rocket, though any resistances, weaknesses, or immunities to bludgeoning (or piercing if applicable) affect Elemental Rocket's damage as normal.

Critical Success You slam tremendously hard into the foe, dealing double damage.

Success You slam into the foe with a direct hit, dealing full damage.

Failure You slam into the foe, but the impact is at an awkward angle and barely hurts them. You deal @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] damage.

Critical Failure You not only miss your foe completely, you also fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} at the end of your movement.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1 on a failure.

Infused Ground.name: 灌注之地 Infused Ground
Infused Ground.description:
你将周围的地面灌注元素能量，当你操控这些能量来刷新你的力量时，将其转化为有害地形。你 刷新 你的力量。直到你下个回合开始时，一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的地面成为有害地形，造成与你的 元素 所关联的类型的 @Damage[4[untyped]] 伤害。在14级时，伤害提升至 @Damage[5[untyped]]，在17级时提升至 @Damage[6[untyped]]，在20级时提升至 @Damage[7[untyped]]。

You infuse the ground around you with elemental energy, transforming it into hazardous terrain as you manipulate the energy to refresh your powers. You Refresh your powers. Until the beginning of your next turn, the ground in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] becomes hazardous terrain, dealing @Damage[4[untyped]] damage of your element's associated type. At 14th level, the damage increases to @Damage[5[untyped]], at 17th level, it increases to @Damage[6[untyped]], and at 20th level, it increases to @Damage[7[untyped]].

Retributive Sow.name: 报应母猪 Retributive Sow
Retributive Sow.description:
触发 一个生物用一次攻击命中你

当一个敌人以一次攻击命中你时，无论是近战还是在射程内，你抓住这短暂的连接，放出漂浮的种子，用植物将其包围。你在该敌人的空间以及所有与其相邻的空间中播种。

Trigger A creature hits you with an attack

When a foe hits you with an attack, in melee or at range, you seize the momentary connection and send out floating seeds to surround them with plants. You sow in that foe's space and all spaces adjacent to them.

Hydro Bullet.name: 水弹 Hydro Bullet
Hydro Bullet.description:
你向一名敌人射出一发强力的水弹。对60尺内的一名敌人进行一次@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰}，造成@Damage[(2+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]]伤害。

高潮：以显著的后坐力为代价，伤害提升至@Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power]伤害。你在下个回合开始前处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

低潮：水弹从你60尺内的某处发射，并向你飞回。你仍然不能对具有完全掩蔽的目标使用Hydro Bullet，并且你需要到水弹起始点的效果线，但这可能允许水弹通过从不同方向攻击来无视其他类型的掩蔽。

大成功你对该敌人造成双倍钝击伤害，并使该敌人移动20尺。

成功你对该敌人造成正常钝击伤害，并使该敌人移动10尺。

失败除非敌人随着水弹一起移动，否则无法避免被擦中。你的敌人选择是受到@Damage[(2+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]]伤害，还是让你使其移动5尺。

大失败水弹完全未命中。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d4；在高潮时则增加1d8。

You shoot a powerful bullet of water at a foe. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] damage.

High Tide: The damage increases to @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage in exchange for significant recoil. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until your next turn.

Low Tide: The bullet originates from somewhere within 60 feet of you and flies back toward you. You still can't use Hydro Bullet against a target with total cover, and you need line of effect to the bullet's origin point, but this might allow the bullet to ignore other types of cover by attacking from a different direction.

Critical Success You deal double bludgeoning damage to the foe, and you move the foe 20 feet.

Success You deal normal bludgeoning damage to the foe, and you move the foe 10 feet.

Failure The foe can't avoid being grazed unless they move along with the bullet. Your foe chooses whether to take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] damage or to let you move it 5 feet.

Critical Failure The bullet misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d8 on high tide.

Overflowing Spill.name: 满溢溅泼 Overflowing Spill
Overflowing Spill.description:
你松动一名活敌人体内的生命能量，使其能量外泄并恢复其受害者的伤口。选择30尺内的一名敌人。该效果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 当该敌人伤害他人时，其生命力会短暂外泄。持续1轮，每当其对其15尺内的另一名活生物造成伤害时，该敌人失去等同于2加上你等级的一半（@Damage[ 2+ floor(@actor.level /2)]）的生命值，而目标治疗等同于该数值（@Damage[ (2+ floor(@actor.level /2))[healing]]）的生命值，或其原本将承受的总伤害，以较低者为准（此治疗为恢复效果）。如果其同时对15尺内数名活生物造成伤害，它仍只会失去等同于2加上你等级的一半的生命值，而治疗在其所伤害的所有生物之间分配。

失败 同成功，但效果持续至你刷新。

大成功或大失败 失败 同成功，但效果持续至你刷新，且每当该敌人对15尺内的生物造成伤害时其失去的生命值（因此潜在的治疗量）翻倍。

You loosen the life energy in a living foe, causing their energy to spill out and recover their victim's wounds. Choose a foe within 30 feet. The effect depends on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] saving throw.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe's life force briefly spills out when they harm others. For 1 round, whenever they deal damage to another living creature within 15 feet of them, the foe loses Hit Points equal to 2 plus half your level (@Damage[ 2+ floor(@actor.level /2)]) and the target heals that many (@Damage[ (2+ floor(@actor.level /2))[healing]]) Hit Points or the total damage they would take, whichever is less (this healing is a recovery effect).
