If they damage several living creatures within 15 feet at once, they still only lose Hit Points equal to 2 plus half your level, and the healing is divided among all the creatures they damaged.

Failure As success, except the effect lasts until you refresh.

Critical Failure As success, except the effect lasts until you refresh and the amount of Hit Points the foe loses each time it damages a creature within 15 feet (and thus the potential amount of healing) is doubled.

Muspell.name: 穆斯贝尔海姆 Muspell
Muspell.description:
你选择性地将周遭世界与元素火的源泉并置，焚尽一切令你不悦之物。500尺内的世界仿佛瞬间闪烁消失，取而代之的是目力所及尽是火焰。

你在射程内选择的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[fire]] 伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免，以避免其周围世界在刹那间被牵引入火之领域。

You selectively juxtapose the world around you with the wellspring of elemental fire, burning away all that displeases you. The world within 500 feet momentarily seems to flicker away, replaced with only fire as far as the eye can see.

Creatures you choose within the range take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[fire]] damage, with a @Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true] save to avoid the world around them being drawn for an instant into the realm of fire.

Vanishing Silhouette.name: 消隐剪影 Vanishing Silhouette
Vanishing Silhouette.description:
你放出一道黑暗的剪影，形似你自己的影子；在剪影分散你目标注意力的同时，笼罩自身并立刻躲藏。你对120英尺内的一个生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] 伤害，其效果取决于你的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击检定掷骰}。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1} 状态，持续至你下个回合结束，然后你躲藏。

大成功 该生物承受双倍寒冷伤害。

成功 该生物承受全部寒冷伤害。

失败 该生物承受 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[cold]] 寒冷伤害。

大失败 剪影完全未命中。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d6，或在失败时提高1点。

You send forth a silhouette of darkness that resembles your own shadow, while shrouding yourself and immediately hiding as the silhouette distracts your target. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage to a creature within 120 feet, with effects depending on your @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll}. You become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn and then you Hide.

Critical Success The creature takes double cold damage.

Success The creature takes full cold damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[cold]] cold damage.

Critical Failure The silhouette misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1 on a failure.

Soothing Recovery.name: 舒缓复原 Soothing Recovery
Soothing Recovery.description:
你将一片生命能量的场释放到附近的盟友身上，安抚他们并帮助他们从持续的伤害中恢复。你终止30尺内所有影响你活盟友的所有持续性伤害。安抚的能量会在短暂的时代内附着在这些盟友身上。他们获得等同于你每个等级1点临时生命值，持续至你下次刷新为止。

直到你下次刷新为止，如果他们在对抗毒素或疾病的持续豁免上掷骰获得成功，则改为获得大成功或大失败。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.AACuMXNhDoto9kms]{效果: 安抚恢复}

You release a field of life energy into your nearby allies, soothing them and helping them recover from ongoing harm. You end all persistent damage affecting your living allies within 30 feet. The soothing energy clings to those allies for a brief time. They gain 1 temporary Hit Point for each level you have, which last until the next time you refresh.

Until the next time you refresh, if they roll a success on an ongoing saving throw against a poison or disease, they get a critical success instead.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.AACuMXNhDoto9kms]{Effect: Soothing Recovery}

Vital Breath.name: 活力吐息 Vital Breath
Vital Breath.description:
你吐出一团充满活力的生命能量锥形吐息，为区域内的活生物提供焕然一新的活力。选择以15尺到60尺之间你所选择的任意体型的锥形吐出生命能量。锥形区域内的活生物获得1d4临时生命值，外加你每1等级再获得1d4临时生命值，并在1轮内获得+1状态加值至攻击掷骰。临时生命值持续到你刷新为止。锥形区域内的不死生物受到@Damage[(4+(@actor.level*4))[vitality]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。若失败，不死生物在1轮内为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}；若大失败，则其在1轮内为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.blkufFGRhvUBVIjL]{效果: Vital Breath}

等级（+1） 伤害增加4。

You breathe out a cone of vibrant life energy, providing living creatures in the area with renewed vigor. Choose to breathe life energy in a cone of your choice of size from 15 feet to 60 feet. Living creatures in the cone gain 1d4 temporary Hit Points plus 1d4 temporary Hit Points for every level you have) and gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls for 1 round. The temporary Hit Points last until you refresh. Undead creatures in the cone take @Damage[(4+(@actor.level*4))[vitality]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. On a failure, undead are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.blkufFGRhvUBVIjL]{Effect: Vital Breath}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 4.

Wind Rush.name: 疾风奔袭 Wind Rush
Wind Rush.description:
你借着一阵风携带自身穿行于空气中，并利用这股动量对一名敌人释放强力斩击。疾行至多2次，然后对触及范围内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] 伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍斩击伤害。

成功 你造成正常斩击伤害。

失败 你的斩击落空，但附近的气流擦过目标，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[slashing]] 伤害。

大失败 斩击完全落空，目标毫发无伤。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d8，或在失败时增加1点。

You carry yourself through the air on a rush of wind and use the momentum to unleash a powerful slash on a foe. Stride up to two times and then make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe within reach, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] damage.

Critical Success You deal double slashing damage.

Success You deal normal slashing damage.

Failure Your slash misses, but the nearby air current grazes the target, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[slashing]] damage.

Critical Failure The slash misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Blinding Brilliance.name: 致盲辉光 Blinding Brilliance
Blinding Brilliance.description:
你散发出强烈的光，使周围的生物目眩或失明。你对处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]内的每个生物造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]]伤害，结果取决于其@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免。

大成功或大失败该生物不受影响。

成功该生物受到一半火伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}与@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}状态，持续至你下个回合结束。

失败该生物受到全部火伤害，并陷入目眩与显映的状态，持续至你下下个回合结束（共2轮，然后持续至你回合结束）。

大成功或大失败该生物受到双倍火伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}状态，持续至你下个回合结束，并陷入目眩与显映的状态，持续至你下下个回合结束（共2轮，然后持续至你回合结束）。

等级（+1）伤害提高1d6。

You emanate an intense light that dazzles or blinds those around you. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage, to each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60], with results depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full fire damage and is dazzled and limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Critical Failure The creature takes double fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the end of your next turn and dazzled and limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Tezcatlipoca.name: 特斯卡特利波卡 Tezcatlipoca
Tezcatlipoca.description:
你召唤出一只由黑曜石黑暗构成的神话美洲虎，它以数百道黑曜石爪击横扫你所有的敌人，并吸取他们的光。你所选择的、位于200尺内的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[cold]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免；那些豁免失败者将获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1} 状态，直到你下一回合结束。

You call forth a mythical jaguar of obsidian darkness, slashing through all your foes with hundreds of obsidian claws and leaching away their light. Creatures you choose within 200 feet take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[cold]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save, and those that fail their save are @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

Brainstorm.name: 头脑风暴 Brainstorm
Brainstorm.description:
你召唤出一场在区域中翻涌的心智能量风暴；若你也在该区域内，它会将你敌人的想法窃为己用。灵感风暴充满以你为中心60尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的敌人会受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[mental]]伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}直到你下个回合结束。

若敌人变为迟钝时你在该区域内，你会窃取他们的想法，并在你下个回合结束前，获得+1状态加值于意志豁免、察觉检定、以心智力量进行的力量攻击掷骰，以及基于智力、感知与魅力的技能检定。

每个生物在其每个回合中只会因灵感风暴受到一次心智伤害并变为迟钝，即使它在区域内开始其回合然后又进入该区域也是如此。风暴会持续直到你刷新。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.7NCjs0bdgx7gRmq4]{效果：灵感风暴}

等级（+2）伤害提高1d6。

You call forth a storm of mental energy bubbling in an area, stealing your foes' ideas for yourself if you're in the area as well. The brainstorm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 60 feet of you. Foes that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[mental]] damage and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn.

If you're in the area when a foe becomes stupefied, you steal their ideas and gain a +1 status bonus to Will saves, Perception checks, power attack rolls with mind powers, and skill checks based on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma until the end of your next turn.

A creature only takes mental damage and becomes stupefied from Brainstorm once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area. The storm lasts until you refresh.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.7NCjs0bdgx7gRmq4]{Effect: Brainstorm}

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Lambent Reflection.name: 辉光倒影 Lambent Reflection
Lambent Reflection.description:
你召唤两面镜子，然后发射一道光流，借由镜面反射，最多将其重新导向两次。该光流呈现为一个@Template[type:line|distance:240]，但你可以让这条线在其长度上的点位借由镜子最多两次转向至多90度。区域内的敌人受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]]伤害，其效果取决于他们的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。一名已处于显映的的敌人，其反射豁免承受–2环境减值。即使路径多次与同一名敌人相交，他们也只会受到一次伤害。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半火伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}状态，持续至你下个回合结束。

失败 该生物受到全额火伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态与显映的状态，持续至你下下个回合结束之后你的回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你的回合结束）。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍火伤害，并获得目眩状态与显映的状态，持续至你下下个回合结束之后你的回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你的回合结束）。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d6。

You call two mirrors and then fire a stream of light, bouncing off the mirrors to redirect it up to twice. The stream takes the form of a @Template[type:line|distance:240], except you can cause the line to turn up to 90 degrees twice at the points on its length with mirrors. Foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save. A foe that was already limned takes a –2 circumstance penalty to their Reflex save. Even if the path intersects a foe multiple times, they only take damage once.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Critical Failure The creature takes double fire damage and is dazzled and limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Spasmodic Shock.name: 痉挛震击 Spasmodic Shock
Spasmodic Shock.description:
你将一道电荷注入敌人的神经系统，引发痉挛并影响该生物的协调性。选择120尺内的一个敌人。你对该生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] 伤害，其效果取决于其进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免。

选择一项：

  • 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，则在成功时笨拙（状态）提高至2，在失败时提高至3，并在大成功或大失败时提高至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 4}。

大成功或大失败 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人受到一半伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 1}；两个状态持续1轮。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并获得震慑和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 2}；两个状态持续3轮。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并获得震慑和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 3}；两个状态持续1分钟。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d4，放电时的伤害增加1d8。

You send an electric charge coursing through a foe's nervous system, leading to spasms that affect the creature's coordination. Choose a foe within 120 feet. You deal the creature @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, the clumsy condition increases to 2 on a success, 3 on a failure, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 4} on a critical failure.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}; both conditions last for 1 round.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is shocked and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}; both conditions last for 3 rounds.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is shocked and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3}; both conditions last for 1 minute.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, damage on discharge increases by 1d8.

Static Shock.name: 静电冲击 Static Shock
Static Shock.description:
你在身体表面创造电势，然后接触一名敌人，释放静电冲击。你对被接触的敌人造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] 伤害。结果取决于你的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}。选择一项：

  • 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}，
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d12[electricity]]。

大成功 你造成双倍电击伤害，且敌人在2轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 状态。

成功 你造成正常电击伤害，且敌人获得震慑状态直到你下个回合结束。

失败 你的接触未命中，但部分电击跨越了距离，仍有少量电荷转移至目标。其受到 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[electricity]] 电击伤害，并获得震慑状态直到你下个回合结束。

大失败 你的接触完全未命中，且目标毫发无伤。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d6，放电时的伤害提高1d12。

You create an electric potential on the surface of your body and then touch a foe, releasing a static shock. You deal @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] damage to a touched foe. The results depend on your @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll}. Choose one:

  • You become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged},
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d12[electricity]].

Critical Success You deal double electricity damage and the foe becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} for 2 rounds.

Success You deal normal electricity damage and the foe becomes shocked until the end of your next turn.

Failure Your touch misses, but some of the electricity crosses the distance, and a small charge still transfers to the target. They take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[electricity]] electricity damage and become shocked until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure Your touch misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, damage on discharge increases by 1d12.

Yggdrasil.name: 世界之树 Yggdrasil
Yggdrasil.description:
你培育出一株传奇世界树的树苗，其树干为半径20英尺、高120英尺的圆柱体，并在树干顶部生长出最远可达半径60英尺的枝叶。若没有足够的垂直空间，或有生物或物体占据其树干的空间，则世界树树苗无法生长；但枝叶可按需要缩小半径，最小为30英尺。世界树树苗的树干如常提供掩蔽，其枝叶绽放各种花朵与果实。

这些果实可供至多50个中型生物吃一餐。花朵会在枝叶下方的所有空间洒落花瓣。世界树花瓣与其木元素能量何其奇妙，你可以在花瓣落下之处的地面上，从所有空间中采收任意次数，而无需在该区域播种。

1分钟后，树苗缩回地下并消失。在花瓣飘落的区域内的盟友获得AC与所有豁免+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.42mebRmx1X1RcuCO]{效果: 世界树}

You grow a sapling of a legendary world tree whose trunk is a 20-foot radius cylinder 120 feet tall, growing out to up to a 60-foot radius of branches at the top of the trunk. The world tree sapling can't grow if there's not enough vertical space or if creatures or objects occupy its trunk's space, but the branches can have a smaller radius as necessary, to a minimum of 30 feet. The world tree sapling's trunk provides cover as normal, and its branches blossom with various flowers and fruits.

The fruits can feed up to 50 Medium creatures for one meal. The flowers drop petals on all spaces beneath the branches. So marvelous are the world tree petals and their wood elemental energy that you can harvest from all spaces on the ground where the petals fall any number of times, without needing to sow in the area.

The sapling shrinks back into the ground and vanishes after 1 minute. Allies in the area where the petals are falling gain a +2 status bonus to AC and all saving throws.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.42mebRmx1X1RcuCO]{Effect: Yggdrasil}

Pall of Darkness.name: 黑暗帷幕 Pall of Darkness
Pall of Darkness.description:
你将一片黑暗的帷幕施放于120英尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]上，扼灭光。光无法进入该区域，任何非魔法光源，例如火把或提灯，在该区域内都不会散发任何光，即使其光半径本应延伸到帷幕之外也是如此。魔法光可以如常尝试反制该帷幕。

光无法穿透，因此该区域内的生物若没有黑暗视觉就无法看见区域外。从外部看去，这片黑暗帷幕呈现为一处笼罩的纯粹黑暗区域。

这片黑暗帷幕将持续至你刷新。

You cast a pall of darkness upon a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet, choking out the light. Light does not enter the area and any nonmagical light sources, such as a torch or lantern, don't emanate any light while inside the area, even if their light radius would extend beyond the pall. Magical light can attempt to counteract the pall as normal.

Light can't pass through, so creatures in the area can't see outside without darkvision. From outside, the pall of darkness appears as a shrouded area of pure darkness.

The pall of darkness lasts until you refresh.

Wind Barrier.name: 风之障壁 Wind Barrier
Wind Barrier.description:
当你刷新你的空气力量时，你在自己周围创造一个风之穹顶，在你恢复时驱散远程攻击。持续1轮，针对你或位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的一名盟友的物理远程攻击会根据远程武器的体型承受环境减值。

使用箭、弩矢、子弹或类似弹药的攻击承受–4环境减值；使用更大的远程武器（如标枪）的攻击承受–2环境减值。巨大的远程武器以及不依赖物理物体的法术效果会无减值地穿过风墙。

你刷新你的力量。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.uERezG076DkjIoUt]{效果：风障}

You create a dome of wind around you as you refresh your air powers, scattering ranged attacks while you recover. For 1 round, physical ranged attacks against you or an ally within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] take a circumstance penalty depending on the size of the ranged weapon.

Attacks that use arrows, bolts, bullets, or similar ammunition take a –4 circumstance penalty, attacks with bigger ranged weapons, such as javelins, take a –2 circumstance penalty. Massive ranged weapons and spell effects that don't rely on physical objects pass through the winds with no penalty.

You Refresh your powers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.uERezG076DkjIoUt]{Effect: Wind Barrier}

Storm Surge.name: 风暴涌动 Storm Surge
Storm Surge.description:
一股水的涌动从你身边向外奔涌或向你汇聚，冲击你的敌人。你对处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的所有敌人造成@Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),6))d4[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power]伤害，其效果取决于他们的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免。

高潮：伤害变为@Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),6))d8[bludgeoning]]伤害，但突如其来的涌动会扰乱你的反射。直到你下个回合结束前，你的反射豁免承受–2环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.fdgqSSrOsrq1yoRO]{效果：风暴涌动（高潮）}

低潮：你汇聚涌动的水来帮助你跃开敌人的效果。直到你下个回合结束前，你的反射豁免获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.BPlem9tBkw6ztaBd]{效果：风暴涌动（低潮）}

大成功或大失败 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人承受一半伤害。

失败 敌人承受全部伤害，并且你将其移动10尺。

大成功或大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，将其移动10尺，然后使其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d4，或在高潮时增加1d8。

A surge of water rushes outward from you or toward you, buffeting your foes. You deal @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),6))d4[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage to all foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),6))d8[bludgeoning]] damage, but the sudden surge disrupts your reflexes. You take a –2 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.fdgqSSrOsrq1yoRO]{Effect: Storm Surge (High Tide)}

Low Tide: You gather the surging waters to help you leap out of the way of enemy effects. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.BPlem9tBkw6ztaBd]{Effect: Storm Surge (Low Tide)}

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you move them 10 feet.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, move them 10 feet, and then knock them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d8 on high tide.

Sink Into the Dark.name: 沉入黑暗 Sink Into the Dark
Sink Into the Dark.description:
触发 一个生物在一次察觉检定中成功地对你进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}，并且你将会被该生物观察到。

需求 你处于笼罩的状态，且对该生物而言处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}或未察觉。

正当一个生物即将观察到你时，你沉入你的黑暗帷幕之中以摆脱他们的注意。就在该生物瞥见你的一瞬间，你尝试[[/act hide]]，且你的检定获得+2状态加值。

Trigger A creature succeeds at a Perception check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} you and you would become observed by that creature.

Requirements You are shrouded and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or undetected to the creature.

Just when a creature is about to observe you, you sink into your shroud of darkness to shake off their notice. Just as the creature catches a glimpse of you, you attempt to [[/act hide]], with a +2 status bonus on your check.

Retributive Wave.name: 惩戒波 Retributive Wave
Retributive Wave.description:
触发 一个生物用近战攻击命中你。

你召唤一道波浪，将你的敌人击退向你或远离你，取决于你的潮汐。其必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物选择是让你将其移动5尺，或是变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 直到其下个回合结束。

失败 你将该生物移动10尺。若你处于低潮且该生物原本已在你身旁，则其变为off-guard直到其下个回合结束。

大成功或大失败 失败 你将该生物移动20尺。若你处于低潮且该生物原本已在你身旁，则其变为off-guard持续2轮。

Trigger A creature hits you with a melee attack.

You call forth a wave to knock your foe toward you or away from you, depending on your tide. They must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature chooses whether to let you move it 5 feet or to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of its next turn.

Failure You move the creature 10 feet. If you're at low tide and the creature was already next to you, it becomes off-guard until the end of its next turn.

Critical Failure You move the creature 20 feet. If you're at low tide and the creature was already next to you, it becomes off-guard for 2 rounds.

Piercing Spike.name: 穿刺尖刺 Piercing Spike
Piercing Spike.description:
你创造一根石刺，并在射出时将其扭转，使其沿直线贯穿数名敌人。对在一个 @Template[type:line|distance:15] 内的每名敌人进行 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}。它们将根据你的力量攻击掷骰结果，受到 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] 伤害。

如果你的触及大于5尺，则直线的长度等于你的触及 + 10（10尺触及为 @Template[type:line|distance:20]，15尺触及为 @Template[type:line|distance:25]，依此类推）。

大成功 你对该敌人造成双倍伤害，且除非它们或一名盟友先花费一个交互动作将碎片移除，否则它们会因石刺碎片在1轮内于攻击掷骰上承受–2状态减值。

成功 你对该敌人造成正常伤害，且除非它们或一名盟友先花费一个交互动作将碎片移除，否则它们会因石刺碎片在其下一次攻击掷骰上承受–2状态减值。

失败 石刺仅擦过敌人，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[piercing]] 伤害。

大失败 石刺完全未命中。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.djj4RVWRNzz4wiI5]{效果：穿刺石刺碎片}

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d6，或在失败时提高1点伤害。

You create a spike of stone and twist it as you shoot it forth, piercing through several foes in a line. Make @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack rolls} against each foe in a @Template[type:line|distance:15]. They take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage, depending on the results of your power attack roll.

If your reach is greater than 5 feet, the length of the line is equal to your reach + 10 (a @Template[type:line|distance:20] for 10-foot reach, a @Template[type:line|distance:25] for 15-foot reach, and so on).

Critical Success You deal double damage to the foe, and they take a –2 status penalty on attack rolls for 1 round from the spike's fragments unless they or an ally spend an Interact action to remove them first.

Success You deal normal damage to the foe, and they take a –2 status penalty on their next attack roll from the spike's fragments unless they or an ally spend an Interact action to remove them first.

Failure The spike only grazes the foe, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[piercing]] damage.

Critical Failure The spike misses completely.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.djj4RVWRNzz4wiI5]{Effect: Piercing Spike Fragment}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1 damage on a failure.

Deep Freeze.name: 深度冰封 Deep Freeze
Deep Freeze.description:
你将所有冰力量集中于60尺内的一个生物，根据其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免，将其冻结得异常深。

大成功或大失败 该生物摆脱了大部分效果，但仍然是冻结 1。

成功 该生物被部分冻结，并变为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 5}。

失败 该生物被显著冻结，并变为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 8}（由于冻结状态一次性施加，这可以超过由冰积累合并冻结值的上限，但最高仅到8）。

大成功或大失败 该生物不仅被冻结，还被冷却到寒意使其迟钝并减缓其移动的程度。该生物在2轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，并且冻结 8。

You concentrate all your ice powers on a single creature within 60 feet, freezing it exceptionally deeply, depending on its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature shakes most of the effect off but is still frozen 1.

Success The creature is partially frozen over, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5}.

Failure The creature is significantly frozen over and becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 8} (since the frozen condition applies all at once, this can surpass the limit for combining frozen value from ice accumulation, but only to a maximum of 8).

Critical Failure The creature is not only frozen but chilled to the point that the cold dulls and slows its movements. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 2 rounds and frozen 8.

Embrace the Dark.name: 拥抱黑暗 Embrace the Dark
Embrace the Dark.description:
你拥抱周围的黑暗，以便刷新你的黑暗力量。你刷新你的力量，并在你下个回合结束前变为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}。你 [[/act hide]]，然后 [[/act sneak]]。

You embrace the darkness around you in order to refresh your darkness powers. You Refresh your powers and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn. You [[/act hide]], then [[/act sneak]].

Wintry Vortex.name: 凛冬漩涡 Wintry Vortex
Wintry Vortex.description:
你以可塑形的冬日漩涡环绕自身，旋转的雨夹雪与极寒翻涌。你对位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的所有敌人造成等同于@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 +ceil(@actor.level/2))[cold]]伤害的寒冷伤害，其结果取决于它们的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并且为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并且为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3}。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4}。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1。

You surround yourself in a shapeable wintry vortex of swirling sleet and deepest cold. You deal an amount of cold damage equal to @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 +ceil(@actor.level/2))[cold]] damage to all foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], with results depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}.

Failure The creature takes full damage is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Absolute Zero.name: 绝对零度 Absolute Zero
Absolute Zero.description:
你将完美的寒冷注入一名生物的全身，使其移动减缓至停滞。选择90英尺内的一名生物。目标受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免结果。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2} 状态，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1} 状态。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3} 状态，并在1轮内获得迟缓 2 状态，然后在之后的那一轮获得迟缓 1 状态。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4} 状态，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 3} 状态，然后在之后的那一轮获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2} 状态，最后在再之后的那一轮获得迟缓 1 状态。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You infuse perfect cold throughout a creature's body, slowing its movements down to nothing. Choose a creature within 90 feet. The target takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage, is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}, and is slowed 2 for 1 round, then slowed 1 the round after that.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4}, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 3} for 1 round, then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} the round after that, and finally slowed 1 the round after that.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Effulgent Explosion.name: 辉煌爆炸 Effulgent Explosion
Effulgent Explosion.description:
你蓄力引发一场灿烂光爆，使其中的生物在较长时间内被显映的标记。爆炸在360英尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:30]中形成，对区域内每个生物造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]]伤害，取决于它们的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}状态，持续1分钟。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态，直到你下个回合结束，且被显映的持续10分钟。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并获得目眩状态，直到你下个回合结束，且被显映的持续1小时。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You charge up an explosion of effulgent light that limns creatures within for a lengthy period. The explosion forms in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] within 360 feet, dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage to each creature in the area, depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} for 1 minute.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of your next turn and limned for 10 minutes.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is dazzled until the end of your next turn and limned for 1 hour.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Death Blow.name: 死亡重击 Death Blow
Death Blow.description:
你召唤死亡的力量迅速降临，屠戮附近的敌人。你对60英尺内的一名敌人造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[void]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d10。

You call upon the power of death to descend swiftly upon and slaughter a nearby foe. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[void]] damage to a foe within 60 feet, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Bewitching Meme.name: 蛊惑梗图 Bewitching Meme
Bewitching Meme.description:
你在一个锥形范围内散播一种自我复制的心智过程，使你的敌人对你产生着迷。你对@Template[type:cone|distance:40]内的所有敌人造成 @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免结果。

大成功或大失败 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害，并对你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}状态，持续1轮，但任何敌对动作都会如常结束该着迷。

失败 敌人受到全部伤害，并对你着迷1轮。与通常不同，只有针对受影响敌人的敌对动作才会结束该着迷，而不是针对该敌人盟友的敌对动作。

大成功或大失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，并对你着迷1轮。与通常不同，敌对动作不会提前结束该着迷。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1。

You spread a self-replicative mental process in a cone, causing your foes to become fascinated with you. You deal @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[mental]] damage to all foes in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40], with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by you for 1 round, though any hostile action ends the fascination as normal.

Failure The foe takes full damage and is fascinated by you for 1 round. Unlike normal, only hostile actions against the affected foe end the fascination, not hostile actions against the foe's allies.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and is fascinated by you for 1 round. Unlike normal, hostile actions don't end the fascination early.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Ignite.name: 点燃 Ignite
Ignite.description:
你点燃你的敌人，使其着火并陷入燃烧。你对30尺内的一个目标造成 @Damage[(@actor.level*2)[persistent,fire]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半的持续火伤害。

失败 该生物承受全部的持续火伤害。

大失败 该生物承受全部的持续火伤害，并立即燃烧，受到 @Damage[(4*@actor.level)[fire]] 伤害。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加2。

You light your foe on fire, setting them ablaze. You deal @Damage[(@actor.level*2)[persistent,fire]] damage to a target within 30 feet, with an effect based on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half persistent fire damage.

Failure The creature takes full persistent fire damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes full persistent fire damage and burns immediately for @Damage[(4*@actor.level)[fire]].

Level (+1) The damage increases by 2.

Gusting Curtain.name: 疾风帷幕 Gusting Curtain
Gusting Curtain.description:
你在战场上描绘出一道风之帷幕，斩裂穿越它的目标，并将对你盟友的远程攻击吹回。你创造一道5尺厚的风之帷幕，高至10尺，长至@Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long in a straight line}，并可在120尺内唤出该帷幕。任何穿过帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据帷幕区域的生物，都会受到@Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d6[slashing]]伤害。此外，你可以选择让帷幕在你将其吹开的同时，使其对抗你敌人的物理远程攻击（不包括异常巨大的远程投射物，例如巨石或弩炮弩矢）为AC提供+2环境加值。穿过帷幕的你盟友的物理远程攻击会被风加速，改为使该次攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值。该帷幕持续直到你刷新。每个生物在其每个回合中只会因“阵风帷幕”受到一次挥砍伤害，即使它在回合开始时位于帷幕内随后又穿过帷幕，或多次穿过帷幕也是如此。

等级（+2）伤害增加1d6。

You trace a curtain of wind across the battlefield, slashing those who cross it and pushing back ranged attacks against your allies. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of wind up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long in a straight line}, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d6[slashing]] damage. Additionally, you can choose to have the curtain provide a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against your enemies' physical ranged attacks other than unusually massive ranged projectiles (such as boulders or ballista bolts) as you blow them away. The winds accelerate your allies physical ranged attacks that pass through the curtain, granting them a +1 circumstance bonus to the attack roll instead. The curtain lasts until you refresh. A creature only takes slashing damage from Gusting Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Polar Rime.name: 极地霜霭 Polar Rime
Polar Rime.description:
你用寒冽的极地霜痕包围你的目标，使其身体僵硬，移动变得生硬而笨拙。选择90尺内的一个生物。目标受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[cold]]伤害，并在其保持冻结时变得笨拙，其效果取决于其@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]强韧豁免。若其曾经结束冻结状态，则不再笨拙，即使你之后再次给予其冻结状态也一样。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，变为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}，并在其保持冻结时处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，变为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3}，并在其保持冻结时变得笨拙，其数值等于其冻结数值的一半，最高为冻结数值达到8或更高时的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 4}。当该生物的冻结数值增加或减少时，其笨拙数值也会相应改变。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但该生物受到双倍伤害，并且为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 5}。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d8。

You surround your target with algid polar rime, stiffening its body and making its movements jerky and clumsy. Choose a creature within 90 feet. The target takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[cold]] damage and becomes clumsy while it remains frozen, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save. If it ever ends the frozen condition, it's no longer clumsy, even if you later give it the frozen condition again.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage, becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} as long as it remains frozen.

Failure The creature takes full damage, becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}, and becomes clumsy as long as it remains frozen with a value equal to half its frozen value, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 4} with a frozen value of 8 or higher. As the creature's frozen value increases or decreases, its clumsy value changes accordingly.

Critical Failure As failure, except the creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5}.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d8.

Illuminating Curtain.name: 照明帷幕 Illuminating Curtain
Illuminating Curtain.description:
你在战场上划出一道光之帷幕，显映并炫目那些穿越它的人。你创造一道5英尺厚的光之帷幕，高至10英尺，且以一直线延伸至多 @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long}，在120英尺内感召出该帷幕。帷幕的光如此明亮，以至于光会遮蔽另一侧的一切，不过你和你的盟友会无视来自帷幕的隐蔽，因为光会向你揭示其秘密。任何穿越帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据帷幕区域的生物，会受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[fire]] 伤害，并成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 和 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned}，直到其下个回合结束。帷幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

一个生物在其每个回合中只会从照明帷幕受到一次火伤害，即使它在回合开始时处于帷幕中然后又穿越帷幕，或多次穿越帷幕。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1d6。

You trace a curtain of light across the battlefield, limning and dazzling those who cross it. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of light up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet long} in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. The curtain is so bright that the light conceals everything on the other side, though you and your allies ignore the concealment from the curtain, as the light reveals its secrets to you. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[fire]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of their next turn. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes fire damage from Illuminating Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Level (+2) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Umbral Curtain.name: 幽影帷幕 Umbral Curtain
Umbral Curtain.description:
你在战场上划出一道黑暗的帷幕，笼罩穿过它的对象。你创造一面5尺厚的黑暗帷幕，高至10尺、长至@Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet}尺，以直线延伸，并在120尺内感召这面帷幕。帷幕处于黑暗并阻挡光；只有具备黑暗视觉的生物才能看到帷幕的另一侧。

任何穿过帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据帷幕区域的生物，受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]]伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}，直到其下个回合结束。该帷幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

每个生物在其每个回合中只会因“幽影帷幕”受到一次寒冷伤害，即使它在帷幕中开始其回合然后穿过帷幕，或多次穿过帷幕。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1d6。

You trace a curtain of darkness across the battlefield, enshrouding those who cross it. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of darkness up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet} long in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. The curtain is dark and blocks light; only creatures with darkvision can see the other side of the curtain.

Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of its next turn. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes cold damage from Umbral Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Level (+2) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Pallid Frostbite.name: 苍白霜噬 Pallid Frostbite
Pallid Frostbite.description:
你令一个生物遭受剧烈冻伤，使其冻结的身体变得脆弱，并更容易受到物理攻击伤害。选择60英尺内的一个敌人。该目标受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[cold]] 伤害，并获得等同于你等级一半的物理伤害弱点，其效果取决于其强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2} 状态，并获得物理伤害弱点，直到你下个回合结束。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3} 状态，并获得物理伤害弱点，持续2轮。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4} 状态，并获得两倍于正常值的物理伤害弱点，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4gGxZ9HGl5eqWYWq]{效果：苍白冻伤}

等级（+1） 该伤害增加1点。

You give a creature intense frostbite, making its frozen body brittle and easily harmed by physical attacks. Choose a foe within 60 feet. The target takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[cold]] damage and gains weakness equal to half your level to physical damage, with effects depending on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage, is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}, and gains the weakness to physical damage until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}, and gains the weakness to physical damage for 2 rounds.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4}, and gains twice the normal weakness to physical damage for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4gGxZ9HGl5eqWYWq]{Effect: Pallid Frostbite}

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1.

Ocean Torrent.name: 海洋激流 Ocean Torrent
Ocean Torrent.description:
你汲取自己的耐力储备，在一条直线上创造一道海洋水流的洪流。你对@Template[type:line|distance:40]内所有敌人造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]]伤害，其效果取决于他们的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免。

在第7等级时，你在使用 Ocean Torrent 时可以选择将直线的体型增加到@Template[type:line|distance:50]；此后每4等级，你都可以将直线的体型再增加10英尺，至第19等级时最大为80英尺。

高潮：伤害变为@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power]伤害，代价是你的耐力。直到你下个回合结束前，你的强韧豁免承受–2环境减值。

低潮：你通过将洪流汇聚到自身来积攒耐力。直到你下个回合结束前，你的强韧豁免获得+2环境加值。

大成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物受到一半伤害。

失败该生物受到全额伤害，且你将其移动10英尺。

大失败该生物受到双倍伤害，且你将其移动20英尺。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Qo8ccw1GcVpmOOxd]{效果：Ocean Torrent（高潮）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.bfYTSksrTpFrN764]{效果：Ocean Torrent（低潮）}

等级（+1）伤害增加1d4。

You tap into your reserves of endurance to create a torrent of ocean water in a line. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] damage to all foes in a @Template[type:line|distance:40], with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

At 7th level, you can choose to increase the size of the line to a @Template[type:line|distance:50] when you use Ocean Torrent, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the line by 10 additional feet, to a maximum of 80 feet at 19th level.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage at the cost of your endurance. You take a –2 circumstance penalty to Fortitude saves until the end of your next turn.

Low Tide: You build your endurance by gathering the torrent to you. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves until the end of your next turn.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and you move them 10 feet.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and you move them 20 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Qo8ccw1GcVpmOOxd]{Effect: Ocean Torrent (High Tide)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.bfYTSksrTpFrN764]{Effect: Ocean Torrent (Low Tide)}

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d4.

Explode Corpse.name: 尸体爆炸 Explode Corpse
Explode Corpse.description:
你将死亡能量注入一名生物的体内，使其从内部膨胀，并在死亡时爆炸。选择60尺内的一名生物。该目标受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[void]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]强韧豁免。若此效果将目标降至0生命值，则目标爆炸，对你选择的一个以其为中心、半径至多30尺的散发内所有生物造成等量伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

因该爆炸而死亡的生物会以同样方式继续爆炸；不过，即使一名生物处于多个此类爆炸的区域中，它也只会因爆尸术受到一次伤害。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d8。

You send death energy into a creature's body, bloating it from the inside and causing it to explode upon death. Choose a creature within 60 feet. The target takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[void]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. If this reduces the target to 0 Hit Points, the target explodes, dealing the same amount of damage to all creatures in an emanation of your choice of radius, up to 30 feet, with a basic Reflex save.

Creatures who die from the explosion continue to explode in the same way, though even if a creature is in the area of multiple such explosions, they only take damage once from Explode Corpse.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d8.

Unrelenting Jet.name: 不息喷流 Unrelenting Jet
Unrelenting Jet.description:
你召唤出一枚水之宝珠，对一名敌人发射持续不断的水流喷射，试图阻止其接近或使其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}。你对60英尺内的一名单个敌人造成 @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),6))d4[bludgeoning]] 伤害，其效果取决于其进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。

高潮：该伤害改为 @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),6))d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害，但你直到下个回合结束前对AC承受–2减值。

低潮：除非目标在其豁免中获得大成功或大失败，否则目标直到你下个回合结束前对你进行攻击掷骰时承受–2环境减值。

大成功或大失败该生物不受影响。

成功目标受到一半伤害，并且在1轮内，对其而言逆着水流移动（高潮时朝向你，或低潮时远离你）为困难地形。

失败目标受到全额伤害，你使目标移动5英尺，并且在1轮内，对其而言逆着水流移动（高潮时朝向你，或低潮时远离你）为强效困难地形。

大成功或大失败目标受到双倍伤害，你使目标移动10英尺，并且在1轮内其无法逆着水流移动（高潮时朝向你，或低潮时远离你）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.s7OtrwAXwaGWVT10]{效果：无情喷射（高潮）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Be68woo4zufVqnxc]{效果：无情喷射（低潮）}

等级（+1）伤害提高1d4，或在高潮时提高1d8。

You call forth an orb of water that fires a continuous jet against a foe, attempting to prevent it from approaching or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}. You deal @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),6))d4[bludgeoning]] damage to a single foe within 60 feet, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),6))d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage, but you take a –2 penalty to AC until the end of your next turn.

Low Tide: The target takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn unless they critically succeed at their saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and moving against the jet (toward you for high tide, or away from you for low tide) is difficult terrain for them for 1 round.

Failure The target takes full damage, you move the target 5 feet, and moving against the jet (toward you for high tide, or away from you for low tide) is greater difficult terrain for them for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, you move the target 10 feet, and it can't move against the jet (toward you for high tide, or away from you for low tide) for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.s7OtrwAXwaGWVT10]{Effect: Unrelenting Jet (High Tide)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Be68woo4zufVqnxc]{Effect: Unrelenting Jet (Low Tide)}

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d4, or 1d8 on high tide.

Aegis of Immortal Stone.name: 不朽之石的护卫 Aegis of Immortal Stone
Aegis of Immortal Stone.description:
你以近乎无懈可击的大地与岩石防护神盾环绕自身。直到你下个回合开始，你获得对AC、反射豁免与强韧豁免的+2环境加值，以及等于你等级四倍的物理伤害抗力（除了精金）。在你下个回合开始时，若该神盾的增益从未适用（没有任何东西攻击你、你从未尝试任何反射或强韧豁免，而且你从未会受到伤害），则较弱的增益会持续。

你获得对AC、反射豁免与强韧豁免的+1环境加值，以及等于你等级的物理伤害抗力（除了精金）；其持续到该神盾的增益首次适用，或直到你刷新，两者以先发生者为准。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.NxkjDZeTAH7EfQsL]{效果：不朽岩石神盾}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.pjjAa7XPeo7nRVsg]{效果：不朽岩石神盾（持续）}

You surround yourself with a nigh-invulnerable protective aegis of earth and stone. Until the beginning of your next turn, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC, Reflex saves, and Fortitude saves, as well as resistance to physical damage (except adamantine) equal to four times your level. At the beginning of your next turn, if the aegis's benefits did not apply (nothing attacked you, you never attempted a Reflex or Fortitude save, and you never would have taken damage), lesser benefits linger.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC, Reflex saves, and Fortitude saves, as well as resistance to physical damage (except adamantine) equal to your level, which lasts until either the first time the aegis's benefits apply or until you refresh, whichever comes first.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.NxkjDZeTAH7EfQsL]{Effect: Aegis of Immortal Stone}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.pjjAa7XPeo7nRVsg]{Effect: Aegis of Immortal Stone (Lingering)}

Grasping Permafrost.name: 攫握冻土 Grasping Permafrost
Grasping Permafrost.description:
你使环绕敌人的霜冻抓握并进一步侵入他们的身体，令其遭受剧烈伤害。在120尺内，因你的冰力量而处于冻结状态的敌人会受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] 伤害，外加等同于其冻结数值数量的d8寒冷伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

You cause the frost surrounding your foes to grasp and extend further into their bodies, causing them intense harm. Foes within 120 feet who have the frozen condition from your ice powers take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage, plus an additional number of d8s of cold damage equal to their frozen value, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Blizzard.name: 暴风雪 Blizzard
Blizzard.description:
你召唤一场冰川暴风雪，冻结其中的所有对象。暴风雪充满你120英尺内的一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]。进入或在该区域开始其回合的敌人会受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]] 伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}。风暴持续到你刷新为止。

一个生物在其每个回合中只会因暴风雪受到一次寒冷伤害并变为冻结，即使它在区域内开始其回合，然后又进入该区域。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1d6。

You conjure a glacial blizzard that freezes over all those within. The blizzard fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Foes that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]] damage and are @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}. The storm lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes cold damage and becomes frozen from Blizzard once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Level (+2) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Smoldering Curtain.name: 闷燃帷幕 Smoldering Curtain
Smoldering Curtain.description:
你在战场上划出一道火焰帷幕，焚烧任何穿过它的存在。你创造一道5英尺厚的火焰帷幕，高至10英尺，最长为一条直线上的@Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet}。你在120英尺内感召这道帷幕出现。任何穿过该帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据帷幕区域的生物，受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[fire]]伤害。该帷幕持续至你刷新为止。

生物在其每个回合中只会从“闷燃帷幕”受到一次火伤害，即使它在回合开始时位于帷幕中随后又穿过帷幕，或在同一回合内多次穿过帷幕。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You trace a curtain of flame across the battlefield, immolating those who cross it. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of flame up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet} long in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet. Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[fire]] damage. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes fire damage from Smoldering Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d4.

Path of Life.name: 生命之路 Path of Life
Path of Life.description:
你身后留下一条充满活力的治疗能量轨迹。你要么进行疾走，要么进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{翻滚穿越}，在那次移动期间你进入过的所有空间中留下闪烁的生命能量，该能量持续到你下个回合结束。记录活生物在处于生命之路内时实际失去的生命值。当它们在生命之路内开始其回合时，它们恢复@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[healing]]生命值，或恢复其在生命之路内失去的生命值数量，取两者较少者。在生命之路内开始其回合的亡灵生物，或穿过生命之路的亡灵生物，承受@Damage[(4+(4*@actor.level))[vitality]]伤害。亡灵生物只会从生命之路中承受一次活力伤害，即使它在路径中开始其回合然后穿过路径，或多次穿过路径。穿过路径的活生物不会被治疗。

等级 (+1) 治疗增加1d4，伤害增加4。

You trail a path of vibrant healing energy behind you. You either Stride or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through}, leaving behind glimmering life energy in all the spaces you entered during that movement, which lasts until the end of your next turn. Keep track of actual Hit Points living creatures lose while they are within the Path of Life. When they start their turn in the Path of Life, they regain @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[healing]] Hit Points, or the amount of Hit Points they lost while within the Path of Life, whichever is less. Undead creatures that start their turn in the Path of Life, or that cross the Path of Life, take @Damage[(4+(4*@actor.level))[vitality]] damage. An undead creature only takes vitality damage from the Path of Life once, even if it starts its turn in the path and then crosses the path, or crosses the path several times. Living creatures that cross the path aren't healed.

Level (+1) The healing increases by 1d4 and the damage increases by 4.

Contagious Folly.name: 传染性愚行 Contagious Folly
Contagious Folly.description:
你用一种特别的愚蠢感染一名敌人，这种愚蠢出人意料地引人入胜，并会迅速传播给听见其胡言乱语的人。选择60尺内的一名敌人。其受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

在因传染性愚行而陷入迟钝期间，每当该生物触碰其一名盟友或与其一名盟友交流时，该盟友也必须尝试对抗传染性愚行的意志豁免，并在其豁免上获得+2环境加值；一个生物只能受到同一个传染性愚行影响一次，即使其具有传染性的盟友多次触碰它或多次尝试与它交流也是如此。

这些盟友本身不具传染性，而通过交流造成的传染效果具有语言（特征）（如果其盟友无法理解被感染敌人所说的荒唐内容，他们就无法以这种方式传播其愚行）。

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1} 直到你下个回合结束。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，并获得迟钝1直到你刷新。

大失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2} 直到你刷新。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You infect a foe with a particular brand of foolishness that's surprisingly compelling and quickly spreads to those who hear its blathering. Choose a foe within 60 feet. They take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

While stupefied by Contagious Folly, whenever that creature touches one of their allies or communicates with one of their allies, that ally also must attempt a Will save against Contagious Folly with a +2 circumstance bonus on their saving throw; a creature can only be affected by the same Contagious Folly once, even if their infectious ally touches them or attempts to communicate with them multiple times.

These allies aren't themselves contagious, and the contagious effect via communication has the linguistic trait (if their allies can't understand the inane things the infected foe is saying, they can't spread their folly that way).

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The foe takes full damage and is stupefied 1 until you refresh.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until you refresh.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Tremor Stomp.name: 震颤践踏 Tremor Stomp
Tremor Stomp.description:
需求 你站在坚实的表面上

你跺脚并将大地能量注入地面，制造一次局部震颤。你对所有站在同一坚实表面上、处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:5]内的生物造成@Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]]伤害，其效果取决于它们的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免。

在9级时，当你使用Tremor Stomp，你可以选择将该放射的体型增加到@Template[type:emanation|distance:10]；在17级时，你也可以选择将其增加到@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并且立足不稳，使其在其下一回合开始前成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并且立足不稳，使其在其下一回合开始前成为off-guard。它在1轮内对你以外的生物进行攻击的攻击掷骰承受–1环境减值。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物受到全额伤害并倒下@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。它在1轮内对你以外的生物进行攻击的攻击掷骰承受–2环境减值。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

Requirements You are standing on a solid surface

You stomp and infuse earth energy into the ground, creating a localized tremor. You deal @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures standing on the same solid surface in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5], with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

At 9th level, you can choose to increase the size of the emanation to a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] when you use Tremor Stomp, and at 17th level, you can also choose to increase it to a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15].

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success The creature takes half damage and their footing is unsteady, causing them to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the beginning of their next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage and their footing is unsteady, causing them to become off-guard until the beginning of their next turn. It takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against creatures other than you for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. It takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against creatures other than you for 1 round.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Gloaming Backstab.name: 幽影背刺 Gloaming Backstab
Gloaming Backstab.description:
你沉入阴影之中，用一把纯粹黑暗之刃从背后刺向你的敌人。你对一名在你触及内的敌人造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[cold]] 伤害。结果取决于你的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}。如果你处于笼罩的状态，且对该敌人而言你为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉}，你会额外造成2d4精准伤害，外加你每有1级便再额外造成1d4精准伤害，并且该攻击后笼罩的状态结束。否则，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}，持续到你下个回合结束。

大成功或大失败：成功 你造成双倍寒冷伤害（以及精准伤害，如果有的话）。

成功 你造成正常寒冷伤害（以及精准伤害，如果有的话）。

失败 你的背刺未命中，但黑暗仍然降临于其身。他们受到 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[cold]] 伤害；精准伤害不适用。

大成功或大失败：失败 你的背刺完全落空，且目标未受伤害。

等级 (+1) 寒冷伤害增加1d6，或在失败时增加1点，并且精准伤害增加1d4。

You sink into the shadows and stab your foe in the back with a blade of pure darkness. You deal @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage to a foe within reach. The results depend on your @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll}. If you're shrouded and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} by the foe, you deal an additional 2d4 precision damage plus 1d4 precision damage for every level you have, and the shrouded condition ends after the attack. Otherwise, you become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Success You deal double cold damage (and precision damage, if any).

Success You deal normal cold damage (and precision damage, if any).

Failure Your backstab misses, but the darkness still falls upon them. They take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[cold]] damage; the precision damage doesn't apply.

Critical Failure Your backstab misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The cold damage increases by 1d6, or 1 on a failure and the precision damage increases by 1d4.

Vengeful Backlash.name: 复仇反击 Vengeful Backlash
Vengeful Backlash.description:
需求 你正站在坚固的表面上

你在体内循环大地能量，准备释放惩戒性冲击波，以等量但相反的反应动作（）惩罚那些胆敢伤害你的人，甚至还能在他们的武器中回响。直到你下个回合开始（或直到你不再站在坚固的表面上，以先发生者为准），所有用近战打击命中你的生物都会因“复仇反冲”受到钝击伤害，其数值等于他们的伤害掷骰结果，并在将伤害因大成功或大失败翻倍或因抗力、弱点等调整之前结算。

当此效果持续期间，你可以选择让自己对敌人攻击的AC承受环境减值，最多减值为–4，以便承受更多命中；你可以对每次攻击分别选择该减值。

若在“复仇反冲”生效期间没有任何生物用近战打击命中你，则在你的下个回合，若你使用一个没有持续时间的、造成伤害的大地力量，则该力量造成额外的 @Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.EPPZVNLm4W9qwQAB]{效果: 复仇反冲}

等级 (+1) 该伤害增加1点。

Requirements You are standing on a solid surface

You circulate earth energy within yourself, ready to send shockwaves of backlash that punish those who dare to harm you with an equal but opposite reaction, even reverberating through their weapons. Until the beginning of your next turn (or until you are no longer standing on a solid surface, whichever comes first), all creatures that hit you with melee Strikes take bludgeoning damage from Vengeful Backlash equal to the result of their damage roll, before doubling the damage for a critical hit or adjusting for resistance, weakness, or the like.

While this effect lasts, you can choose to give yourself a circumstance penalty to AC against your foes' attacks, up to a maximum penalty of –4, in order to take more hits; you can select the penalty separately against each attack.

If no creatures hit you with melee Strikes while Vengeful Backlash is active, on your next turn, if you use a damaging earth power without a duration, that power deals additional @Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]] damage.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.EPPZVNLm4W9qwQAB]{Effect: Vengeful Backlash}

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1.

Padma.name: 莲花 Padma
Padma.description:
你召唤出一团神话般的莲花虫群，其近乎无限的切面反射出千万亿种不同的可能性，以及纯粹木之能量的创造性相。所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:500] 内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true] 意志豁免。

在该区域内播撒漂浮的莲花，包括在空气中。这些莲花只持续到你下个回合开始，但它们不会妨碍你或你盟友的移动。

You call forth a swarm of mythical lotus blossoms, whose near infinite facets reflect a quadrillion different possibilities and the creative aspects of pure wood energy. All foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:500] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Sow floating lotuses within the area, including in the air. These lotuses only last until the beginning of your next turn, but they don't impede the movement of you or your allies.

Rushing Current.name: 奔涌激流 Rushing Current
Rushing Current.description:
你创造一道宽阔的水流，猛击你的敌人，并使逆流移动变得困难。水流为一条 @Template[type:line|distance:60|width:15] 宽15尺的直线。你使用该力量时，区域内的敌人会受到 @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),10))d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，具体取决于其 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。

在其区域内逆流移动（若你在高潮使用“奔涌激流”，则为朝向你；若你在低潮使用“奔涌洪流”，则为远离你）将成为持续1轮的困难地形。

高潮：伤害改为 @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),10))d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害，但你在直到你下个回合结束前对反射豁免承受-2减值。

低潮：你在直到你下个回合结束前对反射豁免获得+2环境加值。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人受到一半伤害，且你将其移动5尺。

失败 该敌人受到全额伤害，且你将其移动10尺。

大失败 该敌人受到双倍伤害，且你将其移动20尺。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.bIefoFLc8f59bJl6]{效果: 奔涌激流（高潮）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.jAKO8B23405V0St9]{效果: 奔涌激流（低潮）}

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d6；在高潮时则提高1d8。

You create a wide current, which smashes your foes and makes it difficult to move against the current. The current is a @Template[type:line|distance:60|width:15] 15 feet wide. Foes within the area when you use the power take @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),10))d6[bludgeoning]] damage, depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Moving against the current within its area (toward you if you use Rushing Current in high tide, or away from you if you use Rushing Torrent in low tide) is difficult terrain for 1 round.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(max((1+@actor.level),10))d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage, but you take a -2 penalty to Reflex saves until the end of your next turn.

Low Tide: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves until the end of your next turn.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and you move them 5 feet.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you move them 10 feet.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and you move them 20 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.bIefoFLc8f59bJl6]{Effect: Rushing Current (High Tide)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.jAKO8B23405V0St9]{Effect: Rushing Current (Low Tide)}

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d6, or 1d8 on high tide.

Protective Shock.name: 防护电击 Protective Shock
Protective Shock.description:
触发 一个相邻的敌人用近战攻击命中你、一个敌人用近战徒手攻击命中你，或一个敌人用金属武器的近战攻击命中你

你试图短暂电击攻击者，尝试将其击晕到刚好足以取消该次攻击。触发的敌人必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，对抗你的力量DC。若失败，该次攻击被扰乱。

在其掷强韧豁免之前，你可以选择放电。若你如此做且其豁免失败，则其还会在该回合失去其剩余动作中的1个（类似于处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，但该效果会在其回合中立即生效）。

Trigger An adjacent foe hits you with a melee attack, a foe hits you with a melee unarmed attack, or a foe hits you with a melee attack with a metal weapon

You attempt to briefly zap an attacker, attempting to stun them just long enough to cancel the attack. The triggering foe must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save against your power DC. On a failure, the attack is disrupted.

Before they roll the Fortitude save, you can choose to discharge. If you do and they fail the save, they also lose 1 of their remaining actions for the turn (similar to being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, but the effect is applied immediately on their turn).

Electric Shot.name: 电击射击 Electric Shot
Electric Shot.description:
你向一名敌人射出一道令人抽搐的电击射击。对40英尺内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击检定}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] 伤害。选择一项：

  • 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}
  • 你放电，使伤害提高至 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] 伤害，并将射程提高至80英尺。

在第7等级，以及此后每4个等级，你的电击射击射程增加20英尺（若你放电则为40英尺），在第19等级时最多为120英尺（若你放电则为240英尺）。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍电击伤害。

成功 你对目标造成正常电击伤害。

失败 该射击以很小的差距未命中，对目标造成 @Damage[@actor.level[electricity]] 伤害。如果目标处于震慑状态，该射击会偏转向目标并轻微电击他们，改为造成一半伤害。

大失败 该射击完全未命中。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d4，放电时的伤害提高1d8。

You shoot a jolting shot of electricity at a foe. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 40 feet, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] damage. Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] damage and increase the range to 80 feet.

At 7th level, and every 4 levels thereafter, your electric shot's range increases by 20 feet (40 feet if you discharge), to a maximum of 120 feet (240 feet if you discharge) at 19th level.

Critical Success You deal double electricity damage to the target.

Success You deal normal electricity damage to the target.

Failure The shot misses by a small margin, dealing the target @Damage[@actor.level[electricity]] damage. If the target is shocked, the shot swerves toward the target and jolts them slightly, dealing half damage instead.

Critical Failure The shot misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d4, damage on discharge increases by 1d8.

Chilling Breath.name: 寒冷吐息 Chilling Breath
Chilling Breath.description:
你呼出一锥极寒冷气与飞雪，将路径上的目标冻结。位于@Template[type:cone|distance:60]内的生物受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]]伤害，其效果取决于其进行的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

大成功或大失败该生物不受影响。

成功该生物受到一半伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3}。

失败该生物受到全额伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4}。

大成功或大失败该生物受到双倍伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 5}。

等级 (+1)伤害增加1d6。

You breathe out a cone of frigid cold and snow that freezes those in its path. Creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}.

Failure The creature takes full damage is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5}.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Rockfall.name: 落石 Rockfall
Rockfall.description:
你令岩石从上方坠落，为所有胆敢与你为敌之人带来死亡。岩石在你周围的@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内坠落；它们奇迹般地不会伤及你与盟友，但会对区域内每个敌人造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[钝击]]伤害，进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。岩石会持续坠落直到你的回合结束，在此之前为你与区域内的盟友提供强效掩蔽。岩石将留在区域内的地面上，使其成为困难地形，直到你刷新。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d8。

You make rocks fall from above, bringing death to everyone who dares to stand against you. The rocks fall in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] around you, leaving you and your allies miraculously unharmed as they deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]] damage to each foe in the area, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. The rocks continue falling until the end of your turn, providing you and your allies in the area greater cover until then. The rocks remain on the ground in the area, making it difficult terrain until you refresh.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d8.

Needle Storm.name: 针雨风暴 Needle Storm
Needle Storm.description:
你召唤一场针刺风暴，刺穿你的敌人，并且可以选择播种仙人掌或收割以强化风暴。针刺风暴在你120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]内生效。进入该区域或在该区域开始其回合的生物会受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[piercing]]伤害。该风暴持续直到你刷新。

一个生物在其每个回合中只会从针刺风暴受到一次穿刺伤害，即使它在区域内开始其回合，然后又进入该区域。

选择播种或收割。

  • 播种：你在该区域播种仙人掌。当你收割仙人掌时，任何处于某株仙人掌的空间内或与该仙人掌相邻的生物会受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)[piercing]]伤害。无论仙人掌数量多少，一个生物每次收割只会受到一次该伤害。
  • 收割：你在该区域进行收割，使任何被收割的方格中的针数量增加。针刺风暴在所有被收割的方格中每轮会造成等同于你等级的额外@Damage[(@actor.level)[piercing]]伤害。

等级 (+1) 播种与收割的伤害各增加1。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1d6。

You conjure a storm of needles that skewer your foes and either sow cacti or harvest to empower the storm. The needle storm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Creatures that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[piercing]] damage. The storm lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes piercing damage from Needle Storm once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow cacti in the area. When you harvest the cacti, any creatures either in a cactus's space or adjacent to a cactus takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[piercing]] damage. A creature only takes this damage once per harvest, regardless of the number of cacti.
  • Harvest: You harvest in the area, increasing the number of needles in any harvested square. The needle storm deals additional @Damage[(@actor.level)[piercing]] damage equal to your level each round in all harvested squares.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1 for Sow and Harvest.

Level (+2) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Meteor.name: 流星 Meteor
Meteor.description:
你从高空召来一颗流星，以极远的射程坠落，粉碎并在你的敌人中爆炸。

流星坠落在 500 尺内的一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:30] 中，对区域内的每个生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[钝击]] 伤害，并爆炸，对区域内的每个生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[火]] 伤害。

区域内的生物进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免，以对抗流星造成的全部伤害。

等级 (+1) 钝击伤害增加 1。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d6。

You send down a meteor from above, shattering and exploding on your foes at an enormous range.

The meteor strikes down in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] within 500 feet, dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] damage to each creature in the area and explodes, dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage to each creature in the area.

Creatures in the area make a single @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against all the damage from the meteor.

Level (+1) The bludgeoning damage is increased by 1.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Symplegades.name: 撞岩群 Symplegades
Symplegades.description:
你在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]中召唤出相互碰撞的力场能量块，它们彼此猛撞，并撞击区域内的敌人，造成伤害并将其重新定位到你想要的位置。在你每个回合结束时，这些力场块彼此碰撞，对区域内每个敌人造成@Damage[(@actor.level)d4[force]]伤害，其效果取决于其进行的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免，并允许你在不伤害盟友的情况下将其重新定位至多20尺。这股碰撞的力场将持续，直到你刷新。

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害，且你不能重新定位它。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，且你可以将其重新定位至多10尺。

大失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，且你可以将其重新定位至多20尺。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You call forth clashing chunks of force energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] that slam into each other and foes in the area, dealing damage and repositioning them where you please. At the end of each of your turns, the chunks of force clash against each other, dealing @Damage[(@actor.level)d4[force]] damage to each foe in the area, with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] saves, and allowing you to reposition allies up to 20 feet without harming them. The clashing force lasts until you refresh.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and you can't reposition them.

Failure The foe takes full damage, and you can reposition them up to 10 feet.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage, and you can reposition them up to 20 feet.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d4.

Enduring Force Storm.name: 持久力场风暴 Enduring Force Storm
Enduring Force Storm.description:
你在一个区域中召唤一场旋转的力场风暴，它会汲取自身的力量来造成伤害并重新定位敌人。力场风暴在你120尺内形成一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]。进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的敌人会受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[force]] 伤害，且你可以将其重新定位5尺。你也可以将于该区域内开始其回合的盟友重新定位5尺，但他们不承受伤害。

一个生物在其每个回合中仅会从“持久力场风暴”承受一次力场伤害，即使它在该区域内开始其回合然后又进入该区域也是如此。风暴持续直到你刷新。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You set a storm of force swirling in an area, feeding off its own power to damage and reposition foes. The force storm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Foes that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[force]] damage and you can reposition them 5 feet. You can also reposition allies that start their turn in the area 5 feet, but they don't take damage.

A creature only takes force damage from Enduring Force Storm once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area. The storm lasts until you refresh.

Level (+2) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Fire Trap.name: 火陷阱 Fire Trap
Fire Trap.description:
你在地面上设置一个燃烧陷阱，使第一个踩上它的生物迎来烈焰般的末路。选择你60尺内地面上的一个5尺方格。第一个进入所选方格的生物，以及所有在该方格 @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] 内的其他生物，受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d12[fire]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

在你使用火陷阱时，旁观者能清楚看到你把它放在了哪里，但在使用火陷阱之后，它会变得难以察觉，需要进行一次 @Check[type:perception|against:eldamon] 察觉检定，对抗你的力量DC才能注意到。陷阱持续存在，直到你刷新。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d12。

You place an incendiary trap on the ground, causing the first creature who steps on it to meet a fiery doom. Choose a 5-foot square on the ground within 60 feet. The first creature that enters the chosen square, as well as all other creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] from the square, takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d12[fire]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

While those watching you use Fire Trap can clearly see where you placed it, after using Fire Trap, it becomes difficult to notice, requiring a @Check[type:perception|against:eldamon] check against your power DC to do so. The trap lasts until you refresh.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d12.

Mirror's Reflections.name: 镜中倒影 Mirror's Reflections
Mirror's Reflections.description:
你从光中旋出三个看起来像你的影像。由光构成的你的三个影像在你的空间周围旋转，可能使那些对你进行攻击的人击中其中一个影像而不是你。任何本应命中你的攻击，都有随机几率改为命中你的某个影像而不是你。若三个影像都仍在，则命中你的几率为 1/4（1d4 掷出 1）。若剩余两个影像，则命中你的几率为 1/3（1d6 掷出 1–2）。若只剩一个影像，则几率为 1/2（1d6 掷出 1–3）。

一旦某个影像被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但没有大失败，它会摧毁一个影像，但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常会在失败时产生效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功且本会命中某个影像，则摧毁其中一个影像，并且该次攻击掷骰改为对你成功。一旦所有影像被摧毁，或当你 刷新 时，该力量的效果结束。

You spin three images out of light that appear to be you. Three images of you formed out of light swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on 1d4). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1–2 on 1d6). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1–3 on 1d6).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn’t critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, or when you Refresh, the power’s effect ends.

Peregrine Gust.name: 游隼疾风 Peregrine Gust
Peregrine Gust.description:
你释放出一阵凶猛的切割狂风，它会穿越你的敌人并进行长距离旅行。这阵狂风呈现为一个 @Template[type:line|distance:500]，但你可以使这条线在其长度上的任意一点至多转向一次，最多转向 90 度。区域内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 基础豁免。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高 1d8。

You send forth a fierce cutting gust, which travels a great distance through your foes. The gust takes the form of a @Template[type:line|distance:500], except you can cause the line to turn up to 90 degrees once at any point along its length. Foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d8.

Retributive Shroud.name: 惩戒裹尸布 Retributive Shroud
Retributive Shroud.description:
触发 一名相邻的敌人以一次近战攻击命中你，或一名敌人以一次近战徒手攻击命中你

当一名敌人在近身战中打击你时，你用黑暗笼罩他们以避免后续攻击。触发的敌人变为笼罩的，直到其回合结束，具体取决于其针对你力量DC的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 敌人避开降下的笼罩，完全不受影响。

成功 敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1} 状态，直到其回合结束。

失败 敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 2} 状态，直到其回合结束。

大成功或大失败 敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 3} 状态，直到其回合结束。

Trigger An adjacent foe hits you with a melee attack or a foe hits you with a melee unarmed attack

When an enemy strikes you in close quarters, you shroud them in darkness to avoid follow-up attacks. The triggering foe becomes shrouded until the end of their turn, depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save against your power DC.

Critical Success The foe avoids the descending shroud and is completely unaffected.

Success The foe is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of their turn.

Failure The foe is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2} until the end of their turn.

Critical Failure The foe is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3} until the end of their turn.

Flamethrower.name: 火焰喷射器 Flamethrower
Flamethrower.description:
