你释放出一股火焰洪流，灼烧喷火器路径上的目标。你对位于 @Template[type:line|distance:60] 内的所有生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] 伤害，并额外造成 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,fire]] 伤害，且其需进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 基础豁免。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高 1d6。

等级 (+2) 持续伤害提高 1。

You release a torrent of flame, burning those in the flamethrower's path. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage, as well as @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,fire]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:60], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d6.

Level (+2) The persistent damage is increased by 1.

Flensing Leaps.name: 剥皮跃击 Flensing Leaps
Flensing Leaps.description:
你在脚下创造快速旋转的空气激流，并跃向你的敌人，在你从一个敌人弹跳到另一个敌人时切割他们。你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跃跃}，最多30尺（无视你正常的跃跃距离上限）。如果你选择跃跃进入一个敌人的空间，进行一次近战力量攻击检定，根据你的力量攻击掷骰结果造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] 。除非该力量攻击掷骰大失败，否则你再次跃跃。只要你持续跃跃进入一个你尚未用剥皮跃跃进入过其空间的敌人的空间，你就可以从每个敌人的头顶弹起跃向下一个，持续对每个敌人进行 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击检定} 并再次跃跃；这些攻击掷骰都要计入你的多重攻击减值，但要等到你尝试完所有这些攻击之后才应用。一旦你在跃跃时未进入一个新的敌人空间，或一次力量攻击掷骰大失败，剥皮跃跃结束。

大成功 你造成双倍挥砍伤害，并获得一次极佳的反弹，使你在下一次以剥皮跃跃进行的跃跃中可以额外跃跃10尺。

成功 你造成正常挥砍伤害，并可以正常跃跃。

失败 你仍能从敌人身上跃开，但挥砍之风造成的伤害不高。目标仅受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[slashing]] 伤害。

大失败 你未命中你的目标，你的弹跳结束。你落在你选择的、与目标相邻且在你跃跃射程内的空间中，并且你不会再次跃跃。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d8，或在失败时提高1。

You create rapidly spinning torrents of air beneath your feet and leap onto your enemies, slicing them as you bounce from foe to foe. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}, up to a maximum of 30 feet (regardless of your normal Leap distance). If you choose to Leap into a foe's space, attempt a melee power attack, dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] depending on the results of your power attack roll, and you Leap again unless the power attack roll critically failed. As long as you continue to Leap into the space of a foe whose space you've not yet entered with Flensing Leaps, you can bounce off the head of each foe into the next, continuing to make @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack rolls} against each foe and Leaping again; these attack rolls all apply to your multiple attack penalty, but not until after you attempt all of them. Once you Leap without entering a new foe's space, or critically fail a power attack roll, Flensing Leaps ends.

Critical Success You deal double slashing damage and you get a great rebound, allowing you to Leap an additional 10 feet on your next Leap with Flensing Leaps.

Success You deal normal slashing damage and can Leap normally.

Failure You're able to Leap off the foe, but the slashing winds don't deal much damage.The target only takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[slashing]] damage.

Critical Failure You miss your target and your bouncing ends. You land in your choice of space adjacent to the target and within range of your Leap, and you don't Leap again.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Forceful Embrace.name: 强力拥抱 Forceful Embrace
Forceful Embrace.description:
你用力场丝线包围自己，可能重新定位与你接触的生物。在你刷新之前，你可以重新定位那些以近战攻击命中你的相邻生物，以及那些接触你或以徒手攻击命中你的生物，这取决于它们的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免结果。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 你可以将该生物重新定位至多5尺。该生物受到等同于你等级一半的 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[force]]{力场伤害}。

大失败 你可以将该生物重新定位至多10尺。该生物受到等同于你等级的 @Damage[(@actor.level)[force]]{力场伤害}。

You surround yourself with threads of force, potentially repositioning creatures who come in contact with you. Until you refresh, you can reposition adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, depending on the results of their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure You can reposition the creature up to 5 feet. The creature takes @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[force]]{force damage} equal to half your level.

Critical Failure You can reposition the creature up to 10 feet. The creature takes @Damage[(@actor.level)[force]]{force damage} equal to your level.

Force Field.name: 力场护盾 Force Field
Force Field.description:
你在自己周围创造一个巨大的力场屏障，为你的力场力量充能，并在飞射物来袭时将其推开。持续1轮，你或30尺散发范围内的任一盟友遭受的物理远程攻击会根据远程武器的体型承受环境减值。使用箭矢、弩矢、子弹或类似弹药的攻击承受–4环境减值；使用更大的远程武器（例如标枪）的攻击承受–2环境减值。巨型远程武器以及不依赖物理物体的法术效果会无减值地穿过这些风。你刷新你的力量。

You create an enormous force field around you to recharge your force powers and push away projectiles as they come your way. For 1 round, physical ranged attacks against you or an ally within a 30- foot emanation take a circumstance penalty depending on the size of the ranged weapon. Attacks that use arrows, bolts, bullets, or similar ammunition take a –4 circumstance penalty, attacks with bigger ranged weapons, such as javelins, take a –2 circumstance penalty. Massive ranged weapons and spell effects that don't rely on physical objects pass through the winds with no penalty. You Refresh your powers.

Rahu Ketu.name: 罗睺 计都 Rahu Ketu
Rahu Ketu.description:
你呼唤两位协作引发日月食的神话月之交点，带来一场突然的日食以终结光明。在1分钟内，@Template[type:emanation|distance:200]内所有光都停止照耀，甚至太阳在该射程内也被遮蔽（不过太阳在行星其余部分仍正常照耀）。

处于被遮蔽区域内的敌人必须尝试一次@Check[will|against:eldamon]意志豁免，具有以下效果。拥有强效黑暗视觉的生物在其豁免上获得+2环境加值。

大成功或大失败 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人几乎未被光之消逝所动摇。他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该敌人被光之消逝深深扰乱。他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 该敌人被光之消逝真正吓坏了。他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

You call upon two mythical lunar nodes who work together to cause eclipses, bringing forth a sudden eclipse that ends the light. All light ceases to shine within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:200] for 1 minute, and even the sun is eclipsed over that range (though the sun shines normally across the rest of the planet).

Foes within the eclipsed area must attempt a @Check[will|against:eldamon] save, with the following effects. Creatures with greater darkvision gain a +2 circumstance bonus on their saving throw.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe is barely shaken by the dying of the light. They become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The foe is deeply unsettled by the dying of the light. They become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The foe is truly terrified by the dying of the light. They become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Rebounding Embrace.name: 反弹拥抱 Rebounding Embrace
Rebounding Embrace.description:
你硬化身体，反弹并痛击那些试图伤害你的人。直到你刷新为止，毗邻的生物以近战攻击命中你时，以及接触你或以徒手攻击命中你的生物，都会受到 @Damage[@actor.level[钝击]] 伤害。若你对物理伤害具有抗力或对AC有环境加值，则该伤害提高你等级的一半，变为 @Damage[(@actor.level + floor(@actor.level/2))[钝击]]。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1点。

You harden your body, rebounding and bashing those who attempt to harm you. Until you refresh, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take @Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]] damage. If you have resistance against physical damage or a circumstance bonus to AC, this damage is increased by half your level to @Damage[(@actor.level + floor(@actor.level/2))[bludgeoning]].

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Omega Wave.name: 欧米伽波 Omega Wave
Omega Wave.description:
你在周身汇聚元素能量，并将其释放为向外扩散的波动，摧毁你周围的一切。你选择至多一个位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]内的生物，其将受到与你的元素相关联的类型之@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[untyped]]伤害，其效果取决于其基础豁免。对大多数元素而言，该豁免为@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]，但若你的元素为死亡、生命或毒素，则为@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]；若你的元素为心智，则为@Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true]。

若你花费三个动作，伤害提高至@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[untyped]]伤害，且该扩散可至多为@Template[type:emanation|distance:90]{90尺}。若你花费整整两轮（在你使用该力量的回合花费三个动作但未完成该力量，然后在你的下个回合再花费三个动作以完成该力量），伤害提高至@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d12[untyped]]伤害，且该扩散可至多为@Template[type:emanation|distance:180]{180尺}。

等级（+1）伤害提高1d6、1d8或1d12。

You gather elemental energy around you and release it in an emanating wave that destroys all that surrounds you. Creatures in your choice of up to a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[untyped]] damage of the type associated with your element, with effects depending on their basic saving throw. The saving throw is @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] for most elements but @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] if your element is death, life, and poison and @Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true] if your element is mind.

If you spend three actions, the damage increases to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[untyped]] damage and the emanation can be up to @Template[type:emanation|distance:90]{90 feet}. If you spend two full rounds (spending three actions on the turn you used the power without completing the power, then spending three more actions on your next turn to complete the power), the damage increases to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d12[untyped]] damage and the emanation can be up to @Template[type:emanation|distance:180]{180 feet}.

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d6, 1d8, or 1d12.

Bubble Swarm.name: 泡泡虫群 Bubble Swarm
Bubble Swarm.description:
当你刷新你的力量时，你形成无数水泡，它们朝着你的潮汐方向虫群般涌去，并将你的敌人一同推开。你根据敌人的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免，将 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的敌人移动。你刷新你的力量，这使你可以在高潮或低潮中选择一种进行改变。

低潮：水泡聚集在你周围，使你的 AC 获得 +2 环境加值，直到你下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.O5qAywGhFe9k89J4]{效果：泡泡虫群}

成功 敌人不受影响。

失败 你将敌人移动 10 尺。

大成功或大失败 你将敌人移动 20 尺。

You form countless water bubbles as you refresh you powers, and they swarm in the direction of your tide, pushing your foes with them. You move foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] saves. You Refresh your powers, which allows you to change to your choice of high tide or low tide.

Low Tide: The bubbles gather around you, granting you a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC until the beginning of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.O5qAywGhFe9k89J4]{Effect: Bubble Swarm}

Success The foe is unaffected.

Failure You move the foe 10 feet.

Critical Failure You move the foe 20 feet.

Object Throw.name: 物体投掷 Object Throw
Object Throw.description:
你用力量抓起附近一件无人持用的物体，然后将其掷向一名敌人。选择一件30尺内、负载为1或2的无人持用物体，并对120尺内的一名敌人进行一次@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}，将该物体掷向敌人，造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[untyped]]伤害；伤害类型为钝击、穿刺或挥砍，取决于你所选择的物体。

若该物体由特殊材料制成，例如白银或精金，则物体投掷造成的伤害会适当地与抗力、弱点等进行交互；但除此之外，不同物体通常不会产生任何其他效果，无论其魔法或物理性质或属性如何。在极其罕见的环境下，GM可能会判定该物品的其他性质或属性适用。

大成功 该物体对敌人大成功命中，造成双倍伤害。

成功 该物体命中敌人，造成全额伤害。

失败 尽管该物体只是略微偏离敌人，但周围的力场丝线会重新调整，敌人仍会受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)[untyped]]点相应类型的伤害。

大失败 该物体完全未命中，不造成伤害。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d8，或在失败时提高1点。

You grab a nearby unattended object with force and then fling it at a foe. Choose an unattended object of Bulk 1 or 2 within 30 feet and make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack roll} against a foe within 120 feet to throw the object at the foe, dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[untyped]] damage, either bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage depending on the object you chose.

If the object is made of a special material, such as silver or adamantine, the damage from Object Throw interacts with resistances, weaknesses, and the like as appropriate, but otherwise, different objects normally have no other effect, regardless of their magical or physical properties or attributes. In extremely rare circumstances, the GM might determine that other properties or attributes of the item apply.

Critical Success The object critically hits the foe, dealing double damage.

Success The object hits the foe, dealing full damage.

Failure While the object just slightly misses the foe, the surrounding threads of force readjust, and the foe still takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[untyped]] damage of the appropriate type.

Critical Failure The object misses completely, dealing no damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Blazing Embrace.name: 炽焰拥抱 Blazing Embrace
Blazing Embrace.description:
你让自己被烈焰环绕，以灼烧所有胆敢攻击你的人。直到你刷新前，邻接的生物若以近战攻击命中你，以及接触你或以徒手攻击命中你的生物，都会受到等同于你等级的火伤害，以及等同于你等级一半的持续火伤害。

@Damage[(@actor.level)[fire],(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,fire]]

等级（+1）伤害提高1。

等级（+2）持续伤害提高1。

You surround yourself in flames in order to burn all those who dare attack you. Until you refresh, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take fire damage equal to your level and persistent fire damage equal to half your level.

@Damage[(@actor.level)[fire],(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,fire]]

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1.

Level (+2) The persistent damage is increased by 1.

Prism's Refraction.name: 棱镜的折射 Prism's Refraction
Prism's Refraction.description:
你将面前的光如棱镜般折射成一片辉煌的锥形光线。你对@Template[type:cone|distance:40]内所有生物造成等同于@Damage[((1+(@actor.level))d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]]的火伤害，其结果取决于它们进行的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。已被显映的生物在对抗棱镜折射的反射豁免上承受–2环境减值。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半火伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}状态，持续至你下一回合结束。

失败 该生物受到全部火伤害，并陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态且被显映，持续至你下一回合结束。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍火伤害，并目眩且被显映，持续至你下下回合结束（持续2轮，随后持续至你该回合结束）。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d4。
等级（+2）伤害增加1。

You refract light in front of you like a prism into a cone of brilliant rays. You deal an amount of fire damage equal to @Damage[((1+(@actor.level))d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40], with results depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save. Creatures that were already limned take a –2 circumstance penalty to their Reflex save against Prism's Refraction.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and limned until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double fire damage and is dazzled and limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Level (+1) The damage is increased by 1d4.
Level (+2) The damage is increased by 1.

Lantern of Revelation.name: 启示灯笼 Lantern of Revelation
Lantern of Revelation.description:
你放射出一个显露真相的光之球体，以真理灼烧其中的所有目标。该球体在120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]中形成。爆发区域内的生物受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]]伤害，其效果取决于它们的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

启示提灯会尝试反制幻术以及使生物真实形态被伪装的效果，对每个被启示提灯显映的生物都进行一次反制；使用你的力量DC–10作为你的反制调整值，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。成功时，启示提灯不会终止被反制的效果，而是暂时揭示幻象或变形背后的真实本质，供所有人看见，持续时间为其仍被启示提灯显映为止。

启示提灯也会尝试反制区域内不附着在特定生物身上的幻术，以光将其笼罩并揭示其真实本质，直到你下下回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你的回合结束）。你可以选择不反制启示提灯范围内你自己的幻术；对你而言，它们代表其自身的一种真理形态。

大成功或大失败 成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物受到一半火伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}状态，直到你的下个回合结束。

失败该生物受到全额火伤害，并获得显映的状态，直到你下下回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你的回合结束）。

大成功或大失败 失败该生物受到双倍火伤害，并获得显映的状态，直到你下下回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你的回合结束）。

等级 (+1)伤害提高1d6。

You emit a sphere of revealing light, searing those within with the truth. The sphere forms in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet. Creatures in the burst take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Lantern of Revelation attempts to counteract illusions and effects that disguise a creature's true form on every creature that becomes limned by Lantern of Revelation, using your power DC – 10 as your counteract modifier and half your level rounded up as your counteract level. On a success, Lantern of Revelation doesn't end the counteracted effect but instead temporarily reveals the true nature behind the illusion or transformation for all to see as long as they remain limned by Lantern of Revelation.

Lantern of Revelation also attempts to counteract illusions in the area that aren't on a specific creature, surrounding them in light and revealing their true nature until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn). You can choose not to counteract your own illusions within the Lantern of Revelation; to you, they represent their own form of truth.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half fire damage as is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full fire damage and is limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Critical Failure The creature takes double fire damage and is limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Slippery Ice.name: 湿滑的冰 Slippery Ice
Slippery Ice.description:
触发 60英尺内具有寒冷（特征）或处于冻结状态的一个敌人进行跨步（或在地面上进行另一种移动动作，例如匍匐）

你改变冻结生物的冰，使其融化并再次冻结以创造一片湿滑区域，并可能使该生物被绊倒。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物保持平衡，但在其下一个回合开始前处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态，除非其花费一个动作使自己稳定。

失败 该生物在移动过程中滑倒并滑行，并在其移动结束时倒地，处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 状态。

大失败 该生物立即摔倒，在其移动开始时倒地，并打断该移动。

Trigger A foe with either the cold trait or the frozen condition within 60 feet Strides (or makes another move action across the ground, such as Crawling)

You alter the ice freezing a creature, melting and refreezing it to create a slick and potentially tripping the creature. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature maintains its balance but is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the beginning of its next turn unless it spends an action stabilizing itself.

Failure The creature slips and slides through its movement and falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} at the end of its movement.

Critical Failure The creature falls over immediately, falling prone at the beginning of its movement and disrupting the movement.

Rock and Roll.name: 摇滚 Rock and Roll
Rock and Roll.description:
你变形为一块巨石，并掷骰沿着@Template[type:line|distance:20]{20尺直线}移动，碾过你路径上的敌人，然后变形回原状。你路径上的敌人承受@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[钝击]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]基础豁免。在大成功或大失败的失败时，他们还会被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

你作为巨石的移动会如常触发反应动作，但当你为巨石形态时，针对此类反应动作，你的AC获得+4环境加值，并且你的硬度等于你等级的两倍。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Y91rsRryHHVgX6n5]{效果: Rock and Roll}

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d8。

You transform into a giant boulder and roll up to @Template[type:line|distance:20]{20 feet in a straight line}, bowling over enemies in your way, then transform back. Foes in your path take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. On a critical failure, they're also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Your movement as a giant boulder triggers reactions as normal, but you have a +4 circumstance bonus to AC and Hardness equal to twice your level against such reactions while you're a boulder.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Y91rsRryHHVgX6n5]{Effect: Rock and Roll}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Brilliant Raiment.name: 辉煌华衣 Brilliant Raiment
Brilliant Raiment.description:
你让自己披上由灿烂光芒织就的华服，对附近的生物造成伤害，并在它们注视你时令其目眩。你的闪耀华服对所有处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的生物造成等同于@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]]的火伤害，并允许进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]强韧基础豁免。

直到你下个回合结束前，每当一名敌人试图以你为目标时，在该次尝试期间其为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩（状态）}（目眩状态会要求敌人进行通常的纯骰检定，但该状态不会在该次尝试之外持续）。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d4。

等级（+2） 伤害提高1。

You garb yourself in a raiment of brilliant light, damaging nearby creatures and dazzling them when they look upon you. Your shining raiment deals an amount of fire damage equal to @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+(ceil(@actor.level/2)))[fire]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Until the end of your next turn, whenever a foe attempts to target you, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} during that attempt (the dazzled condition requires the foe to attempt the usual flat check, but the condition doesn't linger beyond that attempt).

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Electric Field.name: 电场 Electric Field
Electric Field.description:
你在周围创造一个噼啪作响的电场，用电击包裹你的敌人。电场是一个散发，半径最多为 @Template[type:emanation|distance:15]{15 feet}，或在水下或在足够大的、完全由金属或其他导电材料制成的表面上最多为 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet}。该力场对区域内所有敌人造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] 伤害，并需要进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 基础豁免。选择一项：

  • 你要么成为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}
  • 你要么放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，你也可以将半径提高至最多 30 feet，或在水下或在导电表面上最多为 @Template[type:emanation|distance:60]{60 feet}。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d4，或在放电时增加 1d8。

You create a crackling electric field around you to envelop your foes in electricity. The electric field is an emanation with a radius of up to @Template[type:emanation|distance:15]{15 feet}, or up to @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} underwater or on a large enough surface made entirely of metal or another conducting material. The field deals @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] damage, to all foes in the area, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, you can also increase the radius to be up to 30 feet, or up to @Template[type:emanation|distance:60]{60 feet} underwater or on a conductive surface.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d8 on discharge.

Siphon Vitality.name: 虹吸活力 Siphon Vitality
Siphon Vitality.description:
你从位于@Template[type:cone|distance:60]中的生物身上虹吸其生命精华。区域内的生物受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[void]]伤害，并且根据其@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免，可能会陷入枯竭状态。

大成功或大失败：成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物抵抗了你大部分的虹吸。它受到一半伤害，且不会枯竭。

失败你虹吸了该生物的一部分生命力。它受到全额伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭 1}。

大成功或大失败：失败你虹吸了该生物的大量生命力。它受到双倍伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭 2}。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d6。

You siphon away the vital essence from creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60]. Creatures in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[void]] damage, and they might be drained, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature resists most of your siphoning. It takes half damage and isn't drained.

Failure You siphon away some of the creature's vitality. It takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Critical Failure You siphon away much of the creature's vitality. It takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Dark Cocoon.name: 黑暗茧 Dark Cocoon
Dark Cocoon.description:
你用凝结的黑暗将一名敌人包裹成茧。选择60尺内的一名敌人。根据其进行的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免结果，目标会受到不同影响；若其已处于笼罩的状态，则其此次反射豁免承受–2环境减值。

若目标挣脱，茧会剥落并化为液态墨黑的黑暗；否则该效果最多持续1分钟。当一名敌人被囚禁在你的黑暗之茧中时，其处于笼罩的状态，数值取决于其豁免结果。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标未被黑暗之茧完全困住，但黑暗的团块仍将其压制。目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1}，直到其以 [[/act escape dc=resolve(@actor.system.proficiencies.classDCs.eldamon.dc)]]{Escapes} 对抗你的力量DC而挣脱，或在一次 @Check[type:athletics|dc:10] 检定中成功，将黑暗一块块扯下。

失败 目标被完全囚禁于茧内。目标处于immobilized并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2}，直到其以Escapes对抗你的力量DC而挣脱。

大成功或大失败：失败 目标被黏附的黑暗囚禁并被 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}。目标被茧restrained并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3}，直到其以Escapes对抗你的力量DC而挣脱。

You encase a foe in a cocoon of congealed darkness. Choose a foe within 60 feet. The target is affected depending on its @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save, and they take a –2 circumstance penalty to their Reflex save if they were already shrouded.

The cocoon sloughs away into liquid inky darkness if the target breaks free, and it otherwise lasts up to a maximum of 1 minute. While a foe is imprisoned in your dark cocoon, they're shrouded, with a value that depends on their save result.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target isn't fully trapped by the cocoon, though the clumps of darkness still hold them down. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until it either [[/act escape dc=resolve(@actor.system.proficiencies.classDCs.eldamon.dc)]]{Escapes} against your power DC or succeeds at a @Check[type:athletics|dc:10] check to pull off the darkness clump by clump.

Failure The target is imprisoned completely within the cocoon. The target is immobilized and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2} until it Escapes against your power DC.

Critical Failure The target is imprisoned and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by the clinging darkness. The target is restrained by the cocoon and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3} until it Escapes against your power DC.

Bubble Burst.name: 泡泡爆裂 Bubble Burst
Bubble Burst.description:
你在敌人周围召唤一个巨大的气泡，它随即爆裂，将敌人向外推开或将其拉向你。你对120尺内一个@Template[type:burst|distance:30]中的所有敌人造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] 伤害，具体取决于他们的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。

高潮：伤害改为 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害，但你在你下一回合结束前对AC承受–2减值。气泡爆裂的强迫移动不再是将其远离你推开；当气泡爆裂移动一个生物时，它会被朝爆裂中心的反方向移动。这是强迫移动。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4jBsevZHp1D3WFFu]{效果: Bubble Burst (High Tide)}

低潮：除非敌人在其豁免中大成功或大失败，否则区域内的敌人在你下一回合结束前对你进行攻击掷骰时承受–2环境减值。气泡爆裂的强迫移动不再是将其拉向你；当气泡爆裂移动一个生物时，它会被朝爆裂中心移动。这是强迫移动。如果气泡中心附近没有足够的空间，离中心更近的生物先移动，其他生物在不被阻挡的情况下尽可能移动，最多移动到其豁免结果所决定的距离。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.eodo23kQ8nTVj5np]{效果: Bubble Burst (Low Tide)}

大成功或大失败 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害，你将其移动5尺。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，你将其移动10尺。

大成功或大失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，你将其移动20尺。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4，在高潮时则增加1d8。

You summon an enormous bubble around your foes, and it bursts, pushing foes outward or drawing them in. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] damage to all foes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] within 120 feet, depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage, but you take a –2 penalty to AC until the end of your next turn. Instead of pushing away from you, when the bubble burst moves a creature, they are moved away from the center of the burst. This is forced movement.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4jBsevZHp1D3WFFu]{Effect: Bubble Burst (High Tide)}

Low Tide: Foes in the area take a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn unless they critically succeed at their saving throw. Instead of pulling toward you, when the bubble burst moves a creature, they are moved toward the center of the burst. This is forced movement. If there's not enough space near the center of the bubble, creatures nearer to the center move first, and others move as far as they can without being blocked, up to the amount set by their saving throw outcomes.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.eodo23kQ8nTVj5np]{Effect: Bubble Burst (Low Tide)}

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and you move them 5 feet.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you move them 10 feet.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and you move them 20 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d8 on high tide.

Lethal Curtain.name: 致命帷幕 Lethal Curtain
Lethal Curtain.description:
你在战场上描绘出一幕死亡帷幕，熄灭所有穿越其间者的生命。你创造一道5英尺厚、最高10英尺、并在一条直线上最长达@Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet}的死亡帷幕，并在120英尺内感召该帷幕出现。

任何穿越该帷幕的生物，或在其回合开始时占据该帷幕区域的生物，都会受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]]伤害，且该生物在其回合结束前变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。该帷幕持续存在，直到你刷新。

每个生物在其每个回合中仅会从致命帷幕承受一次虚空伤害，即使它在回合开始时就在帷幕中，随后又穿越帷幕，或多次穿越帷幕也是如此。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You trace a curtain of death across the battlefield, snuffing out the lives of those who cross it. You create a 5-foot thick curtain of death up to 10 feet high and up to @Template[type:line|distance:60]{60 feet} long in a straight line, calling forth the curtain within 120 feet.

Any creature that crosses the curtain or is occupying the curtain's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]] damage, and the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of their turn. The curtain lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes void damage from Lethal Curtain once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the curtain and then crosses the curtain, or crosses the curtain several times.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Polarize.name: 极化 Polarize
Polarize.description:
你使一个目标电极化，使其变得带电，电击涌动穿过其身体，一次又一次地使其受到电击。你对30尺内的一个目标造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[persistent,electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 强韧豁免。若失败，则其获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 状态，持续2轮。来自极化的此持续电击伤害不会如常那样使其震慑状态放电。选择一项：

  • 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 状态
  • 你放电，使持续电击伤害提高至 @Damage[(@actor.level)d4[persistent,electricity]] 伤害。

等级 (+1) 放电时的伤害提高1d4。

等级 (+2) 常规伤害提高1d4。

You electrically polarize a target, causing it to become charged as electricity surges through them, jolting them over and over. You deal @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[persistent,electricity]] damage to a target within 30 feet, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. On a failure they become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} for 2 rounds. This persistent electricity damage from Polarize doesn't discharge their shocked condition, as normal. Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the persistent electricity damage to @Damage[(@actor.level)d4[persistent,electricity]] damage.

Level (+1) The damage on discharge increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The normal damage increases by 1d4.

Nature Overwhelming.name: 自然压倒性力量 Nature Overwhelming
Nature Overwhelming.description:
你将木元素能量灌注进你的敌人，压倒他们，并且要么播种茂密植被，要么收割并将大量植物物质堆叠在其身上以令其震慑（状态）。选择90尺内的一个生物。该目标受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 强韧豁免。

选择播种或收割其一。

  • 播种：你以该生物为中心，在其周围的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]（包括该生物的空间内）进行播种，创造出茂密且色彩鲜艳的植物，极大阻碍移动。该区域为强效困难地形，而非普通困难地形。当你收割这些茂密植物时，空间内有这些植物的生物在1轮内变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。
  • 收割：你以该生物为中心，在其周围的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]（包括该生物的空间内）收割植物，以令其震慑（状态）。强韧豁免的效果从基础强韧豁免改为如下。

大成功或大失败 成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物受到一半伤害，并且若你至少收割了三个方格的植物，该生物还会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败该生物受到全额伤害，且其会陷入震慑（状态），其震慑值等于你每收割三个方格的植物获得1点，最多为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}（若你至少收割了九个方格）。

大成功或大失败 失败同失败，但该生物受到双倍伤害，且震慑（状态）的最大值为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 5}（若你至少收割了十五个方格）。

等级 (+1)伤害增加1d6。

You infuse your foe with wood elemental energy, overwhelming them and either sowing dense verdure or harvesting to stack masses of plant matter onto them to stun them. Choose a creature within 90 feet. The target takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around the creature, including in the creature's space, creating dense and brightly colored plants that greatly obstruct movement. The area is greater difficult terrain, instead of normal difficult terrain. When you harvest these dense plants, creatures with the plants in their space become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round.
  • Harvest: You harvest plants in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] around the creature, including in the creature's space, in order to stun them. The Fortitude save effects change from a basic Fortitude save to the following.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage, and the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as long as you harvested at least three squares of plants.

Failure The creature takes full damage and it's stunned with a stunned value equal to 1 for every three squares of plants you harvested, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} if you harvested at least nine squares.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes double damage and the maximum stunned condition is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 5} if you harvested at least fifteen squares.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Deathly Chill.name: 死亡寒意 Deathly Chill
Deathly Chill.description:
你将包围敌人的冰与霜注入严酷而致命的寒意，使其吸走他们的温暖与生命。选择一个在60英尺内、因你的冰力量而处于冻结状态的敌人。在其每个回合结束时，目标受到等同于其当前冻结数值数量的d10伤害（例如，若其当前冻结5，则在其回合结束时受到5d10伤害）。此伤害不是持续性伤害，且不能以移除持续性伤害的方式移除；相反，它会一直持续到目标不再处于冻结为止，届时该效果结束。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.GxeutBq3kooYKzH1]{冻结（致命寒意）}

You infuse the ice and frost surrounding a foe with a harsh and deathly chill, causing it to sap away their warmth and life. Choose a foe with the frozen condition from your ice powers within 60 feet. At the end of each of its turns, the target takes a number of d10s of damage equal to its current frozen value (for instance, 5d10 at the end of its turn if it's currently frozen 5). This damage isn't persistent damage and can't be removed in the same way as persistent damage; instead, it lasts until the target is no longer frozen, at which point the effect ends.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.GxeutBq3kooYKzH1]{Frozen (Deathly Chill)}

Aqueous Embrace.name: 水之拥抱 Aqueous Embrace
Aqueous Embrace.description:
你用水之潮环绕自身，推动或拉扯与你接触的敌人。直到你刷新为止，你可以移动那些以近战攻击击中你的相邻生物，以及那些接触你或以徒手攻击击中你的生物，具体取决于它们进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免结果。

与大多数水力量不同，“水之拥抱”的效果并不取决于你在使用该力量时所处的潮汐，而是每当你以当前潮汐使用一次力量时就会发生转变。你在使用水之拥抱时仍会改变你的潮汐。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物不移动。若你处于低潮且该生物已与你相邻，则其受到 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[bludgeoning]]{钝击伤害}，数值等同于你等级的一半。

失败 你可以将该生物移动至多10尺。若你处于低潮且该生物已与你相邻，则其受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败 你可以将该生物移动至多20尺。若你处于低潮且该生物已与你相邻，则其受到 @Damage[(2*@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

等级 (+1) 失败时的伤害增加1点，大成功或大失败时的伤害增加2点。

You surround yourself with tides of water, pushing or pulling foes who come in contact with you. Until you refresh, you can move adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, depending on the results of their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Unlike most water powers, Aqueous Embrace's effects don't depend on your tide when you use the power but instead shift each time you use a power with your current tide. Your tide still changes when you use Aqueous Embrace.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature doesn't move. If you're at low tide and the creature is already adjacent to you, it takes @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[bludgeoning]]{bludgeoning damage} equal to half your level.

Failure You can move the creature up to 10 feet. If you're at low tide and the creature is already adjacent to you, it takes @Damage[(@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] damage.

Critical Failure You can move the creature up to 20 feet. If you're at low tide and the creature is already adjacent to you, it takes @Damage[(2*@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1 on a failure, and 2 on a critical failure.

Fatal Weakness.name: 致命弱点 Fatal Weakness
Fatal Weakness.description:
你抽离一个生物的力量与生命。选择60尺内的一个生物。它受到 @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d6[void]] 伤害，并根据其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免的结果陷入虚弱。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物的生命力过于强大，无法被抽离，该生物不受影响。

成功 你短暂地削弱该生物。它受到一半伤害，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}。

失败 你大幅削弱该生物，并留下持续效果。它受到全部伤害，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 3}，且在1分钟内虚弱1。

大成功或大失败：失败 你虹吸该生物力量的巨大部分。它受到双倍伤害，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 4}，且在1分钟内虚弱2。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You leach away a creature's strength along with their life. Choose a creature within 60 feet. It takes @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d6[void]] damage, and becomes enfeebled depending on the results of its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature's life force is too strong to leach away, and the creature is unaffected.

Success You enfeeble the creature briefly. It takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round.

Failure You greatly weaken the creature, with lingering effects. It takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} for 1 round, and enfeebled 1 for 1 minute.

Critical Failure You siphon an enormous portion of the creature's strength. It takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4} for 1 round and enfeebled 2 for 1 minute.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Stupefying Embrace.name: 麻痹之拥 Stupefying Embrace
Stupefying Embrace.description:
你用一层薄薄的精神能量灵光包裹自身，使与你接触的敌人陷入迟钝。直到你刷新为止，与你相邻且以近战攻击命中你的生物，以及接触你或以徒手攻击命中你的生物，都会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 直到其下一个回合开始，并受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)[mental]] 伤害。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1点。

You surround yourself with a thin aura of mental energy, stupefying foes who come in contact with you. Until you refresh, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the beginning of their next turn and takes @Damage[(@actor.level)[mental]] damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Muninn.name: 穆宁 Muninn
Muninn.description:
你呼唤一位传奇的思维信使，召来一群思维形态的渡鸦来骚扰你的敌人并引导你盟友的思绪。渡鸦在200尺内出现，占据一个15尺×15尺的区域，体量类似于一只巨型生物，并持续至你刷新为止。在使用该力量后立刻，以及此后每个你的回合开始时，你可以使用一个自由动作（），该动作具有专注（特征），将渡鸦向任意方向移动至多60尺（包括垂直方向）；但如果渡鸦与其所在位置的距离曾经超过500尺，它们就会坍缩回无实体的想象幻影。

所有进入渡鸦@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]内的敌人都会受到@Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d10[mental]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true]意志豁免（基础）；无论它们靠近渡鸦多少次，每轮只会受到一次伤害。处于渡鸦@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]内的盟友在区域内时获得+1环境加值，适用于攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免与技能检定，因为渡鸦在协助他们。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.xYiSBjEMrjwSU6hL]{效果: 穆宁}

等级（20级） 伤害增加1d10。

You call upon a legendary messenger of thought, calling forth a flock of thoughtform ravens to harry your foes and guide your allies' thoughts. The ravens appear within 200 feet, occupy a 15-foot by 15-foot area, similar to the size of a Huge creature, and lasts until you refresh. Just after using this power, and then again at the beginning of each of your turns, you can use a free action, which has the concentrate trait, to move the ravens up to 60 feet in any direction, including vertically, though the ravens collapse back into insubstantial figments of the imagination if they ever move more than 500 feet from your position.

All foes that come within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] of the ravens take @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d10[mental]] damage with a @Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true] save; they take damage only once per round, regardless of how many times they come near the ravens. Allies within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] of the ravens gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks while they are in the area as the ravens assist them.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.xYiSBjEMrjwSU6hL]{Effect: Muninn}

Level (20th) The damage increases by 1d10.

Vital Collapse.name: 生命崩溃 Vital Collapse
Vital Collapse.description:
你将一个既存的生命力束坍缩为一次爆炸，伤害附近的敌人。选择你自己或60英尺内的一名盟友；你选择的目标必须具有来自你某个生命力量的临时生命值。你移除该目标全部的临时生命值，而这些生命能量会爆炸性地坍缩。

这对目标在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的所有敌人造成 @Damage[(@actor.level@actor.system.attributes.hp.temp)[vitality]]{活力伤害} 或 @Damage[(@actor.level+@actor.system.attributes.hp.temp)[force]]{力场伤害}（在每个个别情况下取较佳者），其数值等于你的等级加上来自你生命力量的临时生命值数量，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

活力坍缩不会与来自共享活力的临时生命值特殊储备发生交互。

You collapse an existing bundle of life force into an explosion that harms nearby foes. Choose yourself or an ally within 60 feet; your choice of target must have temporary Hit Points from one of your life powers. You remove all the target's temporary Hit Points, and the life energy explosively collapses.

This deals @Damage[(@actor.level@actor.system.attributes.hp.temp)[vitality]]{vitality damage} or @Damage[(@actor.level+@actor.system.attributes.hp.temp)[force]]{force damage} (whichever is better in each individual case) equal to your level plus the number of temporary Hit Points from your life powers to all of the target's foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Vital Collapse does not interact with the special reservoir of temporary Hit Points from Shared Vitality.

Pillar of Wildfire.name: 野火之柱 Pillar of Wildfire
Pillar of Wildfire.description:
你召下一道巨大的野火之柱，焚毁并点燃火柱中的敌人。火柱为垂直圆柱体，其半径由你选择为5英尺至15英尺，其高度由你选择为40英尺至200英尺，且火柱底部中心必须位于你200英尺内，但火柱的顶部或远端可以延伸至射程之外。

你对区域内的每个生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[fire]] 伤害，并造成 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,fire]]{persistent fire} 持续火伤害，其数值等于你等级的一半，进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You call down an enormous pillar of wildfire, incinerating and igniting foes in the pillar. The pillar is a vertical cylinder with your choice of radius from 5 feet to 15 feet and your choice of height from 40 feet to 200 feet, and the pillar's bottom center must be within 200 feet of you, but the top or far side of the pillar can extend out of range.

You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[fire]] damage, as well as @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,fire]]{persistent fire} damage equal to half your level, to each creature in the area, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Roots of the Ancient Oak.name: 远古橡树之根 Roots of the Ancient Oak
Roots of the Ancient Oak.description:
你让自己被一片巨大的根须力场包围，对敌人造成伤害，并选择播种或收割以绊倒他们。处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]{最高60尺的发散}范围内的敌人受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。

选择播种或收割其一。

  • 播种：你在该区域播种。
  • 收割：你在该区域收割。位于被收割方格中的敌人，若其反射豁免成功（但未大成功），则在其下个回合开始前获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}；若失败则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}；若大失败则倒地，且还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}，持续1轮或直到其针对你的力量DC进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}。

等级（+1）伤害提高1d6。

You surround yourself with an enormous field of roots, damaging foes and either sowing or harvesting to trip them. Foes within an @Template[type:emanation|distance:60]{emanation up to 60 feet} take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in the area.
  • Harvest: You harvest in the area. Foes in a harvested square who succeed (but don't critically succeed) at their Reflex save are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the beginning of their next turn, foes who fail become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, and those who critically fail become prone and are also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round or until they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your power DC.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Thanatos.name: 塔纳托斯 Thanatos
Thanatos.description:
你召唤死亡的化身、收割一切生命的死神，去屠戮所有反抗你的人。一切褪成白色，一具骷髅身影降临在你的敌人之上。

你在200尺内选择的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[void]] 伤害，其效果取决于它们的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并必须进行第二次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|traits:incapacitation] 豁免。若失败，它会立刻死亡。此次第二次强韧豁免是一个死亡与无力化效果。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d8。

You call upon an embodiment of death, the reaper of all life, to slay all who oppose you. Everything fades into white, as a skeletal figure descends upon your enemies.

Creatures you choose within 200 feet take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[void]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and must attempt a second @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|traits:incapacitation] save. On a failure, they instantly die. This second Fortitude save is a death and incapacitation effect.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Absorb Element.name: 吸收元素 Absorb Element
Absorb Element.description:
你吸收一个与你的元素相关，或与一个弱于你元素的元素相关的持续法术或力量，并用它来刷新你的力量。选择一个具有你元素相关特征的法术或力量，或具有与一个弱于你元素的元素相关特征的法术或力量，其当前在你60英尺内生效，并对其进行一次反制检定，使用你的力量DC – 10作为你的反制调整值，并使用你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。无论你的反制检定是否成功，你仍会虹吸一些能量，并刷新你的力量。该法术或力量会在24小时内暂时免疫你的吸收元素。

You absorb an ongoing spell or power related to your element or an element weak to your element, and you use it to refresh your powers. Choose a spell or power with your element's associated trait, or a trait associated with an element weak to your element, that is currently active within 60 feet of you, and attempt a counteract check against it, using your power DC – 10 as your counteract modifier and half your level rounded up as your counteract level. Whether or not your counteract check succeeds, you still siphon some energy, and you Refresh your powers. The spell or power becomes temporarily immune to your Absorb Element for 24 hours.

Flickering Fantasy.name: 闪烁的幻想 Flickering Fantasy
Flickering Fantasy.description:
你在180尺内创造一个由光构成的场景，覆盖一个最大为30尺×30尺的区域，并描绘你自己的真实，其中最多包括10个彼此独立的生物或物体。当你使用“闪烁幻景”时，区域内所有敌人受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免，因为光的投影会以与幻觉相对应的方式对其发起攻击。该场景会按照你的选择持续上演，直到你刷新为止，不过你的敌人不会再受到额外伤害。

与该场景互动的生物、接触该场景的生物、对该场景使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}动作的生物等，可以尝试识破该幻觉。由于该场景是光的投影，因此不包含声音或气味，不过它能够产生温暖与接触感。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d6。

You form a scene out of light within an area up to 30 feet by 30 feet within 180 feet, painting your own truth including up to 10 discrete creatures or objects. When you use Flickering Fantasy, all foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save, as the projections of light assault them in a way that corresponds to the illusion. The scene continues to play out as you choose until you Refresh, though your foes don't take any more damage.

Creatures interacting with the scene, touching the scene, using a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action on the scene, and the like can attempt to disbelieve the illusion. Since the scene is a projection of light it doesn't include sounds or smells, though it is capable of generating warmth and touch.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Intensify Glare.name: 强化怒视 Intensify Glare
Intensify Glare.description:
触发 60英尺内的一名生物在由你的光力量造成的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩（状态）}影响下进行纯骰检定并成功。

你在最后一秒增强光芒的眩光，使该生物的攻击更加偏离。该生物必须再次掷骰进行目眩（状态）带来的纯骰检定，并采用第二次结果。第二次@Check[type:flat|dc:7]检定的DC从5提高至7。

Trigger A creature within 60 feet succeeds at a flat check from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} condition caused by your light powers.

You intensify the glare from your light at the last second, throwing off the creature's attack even more. The creature must roll the flat check from the dazzled condition again and take the second result. The DC of the second @Check[type:flat|dc:7] check increases from 5 to 7.

Areadbhair.name: 阿里德布海尔 Areadbhair
Areadbhair.description:
你召唤出一柄传奇的阳光长矛，除非敌人有足够的决心承受它，否则它会贯穿你的敌人。所有位于@Template[type:line|distance:500|width:15]{15尺宽、最长500尺的线形区域}内的敌人都会被灼目的光所灼烧，受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[fire]] 伤害，取决于敌人的@Check[will|against:eldamon]意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人受到一半伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}与@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}，直到你下个回合结束。

失败 该敌人受到全部伤害，并陷入目眩与显映的，直到你下下个回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你回合结束）。

大成功或大失败 失败 该敌人受到双倍伤害，并永久获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}，并且即使其移除或避免了永久失明，也会目眩1分钟，同时它显映的持续1分钟。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d8。

You call forth a legendary spear of sunlight that pierces through your foes unless they have the resolve to withstand it. All foes in a @Template[type:line|distance:500|width:15]{15-foot wide line up to 500 feet long} are seared with blinding light, taking @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[fire]] damage, depending on the foe's @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The foe takes full damage and is dazzled and limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} permanently, and dazzled for 1 minute even if it removes or avoids the permanent blindness, and it's limned for 1 minute.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Incandescent Guardian.name: 炽光守护者 Incandescent Guardian
Incandescent Guardian.description:
你召唤一个白炽的守护者，它会附着在一个敌人身上，对其造成伤害并揭示其攻击。选择一个120尺内的敌人。你造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[fire]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 你对该敌人造成一半火伤害，且该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的} 状态，直到你下一回合结束。你可以选择不对该敌人造成火伤害，而非造成一半伤害；若你选择这么做，则只要其仍保持显映的，你与盟友在对抗该敌人的AC上获得+2环境加值，直到你下一回合结束。

失败 你对该敌人造成全额火伤害，且该敌人获得显映的状态，直到你下一回合结束。在此期间，只要其仍保持显映的，你与盟友在对抗该敌人的AC上获得+2环境加值。

大失败 你对该敌人造成双倍火伤害，且该敌人获得显映的状态，直到你下下回合结束（持续2轮，然后直到你该回合结束）。在此期间，只要其仍保持显映的，你与盟友在对抗该敌人的AC上获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Ei9t00REcjAiEnmM]{效果：白炽守护者}

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You conjure an incandescent guardian that clings to a foe, damaging them and revealing their attacks. Choose a foe within 120 feet. You deal @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[fire]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success You deal half fire damage to the foe, and the foe is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn. You can choose to deal no fire damage to the foe instead of half damage; if you choose to do so, you and your allies gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the foe until the end of your next turn, as long as it remains limned.

Failure You deal full fire damage to the foe, and the foe is limned until the end of your next turn. During that time, as long as it remains limned, you and your allies gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the foe.

Critical Failure You deal double fire damage to the foe, and the foe is limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn). During that time, as long as it remains limned, you and your allies gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the foe.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Ei9t00REcjAiEnmM]{Effect: Incandescent Guardian}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Umbral Call.name: 幽影召唤 Umbral Call
Umbral Call.description:
你召唤出黑暗，用以刷新你的黑暗力量。你刷新你的力量。

然后，你周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 的区域在你下个回合结束前变为黑暗。光无法进入该区域，任何非魔法光源（例如火把或提灯）在区域内都不会散发任何光，即使其光照半径本会延伸到区域之外也是如此。魔法光可以如常尝试反制黑暗。光无法穿透，因此区域内的生物若没有黑暗视觉便无法看见区域外。从外部看，黑暗区域呈现为一个纯粹黑暗的球体。

You call forth darkness you can use to refresh your darkness powers. You Refresh your powers.

Then the area in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] around you becomes darkness until the end of your next turn. Light doesn't enter the area and any non-magical light sources, such as a torch or lantern, don't emanate any light while inside the area, even if their light radius would extend beyond the area. Magical light can attempt to counteract the darkness as normal. Light can't pass through, so creatures in the area can't see outside without darkvision. From outside, the area of darkness appears as a sphere of pure darkness.

Fire Breath.name: 火 吐息 Fire Breath
Fire Breath.description:
你如同红色巨龙般吐出极其巨大的火焰锥形吐息，焚尽你的敌人。该锥形的体型由你选择，从 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 到 @Template[type:cone|distance:80] 不等；若你花费三个动作，则可将锥形的体型提高至最多 @Template[type:cone|distance:120]。

区域内的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[fire]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d8。

You breathe out an absolutely massive cone of fire like a red dragon, incinerating your foes. The cone is your choice of size from a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] to an @Template[type:cone|distance:80], and if you spend three actions, you can choose for the cone to be up to a @Template[type:cone|distance:120].

Creatures in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[fire]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Hurricane Downdraft.name: 飓风下沉气流 Hurricane Downdraft
Hurricane Downdraft.description:
你召来飓风般的狂风，切割你的敌人，并将胆敢在空中挑战你者击落。下沉气流是一个垂直的圆柱体，你可以选择其半径为5尺至15尺、高度为40尺至200尺；柱体顶部的中心必须位于你500尺内，但柱体的底部或远侧可以延伸到射程外。你对区域内每个生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]]，其结果取决于其 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。飓风下沉气流造成的强迫移动不会引发坠落伤害，即使它使该生物到达地面也是如此。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 飓风之风擦过该生物，若其正在飞行则将其略微向下推。该生物承受一半伤害；若其正在飞行，则被向地面方向推下10尺。

失败 飓风之风结实地切入该生物，若其正在飞行则将其向下推。该生物承受全额伤害；若其正在飞行，则被推至圆柱体底部或地面，以先到达者为准。

大成功或大失败 飓风之风可怖地重创该生物，并将其击倒至地面，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。该生物承受双倍伤害。若其正在飞行，飓风将其推至地面。无论该生物是否在飞行，它都会倒地。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d8。

You bring down hurricane force winds that slice through your foes and knock down those who dare challenge you in the sky. The downdraft is a vertical cylinder with your choice of radius from 5 feet to 15 feet and your choice of height from 40 feet to 200 feet, and the pillar's top center must be within 500 feet of you, but the bottom or far side of the pillar can extend out of range. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] to each creature in the area, with results depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save. Forced movement from Hurricane Downdraft doesn't cause falling damage, even if it causes the creature to reach the ground.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The hurricane wind grazes the creature, and pushes it down slightly if it was flying. The creature takes half damage, and is pushed 10 feet down toward the ground if it's flying.

Failure The hurricane wind solidly cuts into the creature and pushes it down if it was flying. The creature takes full damage, and if it's flying, it's pushed to the bottom of the cylinder, or to the ground, whichever it reaches first.

Critical Failure The hurricane wind horribly wounds the creature and knocks it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} to the ground. The creature takes double damage. If it's flying, the hurricane pushes it to the ground. Whether or not the creature is flying, it falls prone.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Vibrant Inoculation.name: 活力接种 Vibrant Inoculation
Vibrant Inoculation.description:
你创造一根由生命能量组成的巨针，在你和盟友周围形成一层薄薄的保护层，阻挡致病媒介。你和所有位于 @Template[type:line|distance:120] 内的盟友获得1d4点临时生命值，外加你每个等级再获得1d4点临时生命值，这些临时生命值持续到你刷新为止。只要某个生物仍拥有任何这些临时生命值，它们将其本应获得的任何恶心值减少1，并在所有强韧豁免上获得+2状态加值。

区域内的不死生物受到 @Damage[(4+(4*@actor.level))[vitality]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。豁免失败时，它们在所有强韧豁免上承受–1状态减值，持续1轮；在大成功或大失败中的大失败时，它们在所有强韧豁免上承受–2状态减值，持续1轮。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.frPCI1Bo9HStDIJP]{效果：活力接种（活）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.s5JPWpwDatuNRBKG]{效果：活力接种（不死）}

You create a giant needle of life energy that surrounds you and your allies in a thin protective layer, keeping out sickening agents. You and all allies within a @Template[type:line|distance:120] gain 1d4 temporary Hit Points plus 1d4 temporary Hit Points for every level you have, which last until you refresh. As long as a creature still has any of these temporary Hit Points, they reduce any sickened value they would receive by 1 and gain a +2 status bonus on all Fortitude saving throws.

Undead creatures in the area take @Damage[(4+(4*@actor.level))[vitality]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. On a failed saving throw, they take a –1 status penalty on all Fortitude saving throws for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they take a –2 status penalty on all Fortitude saving throws for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.frPCI1Bo9HStDIJP]{Effect: Vibrant Inoculation (Living)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.s5JPWpwDatuNRBKG]{Effect: Vibrant Inoculation (Undead)}

1,000 Arboreal Warriors.name: 1,000 树栖战士 1,000 Arboreal Warriors
1,000 Arboreal Warriors.description:
你令一支由无数木质树战士组成的军团从地面升起，狂奔冲锋并将你的敌人刺穿，随后它们要么把自己种入树中，要么四散开来去攻击更多敌人。战士以一次爆发出现，形成一个至多 @Template[type:burst|distance:20] 的爆发，中心位于120尺内。区域内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免检定。

选择播种或收获。

  • 播种：战士生根并化为树木。你在该区域播种，播下的树木提供标准掩蔽。
  • 收获：你收割附近植物的能量，让你的战士冲向远处的敌人。伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[piercing]] 伤害。你在区域内每收获一个方格中的一株植物，就有一名战士冲向区域外但在该区域200尺内的一个不同敌人，该敌人基于其基础反射豁免而承受来自此力量的伤害。单个敌人只能从此力量受到一次伤害。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6，或在收获时增加1d8。

You cause a troop of countless wooden tree warriors to rise from the ground, stampede, and impale your foes, before either planting themselves into trees or scattering to attack more foes. The warriors arise in a burst with up to a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] centered within 120 feet. Foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: The warriors take root and become trees. You sow in the area, sowing trees that provide standard cover.
  • Harvest: You harvest the energy of nearby plants to allow your warriors to rush off toward distant foes. The damage increases to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[piercing]] damage. For each square in the area where you harvest a plant, one warrior rushes toward a different foe outside the area but within 200 feet of the area, and that foe takes damage from this power, based on their basic Reflex save. A single foe can only take damage from this power once.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d8 on harvest.

Throw Everything.name: 全都扔出去 Throw Everything
Throw Everything.description:
如果附近有你没扔的无人看管的物体，那只是因为你没注意到它。你会把一切都扔出去。对60英尺内任意数量的生物进行 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}，你用各种物体痛击它们，造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[untyped]] 伤害；根据你的力量攻击掷骰结果，伤害类型在钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害中选择对其最有利的一种。

由于你投掷了太多不同的物体，银或精金等特殊材料通常不适用（不同于物体投掷力量），不过由GM酌情决定：如果你周围只有一种材料的物体，它们可能适用。

在所有攻击结算完毕之前，不要应用你的多重攻击减值。

大成功 该生物受到双倍伤害。

成功 该生物受到全额伤害。

失败 该生物受到一半伤害。

大失败 该生物不受伤害。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

If there was an unattended object nearby that you didn't fling, it's just because you didn't notice it. You throw everything. Make @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack rolls} against any number of creatures within 60 feet as you pummel them with various objects, dealing @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[untyped]] damage, of whichever of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage is most advantageous, depending on your power attack roll.

Since you're throwing so many different objects, special materials like silver or adamantine typically don't apply (unlike the Object Throw power), though at the GM's discretion if you are surrounded by only objects of one material, they might apply.

Don't apply your multiple attack penalty until after all the attacks.

Critical Success The creature takes double damage.

Success The creature takes full damage.

Failure The creature takes half damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes no damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Solar Flare.name: 太阳耀斑 Solar Flare
Solar Flare.description:
你召唤一场猛烈的耀光风暴，对区域内的生物造成伤害并照亮它们。风暴充满你120英尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。进入该区域或在该区域开始其回合的敌人受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[fire]]伤害，且该区域被明亮光照覆盖。

区域内的生物会被显映并处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态，只要它们仍留在该区域内。风暴持续至你刷新。

一个生物在其每个回合中只会从日耀闪焰受到一次火伤害，即使它在区域内开始其回合，随后又进入该区域。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1d6。

You call an intense storm of flaring light that damages and shines upon creatures in the area. The storm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Foes that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[fire]] damage and the area is covered in bright light.

Creatures in the area are limned and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} as long as they remain in the area. The storm lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes fire damage from Solar Flare once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Retributive Dazzle.name: 惩戒眩光 Retributive Dazzle
Retributive Dazzle.description:
触发 一个敌人会以一次近战攻击命中你

当一个敌人在近战中打击你时，就在它命中之前，你会使其目眩并勾勒其轮廓，直到其下个回合开始。若该触发攻击并未因隐蔽、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{藏匿（状态）}状态或类似原因而需要进行纯骰检定来以你为目标，则该敌人必须因处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}而立即尝试进行该纯骰检定；若失败，则该攻击失败。

Trigger A foe would hit you with a melee attack

When an enemy strikes you in melee, you dazzle and limn them just before it hits until the beginning of its next turn. If the triggering attack didn't already require a flat check to target you due to concealment, the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} condition, or the like, the enemy must immediately attempt the flat check due to being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, and on a failure, the attack fails.

Imprison in Thorns.name: 荆棘禁锢 Imprison in Thorns
Imprison in Thorns.description:
你用活荆棘囚禁你的敌人。选择60尺内的一名敌人。该目标受到的影响取决于其反射豁免。任何用于移除囚笼的交互动作，或尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}囚笼，都会使尝试该动作的生物受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[piercing]]伤害。

选择“播种”或“收割”之一。

  • 播种：你以你的目标为中心，在其周围@Template[type:emanation|distance:10]范围内播种。
  • 收割：你在敌人的空间内或相邻方格内收割，以增强荆棘囚笼的效果。用于移除囚笼的交互动作，或尝试逃脱囚笼，都会使尝试该动作的生物受到等同于你等级的穿刺伤害，而非你等级的一半。

大成功或大失败：成功 该目标不受影响。

成功 该目标仅被轻微囚禁。目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，直到它或另一名相邻生物花费一次交互动作移除囚笼。

失败 该目标被更深地囚禁。目标定身，直到它或另一名相邻生物总共花费两次交互动作移除囚笼，或直到目标以你的力量DC成功逃脱，以先发生者为准。一次失败的逃脱可替代移除囚笼所需的其中一次交互动作。目标唯一能采取的动作是用于移除囚笼的交互或逃脱动作。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但需要四次交互动作或以你的力量DC成功逃脱，而非两次。

等级（+2） 伤害提高1。

You imprison your foe in living thorns. Choose a foe within 60 feet. The target is affected depending on its Reflex save. Any Interact actions to remove the prison or attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} the prison cause the creature attempting the action to take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[piercing]] damage.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around your target.
  • Harvest: You harvest either in the foe's space or in an adjacent square to increase the thorn prison's effects. Interact actions to remove the prison or attempts to Escape the prison cause the creature attempting the action to take piercing damage equal to your level, instead of half your level.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is only slightly imprisoned. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until it, or another adjacent creature, spends an Interact action to remove the prison.

Failure The target is imprisoned more deeply. The target is immobilized until it, or another adjacent creature, spends a total of two Interact actions to remove the prison, or until the target successfully Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first. A failed Escape substitutes for one of the Interact actions needed to remove the prison. The only actions the target can take are Interact or Escape actions to remove the prison.

Critical Failure As failure, except it takes four Interact actions or a successful Escape against your power DC, instead of two.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Flash Flood.name: 暴洪 Flash Flood
Flash Flood.description:
你创造一次突如其来的洪水，使该区域被水浸透。洪水冲过200尺内一个50尺×50尺的区域。区域内的敌人基于其@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免，受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。除非是拥有游泳速度的生物，否则该区域变为困难地形，直到你刷新。

高潮：伤害变为@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power]伤害，但你直到你下个回合结束前变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

低潮：该区域保留及膝深的水，并且对没有游泳速度的生物而言，变为强效困难地形，而非困难地形。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人受到一半伤害，且你使其移动10尺。

失败 该敌人受到全额伤害，且你使其移动20尺。

大失败 该敌人受到双倍伤害，且你使其移动40尺。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6，或在高潮时增加1d8。

You create a sudden flood that waterlogs the area. The flood rushes through a 50-foot by 50-foot area within 200 feet. Foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage, based on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] saves. The area becomes difficult terrain except for creatures with a swim Speed until you refresh.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage, but you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.

Low Tide: The area retains water up to knee height and becomes greater difficult terrain to creatures without a swim Speed, instead of difficult terrain.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and you move them 10 feet.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you move them 20 feet.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and you move them 40 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d8 on high tide.

Amrita.name: 甘露 Amrita
Amrita.description:
你将一滴超浓缩的液态生命能量滴在一名受了致命伤或最近死亡的生物身上，让其体验到一丝不朽的片段。选择30尺内的一名活生物，或一名在上一轮内死亡的死去生物。

该生物获得 @Damage[150[healing]] 生命值，并且若其已死亡则重返生命，不过，阿姆利塔无法复活因被解离或死亡效果而死的生物。此外，针对每一种使该生物承受的毒素与疾病进行一次反制检定，使用你的力量DC – 10作为你的反制调整值，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。

若你未能以此方式移除某个苦难，则该苦难对阿姆利塔暂时免疫24小时。

You pour a drop of hyper-concentrated liquid life energy on a mortally injured or recently dead creature, allowing them to experience a fragment of immortality. Choose a living creature, or a dead creature who died within the last round, within 30 feet.

The creature gains @Damage[150[healing]] Hit Points and returns to life if they were dead, though Amrita can't revive a creature killed by being disintegrated or a death effect. Additionally, attempt a counteract check against every poison and disease afflicting the creature, using your power DC – 10 as your counteract modifier and half your level rounded up as your counteract level.

If you fail to remove an affliction in this way, the affliction becomes temporarily immune to Amrita for 24 hours.

Trail Blaze.name: 开拓之焰 Trail Blaze
Trail Blaze.description:
你以烈焰裹身，向前冲刺，并在身后留下燃烧敌人的火焰轨迹。你要么【疾走】，要么@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{翻滚穿越}，在移动期间你进入过的任何空间留下火焰，这些火焰持续到你下一回合结束。

在火焰中开始其回合或穿过火焰的生物会受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]]伤害。一个生物从“火焰轨迹”只会受到一次火焰伤害，即使它在火焰中开始其回合然后又穿过火焰，或多次穿过火焰也是如此。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d6。

You alight with flame, rushing forward and leaving behind a trail of fire to burn your foes. You either Stride or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through}, leaving behind flames in any space you enter during the movement, which last until the end of your next turn.

Creatures who start their turn in the flames or pass through the flames take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage. A creature only takes fire damage from Trail Blaze once, even if it starts its turn in the fire and then crosses the fire, or crosses the fire several times.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Midnight Orb.name: 午夜宝珠 Midnight Orb
Midnight Orb.description:
你向一名敌人发射一枚午夜宝珠。对60尺内的一名敌人进行一次@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击检定}，造成等同于@Damage[((2+@actor.level)d4 + ceil(@actor.level /2))[cold]]伤害的寒冷伤害。

在第7等级，以及此后每4个等级，你的宝珠射程增加30尺，最高在第19等级达到180尺。若你处于笼罩的状态，你在该攻击掷骰上获得+1环境加值。

大成功或大失败 你对目标造成双倍寒冷伤害，且目标获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 2}直到你下个回合结束。

成功 你对目标造成正常寒冷伤害，且目标获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}直到你下个回合结束。

失败 宝珠未命中，但仍设法笼罩目标。目标获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}直到你下个回合结束。

大成功或大失败 宝珠完全未命中。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1。

You fire off an orb of midnight at a foe. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing an amount of cold damage equal to @Damage[((2+@actor.level)d4 + ceil(@actor.level /2))[cold]] damage.

At 7th level, and every 4 levels thereafter, your orb's range increases by 30 feet, to a maximum of 180 feet at 19th level. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on the attack roll if you're shrouded.

Critical Success You deal double cold damage to the target and the target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2} until the end of your next turn.

Success You deal normal cold damage to the target and the target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The orb misses but still manages to shroud the target. The target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The orb misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Grasp of the Hungry Earth.name: 饥饿大地之握 Grasp of the Hungry Earth
Grasp of the Hungry Earth.description:
需求 你站在坚实的表面上

你将大地从你的身体上剥离，并朝一个方向注入地面，以攫住附近的敌人并妨碍他们的移动。选择你空间的四个边之一。沿该边与你相邻的所有敌人（通常你为中型时至多三名敌人，你为大型时四名敌人，依此类推）承受 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受全额伤害并被部分缠住。只要它沿你所选择的那一侧与你相邻，它就不能以Step移动，并且对它而言所有这些空间都是困难地形；这些效果持续至你下个回合开始，或直到它以你的力量 DC进行[[/act escape]]{逃脱}，以先发生者为准。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物因大地的攫握承受双倍伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}，直到下个回合开始或直到它以你的力量 DC进行逃脱，以先发生者为准。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d6。

Requirements You are standing on a solid surface

You detach earth from your body into the ground in a single direction to clutch nearby foes and hinder their movements. Choose one of your space's four sides. All foes adjacent to you along that side (typically up to three foes if you are Medium, four foes if you are Large, and so on) take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is partially ensnared. It can't Step as long as it is adjacent to you along the side you chose, and all of those spaces are difficult terrain to it; these effects last until the beginning of your next turn, or until it [[/act escape]]{Escapes} against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage from the earth's grasp and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until the beginning of the next turn or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Explosion.name: 爆炸 Explosion
Explosion.description:
你使一个燃烧中的生物自发燃烧爆裂，对其自身及附近一切造成爆炸性伤害。选择60尺内一个正在承受持续性火伤害的生物。该目标爆炸，受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[fire]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。

你可以选择目标释放的爆炸规模，产生至少5尺、至多30尺的放射。放射范围内的所有其他生物受到你对目标掷出的伤害的一半（在应用目标的豁免、抗力、弱点等之前），并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d10。

You cause a burning creature to spontaneously combust, dealing explosive damage to themself and everything nearby. Choose a creature taking persistent fire damage within 60 feet. The target explodes, taking @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[fire]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

You can choose how big of an explosion the target emits, with an emanation of at least 5 feet and up to 30 feet. All other creatures within the emanation take half the damage you rolled against the target (before applying the target's saving throw, resistances, weaknesses, and so on), with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Retributive Freeze.name: 惩戒寒冻 Retributive Freeze
Retributive Freeze.description:
触发 一名相邻生物以近战攻击命中你，或一名生物以近战徒手攻击命中你。

当一个敌人以一次攻击命中你时，你利用这次接触将寒冷与冰沿着他们的身体或武器蔓延，使其被冰封。他们必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3}。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4}。

Trigger An adjacent creature hits you with a melee attack, or a creature hits you with a melee unarmed attack.

When a foe hits you with an attack, you use that contact to spread cold and ice up their body or weapon, freezing them over. They must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}.

Critical Failure the creature is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4}.

Frigid Embrace.name: 寒霜拥抱 Frigid Embrace
Frigid Embrace.description:
你让自己笼罩在一股难以言喻的寒冷气息中，使接触到你的人感到刺骨。直到你刷新为止，相邻生物以近战攻击击中你时，以及接触你或以徒手攻击击中你的生物，都会受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)[cold]] 伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 2}。

等级 (+1) 该伤害提高 1。

You blanket yourself in an air of ineffable cold, chilling those who come in contact with you. Until you refresh, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take @Damage[(@actor.level)[cold]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 2}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Danse Macabre.name: 死亡之舞 Danse Macabre
Danse Macabre.description:
你释放一场毁灭性的死亡之舞，而死亡舞者在你周围席卷，夺取敌人的生命。位于一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] 内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[void]] 伤害，并且根据其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，可能会陷入力竭。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物避开了舞蹈最糟糕的部分。它受到一半伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭1}。

失败 该生物被舞蹈席卷。它受到全额伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭2}。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物被舞蹈摧毁。它受到双倍伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭4}。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You unleash a devastating dance of death, and the deathly dancers sweep around you, stealing the life from your foes. Foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[void]] damage, and they might be drained, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature avoids the worst of the dance. It takes half damage, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Failure The creature is swept away in the dance. It takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is devastated by the dance. It takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Brain Death.name: 脑死亡 Brain Death
Brain Death.description:
你向敌人的大脑发送一个信号，命令它关闭，甚至可能直接杀死敌人。选择一个120英尺内的敌人。该敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[mental]] 伤害，而他们的大脑是否会关闭，则取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人受到一半心灵伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，直到其下个回合结束。

失败 该敌人受到全额心灵伤害，并获得Stupefied 1直到其下个回合结束；同时由于其大脑在短暂瞬间开始关闭，获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

大失败 该敌人受到双倍心灵伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}直到其下个回合结束；同时由于其大脑暂时关闭，昏迷1轮。他们必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|traits:death,incapacitation] 强韧豁免，对抗你的力量DC。若失败，他们的身体无法在此过程中存活而死亡；若成功，他们的大脑重新启动，并且不再承受进一步效果。此一二级效果具有死亡与失能特征。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d8。

You send a signal to your foe's brain, telling it to shut down and potentially killing the foe outright. Choose a foe within 120 feet. The foe takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[mental]] damage, and their brain might shut down, depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of their next turn.

Failure The foe takes full mental damage, and is stupefied 1 until the end of their next turn and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as their brain begins to shut down for a brief instant.

Critical Failure The foe takes double mental damage, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until the end of their next turn and stunned for 1 round as their brain shuts down temporarily. They must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|traits:death,incapacitation] save against your power DC. On a failure, their body doesn't survive the process and they die, while on a success, their brain starts again and they suffer no further effect. This secondary effect is a death and incapacitation effect.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Puff of Smoke.name: 烟雾喷涌 Puff of Smoke
Puff of Smoke.description:
