触发 一名敌人以一次攻击或能力将你作为目标，且你察觉到该攻击或能力

借由火的力量感召，你让一团烟雾萦绕自身，短暂遮蔽你的身形。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，其适用于触发的攻击或能力，并持续至你下一回合开始。

Trigger A foe targets you with an attack or ability and you are aware of the attack or ability

Calling upon the power of fire, you surround yourself in a puff of smoke, concealing you for a short while. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment}, which applies against the triggering attack or ability and lasts until the beginning of your next turn.

Debilitating Spore Cloud.name: 致衰弱的孢子云 Debilitating Spore Cloud
Debilitating Spore Cloud.description:
你释放出一团巨大的孢子云，在接触生物、物体与地面时形成带刺的衰弱性增生物，既能伤害敌人，也会削弱他们的力量。孢子云飘过一个爆发区域，至多为一个以120尺内一点为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:30]。区域内的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 强韧豁免。

选择播种或收割其一。

  • 播种：你在区域内播种，从你播种之处的地面长出带刺的增生物。除播种的正常效果外，该区域为有害地形，每个方格都会造成 @Damage[1[piercing]] 伤害。若你收割这些带刺的增生物，位于长有增生物的方格内的生物在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}。
  • 收割：你收割附近的植物，并用孢子的汲取力量将其灌注。与被收割植物处于同一空间内的生物，若其强韧豁免成功（但未大成功或大失败），则在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。失败时，其在1轮内为enfeebled 2；大成功或大失败时，其在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4}。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1d6。

You release an enormous cloud of spores that form prickly debilitating growths in contact with creatures, objects, and the ground, damaging foes and sapping away their strength. The spore cloud drifts across a burst with up to a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] centered within 120 feet. Creatures in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in the area, creating prickly growths from the ground where you sow. In addition to the normal effects of sowing, the area is hazardous terrain, dealing @Damage[1[piercing]] damage for each square. If you harvest these prickly growths, creatures in a square with the growths are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round.
  • Harvest: You harvest nearby plants and imbue them with the spores' sapping powers. Creatures in a space with harvested plants who succeed at their Fortitude save (but don't critically succeed) are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're enfeebled 2 for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4} for 1 round.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Flowing River.name: 流动之河 Flowing River
Flowing River.description:
你向前涌动如一股急流，身后留下一条蜿蜒的河流来拍击你的敌人。你选择进行一次疾走或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{翻滚穿越}，并在移动期间你进入的任何空间中留下翻涌的水流，这些水流持续到你下个回合结束。敌人在其回合开始时位于水流中，或穿过水流时，会受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并可能根据其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免而沿着河流被移动。

一个生物只会从流动之河中受到一次钝击伤害，并且只会冒一次被移动的风险，即使它在其回合开始时位于水流中然后又穿过水流，或多次穿过水流也是如此。

高潮：伤害为 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害。完成流动之河的移动后，你在你下个回合结束前处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}。当你将一个生物从你身边移开时，他们会沿着河流的路径前进，而不是直接远离。

低潮：完成流动之河的移动后，直到你下个回合结束，你的各项速度获得 +30 尺状态加值。当你将一个生物向你移动时，他们会沿着河流的路径前进，而不是直接向你靠近。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.mXZVdxasiR7QA8uU]{效果: 流动之河（低潮）}

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害，你将其移动 10 尺。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，你将其移动 20 尺。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，你将其移动 30 尺。

等级（+1） 伤害增加 1d4，或在高潮时增加 1d8。

You flow forward in a rush of water, leaving behind a winding river to batter your foes. You either Stride or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through}, leaving behind frothing waters in any space you enter during the movement, which last until the end of your next turn. Foes who start their turn in the waters or pass through the waters take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] damage and might be moved along the river depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

A creature only takes bludgeoning damage from Flowing River and risks being moved once, even if it starts its turn in the waters and then crosses the waters, or crosses the waters several times.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage. After completing your movement for Flowing River, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until the end of your next turn. When you move a creature away from you, they follow the path of the river instead of moving directly away.

Low Tide: After completing your movement for Flowing River, you gain a +30-foot status bonus to your Speeds until the end of your next turn. When you move a creature toward you, they follow the path of the river instead of moving directly toward you.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.mXZVdxasiR7QA8uU]{Effect: Flowing River (Low Tide)}

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and you move them 10 feet.

Failure The target takes full damage and you move them 20 feet.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and you move them 30 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d8 on high tide.

Pinpoint Singularity.name: 奇点定位 Pinpoint Singularity
Pinpoint Singularity.description:
你将巨量的元素能量压缩成位于手指或肢体末端的无限小奇点，然后以爆炸性的力量将其释放到你的敌人身上。对触及范围内的一个生物进行一次攻击掷骰。

你造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d10[untyped]] 伤害，伤害类型与您的元素相关，其效果取决于你的 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍伤害。

成功 你对目标造成正常伤害。

失败 你的奇点在边缘擦到目标，造成 @Damage[ 2+@actor.level] 伤害。

大失败 你的攻击完全未命中。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d10，或在失败时增加 1 点。

You condense an enormous amount of elemental energy into an infinitesimal singularity at the tip of your finger or appendage, then release it into your foe with explosive power. Make an attack roll against a creature within your reach.

You deal @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d10[untyped]] damage of the type associated with your element, with effects depending on your @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack roll}.

Critical Success You deal double damage to the target.

Success You deal normal damage to the target.

Failure Your singularity catches the target at the edge, dealing @Damage[ 2+@actor.level] damage.

Critical Failure Your attack misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d10, or 1 on a failure.

Cognitive Chain.name: 认知链 Cognitive Chain
Cognitive Chain.description:
你创造一条自我维持的有害思绪链，在多个目标之间反弹，冲击他们的心智。选择120尺内的一个生物。该目标受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] 伤害，并可能因其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免而变得迟钝。

在大成功或大失败时，链条结束。否则，该思维形态会扩散到距第一个目标30尺内的另一名生物，再扩散到距该目标30尺内的另一名生物，如此继续，直到某个目标取得大成功或大失败，或你在射程内找不到更多目标。你可以在任何时点结束该链条。你不能将同一生物作为目标超过一次，并且你必须对所有目标都有效果线。只掷一次伤害，并将其应用于每个目标（根据其豁免结果适当减半或加倍）。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半心智伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续至你下一回合结束。

失败 目标受到全部心智伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续至你下一回合结束。

大失败 目标受到双倍心智伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 4}，持续至你下一回合结束，且在你刷新前获得迟钝 1。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d6。

You create a self-sustaining chain of harmful thoughts that bounce between targets, assaulting their minds. Choose a creature within 120 feet. The target takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] damage and might become stupefied, depending on its @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

On a critical success, the chain ends. Otherwise, the thoughtform spreads to another creature within 30 feet of the first target, spreads to another creature within 30 feet of that target, and so on, until a target critically succeeds or you run out of targets within range. You can end the chain at any point. You can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets. Roll the damage only once, and apply it to each target (halving or doubling as appropriate for its saving throw outcome).

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The target takes full mental damage, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The target takes double mental damage, and it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} until the end of your next turn and stupefied 1 until you refresh.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Labyrinth of Twisted Thoughts.name: 扭曲思绪迷宫 Labyrinth of Twisted Thoughts
Labyrinth of Twisted Thoughts.description:
你将敌人的心智送入一团纠结的、令人困惑且难以理解的思绪之网，使其陷入困惑（状态）并对其心智造成伤害。处于一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:80] 内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[mental]] 伤害，并可能陷入困惑（状态），其结果取决于他们的 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人承受全部心智伤害，但其心智轻易逃离纠结的迷宫，且不会陷入困惑（状态）。

失败 该敌人承受全部心智伤害，并因其思绪被困在迷宫中而在 1 轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}。

大失败 该敌人承受双倍心智伤害，并因其思绪被困在迷宫中而在 1 分钟内处于困惑（状态）。在其每个回合结束时，他们可以尝试一次新的意志豁免，对抗你的力量 DC，以提前移除困惑（状态）。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d4。

You send your foes' minds into a tangled skein of bewildering and unfathomable thoughts, confusing them and damaging their minds. Foes within an @Template[type:cone|distance:80] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[mental]] damage and potentially becoming confused, with results depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes full mental damage but their mind escapes the tangled labyrinth easily, and they aren't confused.

Failure The foe takes full mental damage, and they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round as their thoughts become trapped in the labyrinth.

Critical Failure The foe takes double mental damage, and they are confused for 1 minute as their thoughts become trapped in the labyrinth. At the end of each of their turns, they can attempt a new Will save against your power DC to remove the confused condition early.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Illuminate Weakness.name: 照亮弱点 Illuminate Weakness
Illuminate Weakness.description:
你召唤出一道光，照亮敌人最薄弱之处，使你和你的盟友更容易对敌人造成伤害。选择60尺内的一个敌人。你对该敌人造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[fire]] 伤害，其效果取决于其进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 该敌人不受影响。

成功 你对该敌人造成一半伤害，且该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的} 状态，直到你下个回合结束。在此期间，只要目标仍处于显映的状态，你和你的盟友用打击对该目标攻击时增加2点额外精准伤害，而你用你的光力量对该目标造成的精准伤害增加4点。到11级时，打击的精准伤害增加至3点，你的光力量增加至6点；到15级时，打击增加至4点，你的光力量增加至8点；到19级时，打击增加至5点，你的光力量增加至10点。

失败 同成功，但你对该敌人造成全部火伤害。

大成功或大失败 同成功，但你对该敌人造成双倍火伤害，且显映的状态与精准伤害持续至你下下个回合结束（持续2轮，然后在你的回合结束）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Gmnf0LY2NP8fTcC4]{效果：照亮弱点}

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You bring forth a light that shines on your foe's weakest points, making it easy for you and your allies to damage the foe. Choose a foe within 60 feet. You deal the foe @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[fire]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success You deal half damage to the foe, and the foe is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of your next turn. During that time, you and your allies add 2 additional precision damage with your Strikes against the target as long as it remains limned, and you add 4 additional precision damage with your light powers against the target. At 11th level, the precision damage increases to 3 for Strikes and 6 for your light powers, at 15th level, it increases to 4 for Strikes and 8 for your light powers, and at 19th level it increases to 5 for Strikes and 10 for your light powers.

Failure As success, but you deal full fire damage to the foe.

Critical Failure As success, but you deal double fire damage to the foe, and the limned condition and precision damage last until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn).

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Gmnf0LY2NP8fTcC4]{Effect: Illuminate Weakness}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Wind Cutter.name: 风切刀 Wind Cutter
Wind Cutter.description:
你发射出一道风之刃，它从起源点出发移动时会变得越来越大，切割路径上的所有生物。你对一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内的所有生物造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]]，其起源点可以在60尺内的任意位置（而不是像大多数锥形效果那样从你的方格出发），并且目标进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You launch a blade of wind that grow larger and larger as it moves from its origin point, cutting through all creatures in the way. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[slashing]] to all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] with an origin point anywhere within 60 feet (rather than from your square like most cone effects), with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Stone Shell.name: 石之壳 Stone Shell
Stone Shell.description:
你用一层防护性的石壳包裹自己。你获得对所有物理伤害（除精金外）的抗力7。每当此抗力防止了伤害时，它会降低1。该抗力持续直到你刷新，或直到其降低至0，以先发生者为准。在第4等级，以及此后每2等级，该抗力提高1，在第20等级时最高为16。

You surround yourself in a shell of protective stone. You gain resistance 7 against all physical damage (except adamantine). Whenever this resistance prevents damage, it decreases by 1. The resistance lasts until you refresh or until it decreases to 0, whichever comes first. At 4th level, and every 2 levels thereafter, the resistance increases by 1, to a maximum of 16 at 20th level.

Fissure.name: 裂隙 Fissure
Fissure.description:
你在敌人脚下打开一道裂隙，试图将他们困在其中。裂隙影响@Template[type:line|distance:30]内的地面。区域内的生物必须尝试一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免，效果如下。当你刷新时，裂隙消失，且任何被定身或被困住的生物都会被解放。

大成功或大失败：成功该生物不受影响

成功该生物猛撞在裂隙边缘，受到@Damage[(@actor.level*2)[bludgeoning]]伤害，但它设法避免坠落进裂隙。

失败该生物部分坠入裂隙，猛烈撞击两侧。它受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]]伤害，并且处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}状态，直到它花费一次单动作（具有移动（特征））将自己挣脱出来。

大成功或大失败：失败该生物完全坠入深渊，下落途中粗暴地撞上每一处相邻突缘。它受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[bludgeoning]]伤害，并被困在一条40尺深裂隙的底部（@Check[type:athletics|dc:15]以攀爬）。

等级（+1）成功时的伤害增加2点，或失败时增加1d8，或大成功或大失败：失败时增加1d10。

You open up a chasm beneath your foes, attempting to trap them within. The chasm affects the ground in a @Template[type:line|distance:30]. Creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save with the following effects. When you refresh, the chasm disappears, and any creature immobilized or trapped is freed.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success The creature slams against the edges of the fissure, taking @Damage[(@actor.level*2)[bludgeoning]] damage, but it manages to avoid falling into the fissure.

Failure The creature falls partway into the chasm, smashing violently against the sides. It takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]] damage, and it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until it spends a single action, which has the move trait, to extricate itself.

Critical Failure The creature falls fully into the abyss, roughly impacting every abutting ledge on the way down. It takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[bludgeoning]] damage and is trapped at the bottom of a 40-foot chasm (@Check[type:athletics|dc:15] to Climb).

Level (+1) The damage increases by 2 on a success, or 1d8 on a failure, or 1d10 on a critical failure.

Elemental Control.name: 元素控制 Elemental Control
Elemental Control.description:
运用你对自身元素的精通，你夺取60尺内一名具有你元素所对应特征的生物的控制权，以你自己的力量操纵其身体；其效果取决于其进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免（若你的元素为心智，则改为 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免）。此力量对不具有你元素相关特征的生物没有效果。许多eldamon与元素化身认为此力量是禁忌，因为它窃取了另一名生物的自主权。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，因为其身体在抵抗你的控制。

失败 你控制目标。它获得被控制（状态）直到你刷新，但它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次强韧豁免。成功则此力量结束。

大成功或大失败 如同失败，但只有当你以完全违背其天性的方式控制它时（例如杀死它的盟友），目标才会获得一次新的豁免。

Using your mastery over your element, you seize control of a creature within 60 feet with one of your element's corresponding traits, moving their body under your own power with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save (or @Check[will|against:eldamon] save if your element is mind). This power has no effect on a creature that doesn't have one of your element's associated traits. Many eldamon and elemental avatars consider this power taboo, as it steals another creature's agency.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as its body fights off your control.

Failure You control the target. It gains the controlled condition until you Refresh, but it can attempt a Fortitude save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the power ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if you control it in a way that is completely against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Ride the Lightning.name: 驾驭闪电 Ride the Lightning
Ride the Lightning.description:
你变形为闪电，并沿直线向前涌动。你化作的闪电以一条线射出，最长可达120英尺。区域内的生物受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

你以闪电形态进行的移动仍会触发反应动作（），但除非它们能反制 Ride the Lightning 或直接偏转一道闪电，否则实际上很少有效果能影响你。当你到达线段末端时，你变回原本形态，并已移动了中间的距离。

选择一项：

  • 你要么变为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}
  • 你要么放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d12[electricity]] 伤害，并将线的最大长度提高至240英尺。

等级 (+1) 放电时的伤害提高1d12。

等级 (+2) 常规伤害提高1d12。

You transform into lightning and surge forward in a straight line. The lightning you become shoots out in a line up to 120 feet. Creatures in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Your movement as lightning still trigger reactions, but very few effects can actually affect you when you're lightning unless they counteract Ride the Lightning or directly divert a lightning bolt. At the end of the line, you transform back into your original form, having moved the intervening distance.

Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d12[electricity]] damage and increase the maximum length of the line to 240 feet.

Level (+1) The damage on discharge increases by 1d12.

Level (+2) The normal damage increases by 1d12.

Elemental Lariat.name: 元素套索 Elemental Lariat
Elemental Lariat.description:
你引动与自身元素相符的元素能量，锁定30尺内的一名敌人以将其束缚在原地，效果取决于其进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免结果。

此能力仅对具有你的元素特征之一的敌人能完全生效。若敌人不具有对应的元素（特征），其豁免结果视为比其掷出的结果高一级成功度。若其完全不具有任何对应的元素能量（通常仅在其为另一种元素的纯粹具现时才会如此），则元素套索改为没有效果。

大成功或大失败该生物不受影响。

成功该生物的各项速度承受–10尺的环境减值，持续2轮，或直到其对抗你的力量DC成功挣脱为止（以先发生者为准）。

失败该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身} 状态，持续2轮，或直到其对抗你的力量DC成功挣脱为止（以先发生者为准）。

大成功或大失败该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2} 状态，且其被定身，持续2轮，或直到其对抗你的力量DC成功挣脱为止（以先发生者为准）。

You draw upon the elemental energies that match your element in a foe within 30 feet in order to hold them in place, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

This is fully effective only against foes that possess one of your element's traits. If the foe doesn't have the corresponding elemental trait, their saving throw result is one degree of success better than the result they rolled. If they don't have any corresponding elemental energies at all (usually only if they are a pure embodiment of a different element), Elemental Lariat instead has no effect.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 2 rounds or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 2 rounds or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}, and it's immobilized for 2 rounds or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Rampart.name: 壁垒 Rampart
Rampart.description:
需求 你正站在坚实的表面上。

你令一道土质壁垒从你身体两侧生长出来，形成两条30英尺的线段，从你的身体向相反方向延伸。如果你是小型或中型，则这会创造一条以你为中心的 @Template[type:line|distance:65]，不过如果你的体型更大，这条线可能会更长。

区域内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[钝击]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。壁垒持续存在，直到你移动或直到你下个回合结束，以先发生者为准。

在其持续期间，你从该壁垒获得来自所有方向攻击的标准掩蔽；你的盟友则从穿过壁垒的攻击获得标准掩蔽，但壁垒不会为你的敌人提供任何掩蔽。生物仍然可以穿过壁垒移动，不过壁垒所占的方格对你的敌人而言是强效困难地形。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d8。

Requirements You're standing on a solid surface.

You cause an earthen rampart to grow from your sides, in two 30-foot lines, extending out from your body in opposite directions. If you're Small or Medium, this creates a single @Template[type:line|distance:65] with yourself at the center, though the line might be longer if you're larger.

Foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. The rampart remains until either you move or until the end of your next turn, whichever comes first.

While it lasts, you gain standard cover from the rampart against attacks from all directions, and your allies gain standard cover from attacks passing through the rampart, though the rampart doesn't provide any cover to your foes. Creatures can still move through the rampart, though the rampart's squares are greater difficult terrain for your foes.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Force Intrusion.name: 力场侵入 Force Intrusion
Force Intrusion.description:
你用与敌人动作和躯体相悖的魔法力场侵入其身。选择120尺内的一个生物。根据其@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免，目标承受@Damage[(3d6+@actor.level)[persistent,force]]伤害。

每当它在其每个回合结束时，为移除来自力场侵入的持续力场伤害而进行的纯骰检定失败时，你可以将目标重新定位最多10尺。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受持续力场伤害，但在第一次承受该持续力场伤害之后，它会在为移除持续伤害而进行的纯骰检定上自动成功。

失败 目标承受持续力场伤害。

大成功或大失败 目标承受持续力场伤害，且为移除该持续力场伤害而进行的纯骰检定DC为20；若获得特别有效的协助，则DC为15。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1。

You intrude upon your foe with magical forces that run contrary to its motion and body. Choose a creature within 120 feet. The target takes @Damage[(3d6+@actor.level)[persistent,force]] damage, depending on its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Whenever it fails the flat check to remove the persistent force damage from Force Intrusion at the end of each of its turns, you can reposition the target up to 10 feet.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes the persistent force damage, but it automatically succeeds on its flat check to remove the persistent damage after the first time it takes the persistent force damage.

Failure The target takes the persistent force damage.

Critical Failure The target takes the persistent force damage, and the flat check to remove the persistent force damage is 20, or 15 for especially effective assistance.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Stoke Aggression.name: 煽动侵略 Stoke Aggression
Stoke Aggression.description:
你夺取敌人的侵略性控制权，将其煽动成狂怒的篝火，并将其操纵着反转回敌人自身或其盟友身上。选择一名60尺内的敌人并重定向其侵略性，其效果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

大成功或大失败成功 目标不受影响。

成功 在目标回合结束时，你使其进行一次由你选择的打击，攻击你所选择的目标自身或其触及内（用于近战打击）或射程内（用于远程打击）的其一名盟友。此次打击不使用目标的动作，且不会适用或增加目标的多重攻击减值。

失败 在目标回合开始时，你使其进行一次由你选择的打击，攻击你所选择的目标自身或其触及内（用于近战打击）或射程内（用于远程打击）的其一名盟友。该回合中目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，因为这次打击会干扰其其他动作。该打击照常适用并增加目标的多重攻击减值。

大成功或大失败失败 同失败，但目标必须进行两次由你选择的打击（攻击相同或不同的生物），并在其下个回合获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}。

You seize control of a foe's aggression, stoking it into an enraged bonfire and manipulating it back toward the foe or its allies. Choose a foe within 60 feet and redirect its aggression, with effects depending on its @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success At the end of the target's turn, you cause it to make a Strike of your choice against your choice of itself or one of its allies within reach (for a melee Strike) or range (for a ranged Strike). This Strike doesn't use the target's actions, and it doesn't apply or increase the target's multiple attack penalty.

Failure At the beginning of the target's turn, you cause it to make a Strike of your choice against your choice of itself or one of its allies within reach (for a melee Strike) or range (for a ranged Strike). The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for that turn, as the Strike interferes with its other actions. The Strike applies and increases the target's multiple attack penalty as normal.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target must make two Strikes of your choice (against the same or different creatures) and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for its next turn.

Deteriorating Stream.name: 恶化溪流 Deteriorating Stream
Deteriorating Stream.description:
你发出一股腐朽的死亡能量洪流，使你前方的一切病弱并死去。你对至多 @Template[type:line|distance:120]{120 feet} 的一条直线范围内所有生物造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]] 伤害，其效果取决于它们的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物完全抵抗洪流的腐朽，且不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害，并在其花费一个单动作移除该减值之前，豁免和AC承受–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.cO3Ppp7rjS0oPypK]{效果: 腐朽洪流（成功）}

失败 该生物承受全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 4}。

等级 (+2) 伤害提高1d6。

You send a stream of deteriorating death energy, causing all before you to sicken and die. You deal @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]] damage to all creatures in a line up to @Template[type:line|distance:120]{120 feet}, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature resists the stream's deterioration entirely, and is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and takes a –1 status penalty to saving throws and AC until they spend a single action to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.cO3Ppp7rjS0oPypK]{Effect: Deteriorating Stream (Success)}

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 4}.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Jolting Embrace.name: 震荡拥抱 Jolting Embrace
Jolting Embrace.description:
你用电击环绕自身，以震慑所有胆敢攻击你的人。直到你刷新为止，与你相邻且以近战攻击命中你的生物，以及接触你或以徒手攻击命中你的生物，受到 @Damage[@actor.level[electricity]] 伤害，然后成为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 状态，持续 1 轮。选择一项：

  • 你要么成为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 状态
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1d6+@actor.level)[electricty]]；此伤害在第12等级提升为 @Damage[(1d8+@actor.level)[electricty]]，在第15等级提升为 @Damage[(1d10+@actor.level)[electricty]]，并在第18等级提升为 @Damage[(1d12+@actor.level)[electricty]]。

等级（+1） 伤害提高 1。

You surround yourself with electricity in order to shock all those who dare attack you. Until you refresh, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take @Damage[@actor.level[electricity]] damage and then become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} for 1 round. Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1d6+@actor.level)[electricty]]; this improves to @Damage[(1d8+@actor.level)[electricty]] at 12th level, @Damage[(1d10+@actor.level)[electricty]] at 15th level, and @Damage[(1d12+@actor.level)[electricty]] at 18th level.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Vine Infestation.name: 藤蔓侵染 Vine Infestation
Vine Infestation.description:
你令荆棘与藤蔓侵染一名敌人的身体，不断刺穿他们，并且要么在其周围播种植物，要么收割以提高伤害并限制其移动。选择60尺内的一名敌人。其受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[persistent,piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

选择播种或收割其一。

播种：你以你的目标为中心的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] 内进行播种：现在以及每次其受到持续穿刺伤害时都会如此，因为藤蔓从其体内生长并蔓延到其周围的地面上。

收割：你在该敌人的空间内或相邻的一个方格内进行收割，以增强侵染的效果。持续伤害每当你拥有2个等级便增加1点（向上取整），且在持续伤害持续期间，该敌人的速度会根据其豁免结果承受环境减值；成功则承受–5尺环境减值，失败则承受–10尺环境减值，大失败则承受–20尺环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Ze09I0NqNmXbfe6A]{效果：藤蔓侵染}

等级（+2） 伤害增加1d4。

You cause thorns and vines to infest a foe's body, continually piercing them and either sowing plants around them or harvesting to increase the damage and restrict their movement. Choose a foe within 60 feet. They take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[persistent,piercing]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

Sow: You sow in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] around your target, now and each time they take the persistent piercing damage, as the vines grow out of them and onto the ground around them.

Harvest: You harvest either in the foe's space or in an adjacent square to increase the infestation's effects. The persistent damage increases by 1 for every two levels you have (rounded up), and while the persistent damage lasts the foe takes a circumstance penalty to their Speeds depending on the result of their saving throw; a –5-foot circumstance penalty on a success, a –10-foot circumstance penalty on a failure, and a –20 foot circumstance penalty on a critical failure.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Ze09I0NqNmXbfe6A]{Effect: Vine Infestation}

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d4.

Supercell.name: 超级细胞 Supercell
Supercell.description:
你召唤一场极其强大的闪电风暴，对区域内的生物施以电击。风暴在你120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]中形成。进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的生物会受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[electricity]] 伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑}状态，直到你下个回合结束。风暴持续到你刷新为止。

一个生物在其每个回合中只会从“超级电池”受到一次电击伤害，即使它在区域内开始其回合然后又进入该区域也是如此。

选择一项：

  • 你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}状态
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至@Damage[(@actor.level)d6[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，你可以选择将风暴的半径提高到25尺或30尺。

等级 (+1) 放电时的伤害提高1d6。

等级 (+2) 常规伤害提高1d6。

You call forth an extremely powerful lightning storm that electrocutes creatures in the area. The storm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Creatures that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[electricity]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} until the end of your next turn. The storm lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes electricity damage from Supercell once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, you can choose to increase the radius of the storm to either 25 feet or 30 feet.

Level (+1) The damage on discharge increases by 1d6.

Level (+2) The normal damage increases by 1d6.

Wind Sniper.name: 风之狙击手 Wind Sniper
Wind Sniper.description:
你从极远距离顺风射出一道切割的空气之刃。对240尺内的一名敌人进行一次@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰}，造成@Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[slashing]]伤害。在第7等级，以及此后每隔4个等级，你的风刃射程增加120尺，在第19等级时最大为720尺。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍挥砍伤害。

成功 你对目标造成正常挥砍伤害。

失败 刀刃从目标身旁呼啸而过并留下擦伤般的切口，造成@Damage[(2+@actor.level)[slashing]]伤害。

大失败 刀刃完全落空，不造成伤害。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You fire a cutting blade of air across the wind from an extreme distance. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 240 feet, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[slashing]] damage. At 7th level, and every 4 levels thereafter, your wind blade's range increases by 120 feet, to a maximum of 720 feet at 19th level.

Critical Success You deal double slashing damage to the target.

Success You deal normal slashing damage to the target.

Failure The blade whizzes past the target and leaves glancing cuts, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[slashing]] damage.

Critical Failure The blade misses completely, dealing no damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Liquefy Air.name: 液化空气 Liquefy Air
Liquefy Air.description:
触发 一个生物以远程攻击将你作为目标，且你能看见攻击者。

你将你与该生物之间的空气液化。若该攻击为物理攻击，则触发攻击的射程增量减半，且若该攻击为钝击或挥砍，则承受–2环境减值。降低后的射程增量可能导致你处于该攻击的最大射程之外；在此情况下，该攻击自动未命中你，且无需掷骰进行攻击掷骰。你获得等同于你等级的抗力，用于抵御触发攻击造成的强酸与火焰伤害。尽管你的潮汐对该力量没有效果，但它仍会改变你的潮汐。

特殊 若你在水下，则该力量改为使水变得更黏稠，使环境减值提高至–4，并将该减值与射程增量降低扩展到所有远程武器攻击与远程徒手攻击，即使它们不是物理攻击也一样。然而，该力量造成的射程增量降低不会与水下穿刺远程攻击射程增量的正常降低叠加。

Trigger A creature targets you with a ranged attack and you can see the attacker.

You liquefy the air between you and the creature. If it's physical, the triggering attack's ranged increment is halved, and it takes a –2 circumstance penalty if the attack was bludgeoning or slashing. The reduced range increment could result in you being beyond the attack's maximum range, in which case it automatically misses you without rolling an attack roll. You gain resistance equal to your level against acid and fire damage from the triggering attack. While your tide has no effect on this power, it still changes your tide.

Special If you're underwater, the power makes the water more viscous instead, increasing the circumstance penalty to –4 and extending the penalty and the range increment reduction to all ranged weapon attacks and ranged unarmed attacks, even if they aren't physical. However, the range increment reduction from the power isn't cumulative with the normal reduction to range increment for piercing ranged attacks underwater.

Fimbulvetr.name: 芬布尔之冬 Fimbulvetr
Fimbulvetr.description:
你以冰河年代的伟大永恒寒冬环绕自身，将世界与元素寒冷的源泉并置，在异常宽广的区域内冻结所有反抗你之人。你选择的所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:500] 内的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害并成为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害并成为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 5}。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物受到双倍伤害并成为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 7}。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d6。

You surround yourself with the great eternal winter of an ice age, juxtaposing the world with the wellspring of elemental cold and freezing all those who oppose you in an extraordinarily wide area. All creatures you choose within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:500] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}.

Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 7}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Elemental Supremacy.name: 元素至高 Elemental Supremacy
Elemental Supremacy.description:
触发 100英尺内的一名生物尝试使用一个带有与你的元素相关联的特征的法术或能力。

当你的敌人胆敢侵入你的元素时，你就让他们见识谁才真正体现了它。针对触发的法术或能力进行一次反制检定，其反制等级等于你等级的一半（向上取整），且反制调整值等于你的法术DC – 10。若成功，你可以做出所有选择来决定该法术或能力的目标、目的地或其他效果，如同你是该法术的施法者或该能力的使用者一般。

该法术或能力的起源不会改变；它仍然来自实际的施法者或使用者，你只是改变正在做出的决定以符合你自己的意愿。例如，如果你控制了一条线状或锥形法术，它仍会从该法术的施法者处发出，但你可以按自己选择的不同角度瞄准该线状或锥形，也许会击中施法者的盟友而非你自己的盟友。

Trigger A creature within 100 feet attempts to use a spell or ability with an associated trait from your element.

When your foes dare to trespass upon your element, you show them who truly embodies it. Attempt a counteract check against the triggering spell or ability, with a counteract level equal to half your level rounded up, and a counteract modifier equal to your spell DC – 10. On a success, you make all the choices to determine the targets, destination, or other effects of the spell or ability, as though you were the spell's caster or ability's user.

The spell or ability origin doesn't change; it still comes from the actual caster or user, you simply alter the decisions being made to suit your own whims. For instance, if you took control of a line or cone spell, it would still originate from the spell's caster, but you could aim the line or cone at a different angle of your choice, perhaps hitting the caster's allies instead of your own.

Vital Sacrifice.name: 生命献祭 Vital Sacrifice
Vital Sacrifice.description:
触发 一个敌人对一名盟友造成伤害，且该盟友在你30尺内。

你将你的生命力与盟友相连，保护他们免受伤害，但你自己也要付出代价。你在盟友受到伤害的同时治疗该盟友，数值为 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[healing]]，等同于1加上你的等级，或总伤害值（二者取较低）。这会使总伤害有效降低该数值。若仍有任何剩余伤害，你失去等同于1加上你的等级，或剩余伤害值（二者取较低）的生命值，并使你的盟友所受伤害进一步降低该数值。任何仍然剩余的伤害照常作用于你的盟友。

Trigger A foe damages an ally, and the ally is within 30 feet of you.

You connect your life force to your ally, protecting them from harm, though not without cost for yourself. You heal your ally simultaneously as they receive the damage, for @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[healing]], an amount equal to 1 plus your level, or the total damage, whichever is lower. This effectively reduces the total damage by that amount. If there is any damage remaining, you lose an amount of Hit Points equal to 1 plus your level, or the remaining damage, whichever is lower, and you further reduce the damage to your ally by that amount. Any damage that still remains applies to your ally as normal.

Shared Vitality.name: 共享活力 Shared Vitality
Shared Vitality.description:
你将所有盟友连接到一个共享的活力储备中，保护他们免受伤害。当你使用共享活力时，你与所有在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] 内的盟友获得一个特殊的临时生命值储备，其中包含5点临时生命值，外加你每有1个等级再获得5点临时生命值。这个特殊的临时生命值储备由你与所有这些盟友共同共享，并且由于它存在于一个独立的储备中，它可以与通常的临时生命值叠加。临时生命值会优先从该储备中失去，在任何个别生物失去其临时或实际生命值之前。

如果某个效果同时伤害多个受影响的生物，并且在这些生物之间将造成的总伤害大于该储备中的临时生命值，你可以选择如何在所有受影响的生物之间分配该储备。该储备持续到你刷新。

You connect all your allies to a shared reservoir of vitality, protecting them all from harm. You and all allies within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] when you use Shared Vitality gain a special reservoir of temporary Hit Points, which contains 5 temporary Hit Points plus 5 temporary Hit Points for every level you have. This special reservoir of temporary Hit Points is shared among you and all those allies, and since it exists in a separate reservoir, it is cumulative with normal temporary Hit Points. Temporary Hit Points are lost from the reservoir first, before any individual creature loses their temporary or actual Hit Points.

If an effect damages multiple affected creatures at once and would deal more damage between the creatures than there are temporary Hit Points in the reservoir, you choose how to distribute the reservoir between all affected creatures. The reservoir lasts until you refresh.

Reactive Chain.name: 反应式锁链 Reactive Chain
Reactive Chain.description:
触发 30英尺内的一个生物受到电击伤害，且受伤生物30英尺内有一个处于震慑状态的敌人，并且该敌人没有因同一效果而受到电击伤害。

你使电击电弧跳向一个处于震慑状态的敌人。该触发的震慑敌人受到等同于另一生物所受电击伤害一半的伤害，并进行一次针对你的力量DC的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免（无论最初的电击效果具有不同的DC，或根本没有任何豁免）。

特殊 你可以放电以触发，并对一个与你相邻且未处于震慑状态的敌人触发并使用反应式连锁。

Trigger A creature within 30 feet takes electricity damage, and there's a shocked foe within 30 feet of the damaged creature who didn't take electricity damage from the same effect.

You cause electricity to arc to a shocked foe. The triggering shocked foe takes half the electricity damage the other creature took, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC (regardless of whether the initial electric effect had a different DC or no saving throw at all).

Special You can discharge to trigger and use reactive chain against a foe adjacent to you who isn't shocked.

Lifeguard Bubble.name: 救生气泡 Lifeguard Bubble
Lifeguard Bubble.description:
你创造一个发光的气泡，防止逸散的生命能量离开。气泡以你为中心存在于一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 的范围内，生物可以毫不费力地进出气泡；它只会困住逸散的生命能量。记录你与盟友在气泡内失去的任何实际生命值（非临时生命值）。

气泡会在你下个回合开始时破裂，或在气泡内的你或一名盟友将要达到 0 生命值之前立刻破裂，以较先发生者为准。气泡破裂时，你可以治疗总计 @Damage[(7+(@actor.level*7))[healing]] 生命值，你可以在气泡内的你与盟友之间按你喜欢的方式分配。如同恢复效果的常规规则，该治疗无法为某个单独的生物恢复超过其在气泡生效期间失去的生命值。

等级 (+1) 治疗增加 7。

You create a glowing bubble that prevents leaking life energy from departing. The bubble exists in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] around you, and creatures can move in and out of the bubble effortlessly; it only traps leaking life energy. Keep track of any actual Hit Points (not temporary Hit Points) that you and your allies lose while within the bubble.

The bubble pops at the beginning of your next turn, or just before you or an ally in the bubble would reach 0 Hit Points, whichever comes first. When the bubble pops, you can heal a total of @Damage[(7+(@actor.level*7))[healing]] Hit Points, which you can distribute however you like among yourself and the allies within the bubble. As normal for a recovery effect, this can't heal an individual creature for more Hit Points than they lost while the bubble was active.

Level (+1) The healing increases by 7.

Cocytus.name: 科西图斯 Cocytus
Cocytus.description:
感召一条神话冻结之河的冰川寒意，你将附近所有敌人淹没并封入冰中，寒冷在他们周围哀鸣。所有60英尺内的敌人都会受到影响，取决于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标成为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 1}，并在其仍被你的冰力量冻结期间处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}。如果它曾结束冻结状态，它不再定身，即使你之后再次给予它冻结状态也一样。

失败 如成功，但目标为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4}，且只要它仍被科库托斯定身，它唯一能采取的动作是以交互动作用来移除冻结状态。

大成功或大失败 如成功，但目标为冻结 6 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}，且只要它仍被科库托斯定身，它唯一能采取的动作是以交互动作用来移除冻结状态。

Calling upon the glacial cold of a mythical frozen river, you submerge and entomb all nearby foes as the cold wails around them. All foes within 60 feet are affected depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} as long as it remains frozen by your ice powers. If it ever ends the frozen condition, it's no longer immobilized, even if you later give it the frozen condition again.

Failure As success, except the target is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4} and as long as it remains immobilized by Cocytus, the only actions it can take are Interact actions to remove the frozen condition.

Critical Failure As success, except the target is frozen 6 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, and as long as it remains immobilized by Cocytus, the only actions it can take are Interact actions to remove the frozen condition.

Charybdis.name: 卡律布狄斯 Charybdis
Charybdis.description:
你召唤出一个旋转的泰坦级水巨漩涡，范围为 @Template[type:emanation|distance:60]，将敌人吸入或吐出。在你的每个回合结束时，漩涡鞭挞并咆哮，对区域内每个敌人造成 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，其效果取决于他们进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。该漩涡持续直到你刷新。

高潮：伤害改为 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d10[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害，但只要漩涡持续，你就会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态。

低潮：只要漩涡持续，你获得对 AC 的 +2 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.LOZSTFUALZeY9PBH]{效果：卡律布狄斯（低潮）}

大成功或大失败 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人承受一半伤害，你将其移动 10 英尺。

失败 该敌人承受全额伤害，你将其移动 20 英尺。

大成功或大失败 该敌人承受双倍伤害，你将其移动 40 英尺。

等级（20级） 伤害提高 1d6，或在高潮时提高 1d10。

You bring forth a swirling titanic maelstrom of water in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] that draws foes in or spits them out. At the end of each of your turns, the maelstrom whips and howls, dealing @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d6[bludgeoning]] damage to each foe in the area, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] saves. The maelstrom lasts until you refresh.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d10[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage, but the maelstrom makes you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} as long as it lasts.

Low Tide: You gain a +2 status bonus to AC as long as the maelstrom lasts.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.LOZSTFUALZeY9PBH]{Effect: Charybdis (Low Tide)}

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and you move them 10 feet.

Failure The foe takes full damage, and you move them 20 feet.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage, and you move them 40 feet.

Level (20th) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d10 on high tide.

Floral Embrace.name: 花之拥抱 Floral Embrace
Floral Embrace.description:
你用盛开的花朵与刺果覆盖自身，它们会对接触到你的人造成伤害。直到你刷新为止，与你相邻且用近战攻击命中你的生物，以及接触你或用徒手攻击命中你的生物，都会受到 @Damage[ (@actor.level)[piercing]] 伤害，并且你在你的方格（若你为大型或更大，则为你的一个方格）或相邻方格播种。

等级 (+1) 该伤害提高 1 点。

You cover yourself in blooming flowers and burrs, which damage those who come in contact with you. Until you refresh, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take @Damage[ (@actor.level)[piercing]] damage, and you sow in your square (or one of your squares if you are Large or Larger) or an adjacent square.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Retributive Shock.name: 惩戒震击 Retributive Shock
Retributive Shock.description:
触发 一名相邻的敌人以近战攻击命中你、一名敌人以近战徒手攻击命中你，或一名敌人以金属武器进行的近战攻击命中你

每当一名敌人胆敢打击你时，你便抓住机会用电击震慑他们，使其更容易受到你后续电击攻击的影响。触发的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[electricity]]{电击伤害}，数值等于1加上你等级的一半，并且必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免，效果如下。

在他们掷骰进行反射豁免前，你可以选择放电，以便更有效地将电荷推向你的敌人并电击他们。若你如此做，他们使用比其掷骰结果低一级的成功度结果。

大成功或大失败 成功 敌人完全避开电荷且不受影响。

成功 敌人不受伤害，随后获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 直到你下一回合结束。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，随后震慑1分钟。

大成功或大失败 失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，随后震慑1分钟。

Trigger An adjacent foe hits you with a melee attack, a foe hits you with a melee unarmed attack, or a foe hits you with a melee attack with a metal weapon

Whenever an enemy dares to strike you, you take the opportunity to shock them with electricity, making them more vulnerable to your follow-up electric attacks. The triggering foe takes @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[electricity]]{electricity damage} equal to 1 plus half your level and must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save, with the following effects.

Before they roll the Reflex save, you can choose to discharge in order to more effectively push your charge off onto your foe and shock them. If you do, they use the result one degree of success worse than the one they rolled.

Critical Success The foe avoids the charge entirely and is unaffected.

Success The foe takes no damage and then becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The foe takes full damage and then becomes shocked for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and then becomes shocked for 1 minute.

Force Gambit.name: 力场赌博 Force Gambit
Force Gambit.description:
你运用力场丝线重排力场能量并刷新你的力量，使你的盟友改变位置：将他们移动到夹击位置、让他们撤回至安全处，或推进越过敌人的触及。所有在60尺内且自愿的盟友，沿你选择的方向以“迈步”移动（每个盟友的方向可以不同）。你刷新你的力量。

Using strands of force to rearrange the force energy and refresh your powers, you shift your allies' positions, moving them into flanking positions, backing them off to safety, or advancing past a foe's reach. All willing allies within 60 feet Step in the direction you choose (this can be a different direction for each ally). You Refresh your powers.

Shadowstorm.name: 影暴风 Shadowstorm
Shadowstorm.description:
你召唤一场舞动暗影的风暴，对生物造成伤害，并以暗影覆盖区域。风暴充满你120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。进入该区域或在该区域开始其回合的敌人受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]]伤害，并且若该区域原本处于明亮光照，则该区域会被遮蔽为昏暗光照。在该区域内时，你和盟友不会受到暗影风暴的伤害。

不同于普通的昏暗光照，暗影风暴会与@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}状态结合，使该生物被黑暗所笼罩（使其成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}，除非对拥有黑暗视觉的生物；并且除非它拥有黑暗视觉，否则无法看见）。风暴持续直到你刷新。

一个生物在其每个回合中只会从暗影风暴受到一次寒冷伤害，即使它在该区域内开始其回合，然后又进入该区域。

You call forth a storm of dancing shadows that damages creatures and covers the area with shadow. The storm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Foes that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[cold]] damage and the area is obscured in dim light if it otherwise would have been in bright light. When in the area, you and allies don't take the damage from Shadowstorm.

Unlike normal dim light, a Shadowstorm combines with the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} condition to shroud the creature in darkness (making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} except to creatures with darkvision and unable to see unless it has darkvision). The storm lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes cold damage from Shadowstorm once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Tsunami.name: 海啸 Tsunami
Tsunami.description:
你放出一道巨大的海啸，摧毁你面前的一切。海浪至多60尺宽，以你的空间为中心，至多100尺高，并向外奔涌至离你120尺处。区域内的敌人基于其@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免，受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power]伤害。

高潮：该伤害改为@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]]伤害，但你会被击倒并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

低潮：海啸不再以你的空间为中心向外扩散，而是从离你至多120尺处开始并朝你移动。直到你下个回合开始前，你从该海啸获得强效掩蔽。

大成功敌人不受伤害，你将其移动10尺。

成功敌人受到一半伤害，你将其移动20尺。

失败敌人受到全额伤害，你将其移动40尺。

大失败敌人受到双倍伤害，你将其移动80尺。

等级 (+1)伤害提高1d6，或在高潮时提高1d8。

You send forth a massive tidal wave to annihilate all before you. The wave is up to 60 feet wide, centered around your space, and up to 100 feet tall, and it rushes out to 120 feet away from you. Foes in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage, based on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] saves.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]] damage, but you're knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Low Tide: The tidal wave begins up to 120 feet away from you and moves toward you, instead of beginning centered around your space and moving away from you. You gain greater cover from the tsunami until the beginning of your next turn.

Critical Success The foe takes no damage and you move them 10 feet.

Success The foe takes half damage and you move them 20 feet.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you move them 40 feet.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and you move them 80 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d8 on high tide.

Anvil Crawler Lightning.name: 铁砧爬行者闪电 Anvil Crawler Lightning
Anvil Crawler Lightning.description:
闪电以蜘蛛般的指状分叉呈锥形扩散，对区域内的生物造成震慑并使其带电。你对所有处于一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内的生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 强韧豁免。豁免失败的敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 状态，直到你下一个回合结束。选择一项：

  • 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 状态
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，你也可以将区域扩大，最大为一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:60]。

等级（+1） 伤害提高 1d4，或在放电时提高 1d8。

Lightning branches out in a cone of spidery fingers, shocking and charging creatures in the area. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. Foes who fail their save become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} until the end of your next turn. Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, you can also increase the area up to a maximum of a @Template[type:cone|distance:60].

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d8 on discharge.

Force Maneuver.name: 力场机动 Force Maneuver
Force Maneuver.description:
你使用你的力场丝线来干扰你的敌人。你可以尝试使用@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}来对60尺内的一名生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}，而不是进行运动检定。在第7等级，以及之后每4个等级，最大射程增加30尺，在第19等级时最大为180尺。此外，从第7等级开始，在力量攻击掷骰成功时，一名生物受到@Damage[(@actor.level)[force]]伤害；在大成功或大失败中的大成功时，受到@Damage[(2*@actor.level)[force]]伤害。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1。

You use your strands of force to interfere with your foe. You can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} a creature within 60 feet using a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack roll} instead of an Athletics check. At 7th level, and every 4 levels thereafter, the maximum range increases by 30 feet, to a maximum of 180 feet at 19th level. Additionally, starting at 7th level, a creature takes @Damage[(@actor.level)[force]] damage on a successful power attack roll and @Damage[(2*@actor.level)[force]] damage on a critical success.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Retributive Mindlink.name: 惩戒心灵链接 Retributive Mindlink
Retributive Mindlink.description:
触发 一名生物以近战攻击命中你。

你利用敌人的攻击与该敌人建立一条心智链接，使其暴露在你其他的心智力量之下。该敌人必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功或大失败成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人在对抗你的心智力量的意志豁免上承受–1环境减值，持续1轮。在此期间，它也获得等同于1加上你等级的一半的弱点，针对你第一个对其造成伤害的心智力量所造成的心智伤害。在因该弱点承受一次额外伤害后，该弱点结束。

失败 同成功，但敌人在对抗你的心智力量的意志豁免上承受–2环境减值，且弱点等同于1加上你的等级。

大成功或大失败失败 同成功，但敌人在对抗你的心智力量的意志豁免上承受–3环境减值，且弱点等同于2加上你等级的两倍。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.02zTjXrTz67CTGF7]{效果: Retributive Mindlink}

Trigger A creature hits you with a melee attack.

You use your foe's attack to establish a mental link to that foe, opening them up to your other mind powers. They must attempt a @Check[will|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes a –1 circumstance penalty to its Will saves against your mind powers for 1 round. During that time, it also gain weakness equal to 1 plus half your level to mental damage from your first mental power that damages it. After taking the additional damage from the weakness once, the weakness ends.

Failure As success, but the foe takes a –2 circumstance penalty to its Will saves against your mind powers, and the weakness is equal to 1 plus your level.

Critical Failure As success, but the foe takes a –3 circumstance penalty to its Will saves against your mind powers, and the weakness is equal to 2 plus twice your level.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.02zTjXrTz67CTGF7]{Effect: Retributive Mindlink}

Immortal Water Dragon.name: 不朽之水巨龙 Immortal Water Dragon
Immortal Water Dragon.description:
你形成一条蜿蜒修长的巨龙，它盘旋扭动，猛撞敌人并将其推向你或远离你，不受巨龙当前朝向影响。该巨龙为大型；若你处于高潮，则从你的空间开始；若你处于低潮，则从你选择的、120英尺内的一个空间开始；并沿你选择的一条长达120英尺的路径游动，若你处于低潮则最终结束于你的空间。巨龙路径上的所有敌人都会承受 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，取决于其 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。生物只会被该巨龙影响一次，即使其路径多次穿过该生物也是如此。

高潮：伤害为 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害，且你骑乘巨龙并随之移动，但会失去平衡。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 直到你下个回合结束。

低潮：巨龙的移动结束于你的空间，并在此守护你。你从巨龙处获得强效掩蔽，直到你下个回合结束，或直到你移出巨龙的空间为止，以先发生者为准。巨龙不为其他任何人提供掩蔽。

大成功敌人不受影响。

成功敌人承受一半伤害，且你使其移动5英尺。

失败敌人承受全额伤害，且你使其移动10英尺。

大失败敌人承受双倍伤害，且你使其移动20英尺。

等级（+1）伤害提高1d6；若处于高潮，则提高1d8。

You form a long serpentine dragon that twists and turns, slamming into foes and pushing them toward or away from you, regardless of the dragon's current direction. The dragon is Large, starts in your space if you're in high tide or in a space of your choice within 120 feet if you're in low tide, and swims in a 120-foot long path of your choice, ending in your space if you're in low tide. All foes in the dragon's path take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[bludgeoning]] damage, depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save. Creatures are only affected by the dragon once, even if its path crosses over them multiple times.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage and you ride the dragon, moving along with it but losing your balance. You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.

Low Tide: The dragon ends its movement in your space, where it guards you. You gain greater cover from the dragon until the end of your next turn or until you move out of the dragon's space, whichever comes first. The dragon doesn't provide cover to anyone else.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and you move them 5 feet.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you move them 10 feet.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and you move them 20 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d8 in high tide.

Hindering Winds.name: 阻碍之风 Hindering Winds
Hindering Winds.description:
触发 一名生物在一次移动动作中试图向你移动

你召来一阵风来阻碍触发生物向你接近的进展。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响，并且在此动作期间可以正常移动。

成功 风使该生物更难向你移动。在此动作期间，任何朝向你的移动都视为困难地形（若其已处于困难地形上，则改为强效困难地形）。

失败 风阻止该生物向你移动。在此动作期间，它不能朝向你移动。

大成功或大失败 失败 风将该生物吹倒在地，打断其移动动作，并使其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Trigger A creature attempts to move toward you during a move action

You send a wind to hinder the triggering creature's progress toward you. The creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and can move normally during this action.

Success The wind makes it harder for the creature to move toward you. Any movement toward you is difficult terrain during this action (or greater difficult terrain if it is already over difficult terrain).

Failure The wind prevents the creature from moving toward you. It can't move toward you during this action.

Critical Failure The wind blows the creature to the ground, disrupting its move action and knocking it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Avalanche.name: 雪崩 Avalanche
Avalanche.description:
你召唤出无尽的雪崩，掩埋该区域，在猛击敌人的同时为你的盟友提供些许掩蔽。雪崩在你30尺内填满一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]。除你与盟友之外的生物，若进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合，则受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] 伤害。若你或你的盟友在该区域内，你们不会被雪崩伤害，且改为获得次等掩蔽，给予AC +1 环境加值。雪崩持续至你 刷新。

生物在其每个回合中仅会因雪崩的钝击伤害承受一次，即使它在该区域内开始其回合，随后又进入该区域。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d4。

You conjure an unending avalanche that buries the area, clobbering foes while providing your allies a bit of cover. The avalanche fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 30 feet of you. Creatures other than you and your allies that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] damage. If you or your allies are in the area, you are unharmed by the avalanche, and you instead gain lesser cover, granting a +1 circumstance bonus to AC. The avalanche lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes bludgeoning damage from Avalanche once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Petrifying Dust.name: 石化粉尘 Petrifying Dust
Petrifying Dust.description:
你呼出一团锥形的尘埃，使你的敌人僵硬，让他们的移动变得笨拙（状态），并造成内部钝击伤害，最终将其石化。位于@Template[type:cone|distance:40]内的敌人受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]]伤害，并可能因其@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]强韧豁免而变得笨拙（状态）。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受全额伤害，但甩脱石化效果，并在1轮内获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 1}。

失败 该生物承受全额伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 2}。在其每个回合结束时，因石化尘埃而具有笨拙（状态）的生物必须尝试一次持续的强韧豁免。豁免失败时，笨拙（状态）值提高1（若为大成功或大失败则提高2）。豁免成功时，笨拙（状态）值降低1（若为大成功或大失败则完全移除）；这些持续豁免具有失能（特征）。如果某生物因石化尘埃而达到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 4}，它将永久石化。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但该生物承受三倍伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 3}。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d4。

You breathe a cone of dust that stiffens your foes, making their movements clumsy and causing internal bludgeoning, eventually petrifying them. Foes in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]] damage and might become clumsy, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes full damage but shakes off the petrification and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}. At the end of each of its turns, a creature with the clumsy condition from Petrifying Dust must attempt an ongoing Fortitude save. On a failed save, the clumsy condition increases by 1 (or 2 on a critical failure). A successful save reduces the clumsy condition by 1 (or removes it entirely on a critical success); these ongoing saves have the incapacitation trait. If a creature reaches @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 4} from Petrifying Dust, it becomes petrified permanently.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes triple damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Phlegethon.name: 弗莱格桑 Phlegethon
Phlegethon.description:
你唤起一条狂暴的火焰之河，以阻滞你的敌人推进，只给他们留下焦黑的残骸。你创造一条火焰之河，最宽30英尺、最深20英尺、最长120英尺，可为一条直线或单一道弯曲弧形，并在500英尺内感召这条河流出现。你可以在地面上创造这条河流，甚至可以在半空中；狂怒的火焰洪流无视重力。

当以Stride或Fly穿过火焰之河时，它属于强效困难地形，不过生物可以选择尝试Swim穿过河流，如果那样比在强效困难地形中Stride或Fly更快。

任何穿越河流的生物，或在其回合开始时占据河流区域的生物，都会受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[fire]]伤害。河流持续存在，直到你刷新。

在每个生物各自的回合中，其只会因冥河火焰而受到一次火伤害，即使它在回合开始时位于河流中、随后又穿越河流，或花费数个动作穿越河流也是如此。不过，如果它穿越河流需要超过一个回合，那么在它的每个回合中都会再次受到伤害。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

You evoke a raging river of flame to stymie your foes' advance and leave them nothing more than charred husks. You create a river of flame up to 30-feet wide, up to 20 feet deep, and up to 120 feet long in either a straight line or single curved arc, calling forth the river within 500 feet. You can create the river on the ground or even in mid-air; the raging torrent of flames defies gravity.

The river of flame is greater difficult terrain when Striding or Flying through it, though creatures can choose to attempt to Swim through the river if that would be faster than Striding or Flying through greater difficult terrain.

Any creature that crosses the river or is occupying the river's area at the start of its turn takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[fire]] damage. The river lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes fire damage from Phlegethon once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the river and then crosses the river, or spends several actions crossing the river. However, if it takes more than one turn to cross the river, it takes damage again on each of its turns.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Elysium.name: 乐土 Elysium
Elysium.description:
感召远古英雄强大的生命力，你将你的周围环境变形为一片美丽的发光原野。地面上位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] 内的区域变为极乐原野，持续至你刷新或 4 轮结束（以先发生者为准）。你和你的活盟友在极乐原野中不会因有害地形而受到伤害；相反，当你和你的活盟友在该区域内开始一个回合时，你和你的活盟友恢复 @Damage[20[healing]] 生命值。

以此方式至少恢复 1 点生命值的生物，在其下个回合开始前，获得 +2 状态加值，适用于攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免和技能检定。该区域对不死生物而言是有害地形：不死生物每进入一个方格，便受到 @Damage[5[vitality]] 伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.6O1N7lCkbQL5F9eU]{效果：极乐}

Calling upon the powerful life force of ancient heroes, you transform your surroundings into a beautiful glowing field. The area on the ground within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] becomes an Elysian field until you refresh or for 4 rounds, whichever comes first. You and your living allies don't take damage from hazardous terrain in the Elysian field, and instead, you and your living allies regain @Damage[20[healing]] Hit Points when starting a turn in the area.

A creature who recovers at least 1 Hit Point in this way gains a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks until their next turn. The area is hazardous terrain to undead, dealing @Damage[5[vitality]] damage for every square that the undead enters.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.6O1N7lCkbQL5F9eU]{Effect: Elysium}

Forceful Exile.name: 强力放逐 Forceful Exile
Forceful Exile.description:
触发 60英尺内的一名敌人采取一个移动动作

当你的敌人开始移动时，你迅速以力场先行将其重新定位。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 敌人不受影响。

成功 你的敌人抵抗了你施加以纠缠它的一部分力场，但你仍能让它偏离路线。在其移动之前，你将其重新定位10英尺（或在极少数情况下，若该距离大于其陆地速度、攀爬速度、飞行速度或游泳速度所能移动的最远距离，则改为其可移动的最远距离）。

失败 你在敌人移动前将其送到你想要的位置，可能干扰其计划。在其移动之前，你强迫该敌人疾行（或若其具有相应速度，则改为攀爬、飞行或游泳）。由于是你在移动它，这不会消耗它任何动作。尽管该移动基于其自身速度，这仍是强迫移动，因此如常，它不会因移动而触发反应动作（），也不会让你将其重新定位穿过有害地形、推下悬崖边缘或类似情形。

大成功或大失败 当你用力场之线将其灵体牵引而去时，敌人彻底迷失方向。如同失败，但这些力场也会扰乱敌人所触发的移动动作。

Trigger A foe within 60 feet takes a move action

As your foe begins to move, you quickly reposition them with force first. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success Your foe resists some of the forces you send to bedevil them, but you still send them off-course. Just before they move, you reposition them 10 feet (or the farthest they would be able to move with their land Speed, climb Speed, fly Speed, or swim Speed in the unlikely event this is less).

Failure You send the foe where you want them right before they move, potentially meddling with their plans. Just before they move, you force the foe to Stride (or to climb, fly, or Swim if it has those Speeds). Since you're moving them, this doesn't cost them any actions. Although the movement is based on their own Speed, this is still forced movement, and so as normal it doesn't trigger reactions based on movement or allow you to reposition them through hazardous terrain, off ledges, or the like.

Critical Failure The foe loses its way completely as you spirit it away with threads of force. As failure, but the forces also disrupts the foe's triggering move action.

Change Places!.name: 换位！ Change Places!
Change Places!.description:
你用由力场丝线构成的蛛网包围自身，对敌人造成伤害并重新定位他们。你对位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的所有敌人造成等于@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 +ceil(@actor.level/2))[force]]伤害的力场伤害，效果取决于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免结果。区域内的盟友不受伤害影响，并且若其自愿，你可以将他们重新定位最多10英尺。

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，且你可以将其重新定位最多5英尺。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，且你可以将其重新定位最多10英尺。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

等级 (+2) 伤害增加1。

You surround yourself in a web formed of threads of force, damaging foes and repositioning them. You deal an amount of force damage equal to @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4 +ceil(@actor.level/2))[force]] damage, to all foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], with results depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save. Allies in the area don't take damage, and if they're willing, you can reposition them up to 10 feet.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you can reposition them up to 5 feet.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and you can reposition them up to 10 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Psychic Scream.name: 灵能尖啸 Psychic Scream
Psychic Scream.description:
触发 一名生物以魔法心智效果将你作为目标，或你处于一名生物的魔法心智效果的区域内

那些试图侵入你心智的人犯下了巨大的错误。你向侵入的心智释放出一道灵能尖啸，对其造成伤害并加以扰乱。触发的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于其 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免。

在评估该生物魔法心智效果的效果之前，先应用“灵能尖啸”所造成的呆滞（状态）（这可能会使该生物承受状态减值，或导致需要进行纯骰检定以扰乱该效果）。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 1}，直到你下个回合结束。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 2}，直到你下个回合结束。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 3}，直到你下个回合结束。你不受触发的心智效果影响（不过若它是区域效果或具有多个目标，它仍可能影响其他生物）。

等级（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

Trigger A creature targets you with a magical mental effect, or you're in the area of a creature's magical mental effect

Those who seek to intrude upon your mind have made a huge blunder. You release a psychic scream into the intruding mind, damaging and disrupting it. The triggering creature takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[mental]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Apply the stupefied condition from Psychic Scream before assessing the effect of the creature's magical mental effect (this could give the creature a status penalty or cause a flat check to disrupt the effect).

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} until the end of your next turn. You are unaffected by the triggering mental effect (though if it's an area effect or has multiple targets, it might affect other creatures).

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Kunlun.name: 昆仑 Kunlun
Kunlun.description:
你召唤出一座小山，形如一根巨大而辉煌的擎天巨柱直插云霄，其宝石般的外立面上装饰着神秘学与元素能量的符号。巨柱在200尺内从地面升起并持续1分钟。它具有一个@Template[type:burst|distance:60]{60尺半径）的爆发区域}，高度由你选择：若在开阔区域中使用，最高可达180尺；若在天花板受限的空间中使用，则仅会高到足以不压碎位于柱顶的生物。随着山体生长，区域内的生物会被迅速抬升。

在上升巨柱上的敌人必须在对抗你的力量DC的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免中成功，否则会因突如其来的运动而倒地@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。你可以选择是否让所有此类生物撞上天花板（若有），并承受@Damage[20d6[bludgeoning]]伤害，且需进行一次对抗你的力量DC的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]基础豁免；或在即将触及天花板前轻柔地减缓上升速度。该巨柱的攀爬DC为20。

You call forth a small mountain in the shape of an enormous magnificent pillar that towers into the sky, with a gemlike facade adorned with symbols of mysticism and elemental energy. The pillar emerges from the ground within 200 feet and lasts for 1 minute. It has a @Template[type:burst|distance:60]{60-foot radius), with a height of your choosing, up to 180 feet if used in an open area, or just tall enough not to crush creatures atop the pillar if used in a space with a confined ceiling. Creatures in the area are lifted rapidly as the mountain grows.

Foes on the ascending pillar must succeed at a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save against your power DC or fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} from the sudden motion. You can choose whether to have all such creatures slam into the ceiling, if any, taking @Damage[20d6[bludgeoning]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC, or to gently slow down the ascent just before it reaches the ceiling. The pillar's Climb DC is 20.

Yamazu.name: 亚马祖 Yamazu
Yamazu.description:
你唤起地震与其他地震活动，仿佛一条巨型地下鲶鱼在猛烈翻腾。地震影响200尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:60]。除你之外，区域内在地面上的生物会因冲击波、震颤与坍塌的大地而受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]]，其效果取决于其进行的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

此外，直到你刷新为止，该区域为强效困难地形，且除你之外，区域内在地面上的生物对攻击掷骰、AC与技能检定承受–2环境减值。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响

成功 该生物承受一半伤害

失败 该生物承受全额伤害并因脚被一条小裂缝绊住而倒地@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大成功或大失败 该生物承受全额伤害并坠入一条更大的裂隙，深40尺，且必须攀爬回到地面（需要一次@Check[type:athletics|dc:15]检定）或寻找其他方式上升。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You evoke earthquakes and other seismic activity reminiscent of the thrashing of an enormous subterranean catfish. The earthquake affects a @Template[type:burst|distance:60] within 200 feet. Creatures on the ground in the area other than you take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[bludgeoning]] from the shockwaves, tremors, and collapsing earth, with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Additionally, until you refresh, the area is greater difficult terrain, and creatures on the ground in the area other than you take a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls, AC, and skill checks.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success The creature takes half damage

Failure The creature takes full damage and falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} as their foot catches in a small crevasse.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and falls into a larger fissure, 40 feet deep, and must Climb back out (requiring a @Check[type:athletics|dc:15] check) or find another way to ascend.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Harden.name: 硬化 Harden
Harden.description:
触发 一个生物对你造成物理伤害

你用大地使自己硬化，以抵抗针对你的攻击。你获得等于5加上你的等级的物理伤害抗力（精金除外），以对抗触发的攻击。

Trigger A creature deals physical damage to you

You harden yourself with earth to resist the attack against you. You gain resistance equal to 5 plus your level to physical damage (except adamantine) against the triggering attack.

Spray of Rampant Leaves.name: 狂乱落叶喷涌 Spray of Rampant Leaves
Spray of Rampant Leaves.description:
你掷出一锥形的狂乱树叶，穿刺你的敌人，并且要么播种新的植物，要么收割它们以创造爆炸。@Template[type:cone|distance:60]内的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] 伤害，并根据其 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免产生不同的效果。

选择播种或收割其一。

  • 播种：你在区域内播种。
  • 收割：你在区域内收割，引发额外树叶的微型爆炸。你可以使你收割的任意方格在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内爆炸。除你以外，任何爆炸区域内的生物根据其反射豁免承受该力量的伤害。一个生物只会被该力量伤害一次，即使它同时处于主区域和一次或多次爆炸中。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d6。

You fling forth a cone of rampant leaves, piercing your foes and either sowing new plants or harvesting them to create explosions. Creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in the area.
  • Harvest: You harvest in the area, causing miniature explosions of additional leaves. You can cause any squares you harvest to explode in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]. Creatures other than you in any of the explosion areas take the power's damage depending on their Reflex save. A creature is only damaged by this power once, even if it's in the main area and one or more explosions.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Deathstorm.name: 死之风暴 Deathstorm
Deathstorm.description:
你召唤一场彻底的死亡风暴，席卷一片区域并杀死其中所有人。死亡风暴在你120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]中充斥。进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的生物会受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]]伤害。若此虚空伤害杀死该生物，它会在一处由虚空能量形成的@Template[emanation|distance:20]中爆炸，对该区域内的生物造成相同数值的伤害。风暴持续至你刷新为止。一个生物每轮只能从死亡风暴中受到一次虚空伤害，即使它在该区域内开始其回合后又进入该区域，或被多次爆炸击中亦然。

等级 (+2) 伤害提高1d6。

You call forth a storm of utter death, sweeping through an area and killing all those within. The deathstorm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Creatures that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]] damage. If this void damage kills the creature, it explodes in a @Template[emanation|distance:20] of void energy, dealing the same amount of damage to creatures in the area. The storm lasts until you refresh. A creature can only take void damage from Deathstorm once per round, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area, or is hit by several explosions.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Force Shield.name: 力场护盾 Force Shield
Force Shield.description:
触发 一个生物以一次攻击将你作为目标，且你能看见攻击者。

你以护盾的形状创造多种力场，使该次攻击失去平衡，并可能将其重新定位去攻击其他东西。在触发生物的回合结束前，你的AC获得+2环境加值。

如果触发生物的攻击掷骰在力场护盾生效期间对你造成大失败，你可以选择一个除攻击者以外、与你相邻且在触及内（用于近战攻击）或在射程内（用于远程攻击）的另一个目标；攻击者对新目标重骰其攻击掷骰，并应用新掷骰的效果。

Trigger A creature targets you with an attack and you can see the attacker.

You create a variety of forces in the shape of a shield to throw the attack off-balance and possibly reposition it to attack something else. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC until the end of the triggering creature's turn.

If the triggering creature's attack roll critically fails against you while the force shield is active, you can choose another target other than the attacker that's adjacent to you and within reach (for a melee attack) or range (for a ranged attack); the attacker rerolls their attack roll against the new target and applies the effects of the new roll.

Rush of Insight.name: 洞见奔涌 Rush of Insight
Rush of Insight.description:
你将一股精神能量的奔流注入自身并扩散至周围环境，使你在重新调整能量以再次使用你的力量时，能够迅速检视周围环境，并检索你自己的记忆或与你共享相位之友的记忆。你执行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索} 三次、执行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 三次，或以任意组合执行上述两者共三次。若你是Eldamon，则由你的凡人朋友代替你进行回忆知识。你刷新你的力量。

You send a rush of mental energy through yourself and around you, allowing you to rapidly inspect your surroundings and query your memories or those of the friend whose phase you share while you rearrange the energy to use your powers again. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} three times, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} three times, or use any combination of the two three times. If you're an eldamon, your mortal friend Recalls Knowledge instead of you. You Refresh your powers.

Defensive Shroud.name: 防御斗篷 Defensive Shroud
Defensive Shroud.description:
触发 一名敌人用一次攻击命中你。

在被命中后立刻，你施放一层强大的帷幕以阻止任何后续攻击。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 3}，直到你下一回合开始。

Trigger A foe hits you with an attack.

Just after being hit, you deploy a powerful shroud to prevent any follow-up attacks. You become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3} until the beginning of your next turn.

Vajra.name: 金刚杵 Vajra
Vajra.description:
你召唤一道传奇般不可摧毁且无法抗拒的闪电并向敌人猛力刺出，释放出一道巨大的闪电。所有位于@Template[type:line|distance:2000|width:30]{宽30尺、最长2,000尺的线形区域}内的敌人都会被电击，受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]]伤害。

此电击伤害真正无法抗拒。它无视抗力，甚至对电击免疫的生物也会受到影响，改为承受力场伤害而非电击伤害。

生物无法闪避闪电，其身体也无法指望承受它，但坚不可摧的意志能让敌人否定这道闪电箭的传奇并减轻效果。结果取决于敌人的@Check[will|against:eldamon]意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功电击或许无法抗拒，但敌人的意志坚不可破，因此他们只会受到轻微伤害。敌人受到@Damage[ (floor(@actor.level/2))[electricity]]伤害。

成功敌人受到一半伤害，并陷入@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑}状态2轮。

失败敌人受到全部伤害，并陷入震慑状态1分钟。

大成功或大失败 失败敌人受到双倍伤害，并陷入震慑状态1分钟以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{目眩 1}。

等级（+1）伤害提高1d8。

You call forth a legendary indestructible and irresistible lightning bolt and thrust it forward at your foes, releasing a massive bolt. All foes in a @Template[type:line|distance:2000|width:30]{30-foot wide line up to 2,000 feet long} are electrocuted, taking @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] damage.

This electricity damage is truly irresistible. It ignores resistance, and even creatures immune to electricity are affected, taking force damage instead of electricity damage.

Creatures can't dodge the lightning, and their bodies can't hope to withstand it, but an unbreakable will allows a foe to deny the lightning bolt's legend and mitigate the effects. The results depend on the foe's @Check[will|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The electricity might be irresistible, but the foe's will is so unassailable that they only take minor damage. The foe takes @Damage[ (floor(@actor.level/2))[electricity]] damage.

Success The foe takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} for 2 rounds.

Failure The foe takes full damage and is shocked for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and is shocked for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Force Propel.name: 力场推进 Force Propel
Force Propel.description:
你射出力场丝线，在射程内对敌人造成伤害并重新定位。对60英尺内的一名敌人进行一次@Check[eldamon-power-attack|against:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰}，造成@Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[force]]伤害。

大成功或大失败 你对敌人造成双倍力场伤害，并且你可以将敌人重新定位最多10英尺。

成功 你对敌人造成正常力场伤害，并且你可以将敌人重新定位最多5英尺。

失败 力场丝线造成轻微伤害，但不足以移动敌人，除非它选择随此次攻击一起移动以抵消伤害。你的敌人选择是承受@Damage[(2+@actor.level)[force]]伤害，还是让你将其重新定位最多5英尺。
