大成功或大失败 力场丝线完全未命中。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d6，或在失败时提高1。

You send threads of force to damage and reposition a foe at range. Make a @Check[eldamon-power-attack|against:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[force]] damage.

Critical Success You deal double force damage to the foe, and you can reposition the foe up to 10 feet.

Success You deal normal force damage to the foe, and you can reposition the foe up to 5 feet.

Failure The threads of force deal minor damage but aren't enough to move the foe unless they choose to move with the attack to negate the damage. Your foe chooses whether to take @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[force]] damage or to let you reposition it up to 5 feet.

Critical Failure The force threads miss completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1 on a failure.

Inferno.name: 炼狱 Inferno
Inferno.description:
你在附近的多个区域引发一场大范围的炼狱。火焰焚烧并吞噬生物，覆盖至多六个、均在120尺内的 @Template[type:burst|distance:10]{10尺半径爆发}。你造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[fire]] 火伤害，并对区域内所有生物造成等同于4加上你等级一半的 @Damage[(4+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[persistent,fire]]{持续火} 伤害，目标需进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。即使某个生物处于多个爆发的区域中，它仍然只会受到一次伤害。

等级 (+1) 常规伤害增加1d4。

You bring forth a widespread inferno across multiple areas nearby. Flames burn and consume creatures within up to six @Template[type:burst|distance:10]{10-foot radius bursts} all within 120 feet. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[fire]] damage, as well as @Damage[(4+(floor(@actor.level/2)))[persistent,fire]]{persistent fire} damage equal to 4 plus half your level to all creatures in the area, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. Even if a creature is in the area of multiple bursts, they still only take damage once.

Level (+1) The normal damage increases by 1d4.

Retributive Weakening.name: 报应性削弱 Retributive Weakening
Retributive Weakening.description:
触发 一个与你相邻的生物用一次攻击命中你，或一个生物用一次近战徒手攻击命中你

与死亡对抗者所做的不过是在徒劳的努力中削弱自身。该生物基于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免变为力竭（状态）。力竭（状态）在为触发的攻击掷伤害骰之前生效。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态） 2}，直到其下一回合结束。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态） 3}，直到其下一回合结束。

大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态） 4}，直到其下一回合结束。

Trigger A creature adjacent to you hits you with an attack, or a creature hits you with a melee unarmed attack

Those who fight against death do little more than weaken themself in a futile effort. The creature becomes enfeebled based on its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save. The enfeebled condition applies before rolling damage for the triggering attack.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of its next turn.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} until the end of its next turn.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4} until the end of its next turn.

Life Vortex.name: 生命漩涡 Life Vortex
Life Vortex.description:
你描绘出一个生命能量的漩涡，将你周围盟友身上的一切伤害尽数抽离。你刷新你的力量。然后你移除你所有的临时生命值。对于你30尺内的每名盟友，你可以选择失去等同于10加上你的等级（@Damage[(10+@actor.level)[untyped]]）或他们缺失的生命值数量（二者取较小者）的生命值。若你如此做，你便治疗你的盟友，以等量恢复他们的生命值。

在结算所有失去的生命值与治疗后，你获得等同于你以此方式失去的生命值一半的临时生命值，持续至你下一个回合结束。

You trace a vortex of life energy as you draw all the harms out from the allies around you. You Refresh your powers. You then remove all your temporary Hit Points. For each of your allies within 30 feet, you can choose to lose Hit Points equal to 10 plus your level (@Damage[(10+@actor.level)[untyped]]) or the amount of Hit Points they are missing, whichever is less. If you do, you heal your ally, restoring their Hit Points for an equal amount.

After applying all the lost Hit Points and healing, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the Hit Points you lost in this way until the end of your next turn.

Vital Singularity.name: 生命奇点 Vital Singularity
Vital Singularity.description:
你将自己与数名盟友结合为一个由生命力构成的单一混合体，并按你的意愿分配共享的关键能量。选择至多三名在你40英尺内、等级不低于你且非仆从的盟友（他们不需要彼此都在40英尺内）。你与所选盟友短暂地融合为一个生命能量奇点，然后立即分离。

当你们分离时，你与这些盟友可以选择彼此交换位置。你可以按你的选择分配你自己与盟友的生命值，但任何人获得的生命值不能少于1点，也不能超过其最大生命值。此生命值的重新分配只影响实际生命值，不影响临时生命值。

之后，你们各自获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，直到你下一次刷新。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.DIPLUKPytQCW6kFc]{效果：关键奇点}

You combine yourself and several allies into a single amalgam of life force, distributing the shared vital energy however you see fit. Choose up to three non-minion allies of your level or higher within 40 feet of you (they don't all need to be within 40 feet of each other). You and the allies you chose momentarily merge into a singularity of life energy and then instantly separate.

When you separate, you and the allies can choose to switch positions with each other. You can distribute the Hit Points of yourself and the allies however you choose, except that no one can receive fewer than 1 Hit Point or more than their maximum Hit Points. This redistribution of Hit Points only affects actual Hit Points, not temporary Hit Points.

Afterward, you each gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level until the next time you refresh.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.DIPLUKPytQCW6kFc]{Effect: Vital Singularity}

Dazzling Embrace.name: 炫目拥抱 Dazzling Embrace
Dazzling Embrace.description:
你用耀眼的火花环绕自身，干扰敌人的后续攻击，并用光将其显映。直到你刷新，与你相邻且以近战攻击命中你的敌人，以及接触你或以徒手攻击命中你的敌人，受到等同于你等级的@Damage[(@actor.level)[fire]]火伤害，并成为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}直到其下个回合结束，且成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}直到其当前回合结束。已经同时处于显映的和目眩状态的敌人（可能是此前用炫目拥抱命中你所致）将其受到的火伤害增加你等级的一半，变为@Damage[ (floor(1.5*@actor.level))[fire]]。

You surround yourself with dazzling sparkles that interfere with your foes' follow-up attacks and limn them with light. Until you refresh, adjacent foes that hit you with a melee attack, as well as foes that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take @Damage[(@actor.level)[fire]] damage equal to your level and become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} until the end of their next turn and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of their current turn. Foes that are already both limned and dazzled (potentially from hitting you previously with Dazzling Embrace) increase the fire damage they take by half your level to @Damage[ (floor(1.5*@actor.level))[fire]].

Blinding Flash.name: 致盲闪光 Blinding Flash
Blinding Flash.description:
触发 30英尺内的一名敌人以一次敌对动作将你或30英尺内的一名盟友作为目标。

你创造一道耀眼的光闪，试图短暂致盲你的敌人，并干扰其将你或你的盟友作为目标的能力。结果取决于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人在该次触发动作期间处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

失败 敌人在该次触发动作期间处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}。

大成功或大失败 敌人目盲直到其下一回合开始。

Trigger A foe within 30 feet targets you or an ally within 30 feet with a hostile action.

You create a brilliant flash of light, attempting to momentarily blind your foe and interfere with their ability to target you or your ally. The result depends on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for the triggering action.

Failure The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for the triggering action.

Critical Failure The foe is blinded until the beginning of its next turn.

Retributive Burn.name: 惩戒灼烧 Retributive Burn
Retributive Burn.description:
触发 与你相邻的一个生物用一次攻击命中你，或一个生物用一次近战徒手攻击命中你

当敌人胆敢打击你时，你将其点燃。触发的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[persistent,fire]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1。

Trigger A creature adjacent to you hits you with an attack, or a creature hits you with a melee unarmed attack

When an enemy dares to strike you, you set them ablaze. The triggering creature takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[persistent,fire]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Rock Shield.name: 岩石护盾 Rock Shield
Rock Shield.description:
需求 你正站在坚实的表面上。

触发 一名生物以攻击将你作为目标，且你能看见攻击者。

就在你的敌人攻击前，你瞬间从地面召唤出一面大地护盾来阻挡这次攻击。你在对抗该触发攻击掷骰的 AC 上获得 +4 环境加值。在该触发攻击掷骰之后，这个 AC 加值降低 1；它持续到你下个回合开始或降低至 0 为止，以先发生者为准。

Requirements You are standing on a solid surface.

Trigger A creature targets you with an attack and you can see the attacker.

Just before your foe attacks, you instantly call forth a shield of earth from the ground to block the attack. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to your AC against the triggering attack roll. After the triggering attack roll, this AC bonus reduces by 1; it lasts until the beginning of your next turn or until it reduces to 0, whichever comes first.

Ice Shield.name: 冰护盾 Ice Shield
Ice Shield.description:
触发 一个生物以一次攻击将你作为目标，且你能看见攻击者。

你迅速用一道冰之护盾保护自己，使你被冰覆盖而冻结。你获得+2环境加值至你的AC以对抗该次攻击掷骰，并持续到当前生物回合结束为止；你还获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续到当前生物回合结束为止。你变为冻结 1。

Trigger A creature targets you with an attack and you can see the attacker.

You quickly protect yourself with a shield of ice, which freezes you over. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC against the attack roll and until the end of the current creature's turn, and you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last until the end of the current creature's turn. You become frozen 1.

Retributive Rejuvenation.name: 惩戒复苏 Retributive Rejuvenation
Retributive Rejuvenation.description:
触发 一名敌人对你造成伤害。

你将敌人袭击的能量转化为生命能量，使自己从伤害中恢复活力。你获得持续 2 轮的快速治疗，其数值等于 4 加上你等级的一半，或等于你因该次触发伤害而实际失去的生命值（非临时生命值）的一半，取较低者。

如同通常的恢复效果一样，即使你受到另一个恢复效果或拥有一个提高治疗量的效果，此快速治疗为你恢复的生命值也不能超过你失去的生命值总量。

Trigger A foe deals damage to you.

You convert the energy of your foe's assault into life energy, rejuvenating yourself from harm. You gain fast healing for 2 rounds equal to 4 plus half your level, or half the amount of actual Hit Points (not temporary Hit Points) you lost from the triggering damage, whichever is less.

As normal for a recovery effect, this fast healing can't heal you for more than the amount of Hit Points you lost, even if you receive another recovery effect or have an effect that increases the amount of healing.

Implant Taboo.name: 植入禁忌 Implant Taboo
Implant Taboo.description:
触发 60英尺内的一名敌人采取一个移动动作、采取一个攻击动作、采取一个技能动作、施放一个法术，或使用一个包含移动动作、攻击动作、技能动作或法术的行动。

你探入敌人的心智，使其所选择的动作感觉像不可饶恕的禁忌，可能迫使该生物改变其动作。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:eldamon] 意志豁免，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人对其动作感到不安并踌躇不前。它可以选择要么成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}，要么承受失败的效果。

失败 敌人无法逼迫自己采取触发动作或类似的动作。敌人必须改为选择一个不同的动作，并且在此回合中无法再使用另一个对应的动作（移动动作、攻击动作、技能动作或法术）。如果触发的是一个包含上述多种动作类型的行动，则从中选择一种使其成为禁忌。此反应动作（）发生在敌人花费其动作之前，因此当其转而采取新动作时不会失去任何动作。

大成功或大失败 失败 同失败，但敌人因对禁忌而犹豫不决，浪费1个动作；即便触发的是一个两动作行动或三动作行动，敌人也只浪费1个动作。

Trigger A foe within 60 feet takes a move action, takes an attack action, takes a skill action, casts a spell, or uses an activity containing a move action, an attack action, a skill action, or a spell.

You tap into your foe's mind and make their choice of action feel like an unforgivable taboo, potentially forcing the creature to change their action. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe feels uneasy about their actions and hesitates. They can choose to either become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} or to take the effects of failure.

Failure The foe can't bring themself to take the triggering action, or a similar action. The foe must choose a different action instead, and they can't use another corresponding action this turn (a move action, attack action, skill action, or spell). If the trigger was an activity that contained more than one of the above types of action, choose one of them to become taboo. The reaction occurs before the foe spends their actions, so they don't lose any actions when they pivot to a new action.

Critical Failure As failure, but the foe wastes 1 action hesitating over the taboo; even if the trigger was a two-action activity or a three-action activity, the foe only wastes 1 action.

Death Curse.name: 死亡 诅咒 Death Curse
Death Curse.description:
触发 敌人的攻击或能力将你降至0生命值。

让你更接近死亡对你的敌人而言是危险的。就在你即将陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}、逐渐淡出或死亡之前，你会吐露一句临终诅咒。触发生物受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[void]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]强韧豁免。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d4。

Trigger A foe's attack or ability reduces you to 0 Hit Points.

Bringing you closer to death is dangerous for your foes. Just before slipping into @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconsciousness}, phasing out, or dying, you utter a parting death curse. The triggering creature takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[void]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Illuminating Pulse.name: 照明脉冲 Illuminating Pulse
Illuminating Pulse.description:
你释放出一阵光的脉冲，照亮你周围的一切，揭示原本处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}状态的事物，并为你的光力量充能。@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]范围内的一切都会变为显映的，持续到你下下个回合结束为止（持续2轮，然后直到你回合结束）。你刷新你的力量。

You release a pulse of light that illuminates everything around you, revealing what was @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} and recharging your light power. Everything in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] is limned until the end of your turn after next (for 2 rounds and then until the end of your turn). You Refresh your powers.

Distant Heave.name: 远距投掷 Distant Heave
Distant Heave.description:
你将所有力场集中于移动120尺内的一个生物，并根据其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免尽可能将其移动更远距离。如果目标是一个自愿的盟友，你可以在无需进行强韧豁免的情况下将其重新定位至多80尺。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 你将该生物重新定位至多20尺。

失败 你将该生物重新定位至多40尺。

大成功或大失败 你将该生物重新定位至多80尺。

You concentrate all your force into moving a creature within 120 feet as far as you can, depending on its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save. If the target is a willing ally, you can reposition them up to 80 feet without the need for a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success You reposition the creature up to 20 feet.

Failure The reposition the creature up to 40 feet.

Critical Failure You reposition the creature up to 80 feet.

Exterminate.name: 歼灭 Exterminate
Exterminate.description:
你熄灭周围弱者的生命。你周围30尺@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的所有敌人会立刻死亡或受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[void]]伤害，取决于其对抗@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]强韧豁免的结果。

大成功或大失败 敌人的生命不会如此轻易被熄灭。敌人不受你的“灭绝”影响。

成功 敌人承受了你部分的灭绝，不过如果其特别脆弱仍可能死亡。若敌人为活生物且生命值低于[[ (5* ceil(@actor.level/2)) ]]（你每2个等级为5点生命值，向上取整），则其立刻死亡。否则，其受到一半伤害。

失败 你灭绝敌人。若敌人为活生物且生命值低于[[ (5+(5*@actor.level)) ]]（5加上你每个等级再加5点生命值），则其立刻死亡。否则，其受到全额伤害。

大成功或大失败 你湮灭敌人。若敌人为活生物且生命值低于[[ (10+(10*@actor.level)) ]]（10加上你每个等级再加10点生命值），则其立刻死亡。否则，其受到双倍伤害。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d8。

You snuff out the life of weaklings all around you. All foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] around you either instantly die or take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[void]] damage, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The foe's life can't be so easily snuffed out. The foe is unaffected by your Exterminate.

Success The foe withstands some of your extermination, though it still might die if it was particularly fragile. If the foe is a living creature and has fewer than [[(5* ceil(@actor.level/2))]] Hit Points (5 Hit Points for every two levels you have, rounded up), they instantly die. Otherwise, they take half damage.

Failure You exterminate the foe. If the foe is a living creature and has fewer than [[(5+(5*@actor.level))]] Hit Points (5 plus 5 Hit Points for each level you have), they instantly die. Otherwise, they take full damage.

Critical Failure You annihilate the foe. If the foe is a living creature and has fewer than [[(10+(10*@actor.level))]] Hit Points (10 plus 10 Hit Points for each level you have), they instantly die. Otherwise, they take double damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Ice Tomb.name: 冰之墓穴 Ice Tomb
Ice Tomb.description:
你操纵围绕着被冻结敌人的霜痕，将其封入冰中，直到它挣脱为止。选择60尺内一个因你的冰力量而具有冻结状态的生物。该目标会根据其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免而受到影响。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 只要目标仍被你的冰力量冻结，它就会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} 状态。如果它曾经结束冻结状态，它就不再被定身，即使你之后再次使其获得冻结状态亦然。

失败 同成功，但目标额外获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}，且只要它仍因冰之坟墓而处于定身状态，它唯一能采取的动作是用于移除冻结状态的交互动作。

大成功或大失败 失败 同成功，但目标额外获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，且只要它仍因冰之坟墓而处于定身状态，它唯一能采取的动作是用于移除冻结状态的交互动作。

You manipulate the rime surrounding a frozen foe, entombing them within the ice until they break free. Choose a creature with the frozen condition from your ice powers within 60 feet. The target is affected depending on its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} as long as it remains frozen by your ice powers. If it ever ends the frozen condition, it's no longer immobilized, even if you later give it the frozen condition again.

Failure As success, except the target is additionally @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3} and as long as it remains immobilized by Ice Tomb, the only actions it can take are Interact actions to remove the frozen condition.

Critical Failure As success, except the target is additionally @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, and as long as it remains immobilized by Ice Tomb, the only actions it can take are Interact actions to remove the frozen condition.

Life Cocoon.name: 生命茧 Life Cocoon
Life Cocoon.description:
当你重新校准周围四散的生命精华丝线时，你将它们全部牵引向自身，编织出一个生命能量的茧并将自己包裹其中。你会被这个茧施加@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}，但你获得等于3加上你等级的三倍的临时生命值；两者都持续到你下个回合结束。你刷新你的力量。

如果你失去所有临时生命值，你不再禁足；并且如果禁足（状态）结束，或你移动或被移动，临时生命值也会结束。你可以以一个自由动作（）选择同时结束禁足（状态）与临时生命值；该动作具有专注（特征）。

As you recalibrate the strands of vital essence all around you, you draw them all in toward yourself, weaving a cocoon of life energy and surrounding yourself. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} by the cocoon, but you gain temporary Hit Points equal to 3 plus three times your level, both lasting until the end of your next turn. You Refresh your powers.

If you lose all the temporary Hit Points, you are no longer immobilized, and if the immobilized condition ends or you move or are moved, the temporary Hit Points end. You can choose to end both the immobilized condition and temporary Hit Points as a free action, which has the concentrate trait.

Disrupting Tremor.name: 破坏性震颤 Disrupting Tremor
Disrupting Tremor.description:
触发 一个生物在其正在使用的移动动作期间，尝试离开你触及范围内地面上的一个方格。

你创造一次震颤来扰乱敌人的移动，其效果取决于其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 触发的生物强行继续其移动，且不受你的震颤影响。

成功 对触发的生物而言，你触及范围内的空间在触发的移动动作结束前为强效困难地形。

失败 你扰乱触发的生物的移动。

大成功或大失败 你扰乱触发的生物的移动，且该生物倒下 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Trigger A creature attempts to leave a square on the ground within your reach during a move action it's using.

You create a tremor to disrupt your foe's movement, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The triggering creature powers through with its movement and is unaffected by your tremor.

Success The space within your reach is greater difficult terrain for the triggering creature until the end of the triggering move action.

Failure You disrupt the triggering creature's movement.

Critical Failure You disrupt the triggering creature's movement, and the creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Supercharge.name: 超载 Supercharge
Supercharge.description:
你要么一次性获得，要么一次性释放大量电荷。选择一项：

  • 你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}三次
  • 你至少放电一次，至多放电三次。

如果你选择变为带电，则此力量没有其他效果。如果你选择放电一次，则@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30尺}内的敌人受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]]伤害，进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免；豁免失败则他们获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑}1轮。

如果你选择放电两次，则@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]{60尺}内的敌人受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]]伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免；豁免失败则他们获得震慑2轮。

如果你选择放电三次，则@Template[type:emanation|distance:90]{90尺}内的敌人受到@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d12 + @actor.level)[electricity]]伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免；豁免失败则他们获得震慑3轮。

等级（+1） 放电时伤害增加1d8；放电两次时增加1d10；放电三次时增加1d12+1。

You either gain or expel a huge amount of electric charge at once. Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged} three times
  • You discharge at least once, and up to three times.

If you choose to become charged, this power has no other effects. If you choose to discharge once, foes within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save, and they become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} for 1 round on a failed save.

If you choose to discharge twice, foes within @Template[type:emanation|distance:60]{60 feet} take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]] damage with a basic Reflex save, and they become shocked for 2 rounds on a failed save.

If you choose to discharge three times, foes within @Template[type:emanation|distance:90]{90 feet} take an amount of @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d12 + @actor.level)[electricity]] damage with a basic Reflex save, and they become shocked for 3 rounds on a failed save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8 when discharging, or 1d10 when discharging twice, or 1d12+1 when discharging three times.

Stoke the Embers.name: 拨旺余烬 Stoke the Embers
Stoke the Embers.description:
触发 一个生物在进行纯骰检定以移除你造成的持续火伤害时成功，且成功幅度不超过1（通常为DC为15时在其纯骰检定中掷出15或16）。

你拨弄将熄的火焰余烬，使燃烧再度复燃。触发生物改为在该纯骰检定中失败。

Trigger A creature succeeds at their flat check to remove persistent fire damage you caused, by no more than 1 (typically by rolling a 15 or 16 on their flat check if the DC is 15).

You stoke the embers of the dying flame, reigniting the burn. The triggering creature fails the flat check instead.

Elemental Protection.name: 元素防护 Elemental Protection
Elemental Protection.description:
你以你的元素的守护灌注自身与附近的盟友。你30英尺内的盟友获得等同于你等级的抗力，抵御与你的元素相关的特性。你将作为eldamon或来自元素化身的Elemental Defense专长（若有）所提供的对这些特性的抗力提高你等级的数值；若你并未从上述任一来源获得对你元素特性的抗力，则你改为获得等同于你等级的抗力。这些抗力持续到你刷新。

You infuse yourself and nearby allies with the protection of your element. Your allies within 30 feet gain resistance equal to your level to your element's associated traits. You increase the resistance to those traits from being an eldamon or from the elemental avatar Elemental Defense feat (if any) by your level; if you don't have resistance to your element's traits from one of those sources, you gain resistance equal to your level instead. These resistances last until you Refresh.

Lifestorm.name: 生命风暴 Lifestorm
Lifestorm.description:
你召唤出一场充满生机的璀璨风暴，自上方天空倾泻而下。生机风暴充满你120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。若你（若你是活）或一名活的盟友进入该区域，或在该区域开始你的回合，你获得[[/r 10+@actor.level]]点临时生命值，等于10加上你的等级，持续1轮；而进入该区域或在该区域开始其回合的不死生物会受到等量的@Damage[ (10+@actor.level)[vitality]]伤害。生机风暴持续直到你刷新。

一名生物在其每个回合中只会从生机风暴获得一次活力伤害或临时生命值，即使它在该区域开始其回合，随后又进入该区域也是如此。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1。

You call forth a vibrant storm of glowing vital energy that rains down from the sky above. The lifestorm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. If you (if you are living) or a living ally enter or start your turn in the area, you gain [[/r 10+@actor.level]] temporary Hit Points equal to 10 plus your level which last for 1 round, and undead creatures that enter or start their turn in the area take the same amount of @Damage[ (10+@actor.level)[vitality]] damage. The lifestorm lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes vitality damage or gains temporary Hit Points from Lifestorm once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Forked Lightning.name: 叉状闪电 Forked Lightning
Forked Lightning.description:
你电击一个敌人，而闪电会分叉去打击附近带电的生物。选择40尺内的一个敌人。闪电分支会命中除你以外，位于初始目标 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]{20 feet} 内的所有震慑生物。

目标与额外的震慑生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。选择一项：

  • 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}
  • 你放电以将伤害提升至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，你可以选择最远60尺的一个初始目标，并且额外目标必须位于初始目标 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} 内。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d4，若放电则提高1d8。

You electrocute a foe, and the lightning forks off to strike nearby charged creatures. Choose a foe within 40 feet. The lightning branches to hit all shocked creatures other than you within @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]{20 feet} of the initial target.

The target and the additional shocked creatures take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, you can choose an initial target up to 60 feet away, and the additional targets need to be within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} of the initial target.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d8 on discharge.

Detonate Charge.name: 引爆充能 Detonate Charge
Detonate Charge.description:
你引爆并从一名带电或震慑生物身上释放出不稳定的电击能量涌动，对该生物及其附近所有生物造成伤害。选择60尺内一名@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑}的敌人。目标的电荷在其体内涌动，对其造成@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。

你可以选择电击如何释放，涌出范围至少为@Template[type:emanation|distance:5]{5尺}，至多为@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30尺}。涌出范围内的所有其他生物承受对目标掷出的电击伤害（在应用目标的豁免、抗力、弱点等之前），并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免；若豁免失败，它们将震慑2轮。

选择一项：

  • 你要么变为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}
  • 你放电，引爆你自身的电荷，而非另一名生物的电荷。若你放电，你可以选择涌出范围至多为@Template[type:emanation|distance:40]{40尺}，并将涌出范围的中心置于你自身，而非一名震慑的敌人身上。当你成为目标时，你不会对自己造成伤害，而是将额外伤害向外集中，对涌出范围内的其他生物造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]]伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免；若豁免失败，它们将震慑4轮。

等级 (+1) 放电的伤害增加1d10。

等级 (+2) 常规伤害增加1d12。

You detonate and release a volatile surge of electrical energy from a charged or shocked creature, damaging the creature and all those nearby. Choose a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} foe within 60 feet. The target's electric charge surges through their body, dealing them @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d12[electricity]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

You can choose how the electricity releases, with an emanation of at least @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]{5 feet} and up to @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet}. All other creatures within the emanation take the electricity damage rolled against the target (before applying the target's saving throw, resistances, weaknesses, and so on), with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save, and they become shocked for 2 rounds on a failed save.

Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge, detonating your own charge rather than the charge on another creature. If you discharge, you can choose for the emanation to be up to @Template[type:emanation|distance:40]{40 feet} and you center the emanation on yourself, not on a shocked foe. While you are the target, you don't deal damage to yourself, focusing the extra damage outward to deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d10[electricity]] damage to the other creatures in the emanation with a basic Reflex save, and they become shocked for 4 rounds on a failed save.

Level (+1) The damage on discharge increases by 1d10.

Level (+2) The normal damage increases by 1d12.

Darkness From Below.name: 来自下方的黑暗 Darkness From Below
Darkness From Below.description:
你从下方唤起蔓延的黑暗，它升腾为一根午夜之柱，吞噬你的敌人。此柱为一个垂直圆柱体，你可以选择其半径为5尺至15尺，并选择其高度为40尺至200尺；圆柱底部中心必须在你200尺内，但圆柱的顶端或远侧可以延伸到射程之外。

你对区域内每个生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] 点伤害，其结果取决于其进行的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1} 状态，直到你下个回合结束，因为黑暗也同样向你蔓延。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半寒冷伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部寒冷伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 2} 状态，直到你下个回合结束。

大失败 该生物受到双倍寒冷伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 3} 状态，直到你下个回合结束。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You call forth creeping darkness from below, which ascends in a pillar of midnight, devouring your foes. The pillar is a vertical cylinder with your choice of radius from 5 feet to 15 feet and your choice of height from 40 feet to 200 feet, and the pillar's bottom center must be within 200 feet of you, but the top or far side of the pillar can extend out of range.

You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[cold]] damage to each creature in the area, with results depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save. You become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn, as the darkness creeps over you as well.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half cold damage.

Failure The creature takes full cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 2} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double cold damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3} until the end of your next turn.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Mind Palace.name: 心智宫殿 Mind Palace
Mind Palace.description:
你在自己与盟友周围竖起一座宏伟的心智防御宫殿，为你们疲惫不堪的心智提供避难所，以抵御袭击，并将你的心智能量重新整理归位。持续1轮，你与所有位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的盟友在所有意志豁免上获得+2状态加值。

当你使用心智宫殿时，你与区域内的每名盟友立即将自己的惊惧（状态）降低1，然后你可以再尝试一次针对一个正在影响你、且持续时间尚未结束并允许进行意志豁免的心智效果的意志豁免检定；若豁免成功，则移除该效果。随后，该心智效果会在1天内对你的心智宫殿暂时免疫。你刷新你的力量。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.zHioW4ts7mElDgz6]{效果：心智宫殿}

You erect a palatial mental defense around yourself and your allies, granting your beleaguered minds refuge from what assails them as you bring your mental energies back in order. For 1 round, you and all allies within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] gain a +2 status bonus all Will saves.

You and each ally in the area when you use Mind Palace immediately reduce your frightened condition by 1 and then you can attempt another Will save throw against a mental effect with a duration affecting you that allows a Will save, removing the effect on a successful save. The mental effect then becomes temporarily immune to your Mind Palace for 1 day. You Refresh your powers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.zHioW4ts7mElDgz6]{Effect: Mind Palace}

Superbolt.name: 超级雷霆箭 Superbolt
Superbolt.description:
你从天穹引下一道强力无比的闪电，将沿途的敌人震慑。超强雷击落下形成一个垂直圆柱，半径为5英尺，高度由你选择，最高可达200英尺。闪电必须在距离你200英尺内击中地面。区域内的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] 伤害，其效果取决于其进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免。

选择一项：

  • 你要么获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}
  • 你放电以将伤害提高至 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] 伤害。若你放电，则生物在失败时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}，在大成功或大失败的失败时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并且为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6，若放电则增加1d8。

You bring down an incredibly powerful bolt of lightning from the heavens, stunning foes along its path. The superbolt strikes down in a vertical cylinder with a radius of 5 feet and your choice of height up to 200 feet. The bolt must strike the ground within 200 feet of you. Creatures in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[electricity]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Choose one:

  • You either become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}
  • You discharge to increase the damage to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[electricity]] damage. If you discharge, creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} on a failure and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4} on a critical failure.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d8 on discharge.

Counter Element.name: 反制元素 Counter Element
Counter Element.description:
触发 60英尺内的一名生物试图使用一个带有关联特征的法术或能力，且该特征来自一种对你的元素弱势的元素。

你唤起你的元素力量来反制你的敌人使用你占优势的元素。对触发的法术或能力进行一次反制检定，使用你的力量DC – 10作为你的反制调整值，并将你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。

Trigger A creature within 60 feet attempts to use a spell or ability with an associated trait from an element weak to your element.

You call upon your elemental powers to counter your foe's use of an element where you have the advantage. Attempt a counteract check against the triggering spell or ability, using your power DC – 10 as your counteract modifier and half your level rounded up as your counteract level.

Gather Pollen.name: 采集花粉 Gather Pollen
Gather Pollen.description:
你将锯齿状的花粉聚集在一名敌人周围，要么在敌人周围播撒带有遮蔽性花粉的花朵，要么收割附近的植物，用它们的过敏原使敌人染病。选择60英尺内的一名敌人。该目标敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

选择播撒或收割。

  • 播撒：你以你的敌人为中心在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内播撒（包括其空间），创造出大型花朵，只要它们仍留在该区域内就会释放一团花粉云。与你播撒的花朵处于同一空间内的生物，会因花粉而处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态；而区域外的生物，对区域内的生物而言也会变得隐蔽。这不会使生物对你变得隐蔽，无论你是在该区域内还是在区域外。
  • 收割：你在敌人的空间或相邻的方格内收割，将植物物质转化为额外的致敏花粉并使敌人染病。在强韧豁免成功（但非大成功）时，目标在1轮内其攻击掷骰、察觉检定与技能检定承受–1状态减值；在失败时，目标为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃 2}；在大失败时，目标为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃 3}。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.zSmLnnJTRlyS3Gvf]{效果：聚拢花粉}

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You gather jagged pollen around a foe, either sowing flowers with concealing pollen around your foe or else harvesting nearby plans to sicken the foe with their allergens. Choose a foe within 60 feet. The target foe takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around your foe (including their space), creating large flowers that release a cloud of pollen as long as they remain in the area. Creatures in the same space as a flower you sowed are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} by the pollen, and creatures outside the area become concealed to creatures within. This doesn't make creatures concealed to you, whether you are in the area or out of it.
  • Harvest: You harvest in the foe's space or an adjacent square, transforming the plant matter into additional allergenic pollen and sickening the foe. On a successful Fortitude save (though not a critical success), the target takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls, Perception checks, and skill checks for 1 round, on a failure, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, and on a critical failure, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3}.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.zSmLnnJTRlyS3Gvf]{Effect: Gather Pollen}

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Preserve Life.name: 维持生命 Preserve Life
Preserve Life.description:
你伸手触及周围盟友的生命力量，以便刷新你的生命力量，并汇聚他们溢散的生命能量，让他们能够再次尝试收集。你刷新你的力量。

直到你下个回合结束为止，记录你和你的盟友失去的实际生命值数量（不包括临时生命值），因为你会短暂地收集他们溢散的生命能量。在此期间，如果一名盟友在结束其回合时与你相邻，他们恢复 @Damage[(6+@actor.level)[healing]] 生命值；但是，他们无法以这种方式获得超过其失去的生命值数量的治疗。在你下个回合开始时，你恢复 @Damage[(6+@actor.level)[healing]] 生命值，同样受限于你无法以这种方式获得超过你失去的生命值数量的治疗。

等级 (+1) 该治疗增加 1。

You reach out to the life forces of your allies around you in order to refresh your life powers, and you gather their spilled vital energy so they can try to collect it again. You Refresh your powers.

Until the end of your next turn, keep track of how many actual Hit Points (not including temporary Hit Points) you and your allies lose, as you collect their spilled vital energy momentarily. During this time, if an ally ends their turn next to you, they recover @Damage[(6+@actor.level)[healing]] Hit Points; however, they can't gain more healing in this way than the number of Hit Points they lost. At the start of your next turn, you recover @Damage[(6+@actor.level)[healing]] Hit Points, with the same limitation that you can't gain more healing in this way than the number of Hit Points you lost.

Level (+1) The healing increases by 1.

Reflect Projectiles.name: 反射投射物 Reflect Projectiles
Reflect Projectiles.description:
触发 敌人以物理远程攻击将你作为目标，且你知晓该攻击或能力

你以一阵疾风将投射物反弹开，可能将其转向敌人。你在对抗触发的攻击时获得+4环境加值至AC，并且在直到当前生物回合结束前对抗任何进一步的物理远程攻击时也获得该加值。若任何此类攻击为大成功或大失败中的大失败，你可以将其重定向至射程内的另一个目标，进行一次@Check[eldamon-power-attack|against:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}以决定该攻击是否命中，但使用原本远程攻击的伤害与效果。你无法使用此力量来偏转异常巨大的远程投射物（例如巨石或弩炮箭）。

Trigger A foe targets you with a physical ranged attack and you are aware of the attack or ability

With a gust of wind, you reflect the projectile away, potentially onto a foe. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack, and against any further physical ranged attacks until the end of the current creature's turn. If any such attacks are critical failures, you can redirect them to another target within range, making a @Check[eldamon-power-attack|against:ac]{power attack roll} to determine if the attack hits but using the original ranged attack's damage and effects. You can't use this power to deflect unusually massive ranged projectiles (such as boulders or ballista bolts).

Firestorm.name: 火焰风暴 Firestorm
Firestorm.description:
你召唤一场炽烈的火风暴，它在区域内肆虐，灼烧所有不幸仍留在其中的人。火风暴在你120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]中充满。进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的生物会受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[fire]]伤害。风暴持续直到你刷新。

每个生物在其每个回合中只会从火风暴受到一次火伤害，即使它在区域内开始其回合，然后又进入该区域也是如此。

等级 (+1) 伤害提高1d4。

You conjure a blazing firestorm that rages across the area, searing all those unlucky enough to remain inside. The firestorm fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Creatures that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[fire]] damage. The storm lasts until you refresh.

A creature only takes fire damage from Firestorm once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Final Harvest.name: 最终收获 Final Harvest
Final Harvest.description:
你收割你在周围广大区域内播种的植物。你必须进行收割。当你这样做时，你可以收割你在自身周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:200] 内你选择要收割的任何你所播种的植物。此力量无法收割其他植物。位于被收割植物区域内的敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d8。

You harvest plants you sowed around you in a wide area. You must harvest. When you do, you can harvest any plants you sowed within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:200] around you that you choose to harvest. This power can't harvest other plants. Foes in the area of the harvested plants take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Cancel Life.name: 取消生命 Cancel Life
Cancel Life.description:
你在身边聚集了如此多的死亡能量以刷新你的死亡力量，以至于你遏制了生命的力量。你刷新你的力量。直到你的下个回合，你可以尝试反制任何治疗效果、授予临时生命值的效果，或其他恢复生命值的效果（例如快速治疗和再生），只要该效果在你60英尺范围内。你使用你一半的等级（向上取整）作为你的反制等级，并以你的力量DC – 10作为你的反制调整值。

在反制成功时，你会阻止治疗效果、获得临时生命值或恢复生命值，不过非治疗效果仍可能提供部分益处。

例如，如果你反制了一个授予临时生命值和状态加值的非治疗效果，你只会阻止临时生命值，而状态加值将会保留。

You gather so much death energy around you to refresh your death powers that you stifle the power of life. You Refresh your powers. Until your next turn, you can attempt to counteract any healing effects, effects that grant temporary Hit Points, or other effects that recover Hit Points such as fast healing and regeneration, as long as the effect is within 60 feet of you. You use half your level rounded up as your counteract level and your power DC – 10 as your counteract modifier.

On a successful counteract, you prevent the healing effect, the gaining of temporary Hit Points, or the recovery of Hit Points, though a non-healing effect might still grant a partial benefit.

For instance, if you counteracted a non-healing effect that granted temporary Hit Points and a status bonus, you would only prevent the temporary Hit Points, and the status bonus would remain.

Rock Cover.name: 岩石掩蔽 Rock Cover
Rock Cover.description:
你将岩石牵引到自己周围，刷新你的大地能量，同时为你自己和你的盟友提供掩蔽。你获得强效掩蔽，使你的AC、反射豁免和隐匿获得+4环境加值，但你不能利用该掩蔽进行躲藏或潜行，因为掩蔽明显地环绕着你，你的位置一目了然。

此外，对于来自敌人的、穿过你空间的攻击，你提供标准掩蔽而非次等掩蔽；而对于来自盟友的、穿过你空间的攻击，你操控岩石以使其不提供任何掩蔽。所有这些效果持续到你下个回合开始。你刷新你的力量。

You draw rock around yourself, refreshing your earth energy while providing yourself and your allies cover. You gain greater cover, granting you a +4 circumstance bonus to AC, Reflex saves, and Stealth, though you can't use this cover to Hide or Sneak, since the cover clearly surrounds you and your position is obvious.

Additionally, you provide standard cover, rather than lesser cover, against attacks from your foes that pass through your space, and you manipulate the rock in order to provide no cover against attacks from your allies that pass through your space. All these effects last until the beginning of your next turn. You Refresh your powers.

Force Rebuff.name: 力场击退 Force Rebuff
Force Rebuff.description:
触发 一个生物用近战攻击命中你。

每个动作都有一个大小相等但方向相反的反应，而当敌人打击你时，你会增强该反应并改变其方向，将其送离原位以扰乱其防御、重新定位它，或两者兼有。它必须尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物选择是让你将其重新定位 5 尺，或在其下一个回合结束前成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

失败 你将该生物重新定位 5 尺，且它在其下一个回合结束前变为 off-guard。

大失败 你将该生物重新定位 10 尺，且它变为 off-guard，持续 2 轮。

Trigger A creature hits you with a melee attack.

Every action has an equal but opposite reaction, and you increase that reaction and alter its direction when a foe strikes you, sending them out of position to disrupt their defenses, reposition them, or both. They must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature chooses whether to let you reposition it 5 feet or to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of its next turn.

Failure You reposition the creature 5 feet and it becomes off-guard until the end of its next turn.

Critical Failure You reposition the creature 10 feet and it becomes off-guard for 2 rounds.

Calamitous Deluge.name: 灾厄洪流 Calamitous Deluge
Calamitous Deluge.description:
你在一个区域内倾泻无尽的洪水，汲取其自身的力量以造成伤害并重新定位敌人。灾厄般的洪流充满你120尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。在区域内开始其回合的敌人承受@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d6)[bludgeoning]]伤害，且你将其移动15尺。洪流持续直到你刷新。

高潮：洪流移动生物时，不再是从你身边推开，而是使其远离洪流的中心移动。这是强迫移动。伤害提升为@Damage[(@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power]伤害。然而，只要洪流持续，你就处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}状态。

低潮：洪流移动生物时，不再是朝你拉近，而是使其朝向洪流的中心移动。这是强迫移动。若洪流中心附近没有足够的空间，距离中心更近的生物先移动，其他生物则在不被阻挡的情况下尽可能远地移动。当你在洪流中时，你和你的盟友处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，不过其他生物对你而言并非隐蔽。

等级 (+1) 潮高潮时的伤害提高1d4。

等级 (+2) 常规伤害提高1d6。

You pour down an unending deluge of water in an area, feeding off its own power to damage and reposition foes. The calamitous deluge fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet of you. Foes that start their turn in the area take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d6)[bludgeoning]] damage and you move them 15 feet. The deluge lasts until you refresh.

High Tide: Instead of pushing away from you, when the deluge moves a creature, they are moved away from the center of the deluge. This is forced movement. The damage increases to @Damage[(@actor.level)d4[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage. However, you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} as long as the deluge lasts.

Low Tide: Instead of pulling toward you, when the deluge moves a creature, they are moved toward the center of the deluge. This is forced movement. If there's not enough space near the center of the deluge, creatures nearer to the center move first, and others move as far as they can without being blocked. You and your allies are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while you're in the deluge, though other creatures aren't concealed to you.

Level (+1) The damage on high tide increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The normal damage increases by 1d6.

Glacier.name: 冰川 Glacier
Glacier.description:
你将一座冰川砸向战场，摧毁并冻结你的敌人。冰川落向以120英尺内一点为中心的@Template[type:burst|distance:40]{40英尺半径}内的生物；冰川最初出现在中心点上方40英尺处，对半径40英尺、高40英尺的垂直圆柱体内的生物造成伤害。

区域内的生物受到@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[cold],(1+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]]伤害，其效果取决于其@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 3}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 4}。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 5}。

等级 (+1) 寒冷伤害增加1d4，钝击伤害增加1。

You drop a glacier onto the battlefield, devastating and freezing over your foes. The glacier falls on creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:40]{40-foot radius} with a center within 120 feet; the glacier initially appears 40 feet above the center point, damaging creatures within a vertical cylinder 40 feet high with a radius of 40 feet.

Creatures in the area take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[cold],(1+@actor.level)[bludgeoning]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 3}.

Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 4}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 5}.

Level (+1) The cold damage increases by 1d4 and the bludgeoning damage increases by 1.

Coruscating Flash.name: 炫目闪光 Coruscating Flash
Coruscating Flash.description:
你释放出一道闪耀的光闪，使附近的敌人目眩，并让附近的灯光旋转进入协调状态。在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的敌人将处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态，直到你下个回合结束。你刷新你的力量。

You emanate a coruscating flash that dazzles nearby foes and sets the nearby lights spinning into a coordinated state. Foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of your next turn. You Refresh your powers.

Weakening Field.name: 弱化力场 Weakening Field
Weakening Field.description:
当你将死亡能量以网格状排列在你周围时，你恢复你的力量并创造一个削弱力场以汲取敌人的力量。敌人在你周围的一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内，只要仍留在该力场中，就会根据其@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]强韧豁免而陷入力竭。该力场持续到你下个回合结束。你刷新你的力量。

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 只要仍留在该力场中，敌人便会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 1}。

失败 只要仍留在该力场中，敌人便会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 2}。

大失败 只要仍留在该力场中，敌人便会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 4}。

As you arrange death energy in a lattice around you, you recover your powers and create a weakening field to leach away your foes' strength. Foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] become enfeebled based on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save as long as they remain in the field. The field lasts until the end of your next turn. You Refresh your powers.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} as long as they remain in the field.

Failure The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} as long as they remain in the field.

Critical Failure The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4} as long as they remain in the field.

Rushing Embrace.name: 疾冲拥抱 Rushing Embrace
Rushing Embrace.description:
你以风之刃环绕自身，斩击一切胆敢攻击你之人。直到你刷新，与你相邻且用近战攻击命中你的生物，以及接触你或用徒手攻击命中你的生物，都会受到 @Damage[@actor.level[slashing]] 伤害。若你在上一回合中至少移动了40英尺，你将使风势涌动，使挥砍伤害提高你等级的一半。

等级（+1） 伤害提高1点。

You surround yourself in blades of wind in order to slash all those who dare attack you. Until you refresh, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take @Damage[@actor.level[slashing]] damage. If you moved at least 40 feet on your last turn, you surge up the winds, increasing the slashing damage by half your level.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Enfolding Roots.name: 盘根错节 Enfolding Roots
Enfolding Roots.description:
你用一片根须领域环绕自身，对敌人造成伤害，并通过播种或收割来为你提供掩蔽。你对一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的所有敌人造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]]伤害，其结果取决于其@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免。

选择播种或收割之一。

  • 播种：你在该区域内播种。
  • 收割：你在该区域内收割，将收割到的根须与植物转化为包覆性的屏障，为你和你的盟友（但不为你的敌人）提供标准@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.other-effects.Item.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{掩蔽}，持续2轮。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You surround yourself with a field of roots, damaging foes and sowing or harvesting to provide you cover. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage, to all foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], with results depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow within the area.
  • Harvest: You harvest in the area, transforming the harvested roots and plants into an enfolding barrier that provides standard @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.other-effects.Item.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{Cover} to you and your allies (but not your foes) for 2 rounds.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Opportune Drain.name: 乘隙汲取 Opportune Drain
Opportune Drain.description:
触发 一名盟友对30尺内的一名敌人进行攻击掷骰并大成功或大失败。

在你的盟友打出致命一击、令敌人露出弱点的瞬间，你利用这一破绽汲取敌人的生命力。被触发的敌人会根据其 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免而陷入不同程度的力竭。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}。

大成功或大失败失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 2}。

Trigger An ally critically succeeds at an attack roll against a foe within 30 feet.

In the moment of weakness when your ally lands a telling blow, you take advantage of the opening to drain away your foe's life force. The triggering foe becomes drained depending on its @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Fade Into Darkness.name: 隐入黑暗 Fade Into Darkness
Fade Into Darkness.description:
你完全隐入黑暗之中。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 3}，直到你刷新或直到某个其他效果结束你的笼罩的状态，以先发生者为准。

You fade completely into the darkness. You become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3} until you refresh or until some other effect ends your shrouded condition, whichever comes first.

Force Missile Fusillade.name: 力场飞弹齐射 Force Missile Fusillade
Force Missile Fusillade.description:
你向敌人发射数量惊人的力场飞弹，用力场丝线将它们系住，使其能不断追踪目标直至命中。你的齐射包含数量等于你的等级 + 1 的飞弹。你可以将它们分配给你选择的、120 英尺内的任意数量的目标，最多不超过你齐射中的飞弹数量。

对你以此方式选定的每个生物进行 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{力量攻击掷骰}（无论你向该生物发射多少飞弹，每个生物只进行一次攻击掷骰），并根据你的力量攻击掷骰结果，对指向该生物的每枚飞弹造成合计 @Damage[1d6[force]] 伤害。

如果你为将一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 生物作为目标而进行的纯骰检定失败，你不会完全失去这些飞弹，而是改为应用下方的大成功或大失败效果。

大成功或大失败：成功 你的飞弹对目标造成重击，造成双倍伤害。

成功 你的飞弹命中目标，造成正常伤害。

失败 部分飞弹命中，其余飞弹盘旋回绕以再次尝试。你指向该目标的飞弹中有一半命中（向下取整），仅命中的飞弹造成正常伤害。在你每个回合开始时，直到你刷新为止，用剩余的飞弹对该生物再尝试一次攻击掷骰。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但所有飞弹都未命中并盘旋回绕以再次尝试。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.oQyoIIAqt0N0PbQq]{效果: Force Missile Fusillade (Miss)}

You fire off an outrageous number of force missiles at foes, tying threads of force to allow them to home in on targets until they hit. Your fusillade contains a number of missiles equal to your level + 1. You can divide them among as many targets within 120 feet as you choose, up a maximum of the number of missiles in your fusillade.

Make @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{power attack rolls} against each creature you targeted in this way (a single attack roll per creature regardless of how many missiles you fire at the creature), dealing a combined total of @Damage[1d6[force]] damage per missile directed at that creature based on your power attack roll.

If you fail a flat check to target a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creature, instead of losing the missiles entirely, you apply the critical failure effect below.

Critical Success Your missiles critically hit the target, dealing double damage.

Success Your missiles hit the target, dealing normal damage.

Failure Some of the missiles hit, and the others circle around to try again. Half of the missiles you directed at the target hit (rounded down), dealing normal damage only for the missiles that hit. At the beginning of each of your turns until you refresh, attempt another attack roll against the creature with the remaining missiles.

Critical Failure As failure, except all the missiles miss and circle around to try again.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.oQyoIIAqt0N0PbQq]{Effect: Force Missile Fusillade (Miss)}

Ambush.name: 伏击 Ambush
Ambush.description:
你召唤出一丛突如其来的灌木从地面刺出，出现以提供对抗你敌人的掩蔽，并可能使你的敌人失衡。位于120尺内一个15尺×15尺方形内的生物受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

选择播种或收获之一。

  • 播种：你在该区域内播种，创造出一丛灌木，只要其仍然存在，就能为你和你的盟友提供次等掩蔽（但不为你的敌人提供）。如果你从这丛灌木中收获方格，则该区域内的敌人在你下个回合结束前变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。
  • 收获：你在该区域内收获。该区域内的敌人在你下个回合结束前变为offguard，除非它们在其豁免中大成功。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You bring forth a sudden unexpected shrub that pierces from the ground, emerging to provide cover against your foes and potentially knock your foes off-balance. Creatures in a 15-foot by 15-foot square within 120 feet take @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow within the area, creating a bush that can provide lesser cover to you and your allies (but not to your foes) as long as it remains. If you harvest squares from this bush, foes in the area become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.
  • Harvest: You harvest in the area. Foes in the area become offguard until the end of your next turn unless they critically succeed at their saving throw.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Stiffening Pine Shot.name: 硬化松针射击 Stiffening Pine Shot
Stiffening Pine Shot.description:
你向一名敌人发射一阵松针弹幕，可以在其周围播种，或收割附近植物来使敌人的身体僵硬。对60尺内的一名敌人进行一次@Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{远程力量攻击掷骰}，造成@Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[piercing]]伤害。

选择播种或收割之一。

  • 播种：除大失败以外的任何结果，你都会在敌人的空间周围10尺放射范围内播种（包括敌人的空间）。
  • 收割：你在敌人的空间内，或从与敌人相邻的一个空间中收割。检定结果为失败（但不是大失败）时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续1轮；检定结果为成功时，敌人获得笨拙 1，持续2轮；检定结果为大成功时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续2轮。

大成功 你对目标造成双倍穿刺伤害。

成功 你对目标造成正常穿刺伤害。

失败 你不造成伤害，但你的射击仍会产生一个效果，取决于你选择了播种还是收割。

大失败 你的射击完全落空。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You fire a barrage of pine needles at a foe, either sowing around them or harvesting nearby plants to stiffen the foe's body. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{ranged power attack roll} against a foe within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d6[piercing]] damage.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: On any result except a critical failure, you sow in a 10-foot emanation around the foe's space, including the foe's space.
  • Harvest: You harvest in the foe's space or from a space adjacent to the foe. The foe becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round on a failure (but not a critical failure), clumsy 1 for 2 rounds on a success, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 2 rounds on a critical success.

Critical Success You deal double piercing damage to the target.

Success You deal normal piercing damage to the target.

Failure You deal no damage, but your shot still has an effect depending on whether you sowed or harvested.

Critical Failure Your shot misses completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Devour Charge.name: 吞噬冲锋 Devour Charge
Devour Charge.description:
你在重排区域内的元素电击并刷新你的力量时，从附近的敌人身上汲取电荷。对每个在30英尺内处于震慑状态的敌人，你可以选择吞噬其电荷，使其受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)[electricity]] 伤害，并在1轮内变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，同时移除其震慑状态。若你从至少一个敌人那里吞噬了电荷，你将变为带电。你刷新你的力量。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1点。

You draw in charge from nearby foes as you rearrange the elemental electricity in the area and refresh your powers. For each foe with the shocked condition within 30 feet, you can choose to devour their charge, causing them to take @Damage[(@actor.level)[electricity]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round, removing their shocked condition. If you devoured the charge from at least one foe, you become charged. You Refresh your powers.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1.

Disruptive Impulse.name: 破坏性冲动 Disruptive Impulse
Disruptive Impulse.description:
你夺取附近所有力场的控制权，重新排列它们以刷新你的力量，并对敌人的移动造成破坏。你刷新你的力量。

直到你下个回合开始前，每当你在你周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] 内的一个敌人开始除“迈步”外的一个移动动作时，他们必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 强韧豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 在其移动之前，你将该敌人重新定位5尺。

失败 在其移动之前，你将该敌人重新定位10尺。

大失败 在其移动之前，你将该敌人重新定位20尺。

You seize control of all the forces nearby, rearranging them to refresh your powers and wreak havoc with your foes' movement. You Refresh your powers.

Until the beginning of your next turn, whenever a foe within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] of you begins a move action other than a Step, they must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save, with the following effects.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success You reposition the foe 5 feet just before it moves.

Failure You reposition the foe 10 feet just before it moves.

Critical Failure You reposition the foe 20 feet just before it moves.

Electric Surge.name: 电能涌动 Electric Surge
Electric Surge.description:
你向前方放出一道涌动的电流，以直线电击生物。你对所有位于一个 @Template[type:line|distance:20] 中的生物造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次带有 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。选择一项：

  • 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}状态，
  • 你放电以将区域增加至一个 @Template[type:line|distance:40]，并将伤害骰从d4提升为 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]]{d8}。

在第5等级，当你使用电击涌动时，你可以选择将直线的体型增加为30尺直线，此后每4个等级，你都可以将直线的体型再增加10尺（放电时为20尺），在第17等级时最多达到60尺（放电时为120尺）。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You send a surging current of electricity in front of you, shocking creatures in a line. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:20], with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. Choose one:

  • You become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged},
  • You discharge to increase the area to a @Template[type:line|distance:40] and the damage dice from d4s to @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[electricity]]{d8s}.

At 5th level, you can choose to increase the size of the line to a 30- foot line when you use Electric Surge, and every 4 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the line by 10 additional feet (20 feet when discharging), to a maximum of 60 feet (or 120 feet when discharging) at 17th level.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Ineluctable Flight.name: 不可抗拒的飞行 Ineluctable Flight
Ineluctable Flight.description:
当你收集并排列周遭的空气能量时，几乎没有什么能阻止你移动。选择一个你能看见且位于100尺内的位置。你乘风漂浮至该位置，无视困难地形、强效困难地形、有害地形，以及其他类似的地形效果。

由于你是在风中飞行，你可以移动到难以触及的位置，即使通常你无法步行到达。你无法穿过完全坚固的物体，但你可以像生物使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG]{Vapor Form} 那样穿过微小裂缝。你的移动不会触发任何反应动作或自由动作（即使是那些并非由移动触发的）。

你刷新你的力量。

As you gather and arrange the ambient air energy, almost nothing can stop you from moving. Choose a location you can see within 100 feet. You float on the winds to that location, ignoring difficult terrain, greater difficult terrain, hazardous terrain, and other similar terrain effects.

Since you're flying on the winds, you can move to locations that are hard to reach, even if you ordinarily couldn't walk to them. You can't move through completely solid objects, but you can fit through tiny cracks like a creature using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG]{Vapor Form}. Your movement doesn't trigger reactions or free actions of any kind (even those that aren't triggered by movement).

You Refresh your powers.

Smokescreen.name: 烟幕 Smokescreen
Smokescreen.description:
附近的火焰涌动并喷出大量烟雾，随着你刷新你的火焰。30尺内每个活跃的火焰（包括承受持续火焰伤害的生物）都会放出一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:5]的烟雾，持续到你下一个回合或下下个回合（由你选择），即使你的空间内没有火焰，你也可以选择放出烟雾。

烟雾内的所有生物都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，并且烟雾外的所有生物对于烟雾内的生物而言也处于隐蔽。你刷新你的力量。

Nearby fires surge and emit great volumes of smoke as you refresh your flame. Each active fire within 30 feet (including creatures with persistent fire damage) emits a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] of smoke until your choice of your next turn or your turn after next, and you can choose to emit the smoke even if you don't have a fire in your space.

All creatures within the smoke are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the smoke are concealed to creatures within it. You Refresh your powers.

Entangling Vines.name: 纠缠藤蔓 Entangling Vines
Entangling Vines.description:
你在一片广阔区域播撒藤蔓或收割作物以缠住你的敌人。

选择播撒或收割其一。

  • 播撒：你在一个爆发中进行播撒，半径至多30尺，中心点在120尺内。
  • 收割：你在一个爆发中进行收割，半径至多30尺，中心点在120尺内。处于被收割方格中的敌人必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物的速度在2轮内承受–10尺的环境减值，或直到其对抗你的力量DC成功脱逃（以先发生者为准）。

失败 该生物的速度在2轮内承受–20尺的环境减值，或直到其对抗你的力量DC成功脱逃（以先发生者为准）。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动} 且其速度承受–20尺的环境减值。两个效果均持续2轮，或直到其对抗你的力量DC成功脱逃（以先发生者为准）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4rXXLUOJT0Uv56B5]{效果：缠绕藤蔓}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.1aKKXwItzYgOTRuH]{效果：缠绕藤蔓（失败）}

You sow a wide area of vines or harvest to ensnare your foes.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in a burst with a radius up to 30 feet, centered within 120 feet.
  • Harvest: You harvest in a burst with a radius up to 30 feet, centered within 120 feet. Foes in a harvested square must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 2 rounds or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Failure The creature takes a –20-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 2 rounds or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and takes a –20-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds. Both effects last for 2 rounds or until it Escapes against your power DC, whichever comes first.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4rXXLUOJT0Uv56B5]{Effect: Entangling Vines}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.1aKKXwItzYgOTRuH]{Effect: Entangling Vines (Failure)}

Tempest.name: 暴风雨 Tempest
Tempest.description:
你召唤出一场锋利如剃刀的狂风风暴，吹扫整个区域，将你的敌人切碎。风暴充满以你为中心500尺内的一处 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]。进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的敌人会受到 @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d6[slashing]] 伤害；对你的敌人而言，在该区域内飞行视为困难地形；并且你的敌人的物理远程攻击若穿过该区域，其攻击掷骰会承受–2环境减值，除非他们使用异常巨大的投射物。风暴会持续直到你刷新。一个生物在其每个回合中只会从风暴获得一次挥砍伤害，即使它在该区域内开始其回合，然后又进入该区域。

等级 (+2) 伤害提高1d6。

You call forth a razor sharp tempest of wind that blows across the area, cutting your enemies apart. The tempest fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 500 feet of you. Foes that enter or start their turn in the area take @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d6[slashing]] damage, Flying in the area is difficult terrain for your foes, and your foes's physical ranged attacks that pass through the area take a –2 circumstance penalty to their attack rolls unless they use unusually massive projectiles. The tempest lasts until you refresh. A creature only takes slashing damage from Tempest once during each of its turns, even if it starts its turn in the area and then enters the area.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Spike Seeds.name: 尖刺种子 Spike Seeds
Spike Seeds.description:
你释放出一条带刺的尖刺种子之线来刺穿你的敌人。你对@Template[type:line|distance:30]中的所有生物造成@Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[piercing]]伤害，其效果取决于它们的@Check[reflex|against:eldamon]豁免。

在第3等级时，你可以在使用尖刺种子时选择将线的体型增加为@Template[type:line|distance:35]，此后每2个等级你都可以将线的体型再增加5英尺，在第19等级时最大为75英尺。

选择播种或收获。

  • 播种：尖刺种子长成植物。你在区域内的所有方格进行播种。
  • 收获：你收获区域内的植物，使其爆裂并喷射出大量尖刺种子。空间内有被收获植物的生物会承受等于2加上你等级的两倍的额外穿刺伤害。

大成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物承受一半伤害。

失败该生物承受全额伤害。

大失败该生物承受双倍伤害。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d4。

You release a line of spiky seeds to pierce your foes. You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d4[piercing]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:30], with effects depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] save.

At 3rd level, you can choose to increase the size of the line to a @Template[type:line|distance:35] when you use Spike Seeds, and every 2 levels thereafter you can increase the size of the line by 5 additional feet, to a maximum of 75 feet at 19th level.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: The spike seeds grow into plants. You sow in all squares in the area.
  • Harvest: You harvest plants in the area, causing them to explode with numerous spike seeds. Creatures with harvested plants in their space take additional piercing damage equal to 2 plus twice your level.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Shifting Ground.name: 变动大地 Shifting Ground
Shifting Ground.description:
需求 你正站在坚实的表面上。

你移动下方的地面，重新排列它以刷新你的大地力量，并让你的敌人失去平衡。你刷新你的力量。触及范围内、站在同一坚实表面上的敌人会根据其 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] 豁免而受到影响。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态，持续至你下个回合结束，或直到其使用一个动作来稳住脚步为止，以先发生者为准。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Requirements You are standing on a solid surface.

You shift the ground below, rearranging it to refresh your earth powers and throw your foes off-balance. You Refresh your powers. Foes within your reach that are standing on the same solid surface are affected depending on their @Check[reflex|against:eldamon] saves.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn or until it uses an action to stabilize its footing, whichever comes first.

Critical Failure The creature is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Elemental Frenzy.name: 元素狂乱 Elemental Frenzy
Elemental Frenzy.description:
你用元素能量向触及范围内的一切猛然挥击。对你触及范围内的每个敌人进行 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}。这些攻击的多重攻击减值仅在你完成全部攻击后才开始应用。

你造成 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[untyped]] 点与你的元素相关的类型的伤害，其效果取决于你的力量攻击掷骰结果。

大成功 元素能量压倒敌人，敌人受到双倍伤害。

成功 这次狂乱的攻击命中敌人，造成全额伤害。

失败 元素能量擦过敌人，敌人受到 @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[untyped]] 点伤害。

大失败 这次狂乱的元素攻击完全未命中敌人。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加 1d8，或在失败时增加 1 点。

You lash out with elemental energy at everything within reach. Make @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack rolls} at every foe in your reach. Apply your multiple attack penalty for these attacks only after completing all of them.

You deal @Damage[(1+@actor.level)d8[untyped]] damage of the type associated with your element, with effects depending on your power attack roll.

Critical Success The elemental energy overwhelms the foe, and the foe takes double damage.

Success The frenzied attack hits the foe for full damage.

Failure The elemental energy grazes the foe, and the foe takes @Damage[(1+@actor.level)[untyped]] damage.

Critical Failure The frenzied elemental attack misses the foe completely.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Predict Assaults.name: 预判突袭 Predict Assaults
Predict Assaults.description:
当你重构环绕你的精神能量时，你能读懂敌人在想什么，让你极其容易避开他们的攻击与爆炸。你刷新你的力量。然后你读取你60尺内所有敌人的战斗意图。

直到你下一次刷新为止，对这些敌人中的每一个而言，你要么在针对该敌人的第一次反射豁免上掷骰两次并取较高结果，要么该敌人在对你进行的第一次攻击掷骰上掷骰两次并取较低结果——对该敌人而言，两者中先发生的那个生效。若你掷骰两次并取较高结果，这是一个幸运效果；若你迫使敌人掷骰两次并取较低结果，这是一个厄运效果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.On9REqLmUydHRyBt]{效果: 预判攻击}

As you restructure the mental energies surrounding you, you get a read on what your foes are thinking, making it incredibly easy for you to avoid their attacks and blasts. You Refresh your powers. You then read the combat intentions of all foes within 60 feet of you.

Until the next time you Refresh, for each of those foes, you either roll twice and take the higher result on your first Reflex save against the foe or the foe rolls twice and takes the lower result on its first attack roll against you, whichever of the two comes first for that foe. If you roll twice and take the higher result, it's a fortune effect, and if you force the foe to roll twice and take the lower results, it's a misfortune effect.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.On9REqLmUydHRyBt]{Effect: Predict Assaults}

Cloak of Darkness.name: 黑暗斗篷 Cloak of Darkness
Cloak of Darkness.description:
你将自己笼罩在翻涌的黑暗斗篷中，对一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的生物造成伤害。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}直到你下个回合结束，并且该斗篷对区域内所有生物造成等同于@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+ceil(@actor.level/2))[cold]]的寒冷伤害，并允许进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true]强韧豁免。如果你在使用黑暗斗篷时已经处于笼罩的状态，你可以将该散发范围提升至最多30尺。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

等级（+2） 伤害增加1。

You shroud yourself in a billowing cloak of darkness, damaging creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]. You become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your next turn, and the cloak deals an amount of cold damage equal to @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4+ceil(@actor.level/2))[cold]] damage to all creatures in the area, with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save. If you were already shrouded when you use Cloak of Darkness, you can increase the emanation up to 30 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1.

Auto-Petrification.name: 自动石化 Auto-Petrification
Auto-Petrification.description:
你将自己变形为一尊硬度极高的石像，使自身与大地调谐，并刷新你的大地力量。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化} 状态，直到你下个回合开始为止，但你的硬度等于你等级的四倍，而非通常的硬度8。然而，由于你在石化时AC较低，敌人很可能对你造成重击。你刷新你的力量。

You transform yourself into a stone statue of the utmost hardness, attuning yourself with the earth and refreshing your earth powers. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} until the beginning of your next turn, except that your Hardness is equal to four times your level, instead of the ordinary Hardness of 8. However, due to your low AC while being petrified, foes are likely to critically hit you. You Refresh your powers.

Devour Flames.name: 吞噬火焰 Devour Flames
Devour Flames.description:
你张开嘴吸入附近的火焰，随着火焰在你周围盘旋，刷新你的火焰力量。你30尺内每个承受持续火焰伤害的敌人先承受该持续火焰伤害，然后立刻进行正常的纯骰检定以移除持续火焰伤害。

你30尺内每个其他承受持续火焰伤害的生物不承受伤害，并立刻以因特别有效的协助而降低后的DC进行纯骰检定，以移除持续火焰伤害。你刷新你的力量。

You open your mouth and draw in nearby flames, refreshing your firepower as the flames swirl around you. Each foe within 30 feet of you suffering from persistent fire damage takes the persistent fire damage and then immediately attempts the normal flat check to remove the persistent fire damage.

Each other creature within 30 feet of you suffering from persistent fire damage takes no damage and immediately attempts a flat check to remove the persistent fire damage with the reduced DC from especially effective assistance. You Refresh your powers.

Drifting Slash.name: 漂移斩击 Drifting Slash
Drifting Slash.description:
你借着风向前飘移，沿途劈砍敌人。你移动一次，在你的移动过程中任意时点对触及内的一名敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击}检定，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] 伤害，结果取决于你的力量攻击掷骰。此移动不会触发基于移动的反应动作，例如反射打击。

大成功 你造成双倍挥砍伤害。

成功 你造成正常挥砍伤害。

失败 你的劈砍未命中，但附近的空气气流擦过目标，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[slashing]] 伤害。

大失败 劈砍完全落空，且目标不受伤害。

等级（+1） 伤害提高 1d8，或在失败时提高 1 点。

You drift forward on the wind, slashing through a foe as you go. Stride once, making a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack} against a foe within reach at any point of your movement, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[slashing]] damage, with results depending on your power attack roll. This movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement, such as Reactive Strike.

Critical Success You deal double slashing damage.

Success You deal normal slashing damage.

Failure Your slash misses, but the nearby air current grazes the target, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[slashing]] damage.

Critical Failure The slash misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Dazzling Double.name: 炫目双击 Dazzling Double
Dazzling Double.description:
你用光形成一个分身，帮助你安排你的光力量并保护你免受伤害。你刷新你的力量。一个光的分身出现，持续到你下个回合开始或直到它被摧毁。任何本应命中你的攻击都有随机几率命中你的分身；几率为二分之一（1d6 掷骰结果为 1–3）。

一旦你的分身被命中，它就会被摧毁。如果一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但未大成功或大失败，它会摧毁分身但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常会在失败时产生效果）。如果一次攻击掷骰为大成功或大失败且本应命中分身，则分身被摧毁，且该次攻击掷骰对你变为成功。摧毁分身的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 2 轮。

You form a duplicate out of light that helps you arrange your light power and protects you from harm. You Refresh your powers. A duplicate of light appears, lasting until the beginning of your next turn or until it's destroyed. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting your duplicate; the chances are 1 in 2 (1–3 on 1d6).

Once your duplicate is hit, it's destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys the duplicate but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit the duplicate, the duplicate is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. A creature that destroys the duplicate is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 2 rounds.

Intensify Cold.name: 强化寒冷 Intensify Cold
Intensify Cold.description:
你将自己与周围的寒冷空气以及你所冰冷的冻结敌人连接在一起。所有30尺内因你的冰力量而具有冻结状态的敌人必须成功通过一次对抗你的力量DC的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免，否则其冻结状态增加3；若成功则增加1；若大成功或大失败则增加0。区域内未冻结的敌人，若位于你或任一冻结敌人10尺内，则必须成功通过一次对抗你的力量DC的强韧豁免，否则变为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结 1}。你刷新你的力量。

You connect yourself into the cold air around you and the frozen foes you've chilled. All foes within 30 feet with the frozen condition from your ice powers must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save against your power DC or increase their frozen condition by 3, or 1 on a success, and 0 on a critical success. Unfrozen foes in the area that are within 10 feet of either you or a frozen foe must succeed at a Fortitude save against your power DC or become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen 1}. You Refresh your powers.

Become the Shadow.name: 化身阴影 Become the Shadow
Become the Shadow.description:
你与黑暗与阴影合而为一，重新排列它们以刷新你的黑暗力量。你刷新你的力量。然后你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 3}，直到你下个回合结束。

You become one with the darkness and shadows, rearranging them to refresh your darkness powers. You Refresh your powers. Then you become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 3} until the end of your next turn.

Elemental Cover.name: 元素掩蔽 Elemental Cover
Elemental Cover.description:
你迅速用你元素的能量形成一道半实体的屏障。该屏障最长20尺、最高5尺，且至少有一个方格位于你30尺内。由于该屏障为半实体，生物与攻击可以穿过它，但在这样做时会受到阻碍。

穿越该屏障视为困难地形，且该屏障为中型或更小体型的生物提供标准掩蔽，并为大型生物提供较小掩蔽。生物可以如常在屏障后方@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩蔽}。如果你的元素是无形的，例如心智、生命或时代，你可以描述你的元素能量如何提供掩蔽；例如，也许时代元素的能量会扰乱攻击的时机。该屏障持续到你刷新为止。

You quickly form a quasi corporeal barrier out of your element's energies. The barrier is up to 20 feet long and up to 5 feet high, with at least one square within 30 feet of you. As the barrier is quasi corporeal, creatures and attacks can pass through, but they're impeded when they do so.

Crossing the barrier is difficult terrain, and the barrier provides standard cover to Medium or smaller creatures and lesser cover to Large creatures. Creatures can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} behind the barrier as normal. If your element is intangible, like mind, life, or time, you can describe how your element's energies provide cover; for instance, perhaps time elemental energy throws off the timing of attacks. The barrier lasts until you Refresh.

Relentless Drench.name: 无情浸湿 Relentless Drench
Relentless Drench.description:
你将120英尺内的一名敌人浇得透湿，使其被水浸泡至笨拙且迟缓。他们承受 @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4)[钝击]] 伤害，其效果取决于他们的 @Check[强韧|against:eldamon] 豁免。

高潮：伤害变为 @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d8)[钝击]|options:high-tide-power] 伤害，但水也会浇湿你，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙2}，持续至你下个回合结束。

低潮：浇湿敌人的水会帮助你采取行动。你的下个回合，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，并可用该额外动作来跨步、疾行、打击、游泳（若你具有游泳速度），或若你拥有元素护盾则使用它。

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人承受一半伤害，你将其移动5英尺，且其获得笨拙2，持续至你下个回合结束。

失败 敌人承受全额伤害，你将其移动10英尺，且其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓1}，持续1轮；笨拙2持续至你下个回合结束；并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}，持续至你刷新。

大失败 敌人承受双倍伤害，你将其移动20英尺，且其获得迟缓1持续1轮，笨拙2持续至你下个回合结束，并获得笨拙1持续1分钟。

等级 (+1) 伤害增加1d4，或在高潮时增加1d8。

You drench a foe within 120 feet, waterlogging them until they are clumsy and slow. They take @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d4)[bludgeoning]] damage, with effects depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.
