High Tide: The damage is @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d8)[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage, but the water drenches you too and you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} until the end of your next turn.

Low Tide: The waters that drench your foe help you take action. On your next turn, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} and can use the additional action to Step, Stride, Strike, Swim (if you have a swim Speed), or use Elemental Shield if you have it.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage, you move them 5 feet, and they are clumsy 2 until the end of your next turn.

Failure The foe takes full damage, you move them 10 feet, and they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round, clumsy 2 until the end of your next turn and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until you refresh.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage, you move them 20 feet, and they are slowed 1 for 1 round, clumsy 2 until the end of your next turn, and clumsy 1 for 1 minute.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d4, or 1d8 on high tide.

Reborn in Flames.name: 烈焰重生 Reborn in Flames
Reborn in Flames.description:
火焰吞噬你，而你从其中现身，获得净化，内在之火被刷新。当你蜕去外在形态时，你终止自己身上的所有持续伤害，尝试以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} 脱离使你获得被擒或禁足（状态）的效果，尝试针对恶心（状态）进行一次豁免，并尝试针对任何当前影响你的毒素进行一次豁免。

若你在“浴火重生”的任何毒素豁免中掷出失败或大成功或大失败，则你不会令毒素进展，且不再承受任何进一步效果。你刷新你的力量。

Flames consume you and you emerge from within them cleansed and with your inner fire refreshed. As you slough off your outer form, you end all persistent damage on yourself, attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} from effects giving you the grabbed or immobilized condition, attempt a saving throw against the sickened condition, and attempt a saving throw against any poisons currently affecting you.

If you roll a failure or critical failure on any poison saves from Reborn in Flames, instead of progressing the poison, you don't take any further effect. You Refresh your powers.

Rime Nexus.name: 霜华枢纽 Rime Nexus
Rime Nexus.description:
当你重新描绘并刷新冰元素能量的纹路时，寒冷的冰与雪花图案的冻结分形在地面上蔓延，使你30尺内的地面（@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]）成为困难地形，持续至你选择的你下个回合开始，或再下一个回合开始。你刷新你的力量。

As you redraw and refresh patterns of ice elemental energy, frozen fractals of chill ice and snowflake patterns spread across the ground, making the ground within 30 feet of you (@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]) difficult terrain until your choice of the beginning of your next turn, or the beginning of your turn after that. You Refresh your powers.

Reap Lives.name: 收割生命 Reap Lives
Reap Lives.description:
你将徘徊在死亡边缘的生命熄灭，同时刷新你的死亡力量。每个处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet}内的敌人受到等同于你等级一半（最低1）的@Damage[(max(1,floor(@actor.level/2)))[void]]{虚空伤害}，然后他们可能会死亡，这取决于他们的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免。

如果这击杀了任何敌人，或者如果区域内有敌人在你上一回合开始后死亡（通常是因为你用你之前的死亡力量杀死了他们），你在察觉检定、豁免和技能检定上获得+1状态加值，持续到你下一回合结束。无论如何，你都会刷新你的力量。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.aBgD16MCKAhuBf09]{效果：收割生命}

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到全额伤害。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害。在结算伤害后，如果敌人剩余1点生命值，则其被降低至0点生命值。

大失败 同失败，但敌人受到双倍伤害而非全额伤害。

You snuff out lives on the brink of death as you refresh your death powers. Each foe within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} takes @Damage[(max(1,floor(@actor.level/2)))[void]]{void damage} equal to half your level (minimum 1), and then they might die, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

If this kills any foes, or if there are foes in the area who died since the beginning of your last turn (typically because you killed them with your previous death power), you gain a +1 status bonus on Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of your next turn. Either way, you Refresh your powers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.aBgD16MCKAhuBf09]{Effect: Reap Lives}

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes full damage.

Failure The foe takes full damage. After applying the damage, if the foe has 1 Hit Points, it is reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Critical Failure As failure, but the foe takes double damage instead of full damage.

Piercing Branch.name: 穿刺树枝 Piercing Branch
Piercing Branch.description:
你从身体或附近的植物中伸出一根树枝，如同一根桩般刺穿你的敌人。对一名在你触及范围内的敌人进行一次 @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{近战力量攻击掷骰}，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[piercing]] 伤害。

选择播种或收割其一。

  • 播种：你在你的目标的方格内或与目标相邻的一个方格内播种。
  • 收割：你将30英尺内的一处空间收割到你用于攻击的树枝中。你对位于被收割空间内或与被收割空间相邻的敌人进行该次近战攻击，而非对你触及范围内的目标进行。

大成功你造成双倍穿刺伤害。

成功你造成正常穿刺伤害。

失败你仅擦过目标，造成 @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[piercing]] 伤害。

大失败你的树枝完全落空，且目标毫发无伤。

等级（+1）伤害增加1d8，或在失败时增加1。

You extend a branch from your body or a nearby plant like a stake to impale your foe. Make a @Check[type:eldamon-power-attack|defense:ac]{melee power attack roll} against a foe within your reach, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)d8[piercing]] damage.

Choose to either sow or harvest.

  • Sow: You sow in your target's square or a square adjacent to the target.
  • Harvest: You harvest a space within 30 feet into the branch you use to attack. You make the melee attack against a foe in the harvested space or adjacent to the harvested space, instead of a target within your reach.

Critical Success You deal double piercing damage.

Success You deal normal piercing damage.

Failure You only graze the target, dealing @Damage[(2+@actor.level)[piercing]] damage.

Critical Failure Your branch misses completely, and the target is unharmed.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d8, or 1 on a failure.

Cloudburst.name: 云爆 Cloudburst
Cloudburst.description:
你在极远处召唤一场巨大的暴雨云，骤然倾泻的水落下。暴雨云在500英尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:30]中重击你的敌人，对区域内每个敌人造成@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d6)[钝击]]伤害，具体取决于他们的@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon]豁免。

高潮：伤害变为@Damage[((1+@actor.level)d10)[钝击]|options:high-tide-power]伤害，但涌入暴雨云的水流猛然冲击，使你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

低潮：暴雨云的水流向你涌来，使你对敌人而言处于隐蔽状态。直到你下个回合结束前，你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

大成功敌人不受影响。

成功敌人受到一半伤害，你将其移动5英尺。

失败敌人受到全额伤害，你将其移动10英尺。

大失败敌人受到双倍伤害，你将其移动20英尺。

等级 (+1)伤害增加1d6，或在高潮时增加1d10。

You call forth an enormous cloudburst, a sudden downpour of water, at a great range. The cloudburst pounds your foes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] within 500 feet, dealing @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d6)[bludgeoning]] damage to each foe in the area, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save.

High Tide: The damage is @Damage[((1+@actor.level)d10)[bludgeoning]|options:high-tide-power] damage but the sudden rush of water into the cloudburst knocks you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Low Tide: The cloudburst's water rushing toward you conceals you from foes. You're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe takes half damage and you move them 5 feet.

Failure The foe takes full damage and you move them 10 feet.

Critical Failure The foe takes double damage and you move them 20 feet.

Level (+1) The damage increases by 1d6, or 1d10 in high tide.
